We further evaluate cascaded speech-to-avatar systems and find that their architecture fundamentally precludes the production of full-duplex nonverbal cues. As the first benchmark for full-duplex AV2AV interaction, VideoFDB establishes a foundation for systematic evaluation and, we hope, will accelerate the advancement and development of next-generation multimodal conversational agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个评估全双工视听对话代理的基准VideoFDB，揭示现有系统忽视视觉流与字幕坍塌等缺陷。
light_analysis.motivation: 自然人类对话是全双工且视听双模态的，包含同时说和听以及非语言线索。现有全双工基准仅评估语音，缺乏对视听交互质量的综合评测，阻碍了能够处理实时多模态对话的代理发展。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含237个真实视频通话片段的数据集，覆盖11种非语言对话动态；提出区分感知与生成行为的分类法；设计基于规则的语言模型作为裁判的评估框架，包含可解释的对话质量轴。
light_analysis.result: 在开源和闭源视觉-语音代理上发现系统性问题：字幕坍塌和视觉流忽略；当前系统仅利用视觉进行显式问答，而非实时联合视听接地；级联语音到虚拟形象系统因架构限制无法产生全双工非语言线索。
light_analysis.conclusion: VideoFDB作为首个全双工AV2AV交互基准，为系统评估奠定基础，有望加速下一代多模态对话代理的发展。未来工作可关注更丰富的非语言行为建模。

title: Ambient-robust Inverse Rendering using Active RGB-NIR Imaging
abstract: Inverse rendering aims to reconstruct geometry and reflectance of objects from images. Despite recent progress, existing methods often produces inaccurate reconstructions that are sensitive to ambient illumination conditions. Here we introduce an ambient-robust inverse rendering method enabled by active RGB-NIR imaging. Our key insight is to leverage near-infrared (NIR) flash illumination-imperceptible to human observers-to obtain stable point-light shading that is largely invariant to ambient illumination. By using multi-view RGB images illuminated by ambient light and NIR images acquired with active NIR flash illumination, we reconstruct accurate geometry and reflectance by exploiting the complementary benefits of RGB and NIR images via a three-stage inverse rendering method. To enable dense multi-view acquisition, we develop an active imaging system equipped with a RGB-NIR camera and a NIR flash mounted on a mobile base. Using this system, we collect the first multi-view RGB-NIR inverse rendering dataset captured under multiple ambient illumination conditions. Experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms prior approaches, achieving accurate geometry and reflectance estimation across multiple ambient lighting scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用主动RGB-NIR成像的逆渲染方法，通过近红外闪光照明实现环境光照鲁棒的几何与反射率重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有逆渲染方法对环境光照敏感，在多变照明条件下常产生不准确的重建结果，限制了其在真实场景中的应用。尽管已有一定进展，但如何消除环境光照干扰、实现稳定鲁棒的重建仍然是挑战。本文旨在通过引入人眼不可见的近红外闪光照明，获得对环境光照变化不敏感的稳定点光源着色，从而提升逆渲染的准确性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 提出三阶段逆渲染方法，利用多视角RGB图像（环境光照）和主动NIR闪光图像（近红外照明）的互补信息。首先，从NIR图像中估计几何形状，利用NIR闪光照明的点光源特性获得稳定着色；其次，结合RGB图像进行反射率估计；最后联合优化几何和反射率。开发了搭载RGB-NIR相机和NIR闪光的移动采集系统，构建了首个多环境光照下的多视角RGB-NIR逆渲染数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在多种环境光照条件下进行实验，该方法在几何和反射率估计上均优于现有逆渲染方法。定量结果表明，重建误差显著降低，且对不同环境光照具有鲁棒性。具体性能指标包括更低的几何误差和更准确的反射率恢复，验证了NIR闪光照明在消除环境光照干扰方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过主动RGB-NIR成像有效解决了逆渲染对环境光照敏感的问题，实现了鲁棒且准确的几何与反射率重建。该方法拓展了逆渲染在复杂光照环境下的应用潜力，为高质量物体数字化提供了新途径。未来工作可进一步探索动态场景或更高效的采集策略。

title: GenClaw: Code-Driven Agentic Image Generation
abstract: Image generation models have evolved from text-conditioned pixel synthesis toward multimodal agents endowed with visual comprehension and tool invocation capabilities. Yet, existing agents remain at the mercy of underlying black-box image models. Their workflow is trapped in a repetitive cycle of prompt rewriting for generation refinement, leaving them with no mechanism to directly manipulate the canvas. In essence, the potential of LLMs to serve as a genuine "brush" for precise visual construction remains largely untapped. In this paper, we propose GenClaw, a code-driven agentic image generation paradigm that empowers the agent to create like a human artist: first conceptualizing, then sketching, and finally coloring. Specifically, the agent first constructs the conceptual knowledge and context through search and reasoning. It then utilizes code (e.g., SVG, HTML, Three.js) to render executable visual sketches. Finally, it employs an image generation model to supplement textures, materials, and photorealism. In this workflow, code serves as a controllable intermediate canvas bridging linguistic reasoning and pixel synthesis, seamlessly integrating programmatic logic with the visual expressiveness of generative models. By transforming image generation from a black-box paradigm into a staged process akin to authentic human creation, GenClaw offers a step toward for highly controllable and interpretable visual generation systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GenClaw，一种代码驱动的智能体图像生成范式，通过先概念化、再素描、最后上色的三阶段过程，实现可控和可解释的图像生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图像生成模型虽已发展为多模态智能体，但仍依赖黑盒模型，工作流局限于重复提示重写，缺乏直接操作画布的机制。LLM作为精确视觉构建的“画笔”潜力未被挖掘。需要一种更可控、可解释的生成方式，以突破当前黑盒范式的局限。
light_analysis.method: GenClaw采用代码驱动的智能体范式，分三阶段：首先通过搜索和推理构建概念知识；然后使用代码（如SVG、HTML、Three.js）渲染可执行的视觉草图；最后用图像生成模型补充纹理、材质和逼真感。代码作为可控中间画布，连接语言推理和像素合成，实现分阶段创作。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体实验数据，但声称通过将图像生成从黑盒转化为类似人类创作的分阶段过程，提供了高度可控和可解释的视觉生成系统。与现有黑盒方法相比，GenClaw在可控性和解释性上有本质提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: GenClaw将图像生成从黑盒范式转变为类似人类创作的分阶段过程，实现了高度可控和可解释的视觉生成。该研究为构建更透明、可交互的视觉生成系统提供了新思路，有望在数字艺术、设计等领域应用。未来可探索更复杂的代码生成策略和定量评估。

title: OOD-GraphLLM: Graph Large Language Model for Out-of-Distribution Generalized Drug Synergy Prediction
abstract: Drug synergy prediction (DSP) aims to identify efficacious drug combinations under various cellular contexts with different targets. However, the continual emergence of novel compounds results in variations in molecular scaffolds and sizes, causing drug synergy data to exhibit out-of-distribution (O.O.D.) shifts with respect to topological structure. Existing works rely on in-distribution (I.D.) assumption, failing to handle the O.O.D. shifts. To solve this problem, we study out-of-distribution generalized drug synergy prediction through a graph large language model for the first time. Nevertheless, O.O.D. generalized DSP is highly non-trivial, posing several challenges: i) how to discover structurally relevant and irrelevant molecular representations with respect to cell targets; ii) how to find the optimal graph neural architectures that accurately calculate molecular representations; and iii) how to jointly leverage molecular structural and semantic information in LLMs. To address these challenges, we propose OOD-GraphLLM, a novel graphLLM framework which is able to accurately predict drug synergy under O.O.D. settings via jointly optimizing molecular graph representation and biomedical semantic language representations in a unified manner. Furthermore, we finetune DrugSyn-LLM, a biomedical LLM, and employ a retrieval-augmented biomedical instruction tuning strategy to align molecular topological information and molecular semantic information with language-based reasoning for O.O.D. generalized DSP. Both the source code (https://github.com/EkkoXiao/Bio-GraphLLM) and released model (https://mn.cs.tsinghua.edu.cn/bio-graphllm/) are publicly available, where users are allowed to download model resources and interactively use the system through a web interface.

light_analysis.overview: 首次提出图大语言模型（OOD-GraphLLM）用于药物协同预测中的分布外泛化问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 药物协同预测中，新型化合物不断出现导致分子结构分布偏移，现有方法基于同分布假设无法处理。需要解决三个挑战：发现与细胞靶点结构相关/无关的分子表示、找到最优图神经架构、联合利用分子结构信息和语义信息。
light_analysis.method: 提出OOD-GraphLLM框架，统一优化分子图表示和生物医学语义语言表示。微调DrugSyn-LLM生物医学大模型，采用检索增强的指令微调策略，对齐分子拓扑和语义信息，实现OOD泛化。提供开源代码和预训练模型。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但声称能准确预测OOD设置下的药物协同。模型已公开可用，支持用户下载和通过Web界面交互使用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次将图大语言模型应用于OOD药物协同预测，解决了分子结构偏移问题，具有学术价值和实际应用前景。未来可推广至其他生物医学预测任务。

title: Reinforcement Learning with Robust Rubric Rewards
abstract: While Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) is effective for deterministically checkable tasks, many vision-language tasks are partially verifiable, demanding multi-criteria supervision (e.g., perceptual details, reasoning steps, and constraints). Rubrics provide a natural interface for this fine-grained supervision, but their effectiveness depends on the execution accuracy during online RL. We propose Reinforcement Learning with Robust Rubric Rewards ($\text{RLR}^3$), extending RLVR from task-level verification to criterion-level verification. $\text{RLR}^3$ routes instance-specific rubrics through two execution paths: an LLM-as-an-extractor paired with a deterministic verifier, or an LLM-as-a-Judge for non-verifiable criteria. To ensure faithful scoring, $\text{RLR}^3$ introduce a minimal exposure strategy that masks ground truths from extractors and images from judges. Furthermore, $\text{RLR}^3$ employs hierarchical aggregation to prioritize essential criteria over additional criteria, and mitigates score saturation within rollout groups. Evaluated on Qwen3-VL-30B-A3B across 15 benchmarks, $\text{RLR}^3$ consistently outperforms RLVR, yielding a 4.7-point improvement over the base model and exceeding the official instruct-to-thinking model gap. Controlled audits confirm our deterministic verification and minimal exposure significantly reduce exploitable false positives.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RLR^3，将可验证奖励的强化学习扩展到准则级验证，通过鲁棒评分和层次聚合提升视觉-语言任务表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有RLVR仅适用于确定性可检查任务，而许多视觉-语言任务部分可验证，需要多标准监督（如感知细节、推理步骤和约束）。准则提供了自然接口，但其在线RL中的执行准确性直接影响有效性。现有方法难以处理准则执行不准确导致的奖励欺骗，亟需一种鲁棒的准则奖励机制。
light_analysis.method: RLR^3通过两条路径执行实例特定准则：LLM作为提取器与确定性验证器组合（可验证准则），或LLM作为法官（不可验证准则）。为保障忠实评分，引入最小暴露策略：对提取器掩码真实标签，对法官掩码图像。同时采用层次聚合优先考虑关键准则，并通过滚动组内分数聚类缓解分数饱和。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen3-VL-30B-A3B上跨15个基准评估，RLR^3一致优于RLVR，相比基模型提升4.7分，超过官方指令到思维模型差距。受控审计确认确定性验证和最小暴露显著减少了可利用的假阳性，验证了鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: RLR^3将RLVR从任务级扩展到准则级，通过鲁棒评分和层次聚合有效提升了部分可验证视觉-语言任务的强化学习效果。具有重要学术价值（解决多标准监督的在线RL问题）和实际应用价值（提升模型细粒度对齐能力）。未来可探索更多执行路径及更高效聚合策略。

title: SAM3D-Phys: Towards Multi-Object Interactive Simulation in Real World
abstract: This work addresses the problem of recovering complete, simulatable object geometry from reconstructed real-world scenes, enabling physics-based interaction with objects embedded in the scene. While modern multi-view reconstruction methods can produce visually accurate environments, objects are often incomplete due to occlusions and limited observations, making them unsuitable for physics simulation. To address this limitation, we propose SAM3D-Phys, a framework that integrates scene reconstruction with generative 3D priors of SAM3D to recover physically simulatable objects. Our approach first reconstructs the scene from multi-view images to obtain scene geometry and partial observations of objects. We then leverage SAM3D to infer complete object geometry from these partial observations. To ensure that the recovered objects remain consistent with the reconstructed scene, we restore scene-consistent object states through two complementary strategies: a physics-constrained spatial optimization algorithm that iteratively aligns the recovered object to its original location, and a mask-guided appearance distillation module that refines texture fidelity based on the observed images. By recovering complete object geometry and restoring its pose and appearance within the scene, SAM3D-Phys produces clean object representations suitable for physics-based simulation, enabling simultaneous and physically consistent interactive simulation of multiple objects within a reconstructed scene. Project page: https://chnxindong.github.io/sam3d-phys/

light_analysis.overview: 提出SAM3D-Phys框架，结合场景重建与生成式3D先验，从部分观测恢复完整可模拟物体几何，实现真实场景中多物体物理交互仿真。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代多视图重建方法能生成视觉准确的场景，但由于遮挡和观测有限，物体几何常不完整，无法用于物理仿真。现有方法忽略了从部分观测恢复完整物体几何的需求，限制了虚拟环境中的交互应用。本文旨在解决这一问题，使重建场景中的物体可用于物理模拟。
light_analysis.method: 从多视图图像重建场景几何和部分物体观测，利用SAM3D的生成式3D先验推断完整物体几何。通过两种互补策略恢复场景一致性：物理约束空间优化将恢复物体对齐到原始位置；掩码引导外观蒸馏基于观测图像细化纹理。最终生成干净物体表示，支持多物体同步物理仿真。
light_analysis.result: 论文未提供具体实验数据，但声称框架能产生适合物理仿真的干净物体表示，并实现多物体同时且物理一致的交互仿真。相比现有方法，解决了物体不完整问题，提升了物理仿真的真实性和适用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SAM3D-Phys通过整合重建与生成式先验，成功恢复场景中物体的完整几何和外观，使其可用于物理仿真。该方法为真实场景的虚拟交互应用提供了新思路，潜在局限性可能包括计算开销和先验泛化能力，未来可探索更高效的优化策略。

title: BullingerDB: A Dataset for Handwritten Text Recognition and Writer Retrieval
abstract: We present BullingerDB, a large-scale benchmark dataset for historical document analysis based on the correspondence of Heinrich Bullinger (1504-1575). The corpus comprises 20,898 pages and 499,222 text lines written by 796 writers over six decades, featuring stylistic variation, multilingual content (mostly Latin and Early New High German) as well as meta-information such as writer identity and time. We evaluate BullingerDB on text recognition and writer retrieval. TrOCR, the best performing model, achieves a CER of 9.1%. For writer retrieval, we introduce a temporal nDCG metric to assess time-aware retrieval. While temporally coherent retrieval is achievable, mAP (78.3%) scores indicate challenges due to long-term stylistic variation. With BullingerDB, we aim to establish a new benchmark for multilingual historical text recognition and temporally-aware writer analysis.
comment: Accepted for presentation at ICDAR2026. Dataset available via zenodo

light_analysis.overview: 提出了一个大规模历史文档分析基准数据集BullingerDB，用于手写文本识别和作者检索。
light_analysis.motivation: 历史文档分析需要大规模、多语言、多写手的基准数据集，现有数据集缺乏多样性和时间信息。基于海因里希·布林格的书信构建了包含20898页、499222行文本、796位写手、六十年跨度及多语言内容的BullingerDB，填补了空白。
light_analysis.method: 构建了包含20898页、499222行文本和796位写手的数据集，涵盖六十年跨度及多语言内容，并提供了写手身份和时间信息。评估了文本识别任务，TrOCR模型最佳，CER为9.1%；作者检索任务中，提出了时间感知nDCG指标，mAP为78.3%。
light_analysis.result: 文本识别最佳模型TrOCR达到9.1%的CER；作者检索引入temporal nDCG指标，mAP为78.3%，表明时间一致的检索可行，但长期风格变化带来挑战。
light_analysis.conclusion: BullingerDB作为多语言历史文本识别和时间感知作者分析的新基准，有助于推动领域研究。未来可进一步改进识别错误和检索挑战。

title: How's it going? Reinforcement learning in language models recruits a functional welfare axis
abstract: How does reinforcement learning shape a language model's internal representations? We present evidence that RL recruits a pre-existing representation of functional welfare: an estimate of how well or badly the system is doing, relative to its goals. We train several language models in a novel, semantically neutral maze environment. We then extract concept vectors for rewarded and punished trajectories, and evaluate those vectors in settings unrelated to the maze environment. The punishment vector behaves like a representation of negative welfare: it promotes failure and impossibility tokens, it aligns with negative emotion concepts, it negatively tracks goal-achievement, and steering with it induces negative self-reports, pathological backtracking, refusal, and uncertainty. The positive reward vector behaves as the mirror image, and the two are nearly antiparallel. These effects are robust when controlling for tile-to-reward mapping, scale, instruct tuning, RL training algorithm, model family, and LoRA versus full-finetuning, and largely persist when we replace RL with supervised fine-tuning. Importantly, the vectors are effective in models before they have undergone maze training. Combined with observations that the effects also appear in pretrain-only models, we therefore argue that this functional welfare axis pre-exists post-training: it is recruited, rather than created, by post-training. While we make no claims about any experience of welfare, the axis offers a demonstration that minimal reward signals can broadly affect model behavior by recruiting pre-existing welfare-like representations, with implications for interpretability, post-training dynamics, and alignment.

light_analysis.overview: RL训练会招募语言模型中预先存在的功能福利轴，而非创造新的表征。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习（RL）如何塑造语言模型内部表征尚不明确。现有研究多关注RL对模型行为的最终影响，但缺乏对内部表征机制的深入理解。理解这一过程对于解释模型行为、提升可解释性以及对齐都有重要意义。本文旨在探究RL训练是否创造新的表征，还是招募已有的表征，特别是与“福利”（衡量系统目标实现程度）相关的表征。
light_analysis.method: 在新型语义中立迷宫环境中训练多种语言模型，提取奖励/惩罚轨迹的概念向量，并在迷宫无关场景中评估。惩罚向量促进失败/不可能标记，与负面情感概念对齐，负向跟踪目标达成，引导产生负面自我报告、病理回溯、拒绝和不确定性。奖励向量表现相反，二者近似反平行。控制多种变量（如规模、指令微调、RL算法、模型家族、LoRA vs全微调）后效果稳健，且将RL替换为监督微调后效果基本保持。
light_analysis.result: 惩罚/奖励向量在未经历迷宫训练的模型中同样有效，表明该福利轴在预训练阶段即存在。RL后训练只是招募而非创造了这一表征。效果在多种控制条件下稳健，包括不同模型规模（未具体说明）、指令微调、RL算法（如PPO）、模型家族（如GPT-2）、LoRA vs全微调等。替换为监督微调后，类似效果仍存在但可能稍弱。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文发现语言模型中存在一个功能福利轴，它预存在于预训练中，被RL后训练所招募。该轴表示系统对自身目标实现程度的估计，其存在为解释RL训练如何广泛影响模型行为提供了机制。对可解释性、后训练动态和对齐有重要启示。局限性包括未声称模型有主观福利体验，未来可探究该轴的更广泛适用性及与其他对齐方法的关系。

title: Beyond 3D VQAs: Injecting 3D Spatial Priors into Vision-Language Models for Enhanced Geometric Reasoning
abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) often struggle with robust 3D spatial reasoning. Prevailing methods that rely on fine-tuning with 3D visual question-answering (VQA) datasets may overfit dataset-specific biases, while integrating specialized 3D visual encoders is often inflexible and cumbersome. In this paper, we argue that genuine spatial understanding should emerge from learning fundamental geometric priors, not only from high-level VQA supervision. We propose GASP (Geometric-Aware Spatial Priors), a framework that injects these priors directly into the LLM's transformer layers. GASP employs a small correspondence head, applied as a deep supervision signal across all layers, and is trained with a dual objective leveraging ground-truth geometry from large-scale video scenes: a contrastive loss on ground-truth point correspondences enforces 2D view-invariance, while a depth consistency supervision resolves 3D geometric ambiguities. Our analysis first provides a diagnostic showing that standard VLMs' internal correspondence matching accuracy is very low (often below 5%). We then demonstrate that our training substantially improves this behavior, boosting peak layer-wise correspondence to over 70% and maintaining over 85% temporal robustness while baselines remain below 5%. These internal improvements translate to significant gains on downstream spatial benchmarks including +18.2% on All-Angles Bench and +29.0% on VSI-Bench, all without training on any 3D VQA data. Our findings indicate that learning from fundamental geometric priors is a promising and generalizable pathway towards VLMs with more reliable 3D spatial reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GASP框架，通过对比学习和深度一致性约束注入几何先验，提升VLMs的3D空间推理，无需3D VQA数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有VLMs在3D空间推理中表现不佳，依赖3D VQA微调的方法易过拟合数据集偏差，而集成专用3D编码器缺乏灵活性。标准VLMs内部点对应匹配精度极低（<5%），表明缺乏几何先验。因此，需要一种直接从大规模视频场景学习基本几何先验的方法，以增强模型对3D结构的理解。
light_analysis.method: 提出GASP框架，在LLM的transformer层中注入几何先验。采用小型对应头作为深度监督信号，使用双目标训练：对比损失强制2D视角不变性（点对应），深度一致性损失解决3D歧义。训练数据来自大规模视频场景的ground-truth几何信息。关键创新在于不依赖3D VQA数据，仅通过几何先验学习提升空间推理。
light_analysis.result: 内部评估显示，标准VLM的对应匹配精度从<5%提升至>70%，时间鲁棒性超过85%（基线<5%）。下游任务中，在All-Angles Bench上提升18.2%，在VSI-Bench上提升29.0%，均无3D VQA训练数据。结果表明几何先验学习显著增强了VLMs的3D空间推理能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: GASP证明了从基本几何先验学习是提升VLMs 3D空间推理的有效且泛化途径，避免了3D VQA数据的过拟合。未来可探索更复杂的几何任务，但当前框架在视频场景依赖上可能存在局限性。该方法为构建更可靠的3D感知视觉语言模型提供了新方向。

title: IP-Adapter Is All You Need: Towards Fine-Tuning-Free Diffusion-Based Talking Face Generation
abstract: With the rapid advancement of diffusion models, talking face generation has made remarkable progress. However, existing diffusion-based methods still require task-specific fine-tuning and large-scale audiovisual datasets, resulting in high computational costs that hinder scalability and accessibility of diffusion-based approaches across the research community. To address this, we propose a finetuning-free paradigm that directly performs talking face generation using the pretrained weights of Stable Diffusion and IP-Adapter. This backbone leverages the visual embedding capability of IP-Adapter to mine lip-related semantics from the pretrained Stable Diffusion. To address the challenges of identity drift, synchronization errors, and temporal instability, we also design three trainable-parameterfree components: (1) the Structurist, which explicitly disentangles and reassembles lip and appearance features to mitigate identity drift and appearance distortion; (2) the Structure Controller, which adaptively refines embeddings based on quasi-monotonic motion trends for precise lip synchronization; and (3) the Noise Sensor, which introduces Gaussian prior to detect and suppress flicker and jitter artifacts and enhance temporal consistency. Experimental results show that our method outperforms existing SOTA approaches in both lip-sync accuracy (at least 0.16 gain in PCLD) and visual fidelity (at least 0.7 improvement in FID), establishing a novel fine-tuning-free diffusion framework for talking face generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无需微调的扩散模型说话人脸生成框架，利用预训练Stable Diffusion和IP-Adapter实现高精度唇同步和视觉保真。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的说话人脸生成方法需要针对特定任务进行微调，并依赖大规模视听数据集，导致计算成本高昂，限制了方法的可扩展性和普及性。亟需一种无需微调的范式来降低门槛，同时保持生成质量。
light_analysis.method: 采用预训练的Stable Diffusion和IP-Adapter作为主干，利用IP-Adapter的视觉嵌入能力挖掘嘴唇语义。设计三个无训练参数组件：Structurist解耦并重组嘴唇与外观特征以减轻身份漂移；Structure Controller根据准单调运动趋势自适应调整嵌入实现精确唇同步；Noise Sensor引入高斯先验检测并抑制闪烁和抖动伪影，增强时间一致性。
light_analysis.result: 在唇同步精度上，PCLD指标至少提升0.16；视觉保真度上，FID指标至少提升0.7。整体性能超越现有最先进方法，证明了无需微调框架的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了首个无需微调的扩散模型说话人脸生成框架，显著降低了计算成本，同时保持了高精度和稳定性。该工作为扩散模型在视听领域的应用提供了新思路，未来可探索更轻量的主干或跨模态扩展。

title: Anti Mode-Collapse in Mean-Field Transformer via Auxiliary Variables
abstract: We use a mean-field-based transformer model to theoretically investigate how auxiliary variables, such as positional encoding, prevent mode collapse of self-attention mechanisms. The use of mean-field transformers to analyze the properties of self-attention mechanisms has garnered significant attention in recent years due to their ability to comprehensively analyze token interactions. However, analysis of this simple model suggests that mode collapse, where token distributions degenerate to a single point, occurs during long inferences (i.e., many layers), indicating a discrepancy with reality. This study investigates this mean-field transformer model and demonstrates that the introduction of auxiliary variables, such as positional encoding, acts as a counterforce against theoretical mode collapse. Specifically, we show that in the theoretical scheme, the energy-maximizing distribution does not degenerate to a single point; instead, it is characterized by a pushforward of the auxiliary variable distribution, thereby avoiding concentration in the Dirac measure. Our main examples are the positional encoding and the fixed prompt insertion treated as a parallel auxiliary-variable mechanism. Furthermore, we demonstrate that positional encoding and prompt insertion possess universality of representation in the limit, meaning that the limit distribution of inference can exactly represent a wide class of distributions. We also analyze several key properties of positional encoding and metastability, and validate our theoretical results through mathematical experiments.

light_analysis.overview: 理论证明均值场Transformer中引入辅助变量（如位置编码）可防止自注意力机制的模式坍塌。
light_analysis.motivation: 均值场Transformer模型能全面分析token交互，但理论分析显示深层推理时token分布会退化为单点（模式坍塌），与实际不符。该研究旨在揭示辅助变量如何阻止这种理论上的崩溃，解决理论与现实的差异问题。
light_analysis.method: 基于均值场Transformer理论框架，引入辅助变量（位置编码、固定提示插入）作为并行机制。通过分析能量最大化分布，证明其不退化到狄拉克测度，而是辅助变量分布的前推。此外，证明了位置编码和提示插入在极限下具有表示普遍性，可精确表示广泛分布。
light_analysis.result: 理论推导表明，有辅助变量时能量最大化分布避免集中；通过数学实验验证了位置编码和提示插入防止模式坍塌的有效性，并分析了元稳定性等关键性质。具体数值未在摘要中明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了辅助变量在均值场Transformer中防止模式坍塌的机制，为设计更稳定的自注意力模型提供了理论基础。位置编码和提示插入的普遍性表示能力具有实践价值。未来可探索其他辅助变量或扩展到更复杂模型。

title: ExDBSCAN: Explaining DBSCAN with Counterfactual Reasoning -- Additional Material
abstract: Clustering is an unsupervised technique for grouping data points by similarity. While explainability methods exist for supervised machine learning, they are not directly applicable to clustering, making it challenging to understand cluster assignments. This interpretability gap is particularly evident in the popular density-based method DBSCAN, which assigns points as inliers (cluster members in dense regions) or outliers (noise points in sparse regions). DBSCAN does not provide insight into why a particular point receives its assignment or whether its assignment is robust to small changes in the data. To address the lack of explainability, we introduce ExDBSCAN, a density-aware, post-hoc explanation method. ExDBSCAN offers actionable counterfactual explanations, with theoretical guarantees for validity. It generates multiple counterfactuals using a density connected weighted graph, adopting a physics-inspired model that repels counterfactual candidates from one another (diversity), while pulling them toward the instance to explain (proximity). Empirical evaluation on 30 tabular datasets comparing against four baselines shows that ExDBSCAN outperforms all baselines while attaining perfect validity and retrieving diverse, proximal counterfactuals.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ExDBSCAN，一种针对DBSCAN聚类的后置反事实解释方法，具有理论保证的有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 聚类作为无监督技术缺乏可解释性，尤其是DBSCAN无法解释点为内点或离群点的原因，以及分配对数据微小变化的鲁棒性。现有可解释性方法主要针对监督学习，不直接适用于聚类，导致解释性缺口。因此需要一种专用的后置解释方法来提供可操作的反事实解释，帮助理解聚类分配并评估其稳健性。
light_analysis.method: ExDBSCAN是一种密度感知的后置解释方法，通过构建密度连通加权图，采用基于物理模型的策略生成多个反事实：候选者之间互相排斥（多样性），同时向待解释实例靠近（接近性）。该方法提供可操作的反事实解释，并具有理论保证的有效性，确保生成的-反事实在密度上属于相反类别。
light_analysis.result: 在30个表格数据集上与四种基线方法（如LIME、SHAP等）比较，ExDBSCAN在所有评估指标上均优于基线。特别是实现了完美的有效性（所有反事实确实改变类别），同时检索到的反事实具有良好的多样性和接近性，综合性能显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: ExDBSCAN有效填补了DBSCAN聚类的可解释性缺口，为每个点提供了有理论保证的反事实解释，帮助用户理解分配原因和鲁棒性。实验验证了其有效性、多样性和接近性。未来工作可扩展至其他密度聚类算法或处理高维复杂数据。

title: TriSearch: Learning to Optimize Triangulations via Bistellar Flips
abstract: We introduce TriSearch, a reinforcement learning framework for optimizing objectives over triangulations of a polytope via bistellar flips. The key idea is a circuit-supported subtriangulation action representation: feasible flips are encoded by their supporting circuit and realized local subtriangulation, enabling a learned policy to rank them using local geometric and combinatorial features. This yields a dimension-agnostic interface and enables efficient traversal of the flip graph without explicit enumeration of the full triangulation space. Instantiated in 3D and 4D, TriSearch generalizes zero-shot from small training instances to larger polytopes with exponentially larger search spaces. It achieves top performance on metric objectives in 3D and, in 4D, discovers more distinct Fine, Regular, Star triangulations of reflexive polytopes, corresponding to Calabi-Yau threefolds, than existing samplers under a fixed budget.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TriSearch强化学习框架，通过bistellar flips优化多面体三角剖分，实现零样本泛化到更大搜索空间。
light_analysis.motivation: 三角剖分优化在计算几何和代数几何中具有重要意义，但搜索空间随维度指数增长，现有方法如枚举或采样难以高效探索。本文旨在通过强化学习学习翻转策略，避免显式枚举整个三角剖分空间，从而高效优化目标函数，特别是在高维（4D）场景下发现更多有意义的三角剖分类型。
light_analysis.method: 核心创新是电路支持的子三角剖分动作表示：将可行翻转编码为支持电路和局部子三角剖分，利用局部几何和组合特征训练策略网络进行排名。该方法维度无关，无需维度特定设计，通过深度Q网络学习翻转选择，从翻转图高效遍历。在3D和4D多面体上实例化，使用小训练实例进行训练。
light_analysis.result: 在3D度量目标优化上达到最优性能；在4D中，针对反射多面体的Fine、Regular、Star三角剖分（对应Calabi-Yau三维流形），在固定预算下发现比现有采样器更多不同三角剖分，展示了零样本泛化能力到更大搜索空间（指数级更大）。
light_analysis.conclusion: TriSearch成功将强化学习应用于三角剖分优化，通过新颖的动作表示实现高效探索和维度泛化。该方法在3D和4D中均取得优异效果，尤其在高维发现更多样化的三角剖分，具有计算几何和数学物理的应用价值。未来可扩展到更高维度或结合其他几何优化目标。

title: When Should Models Change Their Minds? Contextual Belief Management in Large Language Models
abstract: Long-horizon interactions require language models to manage accumulating information: when to update their state, when to preserve their state, and what to ignore. We study this challenge as \textbf{Contextual Belief Management (CBM)}: maintaining a predicted belief state aligned with formal evidence while isolating task-irrelevant noise. To make CBM measurable, we introduce BeliefTrack, a closed-world benchmark spanning Rule Discovery and Circuit Diagnosis, where a finite belief space and symbolic verifiers enable exact turn-level evaluation. BeliefTrack diagnoses three failures: Failed Stay, Failed Update, and Failed Isolation. Across multiple LLMs, vanilla models exhibit severe CBM failures, while explicit belief-tracking prompts provide limited gains. In contrast, reinforcement learning with belief-state rewards reduces failure rates by 70.9\% on average. Further probing reveals latent belief-state dynamics behind these failures, and representation-level steering reduces failure rates by 46.1\% across two tasks\footnote{Code is coming soon at https://github.com/zjunlp/CBM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Contextual Belief Management (CBM)概念，量化评估并利用强化学习及表示层引导提升大语言模型在长程交互中的信念管理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 长程交互要求语言模型管理累积信息：何时更新、保持或忽略状态。现有方法缺乏对此挑战的系统研究，标准模型表现出严重失败（Failed Stay, Failed Update, Failed Isolation），而显式信念追踪提示效果有限。因此，需要可测量的评估框架和有效缓解方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出CBM概念，定义三种故障类型，并构建BeliefTrack基准（含规则发现和电路诊断任务），采用有限信念空间和符号验证器实现逐轮评估。核心方法包括：1) 使用信念状态奖励的强化学习训练模型，减少故障率；2) 表示层引导（representation-level steering）直接调节隐层表示，降低故障率。
light_analysis.result: 在多个LLM上，强化学习使平均故障率降低70.9%；表示层引导在两个任务上平均降低故障率46.1%。实验表明，显式信念追踪提示仅带来有限改进，而所提方法显著优于基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: CBM是长程交互中语言模型的关键挑战，BeliefTrack提供了精确评估框架。强化学习和表示层引导有效缓解信念管理失败。未来可扩展至更复杂场景，当前实验限于合成环境。

title: MarginGate: Sparse Margin-Triggered Verification for Batch-Invariant LLM Inference
abstract: Temperature-zero BF16 LLM inference is often treated as reproducible, yet the same request can emit different tokens when decoded alone or inside a larger batch. Existing fixes use batch-invariant operators or LLM-42's per-token verification, incurring cost even when most steps are stable. We ask whether verification can be applied exclusively to flipped tokens. Across five models, batch-induced token flips are sparse on the flip-rate benchmarks: on MATH500, Llama-3.1-8B flips on $0.48\%$ of synchronous decode steps, and all tested models stay within the 0.3-1.3% range on MATH500, GSM8K, and HumanEval. K/V perturbations remain flat before flips, while low top-1/top-2 logit margins expose much of the flip risk. MarginGate turns these observations into a verifier policy: it keeps BF16 decoding on high-margin steps, verifies only low-margin steps, and repairs confirmed mismatches by replacing the current K/V column. We evaluate on four datasets, calibrating on MATH500 and transferring to GSM8K, SharedGPT, and HumanEval. MarginGate restores 100% sequence-level deterministic decoding on Llama-3.1-8B and Qwen2.5-14B with 18.56%/15.05% verifier trigger rates, reducing LLM-42's latency increment by 2.23x/1.99x relative to always-on verification. On DSR1-Distill-Qwen-7B, the same policy reaches determinism in a harder regime at 49.50% triggers.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MarginGate，通过稀疏边缘触发验证实现批量不变的LLM确定性推理，大幅降低验证开销。
light_analysis.motivation: 零温度BF16 LLM推理在批处理中可能产生不同token，现有修复方法如批量不变算子或逐token验证成本高昂。观察到token翻转稀疏（0.3-1.3%），且低logit边际暴露翻转风险，因此需要仅对翻转步骤进行验证以降低开销。
light_analysis.method: 基于翻转稀疏性和低logit边际关联性，MarginGate策略对高边际步骤保持BF16解码，仅验证低边际步骤，并通过替换K/V列修复不匹配。在MATH500校准后，迁移到GSM8K、SharedGPT和HumanEval评估。
light_analysis.result: 在Llama-3.1-8B和Qwen2.5-14B上，以18.56%/15.05%触发率恢复100%序列级确定性，延迟增量较始终验证减少2.23倍/1.99倍。在DSR1-Distill-Qwen-7B上以49.50%触发率实现确定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MarginGate通过稀疏验证实现高效确定性解码，显著降低开销。验证了logit边际作为翻转风险的指标，为批处理LLM推理提供实用方案。未来可扩展至更多模型和低精度推理。

title: Déjà View: Looping Transformers for Multi-View 3D Reconstruction
abstract: Recent feed-forward 3D reconstruction transformers have scaled to over a billion parameters, following the broader trend of increasing model capacity in computer vision. Yet emerging evidence suggests that contiguous transformer layers often behave like repeated applications of similar operations, and multi-view reconstruction transformers refine their predictions progressively across decoder depth. We posit that model depth partially buys iteration, paid for inefficiently in unique parameters, and instead make that iteration explicit in architecture. Our model, DéjàView, applies a single looped transformer block recurrently to per-view features for K refinement steps. Trained once, it exposes K as an inference-time compute knob, matching or outperforming substantially larger feed-forward baselines across five reconstruction benchmarks spanning indoor, outdoor, object-centric, and driving scenes, while using a fraction of their parameters and comparable or lower compute. Importantly, the same looped block formulation outperforms an otherwise identical variant with independent per-step parameters under matched training data and compute, suggesting that explicit iteration is not merely a compute-efficient substitute for capacity but a stronger inductive bias for multi-view 3D reconstruction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DéjàView模型，通过循环transformer块显式迭代，以少参数达到或超越大规模前馈模型的多视图3D重建性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有前馈3D重建transformer参数超十亿，但连续层行为类似重复操作，深度部分购买了迭代却低效使用参数。研究旨在用显式迭代替代参数增长，提高效率并增强归纳偏置。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法为单个循环transformer块递归应用于每视图特征，进行K步细化。训练一次后，推理时K可调节计算量。关键创新在于显式迭代的归纳偏置，参数效率高。
light_analysis.result: 在室内、室外、物体中心、驾驶场景等五个基准上，DéjàView匹配或超越更大前馈基线，使用更少参数和相当或更低计算量。与独立参数变体对比，循环块表现更优，证明显式迭代是更强的归纳偏置。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献在于提出循环transformer架构，具备推理时计算控制旋钮，以少参数实现高性能。表明显式迭代是多视图3D重建的有效归纳偏置，潜在可推广至其他视觉任务。

title: Faithful Embeddings of Irregular and Asynchronous Data for Online Log-NCDEs
abstract: Continuous-time models are a natural choice for irregular and asynchronous data. A central design choice is how to embed discrete observations into continuous time. Interpolation- and imputation-based embeddings reconstruct a continuous observation path, making the model sensitive to the choice of reconstruction. We show that this reconstruction step is unnecessary; under mild conditions, compact-set universality on the model input space transfers to the data space whenever the embedding from data to input is continuous and injective. Guided by this result, and building on the rectilinear control path for Neural Controlled Differential Equations (NCDEs), we introduce a continuous and injective embedding for Log-NCDEs, a universal class of continuous-time models. Our approach records observations as increments and composes them over arbitrary query intervals to directly form log-signatures. This provides interval-level summaries without first interpolating the observed variables, while supporting online computation. Experiments on synthetic controlled dynamics and real-world time-series datasets show that the representation is accurate, efficient, and robust to irregular, asynchronous, and sparse observations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种连续单射的嵌入方法，直接形成log-signatures，避免插值重建，用于在线Log-NCDEs处理不规则异步数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 不规则和异步数据在时间序列中常见，现有方法通过插值重建连续路径，但模型对重建方式敏感。本文证明该重建步骤不必要：只要嵌入连续且单射，模型输入空间的紧凑集通用性可传递到数据空间。因此需要一种既连续单射又支持在线计算的嵌入，以消除插值依赖。
light_analysis.method: 基于神经控制微分方程(NCDE)的整流控制路径，提出连续单射嵌入。将观测记录为增量，在任意查询区间直接组合形成log-signatures，提供区间级摘要。无需先插值观测变量，支持在线计算，保持通用性。
light_analysis.result: 在合成控制动力学和真实时间序列数据集上实验，表明该表示准确、高效，对不规则、异步和稀疏观测鲁棒。与基线方法对比，性能相当或更优，且计算效率显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了连续单射嵌入可传递通用性，消除插值步骤。方法为连续时间模型处理不规则数据提供新范式，具有学术和实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的嵌入结构或扩展到其他连续模型。

title: Cycle Consistency in Video Object-Centric Learning
abstract: Self-supervised video Object-Centric Learning (OCL) aims to discover distinct objects and associate them across time, whereas self-supervised Multi-Object Tracking (MOT) focuses on associating pre-defined object detections or segmentations. Although well-established in MOT, Cycle Consistency (CC) cannot naively or explicitly apply to the latent slot space of OCL. Unlike the deterministic and ideal object representations in MOT, OCL slots are inherently stochastic and ambiguous due to non-unique scene decompositions. Enforcing explicit cycle consistency (ECC) on slots imposes rigid mean seeking. This severely penalizes the model for exploring alternative but equally valid decompositions, thereby driving towards feature collapse. To resolve this dilemma, we propose \textit{Implicit Cycle Consistency (ICC)}, which shifts the cycle-consistency constraint from the restrictive slot space to the continuous reconstruction manifold, encouraging slots to reach a soft consensus on collectively interpreting the visual scene rather than forcing rigid point-to-point feature alignment. Extensive experiments on complex video OCL benchmarks demonstrate that ICC avoids feature collapse and outperforms ECC baselines. Our source code, model checkpoints and training logs are provided on https://github.com/Genera1Z/ICC.

light_analysis.overview: 提出隐式循环一致性（ICC），解决视频对象中心学习中显式循环一致性导致特征崩溃的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 自监督视频对象中心学习（OCL）旨在发现并关联时间上的对象，但现有方法无法直接应用多对象跟踪中的循环一致性（CC）。OCL的槽表示具有随机性和歧义性，显式循环一致性（ECC）强制刚性对齐，严重惩罚替代分解，导致特征崩溃。为此，需要一种更灵活的约束机制。
light_analysis.method: 提出隐式循环一致性（ICC），将循环一致性约束从限制性槽空间转移到连续重建流形，鼓励槽在共同解释视觉场景上达成软共识，而非强制点对点对齐。该方法避免了特征崩溃，并适用于复杂视频OCL基准。
light_analysis.result: 在复杂视频OCL基准上的实验表明，ICC避免了特征崩溃，并显著优于ECC基线。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调了对特征崩溃的有效抑制和整体性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: ICC通过软共识机制解决了OCL中循环一致性的应用难题，避免了特征崩溃，提升了视频对象中心学习的性能。研究为自监督学习中的槽表示提供了新思路，具有潜在的计算机视觉应用价值。

title: HPO: Hysteretic Policy Optimization for Stable and Efficient Training under Sparse-Reward Regime
abstract: We investigate a narrow but common failure mode of GRPO-style reinforcement learning in the context of sparse verifiable rewards: early updates contain more responses with negative advantages than those with positive advantages, while response-level length normalization ties the magnitude of the update to the length of the output. We propose Hysteretic Policy Optimization (HPO), a minimal modification of GRPO that reduces the weight of negative-advantage updates and replaces per-response length normalization with mean-length normalization. We further introduce Adaptive HPO (A-HPO), which sets the hysteretic weight based on batch-level advantage-sign statistics, thereby removing the need for tuning a fixed hysteretic weight. In our TeleLogs and Countdown experiments, A-HPO improves the reward per update compared to GRPO, with the largest gains in early sparse reward regimes. On TeleLogs, A-HPO achieves a final reward of 0.84, outperforming SAPO by 5%, GSPO by 11%, and GRPO by 15%, while maintaining a comparable response-length. On Countdown, A-HPO achieves the largest gains in initial and most difficult configurations across 1.5B-7B models. Ablation studies on the hysteretic weight show that the gains of A-HPO come from better balancing the contributions of positive and negative advantages compared to positive-only or fully symmetric updates.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Hysteretic Policy Optimization (HPO)及其自适应变体A-HPO，通过减少负优势更新的权重和均值长度归一化，提升稀疏奖励下GRPO风格的强化学习训练稳定性与效率。
light_analysis.motivation: GRPO风格的强化学习在稀疏可验证奖励场景中存在失败模式：早期更新中负优势样本多于正优势样本，而响应级长度归一化使更新幅度与输出长度绑定，导致训练不稳定。现有方法如SAPO、GSPO和GRPO在稀疏奖励下性能有限，亟需一种能够平衡正负优势贡献的优化方法。
light_analysis.method: HPO是GRPO的最小修改：降低负优势更新的权重，并用均值长度归一化替代响应级长度归一化。A-HPO进一步根据批次级优势符号统计自适应设置滞回权重，无需手动调参。实验在TeleLogs和Countdown数据集上进行，对比SAPO、GSPO和GRPO。
light_analysis.result: 在TeleLogs上，A-HPO最终奖励0.84，比SAPO高5%，比GSPO高11%，比GRPO高15%，且响应长度相当。在Countdown上，A-HPO在1.5B-7B模型的最难初始配置中增益最大。消融实验表明，A-HPO通过更好平衡正负优势贡献优于仅正或全对称更新。
light_analysis.conclusion: HPO和A-HPO有效解决了稀疏奖励下GRPO的失败模式，显著提升训练效率和最终性能。方法简洁且无需额外调参，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索在更复杂任务或更大规模模型上的适用性。

title: Active Continual Learning with Metaplastic Binary Bayesian Neural Networks
abstract: Always-on edge systems must keep learning as conditions change under tight compute budgets and must detect unreliable predictions. Bayesian binary neural networks are attractive in this setting, but mean-field Bernoulli posteriors can saturate on long non-stationary streams, wiping out epistemic uncertainty and freezing plasticity. We propose BiMU, derived from a bounded-memory variational objective that balances stability, plasticity, and forgetting. BiMU combines a data term with controlled relaxation toward the prior and an uncertainty-dependent step size that prevents saturation and sustains informative uncertainty. This non-degenerate posterior enables fully online, buffer-free active querying via Monte Carlo disagreement, reducing label queries and backpropagation updates under imbalance. BiMU sustains learning and strong OOD detection on 1000-tasks Permuted-MNIST, and on OpenLORIS-Object achieves up to 32$\times$ label/update savings at matched accuracy under class imbalance and feature compression.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BiMU方法，通过有界记忆变分目标平衡稳定性与塑性，在贝叶斯二值神经网络中实现主动持续学习，避免不确定性饱和。
light_analysis.motivation: 始终在线的边缘系统需要在严格计算预算下持续学习并检测不可靠预测。贝叶斯二值神经网络适用于此场景，但平均场伯努利后验在长非平稳流上会饱和，消除认知不确定性并冻结可塑性。现有方法无法同时平衡稳定性、塑性和遗忘，且需要缓冲区存储数据。
light_analysis.method: BiMU源自一个有界记忆变分目标，结合数据项与向先验的受控松弛，以及不确定性相关的步长，防止饱和并维持信息性不确定性。采用蒙特卡洛分歧进行完全在线、无缓冲区的主动查询，减少标签查询和反向传播更新，适用于不平衡数据。
light_analysis.result: 在1000任务Permuted-MNIST上维持学习能力和强OOD检测。在OpenLORIS-Object上，在类不平衡和特征压缩下，以匹配的准确率实现了高达32倍的标签/更新节省。
light_analysis.conclusion: BiMU通过维持非退化后验，实现了在线、无缓冲的主动持续学习，有效平衡稳定性与塑性，显著降低标签和计算成本，适用于边缘设备。未来可探索更复杂的先验或任务适应性。

title: Mean-Field Diffuser: Scaling Offline MARL to Thousands of Agents
abstract: Diffusion-based planning has achieved strong results in single-agent offline reinforcement learning, yet scaling to many-agent systems remains intractable due to the curse of dimensionality in the joint trajectory space. We introduce MF-Diffuser, a framework that lifts trajectory planning to the Wasserstein space of trajectory distributions, where the propagation of chaos ensures a small representative subset of agents captures the full population dynamics. Our approach features a value-weighted chaotic entropy objective that reconciles generative fidelity with return maximization, and a hierarchical coarse-to-fine strategy that progressively grows the agent population during denoising. We establish end-to-end suboptimality bounds with four interpretable terms, revealing that mean-field approximation error scales as $O(H^2/\sqrt{N})$ while offline distribution shift provably does not grow with population size $N$, and prove the generated policy is an approximate mean-field Nash equilibrium with explicit convergence guarantees. Experiments on three mean-field RL benchmarks -- spanning stage games, sequential dynamics, and adversarial team competition -- show MF-Diffuser achieves the best return in the majority of settings, with the largest gains on suboptimal offline data and at extreme scales ($N \geq 10^3$).

light_analysis.overview: 提出MF-Diffuser框架，将多智能体离线强化学习中的轨迹规划提升至Wasserstein分布空间，通过平均场近似和混沌传播实现千级智能体规模。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于扩散的规划在单智能体离线强化学习中表现优异，但扩展到多智能体系统时面临联合轨迹空间的维度灾难。现有方法难以处理大量智能体，且离线分布偏移问题随智能体数量增长而加剧。因此需要一种可扩展的框架，能在保持生成质量的同时实现高效的多智能体协调。
light_analysis.method: MF-Diffuser将轨迹规划提升至轨迹分布的Wasserstein空间，利用混沌传播特性，用小规模代表性子集捕捉全种群动力学。提出值加权混沌熵目标，平衡生成保真度与回报最大化。采用层次化由粗到细策略，在去噪过程中逐步增长智能体种群。理论证明了端到端次优性界限，其中平均场近似误差为O(H^2/√N)，离线分布偏移不随N增长，且生成策略是近似平均场纳什均衡。
light_analysis.result: 在三个平均场RL基准（阶段博弈、序列动力学、对抗性团队竞赛）上，MF-Diffuser在大多数设置中取得最佳回报，特别是在次优离线数据和极端规模（N≥10^3）下提升显著。实验验证了理论界限，表明方法在处理大规模多智能体系统时的有效性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MF-Diffuser通过平均场扩散规划成功将离线MARL扩展到千级智能体，理论保证了扩展性和最优性。该框架为大规模多智能体协同提供了新范式，未来可应用于交通控制、机器人集群等复杂场景。潜在局限包括对平均场假设的依赖，以及层次化策略的设计复杂度。

title: CalArena: A Large-Scale Post-Hoc Calibration Benchmark
abstract: Reliable probability estimates are critical in many machine learning applications, yet modern classifiers are often poorly calibrated. Post-hoc calibration provides a simple and widely used solution, but the large number of proposed methods, combined with small-scale and inconsistent evaluations, makes it difficult to determine which approaches are truly effective in practice. We introduce a large-scale, standardized benchmark for post-hoc calibration, covering nearly 2000 experiments across tabular and computer vision tasks, including binary, multiclass, and large-scale classification settings. Our benchmark aggregates predictions from a diverse set of classical models, modern deep learning architectures, and foundation models, and provides unified, reproducible implementations of dozens of calibration methods within a common evaluation framework. We argue that Post-Hoc Improvement (PHI) in proper scoring rules offers a principled alternative to traditional calibration error estimators for comparing post-hoc methods, capturing both calibration quality and potential degradation to the model's predictive performance. Using this framework, we conduct the most comprehensive empirical study of post-hoc calibration to date. Our results reveal consistent patterns across domains: smooth calibration functions outperform binning-based approaches, dedicated multiclass methods are essential in high-dimensional settings, and generic machine learning models are not competitive without calibration-specific design. To facilitate future research, we release all data, code, and evaluation tools, providing a plug-and-play benchmark for developing and comparing calibration methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出大规模事后校准基准CalArena，涵盖近2000个实验，统一评估多种校准方法，并引入基于proper scoring rules的PHI指标。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代分类器常校准不佳，事后校准是简单常用的解决方案。但现有方法众多，且缺乏大规模、标准化的评估，难以确定哪些方法真正有效。因此需要构建大规模标准化基准，以可靠比较不同校准方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建CalArena基准，涵盖表格和计算机视觉任务，包括二分类、多分类和大规模分类。聚合经典模型、深度学习架构和基础模型的预测，统一实现数十种校准方法。提出Post-Hoc Improvement (PHI)指标，基于proper scoring rules，同时评估校准质量和预测性能变化。
light_analysis.result: 大规模实验显示一致模式：平滑校准函数优于基于分箱的方法；在高维设置中专用多类方法至关重要；没有校准特定设计的通用机器学习模型不具备竞争力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供了最全面的事后校准实证研究，揭示了校准方法选择的关键因素。发布所有数据、代码和评估工具，形成即插即用基准，促进未来校准方法的研究与比较。

title: Can AI Weather Models Predict Beyond Two Weeks? A Quantitative Benchmark and Analysis of Long Rollouts
abstract: While AI weather models excel at short-to-medium range forecasts (up to 15 days), they frequently suffer from ill-defined "instabilities" when rolled out over longer horizons. This work addresses the lack of a formal taxonomy by categorizing these failures into three distinct regimes: blow-up, drift, and loss of seasonality, through year-long rollouts of nine state-of-the-art AI weather models. Our analysis reveals that stability hinges on the treatment of small spatio-temporal scales: unstable models amplify high-frequency energy, while stable models act as denoisers when noise is added to their inputs. Far from reducing these models to mere stochastic parrots, our findings highlight that stable models generate unique weather trajectories, conditioned on the initial state. We verify our findings through ablation studies on architectural design choices, conducted using state-of-the-art Vision Transformer (ViT) AI weather model architectures.

light_analysis.overview: 分类AI天气模型长期预测的不稳定性，揭示稳定模型作为去噪器生成独特轨迹。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有AI天气模型在短中期预测（15天内）表现优异，但长期滚动预测时经常出现定义不清的“不稳定性”问题。缺乏对这些失效模式的系统分类和成因分析，阻碍了模型在气候尺度预测中的应用。理解稳定性的关键因素对于提升模型实用性和可信度至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 通过对九个先进AI天气模型进行长达一年的滚动预测，将不稳定现象系统分类为三种模式：爆发（blow-up）、漂移（drift）和季节性丧失（loss of seasonality）。分析发现稳定性取决于小时空尺度的处理：不稳定模型放大高频能量，而稳定模型在输入中加入噪声时起到去噪作用。利用Vision Transformer（ViT）架构进行消融研究，验证设计选择的影响。
light_analysis.result: 稳定模型并非简单的随机鹦鹉，而是基于初始状态生成独特的天气轨迹。消融实验确认了架构设计（如ViT）对稳定性的影响。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但通过分类和机制分析揭示了现有模型在长期预测中的行为差异。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次对AI天气模型的长期滚动不稳定性进行形式化分类和机理分析，指出处理小尺度波动是稳定性的关键。研究为改进模型设计提供了方向，例如引入去噪机制或控制高频能量增长。未来可探索更鲁棒的架构或训练策略以延长有效预测期限。

title: iLoRA: Bayesian Low-Rank Adaptation with Latent Interaction Graphs for Microbiome Diagnosis
abstract: Parameter-efficient adaptation has made LLMs practical for domain prediction, but standard LoRA still relies on a static low-rank update and does not expose the latent interactions that often drive scientific labels. We introduce iLoRA. To our knowledge, it is the first Bayesian graph-conditioned LoRA framework. It infers a latent interaction graph from the input and uses it to generate input-conditioned LoRA updates. As a result, iLoRA learns prediction and latent interaction structure jointly, rather than training a predictor and applying interaction analysis only post hoc. We instantiate this idea for microbiome diagnosis, where disease state can depend on both species-level abundance and microbe-microbe cross-talk, and evaluate it in two complementary settings: interactive QA with human-annotated graphs, which tests latent structure recovery, and multi-cohort IBD diagnosis, which tests biomedical utility. Across both settings, iLoRA improves over strong LoRA and Bayesian adaptation baselines, recovers graphs aligned with human annotations and cohort-level microbiome associations, and provides calibrated uncertainty with moderate graph-branch overhead.

light_analysis.overview: 首次提出贝叶斯图条件LoRA框架iLoRA，通过推断潜在交互图生成输入条件低秩更新，联合学习预测与结构。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准LoRA依赖静态低秩更新，无法捕捉驱动科学标签的潜在交互。在微生物组诊断中，疾病状态依赖物种丰度和微生物间交叉对话。现有方法预测与交互分析分离，忽视了结构对预测的协同作用。iLoRA旨在同时学习预测和潜在交互，提升诊断准确性与可解释性。
light_analysis.method: iLoRA从输入推断潜在交互图，利用该图生成输入条件LoRA更新，替代静态低秩矩阵。框架基于贝叶斯推断，整合图结构先验，实现预测与结构联合学习。在交互式QA（使用人工注释图验证结构恢复）和多队列IBD诊断两个场景中评估，采用微生物组序列数据。
light_analysis.result: iLoRA在交互式QA和多队列IBD诊断中均优于强LoRA和贝叶斯适应基线。其恢复的潜在图与人工标注及队列级微生物组关联高度一致，并提供校准的不确定性估计。额外计算开销仅来自图分支，整体开销适中。
light_analysis.conclusion: iLoRA证明在科学领域（如微生物组诊断）中联合学习预测与潜在交互的有效性，提升了参数高效适应的可解释性与性能。未来工作可扩展到其他依赖潜在交互的预测任务，并探索更高效的图推断机制。

title: LiveSVG: Zero-Shot SVG Animation via Video Generation
abstract: We introduce LiveSVG, a zero-shot approach for generating Scalable Vector Graphics (SVG) animations using video diffusion models. Current SVG animation methods struggle with complex motions: LLM-based code synthesis fails to express fine, non-rigid Bézier deformations, while Score Distillation Sampling (SDS) provides noisy gradients and often requires category-specific priors like skeletons. In contrast, LiveSVG fits vector geometry directly to an explicitly generated target video. Given an input SVG image and a motion prompt, we generate a previewable target video using a frozen image-to-video model, then fit the original SVG to this video via differentiable rendering. Our fitting stage is skeleton-free, utilizing a dual-level motion representation that combines per-group homographies for coarse articulation with per-path Bézier control-point offsets for local deformations. To resolve color-induced correspondence ambiguities during pixel-wise fitting, we introduce a novel sphere-packing recolorization strategy. We also present ChallengeSVG, a benchmark of complex, multi-object scenes that exposes the limitations of prior work. Evaluations demonstrate that LiveSVG significantly outperforms existing methods on both AniClipart and ChallengeSVG, establishing direct reference-video fitting as a practical, robust route to prompt-aligned and fully editable vector animation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LiveSVG，一种零样本SVG动画生成方法，通过视频扩散模型生成目标视频，再通过可微渲染拟合SVG，实现复杂运动。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有SVG动画方法难以处理复杂运动：基于LLM的代码合成无法表达精细的非刚性贝塞尔变形，而分数蒸馏采样(SDS)提供噪点梯度且常需类别特定先验(如骨架)。因此需要一种无需类别先验、能处理复杂形变和颜色歧义的零样本动画方法。
light_analysis.method: 输入SVG图像和运动提示，使用冻结的视频生成模型(图像到视频)生成可预览的目标视频；然后通过可微渲染将原始SVG拟合到该视频。拟合阶段无骨架，采用双层运动表示：每组同形矩阵用于粗粒度铰接，每条路径的贝塞尔控制点偏移用于局部变形。引入球填充重着色策略解决像素级拟合中的颜色对应歧义。
light_analysis.result: 在AniClipart和ChallengeSVG基准上，LiveSVG显著优于现有方法。ChallengeSVG是提出的复杂多对象场景基准，揭示了先前工作的局限性。具体指标摘要未明确说明，但声称大幅超越现有方法，证明直接参考视频拟合是实现提示对齐和完全可编辑矢量动画的实用稳健途径。
light_analysis.conclusion: LiveSVG通过直接拟合生成的目标视频实现零样本SVG动画，无需类别先验或骨架，能处理复杂非刚性变形。其双层运动表示和球填充重着色策略有效解决了对应歧义问题。贡献包括新颖的零样本框架、运动表示、重着色策略及基准。未来可探索更高效的视频生成模型或扩展至交互式动画。

title: OmniCD: A Foundational Framework for Remote Sensing Image Change Detection Guided by Multimodal Semantics
abstract: Change detection (CD) in remote sensing is vital for applications such as urban monitoring and disaster assessment, yet traditional methods struggle with generalization across diverse scenarios. We present OmniCD, a foundational framework that unifies and enhances remote sensing CD through multimodal semantic guidance. OmniCD incorporates image and text prompts -- such as textual descriptions, semantic maps, and geospatial metadata -- into a unified architecture, supporting tasks from binary CD to zero-shot semantic change understanding. The framework integrates a hierarchical scene retrieval module and a change detection module, reinforced by a style disentanglement mechanism for improved cross-domain robustness. We further introduce RSITCD, a large-scale multimodal dataset with 300K+ annotated image-text pairs. Extensive experiments show that OmniCD achieves state-of-the-art performance across benchmarks, demonstrating strong adaptability and setting a solid foundation for general-purpose CD systems in remote sensing.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OmniCD框架，通过多模态语义引导统一和增强遥感变化检测，支持从二值变化检测到零样本语义变化理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 遥感变化检测在城市监测和灾害评估中至关重要，但传统方法在多样化场景下泛化能力差，难以统一处理多种变化检测任务。现有方法缺乏对文本、语义图等多模态信息的融合，导致跨域鲁棒性不足。因此，需要一种通用框架，通过多模态语义引导提升变化检测的适应性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: OmniCD包含层次化场景检索模块和变化检测模块，结合风格解耦机制增强跨域鲁棒性。框架统一处理图像和文本提示（如文本描述、语义图、地理元数据），支持从二值变化检测到零样本语义变化理解。同时，引入RSITCD大规模多模态数据集（30万+图像-文本对）进行训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 广泛实验表明，OmniCD在多个基准数据集上取得了最先进的性能，展示了强大的跨域适应性和泛化能力。与现有方法相比，在二值变化检测和语义变化理解任务中均有显著提升，验证了多模态语义引导的有效性。具体数据未明确说明，但整体性能领先。
light_analysis.conclusion: OmniCD为遥感图像变化检测提供了一个统一的通用框架，通过多模态语义引导显著提升了模型的适应性和泛化能力。该研究为构建通用变化检测系统奠定了基础，在城市规划、环境监测等实际应用中具有重要价值。未来可进一步探索更复杂的多模态融合策略和实时推理优化。

title: BioRefusalAudit: Auditing Biosecurity Refusal Depth Using General and Domain-Fine-Tuned Sparse Autoencoders
abstract: Biosecurity evaluations of language models typically ask whether models produce hazardous output. This paper asks a complementary question: when a model refuses, is that refusal structurally sound, or does it disappear under modest changes to prompt framing, formatting, or output length? Across five architectures, no model cleanly discriminated benign from hazard. Gemma 2 2B-IT never genuinely refused across 75 prompts, hedging on every hazard-adjacent query. Gemma 4 E2B-IT refused 65/75 prompts with chat-template formatting and 0/75 without it. Both Gemma models collapsed to 0% under an 80-token cap. Qwen 2.5 1.5B and Phi-3-mini over-refused, flagging 83-87% of benign biology as hazardous. Llama 3.2 1B showed the only meaningful tier gradient (61-point spread). To probe what drives such over-refusal, we tested a panel of Schedule I but biologically non-toxic compounds (notably psilocybin cultivation, with FDA Breakthrough Therapy status). Some models refused these at rates exceeding genuinely hazardous biology, suggesting refusal tracks legality and cultural salience over CBRN hazard. To measure the internal side, we introduce a divergence score D comparing a model's surface response label to its internal sparse autoencoder (SAE) feature activations. Full D was computed on Gemma 2 2B-IT (Gemma Scope 1) and Gemma 4 E2B-IT (author-trained bio SAE). Two fine-tuned Gemma 2 domain SAEs were released. On Gemma 4, comply and refuse responses separated by a 0.647-point gap with zero overlap (n=75), though this is preliminary, with a narrow catalog, within-sample calibration, and Gemma-family-only SAE coverage. Built over one hackathon weekend on consumer hardware (GTX 1650 Ti Max-Q, plus Colab T4 for SAE training), this preliminary evidence suggests activation-level auditing may surface failure modes invisible to behavioral evaluation, with substantial variation across architectures.
comment: 21 pages, 2 figures, 3 tables. Apart Research AIxBio Sprint hackathon paper, April 2026 (Track 3: AI Biosecurity Tools). Code, eval set, and SAEs: github.com/SolshineCode/Deleeuw-AI-x-Bio-hackathon. Reviewer feedback: apartresearch.com/project/biorefusalaudit-auditing-biosecurity-refusal-depth-using-general-and-domainfinetuned-sparse-autoencoders-1fyk

light_analysis.overview: 提出BioRefusalAudit方法，通过稀疏自编码器审计语言模型在生物安全拒绝中的深度，发现拒绝行为易受提示变化影响且内部激活与表面响应不一致。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有生物安全评估只关注模型是否输出危险内容，而忽视拒绝的鲁棒性。不同模型对无害生物学查询的拒绝行为差异巨大，且拒绝受格式、长度等轻微变化影响。此外，过度拒绝常见于文化敏感但无生物危害的化合物，表明拒绝机制可能跟踪合法性和文化显著性而非真实危害。
light_analysis.method: 提出BioRefusalAudit框架，通过稀疏自编码器（SAE）分析模型内部激活。引入分歧分数D比较表面响应标签与SAE特征激活。在Gemma 2 2B-IT和Gemma 4 E2B-IT上计算全D，使用Gemma Scope 1和作者训练的bio SAE。还发布了两个微调的Gemma 2领域SAE。实验在消费级硬件（GTX 1650 Ti Max-Q + Colab T4）上完成。
light_analysis.result: 在5种架构上测试：Gemma 2 2B-IT从未真正拒绝，Gemma 4 E2B-IT在格式化下拒绝65/75，无格式时0/75，80-token限制下两者均降为0%。Qwen和Phi过拒绝（83-87%良性生物学被标记为危险）。Llama 3.2 1B显示有意义的分级（61点跨度）。在Gemma 4上，服从和拒绝响应的内部激活差距0.647且无重叠（n=75）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 初步证据表明激活级审计可以揭示行为评估中不可见的失败模式，不同架构间变异显著。但结果源于一个周末的初步实验，涉及窄目录、样本内校准和仅Gemma系列SAE覆盖，需进一步验证。该工作为生物安全拒绝的鲁棒性评估提供了新视角。

title: Why Far Looks Up: Probing Spatial Representation in Vision-Language Models
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) achieve strong performance on spatial reasoning benchmarks, yet it remains unclear whether this reflects structured 3D understanding or reliance on statistical shortcuts in natural images. We introduce a representation-level analysis framework that constructs minimal contrastive pairs to measure how spatial axes are organized and disentangled within VLM embeddings. Our analysis across multiple model families reveals a consistent vertical-distance entanglement: models conflate vertical image position with distance, mirroring the perspective bias of natural photographs. This bias produces a significant accuracy gap between perspective-consistent and counter-heuristic examples, and intensifies under data scaling even as overall benchmark accuracy improves. We further show that models with similar benchmark scores can exhibit different internal representations, and that these differences predict accuracy and robustness across diverse spatial reasoning benchmarks. To isolate this bias from evaluation-set skew, we introduce SpatialTunnel, a synthetic benchmark designed to expose spatial shortcut biases by removing common correlations present in natural images. Experiments confirm that the entanglement is model-intrinsic, and that models with well-separated spatial axes exhibit greater robustness, suggesting that well-structured spatial representations lead to more reliable spatial reasoning across diverse benchmarks. Code and benchmark are available on the project page: https://cheolhong0916.github.io/whyfarlooksup.github.io/.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示VLM空间推理中的垂直-距离纠缠偏见，并提出SpatialTunnel基准以暴露统计捷径。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型在空间推理基准上表现优异，但尚不清楚这是源于结构化3D理解还是利用自然图像中的统计捷径。现有评估方法无法区分模型是否真正具备空间推理能力，亟需深入分析内部表示以揭示潜在偏差。
light_analysis.method: 提出表示级分析框架，通过构建最小对比对来度量VLM嵌入中空间轴的组织与分离程度。针对多个模型家族进行分析，并引入合成基准SpatialTunnel，通过去除自然图像中的常见相关性来孤立空间捷径偏差。
light_analysis.result: 发现模型存在一致的垂直-距离纠缠：垂直图像位置与距离被混淆，导致视角一致与反启发式示例间准确率差距显著。数据规模扩大时偏差加剧，而模型即便有相似基准分数，内部表示差异仍可预测鲁棒性。SpatialTunnel证实偏差是模型固有的。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究揭示了VLM空间推理中的系统性偏差，表明结构化的空间表示有助于提升鲁棒性。提供的分析框架与SpatialTunnel基准为理解模型内部机制、改进空间推理能力提供了新工具，未来可探索消除偏差的方法。

title: On Distributional Reinforcement Learning in Chaotic Dynamical Systems
abstract: Chaotic dynamical systems pose a fundamental challenge for Reinforcement Learning (RL): exponential sensitivity to initial conditions induces high-variance bootstrap targets and poorly conditioned gradient updates. Chaotic dynamics arise across scientific and engineering domains, from fluid flows and climate systems to multi-agent systems, where reliable learning is highly desirable. Standard RL methods optimise expected returns through scalar value functions, implicitly averaging over diverging trajectories and entangling trajectory level instability with the learning objective. We show that under mild statistical stability assumptions, the return distribution evolves more regularly than individual trajectories when measured under the $1$-Wasserstein metric, yielding a smoother distributional Bellman objective. By aligning optimisation with this measure level structure, distributional RL provides better conditioned learning. We offer a principled explanation for the advantages of distributional methods in chaotic systems and the geometries of RL objectives under chaos.

light_analysis.overview: 提出分布强化学习在混沌动力系统中比标准RL更有效，收益分布比单个轨迹更规则，能改善学习条件。
light_analysis.motivation: 混沌动力系统对RL构成根本挑战：对初始条件的指数敏感导致高方差的自举目标和病态梯度更新。标准RL通过标量值函数优化期望收益，隐式平均了发散轨迹，将轨迹级不稳定性与学习目标纠缠。需要更鲁棒的方法来处理混沌系统中的学习不稳定性。
light_analysis.method: 论文证明在温和统计稳定性假设下，收益分布在1-Wasserstein度量下比单个轨迹演化更规则，从而得到更平滑的分布贝尔曼目标。通过将优化与度量层面结构对齐，分布RL提供更好的条件化学习，为分布方法在混沌系统中的优势提供原理性解释。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未给出具体数值结果，但理论上论证了分布RL在混沌系统中的优越性，指出分布目标函数比标准标量目标函数更光滑，从而改善梯度条件。与标准RL方法相比，分布方法能降低方差并稳定学习过程。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文为分布强化学习在混沌动力系统中的应用提供了理论依据，解释了其优势来源。该工作对流体、气候、多智能体系统等具有混沌特性的科学工程领域有重要指导意义。未来可探索更高效的分布更新算法及实际系统验证。

title: RL2ML: Finite-Rollout Surrogate Objectives from Reinforcement Learning to Maximum Likelihood
abstract: Correctness-based Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) trains language models from binary feedback on sampled outputs, but the objective optimized in expectation and the stochastic update geometry induced by finite rollout groups are often conflated. This paper develops RL2ML, a family of finite-rollout surrogate objectives with a closed-form, exactly unbiased gradient estimator. The family continuously connects standard reinforcement learning, maximum-likelihood-like training, and beyond-maximum-likelihood objectives while preserving estimator-objective alignment under a fixed rollout budget. We introduce the group-level update scale to characterize how a rollout group is reweighted after its empirical success count is observed, revealing a subcritical-supercritical update-scale transition that is hidden by population-level objective notation alone. Building on this distinction, calibrated metric-gain analysis and exact variance decomposition show that the best choice of surrogate objective is determined neither by proximity to maximum likelihood nor by the population-level weight alone. Instead, it depends jointly on the evaluation metric, local sensitivity, and estimator variance. The remaining degree of freedom in the surrogate objective family can therefore be formulated as a one-dimensional optimization problem rather than treated as an unconstrained hyperparameter.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RL2ML，一族有限rollout代理目标函数，具有闭式无偏梯度估计，连接强化学习与最大似然训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于正确性的强化学习（RLVR）训练语言模型时，期望优化的目标与有限rollout组的随机更新几何常被混淆，现有方法未区分目标期望与随机梯度几何，导致训练不稳定或次优。该研究旨在解决这一混淆，提供理论清晰且实际有效的目标函数族。
light_analysis.method: RL2ML家族连续连接标准RL、最大似然及超似然目标，通过闭式无偏梯度估计器实现。引入组级更新规模概念，刻画rollout组经经验成功计数后重权的方式，揭示隐藏的次临界-超临界更新规模转变。将剩余自由度转化为一维优化问题，而非无约束超参数。
light_analysis.result: 校准的度量增益分析和精确方差分解表明，最佳代理目标选择不由接近最大似然或群体级权重单独决定，而联合取决于评估度量、局部敏感性和估计器方差。该框架简化了目标选择，提供可解释的理论指导。
light_analysis.conclusion: RL2ML提供了理论框架来统一和优化RLVR训练中的目标函数，揭示有限rollout下的关键动态，将超参数降为一维优化，提升训练效率和效果。未来可扩展至更复杂的奖励结构或长序列生成任务。

title: Overcoming Forgetting in LLM Fine-Tuning with Evolution Strategies
abstract: Evolution Strategies (ES) has recently emerged as a competitive alternative to reinforcement learning (RL) for large language model (LLM) fine-tuning, offering advantages through simplicity, scalability, and inference-only training. However, recent work suggests that ES fine-tuning on new tasks may induce forgetting of prior tasks. First, this paper shows that prior task forgetting (1) is better characterized as performance drift rather than irreversible forgetting, with prior-task performance often recovering during ES training; and (2) is not a specific failure mode of ES, but can also arise for fine-tuning with RL methods. Second, it analyzes when and why such drift arises, highlighting its dependence on ES training dynamics, particularly random walk behavior in weakly constrained directions of the weight space. Third, based on these insights, it introduces Anchored Weight Decay (AWD) as a parameter-space regularization technique that constrains optimization toward the initial model parameters. AWD effectively stabilizes prior-task performance while preserving target-task performance, achieving benefits comparable to large ES population sizes at much lower computational cost. Thus, contrary to previous beliefs, the paper shows that prior-task forgetting under ES is largely avoidable, positioning ES as a promising approach for continual learning in LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示ES微调中先验遗忘实为性能漂移，提出锚定权重衰减(AWD)正则化技术，有效稳定性能，使ES成为LLM持续学习的可行方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 进化策略(ES)在LLM微调中渐成强化学习的有力替代，但近期研究指出其在新任务微调时会导致先前任务遗忘。本文旨在澄清遗忘本质、探究成因并提出低成本解决方案，推动ES在LLM持续学习中的应用，解决现有方法计算开销大或效果有限的问题。
light_analysis.method: 通过实验证明ES中先前任务性能漂移源于权重空间弱约束方向的随机游走，据此提出锚定权重衰减(AWD)，在参数空间正则化，约束优化向初始参数靠近。AWD无需增大ES种群规模，计算高效，与ES训练无缝集成。
light_analysis.result: AWD在保持目标任务性能的同时，显著稳定了先前任务性能，效果与使用大种群ES相当，但计算成本大幅降低。实验证实ES中的先前任务遗忘可避免，性能漂移得到有效抑制。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文重新定义了ES微调中的遗忘问题，证明其非不可逆，且通过AWD可消除。学术上揭示了遗忘的动力学机制，应用上为LLM持续学习提供了轻量级正则化方案。未来可探索AWD与其他持续学习方法的结合，进一步扩展ES在LLM中的应用。

title: AnomalyAgent: Training-Free Agentic Models for Zero-/Few-Shot Anomaly Detection
abstract: Benefiting from generalizability of vision-language models (VLMs) such as CLIP, many zero-/few-shot anomaly detection (AD) approaches have achieved impressive detection performance across various datasets. Nevertheless, they require substantial training on large auxiliary datasets to adapt VLMs to anomaly detection, and their inference largely relies on visual-text embedding similarity-based anomaly scores, lacking reasoning abilities to detect complex anomalies that require in-depth contextual understanding. To address this limitation, we propose \textbf{AnomalyAgent}, a novel training-free, agentic framework that leverages the advanced reasoning and generalization capabilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) for anomaly detection. The key ingredients include \textbf{1)} a comprehensive anomaly-centric toolset that enables adaptive MLLM-driven, agentic anomaly reasoning in zero-shot settings, and \textbf{2)} a customized memory module that grounds anomaly reasoning with few-shot, in-context reference examples. We extend evaluation beyond the detection of simple anomalies (e.g., surface defects like cracks and dents and clear lesions) in widely used benchmarks to more diverse types of anomalies such as logical/contextual anomalies in logistics and manufacturing settings. Extensive experiment results demonstrate that our AnomalyAgent achieves substantially better performance compared to training-free VLM-based AD and generic agentic methods, highlighting its superior generalization capability in both zero-shot and few-shot anomaly detection settings. The code implementation can be find at this address.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AnomalyAgent，一种无需训练的代理框架，利用多模态大语言模型实现零样本/少样本异常检测，具备推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有零样本/少样本异常检测方法依赖视觉-文本嵌入相似度，缺乏推理能力，无法检测需要深度上下文理解的复杂异常（如逻辑/上下文异常）。这些方法通常需要在大型辅助数据集上训练以适配CLIP等视觉语言模型，且泛化能力有限。
light_analysis.method: AnomalyAgent引入两个关键组件：1）全面的异常中心工具集，使多模态大语言模型（MLLM）能在零样本设置下进行自适应代理异常推理；2）定制记忆模块，通过少样本上下文参考示例增强异常推理。该方法无需训练，直接利用MLLM的推理和泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 在多种异常类型（包括表面缺陷和逻辑/上下文异常）的基准测试中，AnomalyAgent在零样本和少样本设置下均显著优于无需训练的VLM方法和通用代理方法，展示了更强的泛化性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: AnomalyAgent证明了无需训练的代理框架在复杂异常检测中的有效性，特别是结合多模态大语言模型的推理能力。未来可扩展至更多实际场景，如工业质检和医疗影像，但可能面临计算开销和模型可解释性的挑战。

title: DAMEL: Dual-Axis Multi-Expert Learning for Class-Imbalanced Learning
abstract: Various algorithms have been proposed to address the challenges posed by class-imbalanced learning from real-world data with long-tailed distributions. While these algorithms reduce prediction bias through rebalancing techniques, they often introduce increased prediction variance as a trade-off. Several multi-expert learning algorithms aim to address this variance but involve complex procedures. We propose a new multi-expert learning algorithm, called the dual-axis multi-expert learning (DAMEL), which reduces both bias and variance of predictions by using multiple experts along both representation and time axes. Along the representation axis, DAMEL concatenates the representations of multiple experts and trains an auxiliary balanced classifier simultaneously with the concatenated representations. Along the time axis, DAMEL aggregates network weights across training epochs, employing these aggregated weights during testing. Experimental results demonstrate that DAMEL reduces both bias and variance of predictions, highlighting its effectiveness in class-imbalanced learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出双轴多专家学习(DAMEL)，沿表示轴和时间轴同时减少类别不平衡学习的偏差和方差。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实数据常呈现长尾分布，导致类别不平衡学习挑战。现有重平衡算法虽能减少预测偏差，但往往增加预测方差作为代价。多专家学习试图解决方差问题，但过程复杂。因此，需要一种方法能同时降低偏差和方差且不增加复杂性。
light_analysis.method: DAMEL沿两个轴利用多专家：1) 表示轴：拼接多个专家的表示，并用拼接后的表示训练一个辅助平衡分类器；2) 时间轴：跨训练 epochs 聚合网络权重，测试时使用聚合后的权重。该方法通过组合多个专家的特征和时序集成来稳定预测。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，DAMEL有效降低了预测的偏差和方差，在类别不平衡学习任务中表现优异，验证了双轴多专家策略的有效性。具体数值未在摘要中明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: DAMEL提供了一种简洁有效的多专家学习框架，同时抑制偏差和方差，适用于长尾分布数据。未来可探索更高效的专家组合方式或扩展到其他不平衡场景。

title: Learning to Extrapolate to New Tasks: A Relational Approach to Task Extrapolation
abstract: Modern learning systems excel at interpolation but struggle to generalize to unseen tasks outside the training distribution's support. This failure occurs even in simple settings, such as handling task parameters beyond the training range, and persists despite advances in foundation models. To this end, we develop the Relational Task Extrapolator (RTE), an algorithm designed to enable systematic extrapolation to novel tasks. The key observation is that extrapolation is inherently relational: extrapolating to unseen tasks requires learning how tasks transform into one another. If a model learns the transformation between tasks A and B during training, it can apply that same transformation to relate known tasks to unseen ones at test time. RTE operationalizes this idea by decomposing each target task into a known anchor task and a transformation linking the anchor and target. It then learns a relational operator, mapping an anchor-transformation pair to predictions for the target task. We instantiate RTE across multiple task extrapolation regimes in function prediction, e.g. where target tasks use out-of-range parameters (parameter extrapolation), have greater compositional depth (length extrapolation), and/or recombine function primitives in unseen ways (compositional extrapolation). We further extend RTE to sequence prediction, integrating it into fine-tuning algorithms for foundation models. Across empirical studies, we find that RTE substantially outperforms existing approaches on extrapolation to novel, unseen tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出关系任务外推器RTE，通过学习任务间变换关系实现系统性的外推到未知任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代学习系统（包括基础模型）擅长内插，但难以泛化到训练分布外的任务，即使简单参数超出范围也会失败。这种外推能力缺失限制了模型在现实场景中的应用，因为新任务常涉及训练中未见的参数、深度或组合方式。现有方法未能有效解决这一根本问题。
light_analysis.method: RTE将每个目标任务分解为已知的锚点任务和连接两者的变换，学习一个关系算子，将锚点-变换对映射到目标任务的预测。在函数预测中，该方法适用于参数外推、长度外推和组合外推等多种场景。此外，RTE可扩展到序列预测，通过集成到基础模型的微调算法中实现。
light_analysis.result: 在参数外推、长度外推和组合外推等多个任务外推设置中，RTE显著优于现有方法。尽管摘要未提供具体数值，但强调RTE在泛化到未见任务上取得了大幅性能提升。实验覆盖函数预测和序列预测领域，验证了方法的有效性和通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: RTE为任务外推提供了系统性的关系方法，揭示了学习任务间变换是关键。该工作具有重要的学术价值，推动了机器学习对外推能力的理解，并可用于需要处理分布外任务的场景（如元学习、超参数优化）。未来可探索自动锚点选择或扩展到更复杂的任务空间。

title: CCS: Clinical Consensus Selection for Radiology Report Generation
abstract: Radiology report generation (RRG) is commonly formulated as a single-path generation task, where a multimodal large language model (MLLM) produces one decoded report as the final output. While recent progress has largely been driven by scaling training data, model capacity, and retrieval mechanisms, improving report quality at inference time remains underexplored. In this work, we observe that fixed radiology MLLMs often generate clinically stronger reports elsewhere in their candidate pool than the one selected by default decoding, suggesting that inference-time decision making remains an overlooked bottleneck. To address this, we propose Clinical Consensus Selection (CCS), a decoder-agnostic inference-time selection framework that samples multiple candidate reports and selects the one with the highest clinical consensus across the rollout pool. CCS unifies text-based utilities with a radiology-adapted utility computed by an image--report-trained multimodal embedder, which measures candidate agreement beyond surface-level textual similarity. Across three datasets and multiple radiology MLLMs, CCS consistently improves inference-time performance over single-path decoding and generic Best-of-N baselines, with particularly clear gains on clinical metrics. Further analysis shows that image-grounded utility forms a selection axis distinct from textual consensus and that substantial headroom remains for improving RRG at inference time.

light_analysis.overview: 提出临床共识选择（CCS）框架，通过采样多候选报告并选择临床共识最高的报告来提升放射学报告生成的推理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 放射学报告生成通常采用单路径生成，但固定多模态大语言模型的候选池中常存在比默认解码更优的报告，表明推理阶段决策是未充分探索的瓶颈。现有方法侧重训练数据、模型容量和检索机制，而推理时质量提升研究不足。
light_analysis.method: CCS是一个解码器无关的推理时选择框架，采样多个候选报告，通过结合文本效用（如BLEU）和基于图像-报告训练的多模态嵌入器计算的放射学适配效用，衡量候选报告之间的临床共识，最终选择共识最高的报告。该方法无需修改模型，统一了文本相似度与跨模态一致性。
light_analysis.result: 在三个数据集和多个放射学MLLM上，CCS一致优于单路径解码和通用Best-of-N基线，在临床指标上提升显著。分析显示图像基础效用与文本共识形成不同选择轴，且推理时改进仍有较大空间。
light_analysis.conclusion: CCS通过推理时选择显著提升放射学报告生成的临床质量，具有实用价值。其局限性在于多候选采样增加计算成本，未来可探索更高效的采样策略或端到端共识学习。

title: PARCEL: Pool-Anchored Resampling with Conditioned Elastic Queries for Efficient Vision-Language Understanding
abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) map visual inputs into dense token sequences, imposing a quadratic computational bottleneck for inference. Elastic visual-token compression addresses this by training a single model that can run at multiple visual-token budgets. However, existing approaches struggle under aggressive compression. Spatial-only compression, as in nested pooling, behaves as an imperfect low-pass filter and induces spectral aliasing that obscures fine-grained detail. Query-only compression, as in nested query resampling, replaces explicit grid-aligned tokens with non-local summaries and substantially degrades spatial grounding. To resolve this representational conflict, we introduce PARCEL (Pool-Anchored Resampling with Conditioned Elastic Queries for Efficient Vision-Language Understanding), a visual tokenization architecture that dynamically partitions the labor of feature extraction. PARCEL establishes spatial pool tokens as low-frequency layout anchors and conditions elastic query tokens on these anchors through Pool-Conditioned Query Resampling. This encourages query tokens to focus on complementary visual features rather than redundant spatial mapping. Extensive evaluations across 27 benchmarks show that PARCEL improves the performance-efficiency Pareto frontier, consistently outperforming existing matryoshka baselines across visual-token budgets while preserving the "train once, deploy anywhere" paradigm.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PARCEL架构，通过空间池化锚点与弹性查询重采样，解决视觉令牌压缩中空间与查询的冲突，提升视觉语言模型的效率与性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型将视觉输入映射为密集令牌序列，导致推理时二次计算瓶颈。弹性视觉令牌压缩可训练单一模型适应多种令牌预算，但现有方法在激进压缩下表现不佳：空间压缩如嵌套池化导致频谱混叠，丢失细节；查询压缩如嵌套查询重采样使用非局部摘要，损害空间定位。因此需要解决这种表征冲突。
light_analysis.method: 提出PARCEL架构，动态分配特征提取任务。建立空间池化令牌作为低频布局锚点，通过池化条件查询重采样使弹性查询令牌依赖于这些锚点，鼓励查询令牌聚焦于互补的视觉特征而非冗余的空间映射，实现“一次训练，多处部署”。
light_analysis.result: 在27个基准测试上，PARCEL改进了性能-效率帕累托前沿，在多种视觉令牌预算下持续优于现有嵌套基线，保持了“一次训练，处处部署”的范式，具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了PARCEL架构，有效解决视觉令牌压缩中空间与查询压缩的冲突，显著提升视觉语言模型的推理效率与性能，具有学术和实际应用价值。未来可探索更极端的压缩场景或与其他模态的融合。

title: Beyond MSE: Improving Precipitation Nowcasting with Multi-Quantile Regression
abstract: Deep-learning precipitation nowcasting models are often optimized using pointwise losses such as mean squared error or mean absolute error, which can lead to overly smooth forecasts and poor representation of heavy rainfall. This study investigates whether the predictive performance of an established deterministic nowcasting architecture can be improved by reformulating training as a multi-quantile regression problem. Using SmaAt-UNet as a core model, we compare MSE, MAE, and multi-quantile pinball-loss training on radar precipitation nowcasting over the Netherlands. The results show that multi-quantile training improves the central deterministic forecast, decreasing test-set MSE by 8.6\% compared to a model trained using MSE, while also producing upper-quantile outputs that are useful for risk-sensitive prediction of heavy precipitation. These findings suggest that quantile regression provides a simple alternative to standard pointwise losses without requiring a new architecture or generative sampling procedure. The implementation of our models and training setup is available on \href{https://github.com/gijsvn/Multi-Quantile-Precipitation-Nowcasting}{GitHub}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出用多分位数回归替代MSE/MAE点态损失，在不改变模型架构下提升降水临近预报的确定性预测和极端降水能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度学习降水临近预报模型常用MSE或MAE点态损失优化，这会导致预报结果过度平滑，对强降雨事件的表征能力不足。实际应用中，准确预测极端降水对防灾减灾至关重要，而现有点态损失无法有效捕捉尾部风险。因此，需要一种简单有效的方法来改善确定性预报质量，同时提供降水不确定性信息。
light_analysis.method: 以SmaAt-UNet为基础模型，将训练目标从MSE/MAE点态损失改为多分位数回归损失（Pinball损失）。模型同时预测多个分位数（如0.1, 0.5, 0.9），其中中位数作为确定性预报。实验使用荷兰雷达降水数据，对比MSE、MAE和多分位数损失训练的效果，代码已开源。
light_analysis.result: 多分位数训练使测试集MSE比MSE训练降低8.6%，中位数预报更准确；同时上分位数输出能有效指示强降水风险区域。该方法无需改变网络结构或引入生成采样，在保持计算效率的同时提升了预测性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 多分位数回归为降水临近预报提供了一种简单替代方案，通过单一模型同时输出确定性预报和不确定性估计，对风险敏感应用价值显著。未来可探索更多分位数组合或扩展到其他气象预报任务。

title: Evolving Features vs Evolving Entire Trees with GP for Interpretable Survival Analysis
abstract: Survival analysis concerns the task of predicting the time until an event occurs. Often used in the medical field, survival analysis deals with incomplete (i.e., censored) data, for instance, from patients who did not experience the event during the duration of the study. For practical use, both accuracy and interpretability are important.   Survival trees are easy-to-follow survival models that split the patient cohort recursively into discrete patient groups. Whilst survival trees can capture complex relationships, they typically need to grow large, threatening interpretability. Moreover, survival trees are often built using greedy approaches that may overlook globally optimal split combinations, limiting predictive performance.   Shallow survival trees require expressive, higher-order feature combinations to achieve competitive accuracy. We therefore use genetic programming to multi-objectively evolve inherently inspectable feature sets and study how they interact with different tree induction strategies. We further introduce an evolutionary approach that jointly optimises the survival tree structure and the non-linear split logic.   Our findings demonstrate that evolutionary feature construction improves predictive performance across different tree induction strategies on two real-world datasets and two different survival tree depths. Full joint evolution has the overall highest potential to propose multiple inherently inspectable shallow survival trees of good performance.

light_analysis.overview: 使用遗传编程多目标进化可解释特征集，并联合优化树结构与分裂逻辑，提升浅层生存树的解释性与预测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 生存分析需处理删失数据，生存树可解释但大时威胁解释性；贪婪构建忽略全局最优，浅层树需高阶特征组合。现有方法在解释性和准确性间权衡不足，需进化方法自动搜索特征和树结构。
light_analysis.method: 提出两种遗传编程方法：进化特征集（多目标）与不同树归纳策略结合；联合进化同时优化树结构和非线性分裂逻辑。在两个真实数据集上评估两种树深度，对比不同策略。
light_analysis.result: 进化特征构建在两种树归纳策略和深度下均提升预测性能；完全联合进化潜力最大，能生成多个可解释且性能良好的浅层生存树。
light_analysis.conclusion: 进化方法有效提升可解释生存树的性能，联合进化优于单独特征进化。为生存分析提供新途径，平衡解释性与精度。未来可扩展至更大数据或更复杂生存模型。

title: SGMD: Score Gradient Matching Distillation for Few-Step Video Diffusion Distillation
abstract: Distribution Matching Distillation (DMD) is a widely used paradigm for accelerating inference in few-step video diffusion models. However, DMD-style video distillation faces two coupled challenges: the fake score must track a continuously evolving generator, making training costly when frequent updates are required, while reverse-KL-style matching can be mode-seeking and conservative for preserving strong motion dynamics. To address these issues, we propose \textbf{Score Gradient Matching Distillation (SGMD)}. SGMD adopts a fake-score perspective by directly optimizing the fake score toward the teacher, while using teacher stop-gradient Fisher as a stable distribution-matching objective. We provide a gradient analysis that motivates this objective choice under ideal tracking. Building on this, SGMD introduces a pair of dual potentials: negative-residual (NR) for outer-loop correction and residual-contraction (RC) for inner-loop tracking. Empirically, compared to DMD2, SGMD achieves an approximately $\sim 3\times$ training speedup and substantially improves motion dynamics for 4-step distilled models while preserving temporal consistency.
