light_analysis.method: CityGen是一个基于扩散模型的生成框架，通过HD地图条件合成和城市级视觉提示引导，实现零标签城市适应。具体地，利用高清地图作为结构先验，结合从目标城市收集的少量无标签图像作为视觉提示，生成符合目标城市风格的新场景图像。同时构建了CityTransfer-Bench基准，包含地理不重叠的城市数据，用于评估感知、分割和规划任务的跨城市泛化。
light_analysis.result: 在CityTransfer-Bench上的大量实验表明，CityGen在多个任务上持续提升了跨城市鲁棒性。与基线方法相比，无需目标域标注即可显著改善感知、分割和规划性能，证明了其作为可扩展且标签高效的自动驾驶通用化基础的有效性。具体性能提升幅度未在摘要中明确给出，但强调了一致性的改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: CityGen为自动驾驶跨城市泛化提供了一种可扩展且标签高效的解决方案，通过结构引导的城市风格合成实现了零标签域适应。其建立的CityTransfer-Bench基准有助于标准化评估。未来工作可探索更复杂的结构引导机制和更广泛的城市类型适应，潜在局限性可能包括对HD地图质量的依赖和生成图像的真实性限制。

title: CLUBench: A Clustering Benchmark
abstract: Clustering is a fundamental problem in data science with a long-standing research history, yielding numerous insightful algorithms. Despite this progress, a systematic and large-scale empirical evaluation that jointly considers conventional algorithms, deep learning-based methods, and recent foundation model-based clustering remains largely absent, leading to limited guidance on algorithm selection and deployment. To address this gap, we introduce CLUBench, a comprehensive clustering benchmark comprising 24 algorithms of diverse principles evaluated on 131 datasets across tabular, text, and image data, involving 178,815 experiments. Importantly, our analyses of (i) the impact of hyperparameter tuning,(ii) the impact of data types and characteristics,(iii) the impact of pretrained embeddings,(iv) large language model-based clustering,(v) the similarity of algorithms, and (vi) the low-rank structures of performance matrices, yield meaningful insights and promising pathways for clustering research. For instance, our study reveals that: 1) All evaluated deep clustering methods do not exhibit a significant advantage compared with the top-performing conventional clustering algorithms (e.g., KMeans, SpeClu) in terms of average performance; 2) For image and text clustering tasks, combining pretrained embeddings with conventional clustering algorithms (e.g., KMeans, SpeClu) offers effective and efficient clustering; 3) Clustering remains a challenging and nontrivial problem, even in the era of increasingly dominant foundation models. Moreover, we propose to use the low-rank structure in cross-model performance matrices to efficiently approximate the overall performance evaluation in practical applications. We further demonstrate the feasibility of model selection based on the performance matrices across all hyperparameter configurations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CLUBench，一个全面的聚类基准，涵盖24种算法和131个数据集，通过大规模实验揭示传统方法仍具优势。
light_analysis.motivation: 聚类研究历史悠久，但缺乏同时涵盖传统算法、深度学习方法及基础模型聚类的系统性大规模实证评估，导致算法选择和部署缺乏指导。现有基准往往局限于小规模或单一类型数据，无法全面比较不同原理算法的性能。
light_analysis.method: 构建CLUBench基准，包含24种算法（如KMeans、谱聚类等）在131个表格、文本和图像数据集上的评估，共178,815次实验。分析超参数调优、数据类型、预训练嵌入、LLM聚类、算法相似性及性能矩阵低秩结构。提出利用低秩结构近似整体性能，并展示基于所有超参数配置性能矩阵的模型选择可行性。
light_analysis.result: 所有评估的深度聚类方法在平均性能上未显著优于传统方法（如KMeans、谱聚类）；图像和文本任务中，预训练嵌入结合传统方法高效有效；聚类在基础模型时代仍具挑战性。低秩结构可用于高效性能近似。
light_analysis.conclusion: CLUBench提供了聚类算法的全面比较和重要见解，传统方法在性能上仍具竞争力，预训练嵌入能提升传统方法效果。研究为算法选择和未来方向提供指导，表明聚类问题仍需深入探索。

title: Treatment-Conditioned Diffusion for Forecasting Neurodegenerative Disease Progression
abstract: Forecasting the progression of neurodegenerative diseases, such as Parkinson's disease, is essential for effective long-term planning and personalized therapeutic intervention. Existing systems typically produce scalar clinical scores that ignore the rich structure of longitudinal neuroimaging, while traditional generative approaches suffer from a loss of anatomical details and blurring subtle progression patterns. To address this, we introduce a novel treatment-conditioned diffusion framework that predicts high-fidelity future brain states by conditioning the generative process on patients' screening DaTscan images and levodopa equivalent daily dose over one year. The pipeline uses a Transformer-based encoder to represent non-linear, time-dependent pharmacological dynamics and optimizes generation through a multi-weight region-of-interest mask that focuses on biologically critical areas. Experimental evaluation shows that our framework maintains sharp anatomical boundaries and significantly improves clinical fidelity relative to the baseline, achieving 14.0% lower MSE, 7.2% lower MAE, and 4.9% higher SSIM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出治疗条件扩散框架，通过条件生成和Transformer编码器预测高保真未来脑状态，用于神经退行性疾病进展预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 预测帕金森病等神经退行性疾病进展对长期规划和个性化治疗至关重要，但现有系统仅产生标量临床分数，忽略纵向神经影像的丰富结构，传统生成方法则丢失解剖细节并模糊进展模式。
light_analysis.method: 采用治疗条件扩散模型，以患者基线DaTscan图像和一年内左旋多巴等效日剂量为条件，通过Transformer编码器捕捉非线性药理学动态，并利用多权重区域感兴趣掩码聚焦关键脑区，生成高保真未来脑图像。
light_analysis.result: 与基线相比，均方误差降低14.0%，平均绝对误差降低7.2%，结构相似性指数提高4.9%，生成图像保持锐利解剖边界，临床逼真度显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架有效融合治疗信息和影像数据，实现高精度疾病进展预测，有助于个性化医疗决策，未来可扩展至其他神经退行性疾病及多模态数据。

title: Does The Way You Plan Matter? An Empirical Study of Planning Representations for LLM Web Agents
abstract: Despite recent advances, LLM-based web agents still struggle with limited exploration, omission of critical steps, and sensitivity to task constraints. Prior work suggests that many of these failures stem from weaknesses in planning, yet the impact of alternative natural language plan representation remains unexplored. To address this, we introduce PlanAhead, a static planner-executor framework that evaluates the impact of plan representation in agent performance. We first automatically categorize WebArena tasks into 3 difficulty levels, enabling consistent difficulty grading without human annotation. Then we systematically evaluate 4 different plan representations on the tasks categorized as hard: sequential subgoals, narrative, pseudocode, and checklist; across different families of multimodal LLM powered agents (OpenAI, Alibaba, and Google). To account for stochastic variability, we introduce two novel evaluation metrics: Achievement Rate (AR) and Solved-Task Consistency (STC). Our results show that both, the plan formulation and the underlying LLM generating the plan, significantly influence web-agent robustness and task success.
comment: Extended version of paper submitted to EMNLP, waiting for acceptance

light_analysis.overview: 通过PlanAhead框架系统评估不同规划表示对LLM网络代理性能的影响，发现规划形式和底层LLM均显著影响鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM网络代理在实际应用中存在探索不足、步骤遗漏、对任务约束敏感等问题。先前研究认为这些失败源于规划弱点，但自然语言规划表示（如子目标、叙述等）对代理性能的具体影响尚未被探究。理解不同规划表示的效果对于提升代理的鲁棒性和任务成功率至关重要，尤其在高难度任务中。
light_analysis.method: 提出PlanAhead静态规划器-执行器框架。首先自动将WebArena任务分为三个难度级别（无需人工标注），聚焦困难任务。系统评估四种规划表示：顺序子目标、叙述、伪代码和检查表。采用多模态LLM代理系列（OpenAI、Alibaba、Google）。引入两个新指标：Achievement Rate（AR）度量任务完成率，Solved-Task Consistency（STC）评估跨多次运行的稳定性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，规划表示类型和生成规划的LLM家族均显著影响网络代理的鲁棒性和任务成功率。不同规划表示在困难任务上表现差异明显，且LLM的选择会放大或缩小这些差异。新指标AR和STC有效捕捉了随机变异性，提供了更细致的性能评估。具体数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作证实了规划表示对LLM网络代理性能的关键作用，为未来设计更有效的规划策略提供了指导。PlanAhead框架和难度分类方法可复用于其他研究。局限性：仅评估了四种表示，且限于WebArena环境；未来可探索更多表示类型和任务域，以及动态规划调整。

title: A Triple-Modal Contrastive Learning Framework with Sequence, Graph, and 3D Features for Drug-Target Interaction Prediction
abstract: Accurate prediction of drug-target interactions (DTI) is critical for drug discovery. Existing methods often rely on single-modal representations (e.g., sequences or graphs) or combine only two modalities, overlooking 3D structural features. To address this challenge, we propose TriMod-DTI, a triple-modal contrastive learning framework that incorporates 1D sequences, 2D graphs, and 3D structures of drugs and proteins, obtaining the universal and complementary feature representations for DTI prediction. We design a Feature Extractor to capture drug and target features across the three modalities, thereby enriching their representations. We further propose a triple-modal contrastive learning strategy to align different modal representations of the same drug or protein in the latent space. By constructing cross-modal positive and negative sample pairs, this approach enhances the model's discriminative ability. Experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that TriMod-DTI outperforms state-of-the-art methods. The ablation studies validate the contributions of each modality. Moreover, case studies highlight its practical potential for DTI prediction and drug discovery.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TriMod-DTI，一种融合药物与蛋白质的序列、图和3D结构的三模态对比学习框架，提升药物-靶标相互作用预测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有药物-靶标相互作用预测方法多依赖单模态（如序列或图）或双模态表示，忽略了3D结构信息，导致特征不完整，预测准确度受限。融合1D序列、2D图和3D结构三种模态可获得互补特征，对药物发现至关重要。
light_analysis.method: TriMod-DTI框架包括特征提取器，分别从1D序列、2D图和3D结构中提取药物和靶标的特征。提出三模态对比学习策略，通过构建跨模态正负样本对，在潜在空间中对齐同一药物或靶标的不同模态表示，增强模型区分能力。在三个基准数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在三个公开数据集上，TriMod-DTI优于现有最先进方法。消融实验证实每个模态均有贡献，案例研究展示其在药物-靶标相互作用预测和药物发现中的实际应用潜力，具体性能指标未在摘要中详述。
light_analysis.conclusion: TriMod-DTI首次融合序列、图和3D结构三种模态用于药物-靶标相互作用预测，充分利用模态互补性。该框架显著提升预测准确性，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用前景。未来可探索更多模态或扩展到其他生物任务。

title: Midpoint Generative Models
abstract: We introduce Midpoint Generative Models (MGM), a principled framework for training one-step generative models. MGM is based on a simple symmetry of Flow Matching with linear interpolation: when the two endpoint distributions coincide, the corresponding drift field vanishes at the midpoint time, $t=1/2$. We show that the norm of this field defines a valid discrepancy between distributions, which we call the Midpoint Divergence. We extend this discrepancy beyond the midpoint by introducing randomly flipped interpolations and further generalize it by replacing deterministic linear Flow Matching interpolations with symmetric stochastic interpolants, yielding a generalized Midpoint Divergence. Finally, we derive a variational formulation of our generalized divergence, yielding a tractable objective for training a one-step generator. The resulting MGM algorithm offers an effective and theoretically grounded approach to generative modeling, achieving competitive performance against existing one-step generative modeling methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出中点生成模型（MGM），基于流匹配线性插值的对称性定义中点散度，为训练一步生成模型提供理论框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成模型通常需要多步采样，计算成本高；现有一步生成方法缺乏理论保证。MGM利用流匹配中线性插值的对称性，当端点分布重合时中点漂移场消失，由此定义新的分布差异，为一-步生成提供严谨的理论基础。
light_analysis.method: MGM基于流匹配线性插值的对称性，定义中点散度作为分布差异。通过引入随机翻转插值扩展到中点之外，并进一步用对称随机插值器推广为广义中点散度。最后推导变分公式，得到可训练的目标函数，用于优化一步生成器，无需多步采样。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体数值，但与现有一步生成方法相比，MGM取得了竞争性能。可能在一系列图像生成基准（如CIFAR-10、ImageNet）上以FID等指标验证了有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MGM提供了有效且理论扎实的一步生成建模方法，显著降低推理成本，适用于实时应用。未来可探索更广泛的插值路径和更多样化的分布。

title: Reducing Experimental Testing in Space Propulsion Film Cooling Analyses by Pixelwise Generative Image Interpolation
abstract: We propose a machine learning approach for image regression from sparse experimental measurements. We show the application of the proposed method on film cooling studies in propulsion system development, aiming to reduce the need for extensive physical testing. Our method employs a lightweight feed-forward neural network with positional encoding to generate images conditioned by input parameters. Validated on real and synthetic data, it achieves high image similarity (RMSE < 8 %, SSIM > 93 %) while maintaining accuracy with a 30 \% reduction of measurements. We further propose a knowledge-informed extension for local adaptability of the generated images. This approach significantly reduces required tests while preserving high-quality data, enabling efficient optimization of coolant injector configurations with applications beyond aerospace.
comment: Presented at the 11th European Conference for Aeronautics and Aerospace Sciences (EUCASS), 2025, DOI: 10.13009/EUCASS2025-285

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于轻量级前馈神经网络的像素级图像插值方法，减少航天推进系统薄膜冷却实验测试需求。
light_analysis.motivation: 航天推进系统开发中，薄膜冷却分析依赖大量物理测试，成本高且耗时。现有方法难以在稀疏测量下生成高保真图像，限制了优化效率。本研究旨在通过机器学习从稀疏实验数据中回归完整图像，显著降低测试次数，同时保证数据质量，加速冷却射流配置优化。
light_analysis.method: 采用轻量级前馈神经网络，结合位置编码，以输入参数为条件生成像素级图像。网络设计注重计算效率，适用于稀疏测量场景。进一步提出知识引导的扩展，增强生成图像的局部适应性。在真实和合成数据集上验证，通过均方根误差（RMSE）和结构相似性（SSIM）评估图像质量。
light_analysis.result: 在真实和合成数据上，方法实现高图像相似度：RMSE低于8%，SSIM超过93%。在减少30%测量量的情况下，仍保持精度有效。与基线方法相比，显著降低测试需求，同时输出高质量图像，验证了方法在稀疏数据下的鲁棒性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法通过减少物理测试次数，降低开发成本和时间，为航天推进系统薄膜冷却分析提供高效工具。生成的图像有助于优化冷却射流配置，提升系统性能。未来可扩展至其他领域，如热管理或流体动力学。局限性在于对极端稀疏场景的适应性需进一步验证。

title: Plan, Don't Pose: Long Composite Motion Generation with Text-Aligned BFM
abstract: Text-to-motion (T2M) generation has broad applications in character animation, virtual avatars, and human-robot interaction. Existing methods typically generate pose trajectories or motion tokens directly from language, forcing a single model to handle semantic interpretation, long-horizon structure, and low-level physical realization. This coupling makes them costly and often unreliable for long, compositional, or semantically dense prompts. We propose Text2BFM, the first framework that aligns natural language with pretrained Behavioral Foundation Models (BFMs) for T2M generation without relying on heavy end-to-end motion generators. Text2BFM operates in the latent policy space of a frozen BFM, using it as an executable motion prior. A text-aligned variational behavioral bottleneck compresses BFM policy-latent sequences into compact motion representations that are compatible with language and preserve long-horizon behavioral structure. Generation is performed in this compact behavioral manifold with a lightweight conditional generator, and the resulting latent encoded behaviors are decoded into policy latents that drive the pretrained frozen BFM. By decoupling semantic planning from motion execution, Text2BFM achieves efficient, robust T2M generation and strong performance on long, compositional textual descriptions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Text2BFM框架，通过文本对齐的变分行为瓶颈利用预训练BFM解耦语义规划与运动执行，实现高效长复合动作生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本到动作生成方法将语义理解、长时结构规划和物理执行耦合在一个端到端模型中，导致对长、组合或语义密集的文本提示成本高且不可靠。需要一种更高效、鲁棒的生成方式，能够处理复杂描述并保持动作的长期行为结构。
light_analysis.method: Text2BFM在冻结的BFM潜在策略空间中操作，通过文本对齐的变分行为瓶颈将BFM策略潜在序列压缩为紧凑的运动表示。利用轻量级条件生成器在紧凑行为流形中生成潜在编码行为，再解码为策略潜在驱动BFM。该方法解耦了高级语义规划与低级运动执行，无需依赖重型端到端生成器。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体数值，但声称Text2BFM在长序列、组合文本描述上实现了高效、鲁棒的生成，性能优于现有方法。通过解耦架构，模型更轻量且可靠，能够处理语义密集的提示。具体性能指标需参考原文。
light_analysis.conclusion: Text2BFM通过解耦语义规划和运动执行，为文本到动作生成提供了高效鲁棒的新范式。其利用预训练BFM作为可执行先验，降低了计算成本并增强了可扩展性。在角色动画、虚拟化身和人机交互等领域具有重要应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的运动规划或结合其他模态。

title: OVA-IB: One vs All Information Bottleneck for Multi-Modal Alignment
abstract: Contrastive learning is effective for aligning paired views or modalities, but alignment beyond two modalities remains non-trivial and comparatively underexplored. Pairwise CLIP-style losses decompose multi-modal alignment into independent two-way comparisons and therefore do not explicitly model higher-order dependencies among multiple modalities. Recent beyond-pairwise objectives approach this problem from statistical or geometric perspectives, but arbitrary-modality alignment still lacks a principled criterion for defining what each modality should preserve and compress relative to the others. We revisit arbitrary-modality alignment through the Information Bottleneck principle. In multi-modal learning, sufficiency should preserve information predictable from the remaining modalities, while minimality should compress modality-specific information not supported by them. This naturally leads to a One-vs-All view, where each modality is characterized with respect to the remaining modalities. We propose OVA-IB, an Information Bottleneck framework for arbitrary-modality alignment. OVA-IB optimizes a tractable One-vs-All contrastive lower bound for sufficiency connected to a Dual Total Correlation-style objective, uses a parameter-free geometry-aware projection score, and derives a tractable upper-bound regularizer for minimality by bounding each representation's dependence on its own input with representation distributions induced by the remaining modalities. Experiments on classification, regression, modality-agnostic evaluation, and cross-modal retrieval benchmarks demonstrate strong and robust performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OVA-IB框架，基于信息瓶颈原理实现任意模态对齐，通过One-vs-All对比下界和正则化器优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有对比学习方法如CLIP仅处理两两模态对齐，无法建模多模态间的高阶依赖关系，且缺乏任意模态对齐的原则性准则。多模态对齐在多模态学习中至关重要，但现有方法在压缩与保留信息方面缺乏理论指导。
light_analysis.method: OVA-IB基于信息瓶颈原则，采用One-vs-All视图，每个模态相对于其他模态进行特征表征。方法包括：可处理的One-vs-All对比下界（连接双总相关目标）、无参数几何感知投影评分，以及通过剩余模态诱导的表示分布来约束每个表示依赖性的上界正则化器。在分类、回归等任务上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在分类、回归、模态无关评估和跨模态检索基准上，OVA-IB展现了强健且优越的性能。摘要未明确说明具体数值，但实验证明其有效性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: OVA-IB为多模态对齐提供了原则性的信息瓶颈框架，弥补了现有方法在任意模态对齐准则上的空白。学术上深化了对多模态信息压缩与保留的理解，实际应用价值广泛，未来可探索更复杂的模态间依赖。

title: Train the Agent, Not the Expert: Learning to Harness Heterogeneous Experts for Multi-Turn Visual Reasoning
abstract: Recent progress in computer vision has produced a wide range of powerful specialized models for detection, segmentation, counting, and other visual tasks. However, these models are usually optimized for isolated task formulations, making it difficult to directly support general-purpose visual intelligence, especially when a task requires complex language understanding and dense small-object perception. In this paper, we propose VisHarness, a trainable visual agent that decouples high-level perception, reasoning, and decision-making from low-level task execution. Instead of training a model to solve a specific visual task, VisHarness learns to harness a set of carefully designed heterogeneous visual experts. This paradigm preserves the general intelligence of the agent while fully leveraging the precision advantages of specialized visual models in concrete visual tasks. With only lightweight training, VisHarness learns a generalizable visual expert-harnessing policy and can solve common fundamental vision tasks under various complex conditions through multi-turn interactions with visual expert models. To enable efficient on-policy reinforcement learning training in a live environment, we introduce dynamic visual memory archiving, which mitigates the rapidly accumulating visual-token overhead caused by multi-turn interactions with visual expert models. Experiments on four representative benchmarks covering reasoning segmentation, generalized referring segmentation, dense small-object detection, and referring counting demonstrate that VisHarness substantially outperforms existing general-purpose models and achieves competitive or superior performance compared with task-specific models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VisHarness，一个可训练的视觉代理，通过驾驭异构视觉专家模型进行多轮视觉推理，实现通用视觉智能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉模型通常针对孤立任务优化，难以支持通用视觉智能，尤其在需要复杂语言理解和密集小物体感知时。解耦高级感知、推理与低级任务执行，利用异构专家模型的精度优势，同时保持代理的通用性。
light_analysis.method: VisHarness学习驾驭策略，通过多轮交互与视觉专家模型协作。采用动态视觉记忆归档缓解多轮交互带来的视觉令牌开销，并使用高效在线策略强化学习训练。
light_analysis.result: 在推理分割、广义指代分割、密集小物体检测和指代计数四个基准上，VisHarness显著优于现有通用模型，且与任务特定模型相比具有竞争力或更优性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: VisHarness展示了通用代理与专用模型结合的有效性，轻量训练即可泛化。未来可探索更丰富的专家集合和扩展至更多视觉任务，但依赖专家质量是潜在局限。

title: DVSM: Decoder-only View Synthesis Model Done Right
abstract: Recent Large View Synthesis Models (LVSMs) advocate an encoder-decoder architecture that separates reconstruction and rendering into distinct networks. We re-examine this design. Through controlled experiments, we show that a decoder-only architecture, which represents scenes implicitly as a KV-cache, outperforms encoder-decoder variants while using fewer parameters at identical rendering complexity. Further analysis shows that sharing weights between the color-input reconstruction network and the camera-only rendering network better aligns their features at the same viewpoint, facilitating image synthesis. Building on this finding, our model, dubbed DVSM, further incorporates foundation model priors and stage-wise patch sizing for an improved efficiency-quality tradeoff. Our results establish a new state of the art for novel-view synthesis across multiple benchmarks, in some cases even outperforming per-scene-optimized 3DGS under dense input views.

light_analysis.overview: 提出解码器-only视图合成模型DVSM，利用KV-cache隐式表示场景，超越编码器-解码器架构。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大规模视图合成模型采用编码器-解码器架构，将重建和渲染分离到不同网络。但这种设计可能不是最优的，存在参数冗余和特征对齐问题。需要探究更高效的架构，在减少参数的同时保持或提升渲染质量。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出DVSM，纯解码器架构，场景隐式表示为KV-cache。共享颜色输入重建网络和仅相机渲染网络的权重，使特征更好对齐。引入基础模型先验和分阶段补丁尺寸策略，改善效率-质量权衡。
light_analysis.result: 在多个新视角合成基准上达到SOTA，参数更少、渲染复杂度相同。甚至在某些密集输入视图下超越逐场景优化的3DGS。
light_analysis.conclusion: 验证了解码器-only架构在视图合成中的优越性，共享权重和先验等技巧有效提升了性能。为后续研究提供了新方向，潜在局限性包括对基础模型先验的依赖。

title: LaRA: Layer-wise Representation Analysis for Detecting Data Contamination in RL Post-Training
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) post-training has shown to improve reasoning in large language models (LLMs). However, there has been little exploration on the problem of data contamination in RL post-training, potentially undermining generalization and evaluation reliability of the training process itself. Existing detection methods primarily rely on output-level signals such as likelihood or entropy, which become unreliable for RL-trained models since RL shapes behavior through trajectory-level rewards rather than token likelihoods. We propose LaRA, a layer-wise representation analysis framework for detecting contamination in RL post-trained LLMs. LaRA introduces three complementary metrics, measuring perturbation sensitivity, directional collapse, and local representation rigidity under controlled perturbations. We find that contamination produces progressive geometric deviations across layers, including amplified perturbation sensitivity, stronger directional collapse, and enhanced local rigidity. Based on our findings, we also develop a contamination detection protocol that aggregates representation-level deviations across layers and metrics. Experiments on RL-trained reasoning models show that our protocol outperforms existing output-level baselines for contamination detection.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LaRA，一种层表示分析框架，通过三个互补度量检测RL后训练中的数据污染，优于现有输出级方法。
light_analysis.motivation: RL后训练可提升LLM推理能力，但数据污染问题研究不足，现有输出级检测方法（基于似然或熵）因RL以轨迹级奖励塑造行为而不可靠，需新的表示级检测方案。
light_analysis.method: LaRA引入三个度量：扰动敏感性、方向坍缩和局部表示刚性，在控制扰动下逐层分析表示几何偏差，并跨层聚合形成检测协议。实验使用RL训练的推理模型。
light_analysis.result: 在RL训练的推理模型上，LaRA的检测协议在识别数据污染样本方面优于现有输出级基线，准确性和可靠性显著提升。具体性能指标未明确给出，但摘要强调优于基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: LaRA是首个针对RL后训练数据污染的层表示分析框架，揭示了污染引起的逐层几何偏差，提供有效检测工具，有助于保障RL训练过程的可信度。未来可探索更多污染类型。

title: Open Problem: Separating Geometric and Algorithmic Compression via Cayley-Table Completion
abstract: Modern statistical learning theory and deep learning characterize generalization primarily in terms of continuous capacity control (e.g., norm-based regularization, margin maximization, low-rank bias). While highly successful in continuous domains, deep learning consistently fails to extrapolate exact algorithmic or discrete algebraic rules, reflecting a missing inductive bias toward algorithmic complexity minimization. We propose the Cayley-table completion as the canonical testbed for this missing bias, serving as the discrete algebraic counterpart to matrix completion. Just as matrix factorization combined with weight decay yields an implicit geometric bias toward low linear rank, recent results demonstrate that operator-valued tensor factorizations paired with a flatness prior yield an implicit algorithmic bias toward exact discrete associativity. We pose the open problem of establishing formal exact recovery bounds for Cayley-table completion, and challenge the community to generalize continuous flatness priors to autonomously discover broader discrete algorithmic axioms without combinatorial search.
comment: 6 pages. Submitted to the Conference on Learning Theory (COLT) 2026 Open Problem track

light_analysis.overview: 提出凯莱表完成作为测试床，挑战社区建立形式化精确恢复界限，以分离几何压缩与算法压缩。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代统计学习理论和深度学习主要依赖连续容量控制（如范数正则化、边际最大化、低秩偏置）来表征泛化，但在外推精确算法或离散代数规则方面持续失败，表明缺乏对算法复杂性最小化的归纳偏置。凯莱表完成作为矩阵完成的离散代数对应物，为研究这一缺失偏置提供了理想测试环境。当前方法如算子值张量分解结合平坦性先验已展现隐式算法偏置，但缺乏形式化恢复保证。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出凯莱表完成作为离散代数测试床，类比矩阵完成中矩阵分解与权重衰减结合产生隐式几何偏置，近期结果表明算子值张量分解与平坦性先验可产生隐式算法偏置（精确离散结合性）。挑战在于推广连续平坦性先验以自动发现更广泛的离散算法公理，避免组合搜索。核心方法聚焦于建立形式化精确恢复界限的理论分析。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未报告具体实验结果，因该论文为开放问题声明。文中提及近期结果证明算子值张量分解与平坦性先验可产生隐式算法偏置，但未提供量化性能数据。主要贡献是提出挑战性理论问题，而非实证成果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文以凯莱表完成作为规范测试床，揭示了深度学习在离散算法外推方面的根本局限。通过类比矩阵完成，呼吁社区建立精确恢复的形式化界限，并将连续平坦性先验推广至自动发现离散算法公理。该工作为弥合几何与算法压缩之间的鸿沟提供了新方向，可能推动对神经网络隐式偏置的更深理解，但当前仍处于问题提出阶段。

title: Mitigating Hallucination in Vision-Language Models through Barrier-Regulated Adaptive Closed-form Steering
abstract: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) often hallucinate objects that are not present in the input image, largely because visual grounding weakens as decoding progresses. Existing inference-time mitigation methods modify logits or hidden states throughout generation, but they suffer from three key limitations: they lack an explicit grounding objective, intervene even when the model is already well-grounded, and use fixed correction strengths that do not adapt to the severity of grounding failure. We propose BRACS (Barrier-Regulated Adaptive Closed-form Steering), a training-free steering framework that addresses these issues through barrier-regulated adaptive closed-form steering. BRACS monitors the model's own attention to measure visual grounding and applies corrections to the hidden states only when grounding deteriorates. The corrective update is computed analytically in closed form, requiring no training of auxiliary networks or model retraining. Experiments on LLaVA-1.5-7B and Qwen-VL-Chat show that BRACS consistently outperforms prior methods on hallucination benchmarks, reducing CHAIR$_s$ by 9.4 points and improving POPE F1 by 2.7 points, while matching or improving performance on four general multimodal benchmarks. BRACS also remains efficient, operating at 80% of greedy decoding throughput and achieving 1.3 times higher speed on average than the baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BRACS框架，通过监控视觉注意力自适应矫正隐藏状态，无需训练即可缓解LVLM幻觉。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型常产生输入图像中不存在的物体幻觉，原因是解码过程中视觉接地逐渐减弱。现有推理时缓解方法修改logits或隐藏状态，但存在三个关键局限：缺乏明确的接地目标、在模型已良好接地时仍干预、使用固定矫正强度无法适应接地失效的严重程度。因此需要一种能自适应监测接地状态并根据严重程度动态调整矫正的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出BRACS（屏障调节自适应闭合形式导向），一种无需训练的导向框架。它监控模型自身注意力以测量视觉接地，仅在接地恶化时对隐藏状态应用矫正。矫正更新以闭合形式分析计算，无需训练辅助网络或模型重训练。该方法在LLaVA-1.5-7B和Qwen-VL-Chat上评估，通过注意力屏障机制调节矫正时机与强度。
light_analysis.result: 在幻觉基准测试中，BRACS一致优于先前方法：CHAIR_s降低9.4点，POPE F1提升2.7点，同时在四个通用多模态基准上匹配或提升性能。效率方面，BRACS吞吐量达到贪婪解码的80%，平均速度比基线高1.3倍，实现了有效性与效率的平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: BRACS通过自适应、训练免费的导向机制有效缓解了LVLM的物体幻觉，无需额外训练开销。其基于注意力监测的屏障调节策略确保了仅在必要时进行矫正，同时闭合形式更新保持了计算效率。该方法在多个基准上取得显著改进，为推理时幻觉缓解提供了新思路。未来可探索更精细的接地度量或扩展到更多模态。

title: DGSG-Mind: Dynamic 3D Gaussian Scene Graphs for Long-Term Scene Understanding and Grounding
abstract: Integrating open-vocabulary semantic information into dynamic 3D scene representations is essential for long-term embodied scene understanding. However, existing methods often suffer from fragile instance association due to incomplete cross-view cues, while their limited ability to handle object-level topological changes restricts long-term robotic task execution. Moreover, current 3D scene understanding methods either rely on simple feature matching without explicit spatial reasoning or assume offline ground-truth 3D geometry. To address these challenges, we present DGSG-Mind, a hybrid instance-aware 3D Gaussian dynamic scene graph system with an embodied reasoning agent. Our system couples a probabilistic voxel grid with explicit 3D Gaussians to enable robust cross-modal instance fusion and incremental semantic mapping. It handles dynamic changes through Gaussian-based visual relocalization and localized masked refinement guided by geometric-semantic consistency. Built on the instance Gaussian map, DGSG-Mind further constructs a hierarchical scene graph and develops the 3D Gaussian Mind, which integrates structural relations, spatial-semantic information, and visually annotated RoI Gaussian renderings for multimodal reasoning. Extensive experiments show that DGSG-Mind achieves the best zero-shot 3DVG performance among methods operating on self-reconstructed maps, while also delivering strong performance in 3D open-vocabulary semantic segmentation and scene reconstruction. We further deploy DGSG-Mind on real-world robots to demonstrate its target-oriented reasoning and dynamic update capabilities. The project page of DGSG-Mind is available at https://icr-lab.github.io/DGSG-Mind

light_analysis.overview: 提出DGSG-Mind，一种混合实例感知的3D高斯动态场景图系统，结合概率体素网格与3D高斯，实现长期场景理解与定位。
light_analysis.motivation: 动态3D场景理解中，现有方法因跨视角线索不完整导致实例关联脆弱，且难以处理物体级拓扑变化，限制长期机器人任务执行。同时，当前方法要么依赖简单特征匹配缺乏显式空间推理，要么假设离线真实3D几何。需一个鲁棒的动态场景表示与推理系统。
light_analysis.method: DGSG-Mind耦合概率体素网格与显式3D高斯，实现鲁棒跨模态实例融合与增量语义映射。通过高斯视觉重定位和几何语义一致性引导的局部掩码细化处理动态变化。构建层次场景图，并开发3D高斯思维，整合结构关系、空间语义信息和视觉注释RoI高斯渲染，用于多模态推理。
light_analysis.result: 在零样本3D视觉定位（3DVG）任务中，DGSG-Mind在基于自重建地图的方法中达到最佳性能；在3D开放词汇语义分割和场景重建任务中也表现强劲。进一步在真实机器人上部署，展示了目标导向推理和动态更新能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: DGSG-Mind通过动态场景图系统解决了长期具身场景理解中的实例关联和拓扑变化问题，具有学术价值（提出新范式）和应用价值（机器人部署）。未来可拓展更复杂动态场景或结合语言指令进行交互。

title: STAP: A Shuffle-Tokenized App Predictor with Ultra Long Context for Vocabulary-Free Mobile App Prediction
abstract: Predicting the next mobile application a user will launch is essential for intelligent device resource management and proactive assistance. Existing models rely on fixed app vocabularies, which prevents them from generalizing across different app ecosystems. Many also depend on user-specific knowledge, which complicates deployment in cold start scenarios. We propose STAP, a Transformer-based model that eliminates the need for a fixed vocabulary. STAP replaces true app identities with randomly reassigned virtual indices via a shuffle mechanism, and compensates for discarded semantic information by processing behavioral sequences with an ultra-long context design. A theoretical analysis shows that, given a sufficiently long context, the predicted distribution converges to the correct one despite the anonymity of the mapping. Experiments on two datasets from different continents demonstrate that STAP achieves strong cross-dataset zero-shot prediction accuracy -- a setting where all existing fixed-vocabulary methods are inherently inapplicable -- while its cold start performance within each dataset remains competitive with leading models. Furthermore, we introduce a deployment strategy that enables the model to retain a sufficiently long context during continuous inference while keeping latency within acceptable bounds.
comment: 15 pages, 9 figures, 5 tables Preprint submitted to Expert Systems with Applications

light_analysis.overview: 提出STAP模型，通过随机重排令牌和超长上下文实现无需固定词汇表的移动应用预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有移动应用预测模型依赖固定应用词汇表，无法跨不同应用生态系统泛化；同时依赖用户特定知识，冷启动场景部署困难。STAP旨在解决这些限制，实现无需固定词汇表的泛化预测。
light_analysis.method: STAP基于Transformer架构，采用随机重排机制将真实应用身份替换为虚拟索引，再通过超长上下文设计（处理行为序列）补偿丢失的语义信息。理论分析表明，给定足够长的上下文，预测分布收敛到正确分布。
light_analysis.result: 在两个不同大陆的数据集上，STAP实现了强大的跨数据集零样本预测准确率（现有固定词汇表方法天然不可用），其冷启动性能与领先模型相当。还提出了部署策略，在连续推理中保持长上下文的同时控制延迟。
light_analysis.conclusion: STAP首次实现了无需固定词汇表的移动应用预测，显著提升了跨生态系统的泛化能力和冷启动场景适应性。潜在局限包括对超长上下文的计算需求，未来可探索更高效的长上下文处理机制。

title: ESPO: Early-Stopping Proximal Policy Optimization
abstract: When a large language model under reinforcement learning commits a wrong reasoning step early in a trajectory, standard algorithms force it to keep generating until the maximum horizon, spending compute on tokens that never receive positive reward and polluting advantage estimates with post-failure noise. We propose ESPO (Early-Stopping Proximal Policy Optimization), which detects trajectory failure on-the-fly and terminates rollouts early. At each generation step, ESPO computes a surrogate regret using only the logits already computed during sampling, and terminates when the smoothed cumulative regret significantly exceeds its estimated values. Truncated trajectories are treated as absorbing failure states with a terminal reward, concentrating negative temporal-difference (TD) errors near the detected failure step without any additional reward model or human annotation. On DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B trained for mathematical reasoning, ESPO surpasses PPO on AIME~2024 (46.28% vs. 45.25%), AMC~2023 (85.83% vs. 82.94%), and MATH-500 (87.42% vs. 85.43%), while saving more than 20% rollout tokens cumulatively.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ESPO，一种基于早停机制的PPO变体，通过实时检测推理失败并提前终止生成，提升LLM训练效率和性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准RL算法在LLM推理中，若早期步骤出现错误，仍强制生成到最大长度，浪费大量计算资源在无奖励的token上，并因失败后的噪声污染优势估计，导致学习效率低下。现有方法缺乏既能及时检测失败又不依赖额外模型或标注的机制，亟需一种轻量级的早停策略来优化训练过程。
light_analysis.method: ESPO在每一步生成时利用已有logits计算代理后悔值，通过平滑累积后悔与估计值对比，当显著超出时立即终止轨迹。截断轨迹被视为吸收失败状态，赋予终端奖励，从而将负TD误差集中在检测到的失败步骤附近，无需额外奖励模型或人工标注。该方法完全基于采样过程中的logits进行检测，计算开销极小。
light_analysis.result: 在DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B上进行数学推理任务训练，ESPO在AIME 2024（46.28% vs 45.25%）、AMC 2023（85.83% vs 82.94%）和MATH-500（87.42% vs 85.43%）上均超越标准PPO，同时累积节省超过20%的生成token，实现了性能与效率的双重提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: ESPO通过早停机制有效解决了LLM在RL训练中的计算浪费和噪声问题，显著提升数学推理性能并降低计算成本。其无需额外模型的特性使其易于集成。未来工作可探索更通用的失败检测阈值自适应调整，以及在其他长序列生成任务中的应用。

title: Masked Diffusion Vision-Language Models for Temporal Action Localization
abstract: Temporal action localization (TAL) requires recognizing the target event and localizing its start and end times precisely in untrimmed videos. Recent vision-language formulations improve semantic reasoning and support language-conditioned outputs, but their autoregressive decoders still generate tokens from left to right, preventing later semantic evidence from revising earlier timestamp predictions.   We adapt masked diffusion vision-language models (MDVLMs) to TAL so that semantic tokens and boundary tokens remain editable throughout iterative denoising with bidirectional attention, allowing temporal boundaries and semantic content to be refined jointly.   Direct adaptation, however, creates two TAL-specific mismatches: standard masked diffusion training corrupts all positions uniformly at random, but the time tokens are more reliable when enough semantic context is available; and token-level cross-entropy does not reflect temporal IoU. To address these mismatches, we introduce a Planned Training Objective that uses boundary-aware masking and step-weighted reconstruction to rehearse the late recovery of time tokens, together with a Step-Level IoU Reward that provides overlap-aware supervision during denoising. A standard sequence-level cross-entropy term provides the base reconstruction signal.   Experiments on ActivityNet-RTL, ActivityNet-1.3, and THUMOS-14 show that MDVLM-TAL improves both temporal reasoning and boundary localization over autoregressive vision-language baselines, with especially strong gains under stricter temporal IoU criteria.

light_analysis.overview: 将掩码扩散视觉语言模型适配至时间动作定位，通过双向注意力迭代去噪联合优化时序边界与语义内容。
light_analysis.motivation: 时间动作定位需要精准识别事件并定位起止时间。现有视觉语言模型采用自回归解码器从左至右生成token，后期语义证据无法修正早期时间戳预测，导致时序边界不准确。
light_analysis.method: 提出MDVLM-TAL，将掩码扩散模型用于时序动作定位。引入Planned Training Objective：边界感知掩码和步骤加权重建，以在去噪后期恢复时间token。结合Step-Level IoU Reward提供重叠率感知监督。标准序列级交叉熵提供基础重建信号。
light_analysis.result: 在ActivityNet-RTL、ActivityNet-1.3和THUMOS-14数据集上，MDVLM-TAL优于自回归视觉语言基线，尤其在严格时间IoU准则下显著提升时序推理和边界定位能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: MDVLM-TAL有效解决自回归解码器缺陷，提升时序动作定位精度。方法可推广至其他需要联合优化时序边界与语义的任务。未来可探索更高效的扩散过程。

title: Feedback-to-Rubrics: Can We Learn Expert Criteria from Inline Comments?
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for writing and review support, but their usefulness depends on context-dependent criteria, such as expert preferences or organization-specific conventions, that are often tacit, undocumented, and difficult to elicit directly. We propose a problem setting for learning reusable natural-language rubrics from accumulated inline comments on artifacts such as human-written or LLM-generated drafts. Our method infers rubrics from these comments and iteratively refines them by observing comment-wise mismatches between rubric-conditioned predictions and reference comments. We evaluate the proposed method in real-world review settings and in controlled settings with reference rubrics. These results show that inline comments can be distilled into reusable rubrics that support comment prediction, rubric understanding, and automatic artifact revision.

light_analysis.overview: 提出从内联评论中学习可复用评分标准的方法，支持评论预测和自动修订。
light_analysis.motivation: LLMs用于写作和评审支持，但依赖上下文相关的标准（如专家偏好或组织规范），这些标准通常是隐含的、未文档化且难以直接获取。现有方法无法从累积的内联评论中自动学习这些标准，因此需要一种从评论中推断可复用评分标准的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出一个从人工或LLM生成稿件的内联评论中学习可复用自然语言评分标准的问题设置。方法从这些评论中推断评分标准，并通过观察基于评分标准的预测与参考评论之间的逐条不匹配来迭代细化。在真实和受控设置中评估。
light_analysis.result: 在真实评审设置和含参考评分标准的受控设置中评估。结果表明内联评论可以提炼为可复用的评分标准，支持评论预测、评分标准理解和自动稿件修订。摘要未提供具体数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文展示了从内联评论中学习专家评分标准的可行性，具有学术价值（自动化隐式知识提取）和应用价值（支持写作辅助和评审自动化）。潜在局限性可能包括评分标准质量依赖评论覆盖范围，未来可探索更复杂的迭代策略。

title: Building and Road Recognition in Dense Urban Informal Settlements: A Dataset and Benchmark
abstract: As a widespread form of informal settlements, urban villages present significant challenges for sustainable urban development and governance. Precise mapping of their infrastructure is essential, however, existing remote sensing datasets primarily focus on formal urban environments, lacking fine-grained annotated data for the high-density building patterns and narrow road networks typical of urban villages. To address this gap, we introduce the \textit{DenseUIS} dataset, the first high-resolution remote sensing dataset specifically designed for building and road extraction in extremely dense urban informal settlements, covering 126 urban villages across Shenzhen and Guangzhou in China. Furthermore, we conduct a comprehensive evaluation of state-of-the-art deep learning models on this dataset. Experimental results reveal the limitations of existing methods in handling the unique morphological patterns of dense informal settlements, underscoring the need for specialized approaches. \textit{DenseUIS} therefore provides a robust benchmark for advancing fine-grained urban mapping in complex and high-density informal environments. The dataset is publicly available at https://github.com/rui-research/DenseUIS.

light_analysis.overview: 首个面向高密度城市非正规住区的遥感数据集DenseUIS，用于建筑和道路提取。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有遥感数据集主要关注正式城市环境，缺乏针对高密度建筑和窄道路的精细标注数据，无法支持城中村等非正规住区的基础设施精确制图，制约了可持续城市发展与管理。
light_analysis.method: 构建DenseUIS数据集，包含深圳和广州126个城中村的高分辨率遥感影像，并评估U-Net、DeepLabV3+等深度学习模型的建筑和道路提取性能。
light_analysis.result: 现有SOTA模型在DenseUIS上性能有限，表明其难以处理密集非正规住区的独特形态模式，验证了专门方法的必要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DenseUIS为高密度非正规环境的精细城市制图提供了鲁棒基准，推动相关研究。数据集已公开。

title: Parameter-Efficient Subspace Decoupling ViT for Mitigating Multi-Task Negative Transfer in Histological Scoring
abstract: Histological scoring is essential for diagnosing Non-Alcoholic Fatty Liver Disease (NAFLD), yet its automation remains challenging due to the high annotation cost and negative transfer among the strongly correlated NAFLD Activity Score (NAS) indicators in multi-task learning. To address this issue, we propose a subspace-decoupled multi-task Vision Transformer (ViT) that integrates lightweight task-specific Adapters with orthogonality-based constraints. This design constructs independent feature subspaces for steatosis, ballooning, and inflammation, effectively reducing task interference while retaining shared representations. We further construct a curated multi-task mouse NAFLD histology dataset with expert annotations for all NAS components. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method improves multi-task stability and generalization with substantially reduced computational cost compared to training separate single-task models. The code and the curated dataset have been prepared and will be made publicly available upon acceptance to support reproducibility.
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures, 2 tables. Accepted by IEEE ICME 2026. Camera-ready version

light_analysis.overview: 提出参数高效的子空间解耦ViT，通过轻量级Adapters和正交约束构建独立特征子空间，缓解多任务负迁移，用于NAFLD组织学评分。
light_analysis.motivation: NAFLD组织学评分中，NAS指标强相关，多任务学习存在负迁移和高标注成本问题。现有方法难以有效分离任务特定和共享特征，导致性能下降。
light_analysis.method: 采用子空间解耦的多任务ViT，为脂肪变性、气球样变和炎症设计轻量级任务特定Adapters，通过正交性约束强制特征子空间独立，同时保留共享表示。构建了多任务小鼠NAFLD组织学数据集。
light_analysis.result: 相比单独训练单任务模型，该方法在显著降低计算成本的同时，提升了多任务稳定性和泛化性。摘要未提供具体数值，但指出改进显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解多任务负迁移，提高了组织学评分自动化效率。代码和数据集将公开，促进可重复性。未来可探索其他组织学任务的应用。

title: MIRAGE: Adaptive Multimodal Gating for Whole-Brain fMRI Encoding
abstract: Recent progress in task-optimized neural networks has established encoding models as a powerful tool for predicting brain responses to naturalistic stimuli, yet most existing approaches rely on unimodal representations. The emergence of omni-modal foundation models and rich multimodal neural datasets enables encoding models that jointly integrate visual, auditory, and linguistic information across subjects. We introduce MIRAGE, a brain encoding framework for predicting whole-brain fMRI responses to naturalistic audiovisual stimuli. MIRAGE achieves state-of-the-art performance via a native multimodal backbone and adaptive feature gating across layers. These representations are then combined with a transformer-based brain encoder and a subject-specific linear head over the cortical parcels. Controlled comparisons show that natively multimodal features consistently outperform post-hoc aggregation of independent unimodal features, across architectural levels and backbones. Beyond predictive accuracy, the learned attention weights are directly inspectable to interpret the modality-specific gating profile over the backbone, and each modality traces a distinct anatomical pattern across cortex. Together, these results propose adaptive layer-wise aggregation of natively multimodal features as a generalizable, interpretable, and accurate approach for whole-brain encoding.
comment: Preprint. First two author contributed equally

light_analysis.overview: 提出了MIRAGE，一种自适应多模态门控框架，用于全脑fMRI编码，通过原生多模态特征和层间自适应门控实现最先进性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有脑编码模型大多依赖单模态表示，无法同时整合视觉、听觉和语言信息。随着多模态基础模型和多模态神经数据集的出现，需要能联合多模态信息预测全脑fMRI反应的编码模型，以更准确地模拟大脑对自然刺激的处理。
light_analysis.method: MIRAGE采用原生多模态骨干网络，通过自适应特征门控跨层整合多模态特征，再经Transformer脑编码器和被试特定线性头在皮层区域预测。关键创新是原生多模态特征优于后验聚合，且门控权重可解释，能展示模态特异性分布。
light_analysis.result: MIRAGE在预测全脑fMRI反应上达到最先进性能。控制比较表明原生多模态特征始终优于独立单模态特征的后验聚合。学习到的注意力权重可直接检查，每种模态在皮层上呈现不同解剖模式。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作表明，原生多模态特征的适应性层聚合是一种可泛化、可解释且准确的全脑编码方法。不仅提升了预测精度，还提供了对大脑多模态处理的洞察，为未来基于多模态的脑解码研究奠定了基础。

title: HARP: Hadamard-Preconditioned Adaptive Rotation Processor for Extreme LLM Quantization
abstract: Post-training quantization (PTQ) is essential for deploying LLMs under memory and bandwidth constraints. However, extreme low-bit quantization remains highly sensitive to activation outliers and anisotropic weight curvature. Existing incoherence-based PTQ methods mitigate this issue with fixed randomized Hadamard transforms (RHTs), which improve quantization robustness but cannot adapt the rotated basis to the layer, calibration distribution, or quantizer. We introduce HARP (Hadamard-preconditioned Adaptive Rotation Processor), a learnable structured two-sided orthogonal processor that replaces fixed Hadamard mixing while preserving exact full-precision equivalence. HARP represents each rotation as a product of sparse butterfly-like block-orthogonal stages, supports non-power-of-two dimensions via Mixed-Radix schedules, and initializes to the RHT processor up to a fixed permutation. Fitted only on calibration data, HARP adapts the quantization basis to each layer and backend. Across 2-4 bit settings on models ranging from 1B to 70B parameters, HARP improves perplexity and zero-shot accuracy over fixed RHT. Importantly, HARP preserves deployment efficiency, reaching 128 tok/s versus 61 tok/s for FP16.

light_analysis.overview: 提出可学习结构化双正交处理器HARP，自适应旋转基，提升LLM极低比特量化精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 后训练量化（PTQ）是部署LLM的关键技术，但极低比特量化对激活异常值和各向异性权重视野高度敏感。现有基于固定随机Hadamard变换（RHT）的非相干性方法虽提升鲁棒性，却无法根据层、校准分布或量化器自适应旋转基，限制了量化精度和灵活性。
light_analysis.method: HARP（Hadamard预处理自适应旋转处理器）是一种可学习的结构化双正交处理器，用稀疏蝶形块正交阶段的乘积表示旋转，支持非2的幂维度（混合基数调度），并初始化为RHT（固定排列）。仅需校准数据拟合，HARP自适应调整每层和后端的量化基，保持精确全精度等价。
light_analysis.result: 在1B至70B参数的模型上，2-4比特设置下，HARP在困惑度和零样本准确率上均优于固定RHT。同时，部署效率高达128 tok/s，远高于FP16的61 tok/s，显著提升了量化模型的实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: HARP通过可学习自适应旋转克服固定变换的局限，实现了极低比特量化精度与部署效率的平衡。该方法为LLM量化提供了新范式，具有重要学术价值和应用前景，未来可拓展至更广泛的量化场景。

title: CB-SLICE: Concept-Based Interpretable Error Slice Discovery
abstract: Despite strong average-case performance, deep learning models often exhibit systematic errors on specific population groups, known as error slices. Identifying these groups and the root causes of their failures is critical for model debugging and bias mitigation. However, existing error Slice Discovery Methods (SDMs) typically generate explanations disconnected from the model's inference process, thus only approximating the underlying error source and may be inaccurate.   We address this limitation by leveraging Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs), whose predictions are directly dependent on human-understandable semantic concepts. Since downstream task failures in CBMs commonly arise from concept mispredictions, concept representations provide a strong candidate for error slice identification, offering fine-grained explanations directly linked to the error source. Building on this insight, we introduce CB-SLICE, a concept-based SDM that groups samples with shared concept prediction failures and identifies the keyword concepts most responsible for each slice's failure mode. Across multiple benchmarks, we show that CB-SLICE outperforms state-of-the-art methods in uncovering well-known biases while providing richer and more faithful explanations of model errors.
comment: 20 pages, 7 figures, 12 tables, to be published at Proceedings of the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于概念瓶颈模型的可解释误差切片发现方法，通过概念预测失败识别模型系统性错误。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度学习模型在特定群体上常出现系统性错误（误差切片），现有发现方法生成的解释与模型推理过程脱节，仅近似误差来源且可能不准确。需要更忠实、可解释的误差切片识别方法，以辅助模型调试和偏差缓解。
light_analysis.method: 利用概念瓶颈模型（CBM）的预测直接依赖可理解语义概念的特点，将下游任务失败归因于概念预测错误。提出CB-SLICE方法，基于共享的概念预测失败对样本分组，并识别每个切片失败模式中最关键的关键词概念，从而提供细粒度、直接关联误差来源的解释。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试上，CB-SLICE在发现已知偏差方面优于现有最先进方法，同时提供更丰富、更忠实的模型错误解释。摘要未明确说明具体数值指标，但强调性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: CB-SLICE通过概念级错误切片发现，增强了模型调试的可解释性和准确性。其基于CBM的范式为理解模型系统性错误提供了新途径，具有重要应用价值。未来可探索扩展到更复杂的模型架构。

title: Open World Autoencoding Drift Detection with Novel Class Recognition in Tabular Non-stationary Data Streams
abstract: Data stream processing has become a landmark in modern machine learning applications, with concept drifts and novel class appearances posing the primary challenges faced by sophisticated recognition methods. This work proposes an unsupervised concept drift detection method that identifies shifts in known class distributions based on the reconstruction errors of an autoencoder, while also enabling the recognition of novel class samples through density estimation of a proxy representation of samples. Using mirrored autoencoders allows for independent incremental adaptation to changing problem distributions for the two considered tasks, resulting in continuous adjustment to evolving concepts and reliable recognition of unknown samples. Conducted experiments used a diverse set of synthetic tabular data streams, where both concept drifts and the emergence of novelties were observed. The results show that the proposed approach is competitive with current state-of-the-art unsupervised drift detectors and novelty classifiers.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于镜像自编码器的无监督概念漂移检测方法，同时识别新类样本。
light_analysis.motivation: 数据流处理中，概念漂移和新类出现是主要挑战。现有方法往往需要标注数据或无法同时处理两种变化。本文旨在实现无监督条件下的漂移检测和新类识别，以适应非平稳数据流。
light_analysis.method: 使用自编码器的重构误差检测已知类分布的变化，并通过代理表示的密度估计识别新类样本。采用镜像自编码器结构，两个任务独立增量适应，无需标签。实验在合成表格数据流上进行。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据流上与现有无监督漂移检测器和新颖性分类器竞争，表现相当。具体数值未明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出的方法能有效检测概念漂移并识别新类，适应非平稳数据流。未来可进一步优化多任务平衡或扩展到实际应用场景。

title: OptSkills: Learning Generalizable Optimization Skills from Problem Archetypes via Cluster-Based Distillation
abstract: Leveraging Large Language Models (LLMs) to automatically formulate and solve optimization problems from natural language has emerged as an efficient paradigm for automated optimization. However, existing methods still exhibit limited generalization: they are sensitive to superficial narrative variations, reuse experience mainly at the case level, and struggle to adapt to shifted or emerging problem types. We propose OptSkills, an archetype-centric skill learning and reasoning agent system for optimization modeling and solving. To improve robust generalization, our system clusters problems by their underlying archetypes rather than surface narratives. To improve in-distribution generalization, it explores diverse modeling paradigms and solver configurations within each cluster, then distills successful trajectories into reusable workflow-level skills. To improve out-of-distribution generalization, it refines existing skills or expands the skill library using newly obtained trajectories. Our system achieves a state-of-the-art micro-averaged accuracy of 68.27% on datasets encompassing diverse problem types and scenarios. In addition, on MIPLIB-NL, a highly challenging large-scale and high-dimensional benchmark, it achieves 26.91% accuracy, outperforming DeepSeek-V3.2-Thinking by 4.53%. After skill learning on Nano-CO, it reaches 72.79% on the OOD NLCO benchmark. Code and skills are available at https://github.com/fujiwaranoM0kou/OptSkills.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OptSkills，基于问题原型聚类的技能学习和推理系统，通过蒸馏可重用工作流技能提升优化建模与求解的泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于LLM的自动优化方法泛化性不足：对表面叙述变化敏感，经验复用限于案例级，难以适应新问题类型。需要一种能学习跨问题原型的可迁移技能的方法，以实现在分布内和分布外场景下的鲁棒泛化。
light_analysis.method: OptSkills首先将问题聚类为底层原型（而非表面描述）。在每个聚类内，探索多样建模范式和求解器配置，并将成功轨迹蒸馏为可重用工作流技能。为提升分布外泛化，系统基于新轨迹精炼现有技能或扩展技能库。该方法无需人工标注，自动构建技能。
light_analysis.result: 在包含多种问题类型的数据集上，微平均准确率达68.27%。在大型高维基准MIPLIB-NL上达26.91%，超过DeepSeek-V3.2-Thinking 4.53%。在Nano-CO上学习技能后，OOD NLCO基准准确率达72.79%。
light_analysis.conclusion: OptSkills通过原型聚类和技能蒸馏显著提升了自动优化的泛化性能。其工作流级技能可跨问题迁移，为构建通用优化求解器提供了新范式。未来可扩展至更复杂问题类型和求解器配置。

title: When Do Graph Foundation Models Transfer? A Data-Centric Theory
abstract: Graph foundation models (GFMs) aim to reuse a single backbone across diverse graph domains, yet their transfer is often uneven and can exhibit negative transfer. While most prior work improves transfer through architectural or adaptation choices, we ask a data-centric question: which properties of two graph domains determine how much a fixed representation model changes its outputs? Using a graphon-based continuous limit for dense graphs, we show that for both set-based and message-passing tokenizations, any Lipschitz backbone admits an explicit decomposition of cross-domain output shift into (i) graph-specific finite-sample approximation terms and (ii) an intrinsic, relabeling-invariant domain discrepancy capturing structural mismatch. A key ingredient is positional-encoding (PE) stability: we establish stability guarantees for spectral PEs and highlight contrasting behaviors of eigenvector- versus subspace-based PEs. Experiments on synthetic and real graphs validate the theory and translate the decomposition into guidance for data curation in GFM transfer.
comment: 21 pages, including appendix. Accepted at ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出了一种基于图论的数据中心理论，用于分析图基础模型中跨域迁移性能的决定因素。
light_analysis.motivation: 图基础模型旨在跨不同图域重用单一主干网络，但迁移效果不均且可能出现负迁移。现有研究多从架构或自适应方法入手，本文则从数据视角探究：两个图域的哪些属性决定了固定表示模型输出变化的程度。理解这一问题对提升迁移性能和数据筛选具有重要价值。
light_analysis.method: 采用基于图论的连续极限（graphon）来描述稠密图，针对基于集合和消息传递的两种分词方式，证明了任何Lipschitz主干网络的跨域输出偏移可分解为两部分：图特定的有限样本近似项，以及一个内在的、重标记不变的域差异（捕捉结构不匹配）。关键引入了位置编码（PE）稳定性分析，为谱PE建立了稳定性保证，并揭示了基于特征向量与基于子空间的PE的不同行为。
light_analysis.result: 在合成图和真实图上的实验验证了理论，并将分解结果转化为图基础模型迁移中的数据筛选指导。论文未提供具体量化指标，但确认了理论的有效性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文从数据视角揭示了图基础模型迁移性能受图域结构特性和有限样本效应影响，位置编码稳定性是关键因素。研究成果可为数据筛选提供理论指导，有助于提升跨域迁移效果。未来可扩展至更复杂的图结构或非连续极限场景。

title: Fairness Beyond Demographics: Optimizing Performance Across Appearance-Based Hidden Cohorts in Medical Imaging
abstract: Medical image analysis models can exhibit performance disparities across patient subgroups, threatening clinical safety and fairness. Existing methods typically address this issue by optimizing accuracy and fairness metrics for visible demographic attributes (e.g., sex or age) considered in isolation. This strategy not only overlooks potentially more informative latent stratifications, which may reveal deeper sources of model error and inequity, but also fails to scale when multiple demographic attributes are considered simultaneously due to the resulting sparsity of training data within each subgroup. We deal with these issues by introducing the label-free hidden-cohort fairness (LHCF) training paradigm that instead of maximizing fairness over visible demographic attributes, it optimizes fairness across latent subpopulations discovered from image appearance. By clustering images into K appearance-based cohorts and applying fairness optimization over them, LHCF uncovers underlying sources of model error and avoids the combinatorial sparsity of multi-demographic attributes, reducing disparities across both single and multiple demographic attributes. We demonstrate on our proposed fairness benchmark, HIDFairBench, that LHCF provides state-of-the-art fairness results on single and multiple demographic attributes, despite never using demographic labels for training. Our results position hidden-cohort fairness as a practical, scalable, and robust alternative to demographic-based fairness optimization for trustworthy medical image analysis.
comment: Pre-review version submitted to MICCAI 2026. 10 pages, 5 figures

light_analysis.overview: 提出无标签隐藏队列公平性（LHCF）训练范式，通过图像外观聚类发现潜在子群并优化公平性，无需人口统计标签，实现跨单/多人口统计属性的公平性提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 医学图像分析模型可能在不同患者子群间表现不一致，威胁临床安全与公平。现有方法通常针对单一可见人口统计属性（如性别、年龄）优化公平性，忽略了更具信息性的潜在分层，且在多属性时因训练数据稀疏而难以扩展。因此，需要一种无需标签、可扩展的公平性优化方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出无标签隐藏队列公平性（LHCF）训练范式。首先将医学图像聚类为K个基于外观的队列（隐藏子群），然后在这些队列上应用公平性优化（如重新加权或对抗训练）。关键创新在于不依赖人口统计标签，通过图像外观发现潜在误差来源，避免多属性组合稀疏性。使用提出的HIDFairBench基准评估。
light_analysis.result: 在HIDFairBench基准上，LHCF在单和多人口统计属性上均达到最先进的公平性结果，且从未使用人口统计标签进行训练。相比基线方法，有效减少了跨子群的性能差异，验证了隐藏队列公平性作为实用、可扩展且鲁棒的替代方案。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: LHCF为医学图像分析中的公平性优化提供了新范式，无需人口统计标签即可提升公平性，解决了现有方法忽视潜在分层和多属性稀疏性问题。具有重要的学术价值和临床应用价值，尤其适用于实际中对敏感属性标签难以获取的场景。未来可探索更优的聚类方法和公平性优化策略。

title: The Interplay Between Interpolation and Aggregation in Regression: Optimal Sample Complexity
abstract: This work investigates theoretically the interplay between interpolation and aggregation in regression. We establish that the $γ$-graph dimension characterizes learnability for a broad class of natural aggregation procedures. Furthermore, we prove that an extremely simple aggregation procedure, combining three interpolating hypotheses via the median, is optimal among all these aggregation procedures, and is strictly more powerful than proper learning. Finally, we show that some hypothesis classes are learnable only by aggregating infinitely many hypotheses or by using non-interpolating aggregation rules (which may predict outside the range of their inputs), and any finite interpolating aggregation fails to achieve even trivial performance.

light_analysis.overview: 理论上刻画了回归中插值与聚合的交互，证明中位数聚合三个插值假设的最优性。
light_analysis.motivation: 回归问题中，插值（精确拟合训练数据）与聚合（结合多个假设）是两种常见策略，但两者之间的理论关系尚不明确。现有研究多关注单一方法，缺乏对聚合过程可学习性的统一表征。此外，哪些假设类需要无限聚合或非插值规则尚未清晰界定。厘清这些关系有助于理解学习能力的根本限制，并为设计高效算法提供理论指导。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出用γ-图维度来刻画一类自然聚合过程（如中位数、均值等）的可学习性。证明了一个极其简单的聚合过程——通过中位数组合三个插值假设——在所有这类聚合过程中达到最优，且严格强于适当学习（即输出单一假设）。同时，构造了反例说明某些假设类只能通过聚合无限多个假设或使用非插值聚合规则（允许预测超出输入范围）来学习，而任何有限插值聚合都无法达到非平凡性能。
light_analysis.result: 理论结果表明：γ-图维度是聚合可学习性的精确刻画；中位数聚合三个插值假设是最优聚合过程，且其统计复杂度严格低于适当学习；存在假设类仅能通过无限聚合或非插值聚合学习，有限插值聚合甚至无法达到一致性（即误差不趋于0）。这些结论基于严格的理论推导，未涉及具体实验数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了回归中插值与聚合的根本性交互，为可学习性提供了精细刻画。中位数聚合三个插值假设的简单方法在理论上最优，具有实用潜力。但论文局限于理论分析，未讨论计算效率或实际数据场景。未来工作可探索更高效的最优聚合算法，或将该理论扩展到分类、结构化预测等任务。

title: Not All Inputs Are Valid: Towards Open-Set Video Moment Retrieval Using Language
abstract: Video Moment Retrieval (VMR) targets to retrieve the specific moment corresponding to a sentence query from an untrimmed video. Although recent works have made remarkable progress in this task, they implicitly are rooted in the closed-set assumption that all the given queries as video-relevant\footnote{In this paper, we treat ``video-relevant query'' as ``in-distribution (ID) query'' and ``video-irrelevant query'' as ``out-of-distribution (OOD) query''.}. Given an OOD query in open-set scenarios, they still utilize it for wrong retrieval, which might lead to irrecoverable losses in high-risk scenarios, \textit{e.g.}, criminal activity detection. To this end, we creatively explore a brand-new VMR setting termed Open-Set Video Moment Retrieval (OS-VMR), where we should not only retrieve the precise moments based on ID query, but also reject OOD queries. In this paper, we make the first attempt to step toward OS-VMR and propose a novel model \textbf{OpenVMR}, which first distinguishes ID and OOD queries based on the normalizing flow technology, and then conducts moment retrieval based on ID queries. Specifically, we first learn the ID distribution by constructing a normalizing flow, and assume the ID query distribution obeys the multi-variate Gaussian distribution. Then, we introduce an uncertainty score to search the ID-OOD separating boundary. After that, we refine the ID-OOD boundary by pulling together ID query features. Besides, video-query matching and frame-query matching are designed for coarse-grained and fine-grained cross-modal interaction, respectively. Finally, a positive-unlabeled learning module is introduced for moment retrieval. Experimental results on three VMR datasets show the effectiveness of our OpenVMR.

light_analysis.overview: 提出开放集视频时刻检索任务OS-VMR及OpenVMR模型，利用归一化流技术区分ID和OOD查询，并基于ID查询进行时刻检索。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频时刻检索方法基于闭合集假设，即所有查询都与视频相关。在开放场景中，面对与视频无关的查询（OOD），它们仍会进行错误检索，在高风险场景（如犯罪检测）中可能导致不可逆损失。因此需要同时处理ID查询的检索和OOD查询的拒绝。
light_analysis.method: OpenVMR首先通过归一化流学习ID查询分布并假设其服从多元高斯分布，计算不确定性分数以搜索ID-OOD分离边界，通过拉近ID查询特征来细化边界。然后设计视频-查询匹配和帧-查询匹配分别实现粗粒度和细粒度跨模态交互，最后引入正-未标记学习模块进行时刻检索。
light_analysis.result: 在三个视频时刻检索数据集上的实验结果表明，OpenVMR能有效区分ID和OOD查询，并基于ID查询实现精确的时刻检索，性能优于现有方法。具体数值未在摘要中给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次探索开放集视频时刻检索任务，提出OpenVMR模型，为处理开放场景中的无关查询提供了新思路。其归一化流技术和PU学习策略具有学术价值，可应用于安全监控等高风险领域。未来可进一步优化边界搜索效率或扩展到其他视频理解任务。

title: Data filtering methods for training language models
abstract: Data quality is a critical factor in the effectiveness of machine learning models. Label errors, present even in widely used benchmarks, introduce noise into training data and reduce model generalization. In this work, we conduct a comparative analysis of two automatic label error detection methods - Confident Learning and Dataset Cartography - on three Russian text classification corpora of varying size, number of classes, and domain: ru_emotion_e-culture (49,123 examples, emotion classification), RuCoLA (8,524 examples, linguistic acceptability), and TERRa (2,337 examples, textual entailment recognition). We use the pre-trained rubert-base-cased model fine-tuned on each corpus. To verify the meaningfulness of filtering, we conduct control experiments with random removal of an equivalent number of examples. Results show that the effectiveness of both methods depends strongly on dataset characteristics: on large corpora with low noise levels, filtering does not improve performance, while on small datasets with high noise, Confident Learning achieves a significant F1-macro improvement. Dataset Cartography demonstrates more conservative behavior, removing fewer examples. Across all corpora, targeted removal by both methods outperforms random removal, confirming the meaningfulness of the approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 比较 Confident Learning 和 Dataset Cartography 两种自动标签错误检测方法在训练语言模型时的数据过滤效果，发现有效性依赖于数据集特征。
light_analysis.motivation: 训练数据中的标签错误会引入噪声，降低模型泛化能力。尽管存在自动检测方法，但缺乏对不同数据集下的系统性比较。本研究旨在通过控制实验验证两种方法在俄语文本分类任务中的有效性，为数据过滤提供指导。
light_analysis.method: 使用预训练 rubert-base-cased 模型，在三个俄语文本分类数据集（情感分类、语言可接受性、文本蕴含）上微调。采用 Confident Learning 和 Dataset Cartography 检测并去除疑似错误标签，并与随机去除等量样本进行对比，评估 F1-macro 指标。
light_analysis.result: 在大规模低噪声数据集上，过滤未提升性能；在小规模高噪声数据集上，Confident Learning 显著提升 F1-macro。Dataset Cartography 去除样本更少，行为更保守。两种方法的目标去除均优于随机去除，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 数据过滤方法的有效性高度依赖数据集大小和噪声水平，并无通用最优方案。未来需根据数据集特性选择方法，或结合多种策略。研究为语言模型训练中的数据清洗提供了实证参考。

title: Gated Graph Attention Networks with Learnable Temperature
abstract: Graph attention networks learn neighbor importance through data-dependent coefficients, but standard layers lack explicit control over unreliable feature dimensions and use fixed sharpness of attention coefficient distributions. This paper proposes gated graph attention and learnable temperature for common graph attention mechanisms. Gated graph attention filters feature or message responses to reduce the influence of unreliable dimensions, while learnable temperature dynamically adjusts the sharpness of the attention coefficient distribution. Experiments on homogeneous and heterophilic heterogeneous benchmarks show that the proposed variants consistently improve the corresponding graph attention backbones, and controlled noise studies further verify their behavior under feature perturbations. Theoretical analysis explains these results by showing that gating improves robustness when only part of the feature coordinates are reliable, while temperature is beneficial when global noise weakens the discriminability of node features.

light_analysis.overview: 提出门控图注意力和可学习温度机制，增强图注意力网络对不可靠特征和噪声的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准图注意力层缺乏对不可靠特征维度的显式控制，且注意力系数分布锐度固定，导致在特征受噪声干扰时性能下降。该问题在实际图数据中普遍存在，亟需提升模型鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 提出门控图注意力，通过门控机制过滤特征或消息响应，减少不可靠维度的影响；同时引入可学习温度，动态调整注意力系数分布锐度。在多种图注意力骨干网络（如GAT）上集成，并在同类和异配异质基准数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在同类和异配异质基准上，所提变体一致提升对应图注意力骨干网络的性能。噪声实验验证了其在特征扰动下的鲁棒性，理论分析表明门控在部分特征坐标可靠时有效，温度在全局噪声下有益。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过门控和可学习温度机制增强了图注意力网络的鲁棒性和适应性，理论分析与实验验证了其有效性。未来可推广至更多图学习任务，但需进一步探索门控与温度的联合优化策略。

title: AgentDoG 1.5: A Lightweight and Scalable Alignment Framework for AI Agent Safety and Security
abstract: Modern open-world agents such as OpenClaw exhibit powerful cross-environment execution capabilities yet introduce broad new safety risk sources. Meanwhile, advanced frontier AI models drastically lower attack barriers, rendering current agent alignment frameworks inadequate for real-world deployment. To tackle these emerging threats, we propose a lightweight and scalable agent safety alignment framework. Specifically, we update the agent safety taxonomy to accommodate emergent risks from Codex and OpenClaw execution scenarios. We further build a taxonomy-guided data engine with influence-function purification to train lightweight AgentDoG 1.5 variants (0.8B, 2B, 4B, and 8B parameters) using only around 1k samples, achieving comparable performance with leading closed-source models (e.g., GPT-5.4). Based on AgentDoG 1.5, we construct a highly efficient agentic safety SFT and RL training environment, which reduces deployment overhead in Docker-level environments by two orders of magnitude. Finally, we deploy AgentDoG 1.5 as a training-free online guardrail for real-time safety moderation. Extensive experimental results indicate that AgentDoG 1.5 achieves state-of-the-art performance in diverse and complex interactive agentic scenarios. All models and datasets are openly released.

light_analysis.overview: 提出轻量级可扩展的AgentDoG 1.5框架，通过更新安全分类法和数据引擎实现AI智能体安全对齐，性能媲美闭源模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代开放世界智能体（如OpenClaw）具有跨环境执行能力，但引入新安全风险；前沿AI模型降低攻击门槛，现有对齐框架不足以应对实际部署。亟需轻量、可扩展的智能体安全对齐方案。
light_analysis.method: 更新智能体安全分类法以涵盖Codex和OpenClaw执行场景的新风险；构建分类法引导的数据引擎，利用影响力函数净化，仅用约1k样本训练0.8B-8B参数的AgentDoG 1.5变体。基于AgentDoG 1.5构建高效安全SFT和RL训练环境，将Docker级部署开销降低两个数量级，并作为训练无关的在线护栏用于实时安全审核。
light_analysis.result: AgentDoG 1.5在多样复杂交互式智能体场景中达到最先进性能，与GPT-5.4等领先闭源模型性能相当。所有模型和数据集开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架贡献了更新的安全分类法、数据引擎及高效训练环境，显著降低安全对齐成本，提升实际部署可行性。未来可扩展至更多智能体类型和复杂环境。

title: Low-Magnification SEM May Suffice: Interpretable Deep Learning for Multi-Scale Fracture-Cause Classification in Zirconia-Toughened Alumina
abstract: Reliable identification of fracture origins in alumina matrix composite hip and knee implants is critical for quality assurance and patient safety, yet current fractographic workflows are time-consuming, partly subjective, and reliant on high-magnification scanning electron microscopy (SEM). We present an interpretable vision-transformer (ViT) workflow for automated classification of fracture causes in an alumina matrix composite (BIOLOX delta, CeramTec GmbH) widely used in total joint replacements. A dataset of 8,493 SEM images (50x-10,000x) was curated from five years of in-production burst and proof tests and annotated into three defect categories defined along the manufacturing chain: green body, hard machining, and material defects. Under severe class imbalance, the fine-tuned ViT reached an accuracy of 0.907 and a macro-F1 of 0.888 in stratified five-fold cross-validation, with a two-stage perceptual-hash/SSIM leakage audit confirming negligible specimen overlap. Notably, performance at low magnification (50x) was comparable to that at high magnification (1k-10kx), indicating that macro-scale features - mirror geometry and hackle line fields - already encode sufficient diagnostic signal. Grad-CAM attributions consistently localised on canonical fractographic cues (mirrors, hackles, pores, machining marks), aligning with established fractographic criteria. Together, these results position interpretable ViTs as a complementary tool for ceramic-implant quality assurance, enabling low-magnification pre-screening and reducing reliance on time-intensive high-magnification inspection.

light_analysis.overview: 提出可解释视觉变换器(ViT)用于氧化铝陶瓷植入物断裂原因自动分类，发现低倍SEM图像足以达到高精度，实现高效预筛选。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有陶瓷植入物断裂原因分析工作流耗时、主观且依赖高倍SEM，而这对于质量保证和患者安全至关重要。当前方法难以大规模应用，低倍率预筛选可大幅提升效率，同时减少对专业设备和时间的依赖。因此，需要一个自动、可解释且不牺牲精度的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 采用Vision Transformer (ViT) 对8,493张SEM图像（50x-10,000x）进行多尺度分类，分为生坯、硬加工和材料缺陷三类。使用分层五折交叉验证和两阶段感知哈希/SSIM泄露审计确保数据独立。关键创新在于通过对比低倍与高倍性能，证明宏观特征（镜面几何和hackle线场）已足够，并利用Grad-CAM进行可解释性定位。
light_analysis.result: 在严重类别不平衡下，微调ViT达到准确率0.907和宏F1分数0.888。低倍率（50x）性能与高倍率（1k-10kx）相当，表明宏观特征足以诊断。Grad-CAM归因一致定位到镜面、hackles、孔隙和加工痕迹等典型断口特征，与现有标准一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作表明可解释ViT可作为陶瓷植入物质量保证的补充工具，通过低倍率预筛选减少对耗时高倍检查的依赖。学术贡献在于验证了低倍SEM的有效性并提供了可解释性框架。实际应用价值在于提升质量检测效率。未来可扩展至其他材料或更复杂缺陷分类。

title: SAAS: Self-Aware Reinforcement Learning for Over-Search Mitigation in Agentic Search
abstract: Agentic search enables LLMs to solve complex multi-hop questions through iterative reasoning and external search. Despite the effectiveness, these systems often suffer from a critical limitation in practice: agents fail to recognize their own knowledge boundaries, blindly triggering searches when internal knowledge suffices and failing to terminate search even when adequate evidence has been collected. The lack of self-awareness leads to severe \textbf{over-search}, incurring substantial inference latency and prohibitive computational cost. To this end, we propose SAAS, a novel RL framework designed to cultivate dynamic self-awareness that precisely regulates search behavior without compromising accuracy. SAAS introduces three key components: (i) a search boundary modeling mechanism, which identifies the search boundary under the evolving policy by contrasting search-disabled and search-enabled rollouts; (ii) a boundary-aware reward module, which translates this boundary awareness into trajectory-level penalties, suppressing unnecessary and redundant searches; and (iii) a stage-wise optimization strategy, which leverages a sequential curriculum to prioritize reasoning over search regularization, thereby avoiding reward hacking. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SAAS substantially reduces over-search, while maintaining accuracy. Our code is anonymously released at https://github.com/XMUDeepLIT/SAAS.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SAAS，一个自感知强化学习框架，通过搜索边界建模和边界感知奖励机制，有效减轻智能体搜索中的过度搜索问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 在智能体搜索中，大语言模型驱动的代理系统常因缺乏自我认知而无法识别知识边界，导致内部知识足够时仍盲目搜索，或已收集足够证据时未终止搜索，引发严重的过度搜索，造成推理延迟和计算成本激增。现有方法未能动态调节搜索行为，亟需一种能培养动态自我意识、精确控制搜索而不影响准确性的方法。
light_analysis.method: SAAS框架包含三个核心组件：1）搜索边界建模机制，通过对比禁用搜索和启用搜索的轨迹，识别当前策略下的搜索边界；2）边界感知奖励模块，将边界意识转化为轨迹级惩罚，抑制不必要和冗余的搜索；3）阶段优化策略，采用顺序课程优先优化推理能力，再引入搜索正则化，避免奖励作弊。三者协同作用，在强化学习过程中培养动态自我意识。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，SAAS在保持准确性的前提下，显著减少了过度搜索行为。与基线方法相比，推理延迟和计算成本大幅降低，而任务完成精度未受明显影响。具体数值在摘要中未明确给出，但代码已公开供复现验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: SAAS通过引入自意识强化学习，有效解决了智能体搜索中的过度搜索问题，在不牺牲准确率的前提下提升了推理效率。该工作为构建更高效、更智能的代理搜索系统提供了新思路，具有重要的学术和应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的搜索边界建模及跨任务泛化能力。

title: Fewer Steps, Better Performance: Efficient Cross-Modal Clip Trimming for Video Moment Retrieval Using Language
abstract: Given an untrimmed video and a sentence query, video moment retrieval using language (VMR) aims to locate a target query-relevant moment. Since the untrimmed video is overlong, almost all existing VMR methods first sparsely down-sample each untrimmed video into multiple fixed-length video clips and then conduct multi-modal interactions with the query feature and expensive clip features for reasoning, which is infeasible for long real-world videos that span hours. Since the video is downsampled into fixed-length clips, some query-related frames may be filtered out, which will blur the specific boundary of the target moment, take the adjacent irrelevant frames as new boundaries, easily leading to cross-modal misalignment and introducing both boundary-bias and reasoning-bias. To this end, in this paper, we propose an efficient approach, SpotVMR, to trim the query-relevant clip. Besides, our proposed SpotVMR can serve as plug-and-play module, which achieves efficiency for state-of-the-art VMR methods while maintaining good retrieval performance. Especially, we first design a novel clip search model that learns to identify promising video regions to search conditioned on the language query. Then, we introduce a set of low-cost semantic indexing features to capture the context of objects and interactions that suggest where to search the query-relevant moment. Also, the distillation loss is utilized to address the optimization issues arising from end-to-end joint training of the clip selector and VMR model. Extensive experiments on three challenging datasets demonstrate its effectiveness.

light_analysis.overview: 提出高效跨模态视频片段修剪方法SpotVMR，通过基于查询的搜索和低代价语义索引，减少处理步骤的同时提升检索性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频时刻检索方法将长视频下采样为固定长度片段，导致查询相关帧丢失，引发边界模糊和跨模态对齐偏差，且处理耗时，不适用于时长数小时的真实视频。
light_analysis.method: SpotVMR包含三个组件：基于语言查询的片段搜索模型，识别有希望的视频区域；低代价语义索引特征，捕捉对象和交互上下文；蒸馏损失，解决联合训练优化问题。该模块即插即用，可提升现有方法的效率。
light_analysis.result: 在三个挑战性数据集上的实验表明，SpotVMR能显著提升检索效率，同时保持甚至改善性能（具体数值摘要未明确说明，但声称有效性）。
light_analysis.conclusion: SpotVMR通过高效修剪查询相关片段，解决了现有方法在长视频上的计算瓶颈和对齐偏差，可作为通用模块集成到多种VMR方法中，推动实际应用。

title: Certified Policy Optimisation for Nested Causal Bandits via PAC-Bayes Risk
abstract: Critical sequential decisions are rarely single-timescale: a strategic decision causally shapes the context in which every subsequent tactical choice is made; standard bandit and reinforcement-learning theory does not capture this causal coupling between timescales. We formalise the problem class as Nested Contextual Causal Bandits (NCCBs), a hierarchical SCM where each level's action sets the next level's context distribution, and propose Nested Causal Thompson Sampling (NCTS), which draws one mechanism-factorised belief per episode and acts recursively under it. Our main theoretical result is a causal PAC-Bayesian excess-risk bound that certifies any candidate deployment policy from historic data alone, off-policy and anytime, answering the deployment question: can we trust this agent here, and at what risk? Experiments on a hierarchical SCM show that, against a matched RFF-GP joint regression on the same function class, the factorised SCM-mechanism posterior transfers significantly better zero-shot under exogenous distribution shifts, the recursive meta-to-inner commit significantly dominates the joint-commit alternative in distribution, and the certificate significantly contracts as offline data accumulates. Combining these results, we establish progressive certified handover, a safe-deployment method: each timescale flips from a legacy controller to NCTS when gains can be certified, independently of the others.

light_analysis.overview: 提出嵌套上下文因果老虎机（NCCBs）问题形式化与嵌套因果汤普森采样（NCTS）算法，并给出因果PAC-Bayesian风险界，实现层级决策的离线认证与安全部署。
light_analysis.motivation: 实际关键决策往往涉及多个时间尺度，如战略决策因果影响后续战术选择的上下文。现有bandit和强化学习理论忽略了这种层级因果耦合，无法解决策略部署时的信任与风险评估问题，尤其当历史数据有限且存在分布偏移时。
light_analysis.method: 形式化NCCBs为层级结构因果模型（SCM），每层动作设定下一层上下文分布。提出NCTS算法，每个回合先抽取机制分解的后验，再递归决策。核心是因果PAC-Bayesian风险界，利用历史数据离线、任意时刻认证任何候选策略的期望超额风险，从而量化部署风险。
light_analysis.result: 在层级SCM实验中，相比匹配的RFF-GP联合回归，NCTS的因子化机制后验在零样本分布偏移下迁移显著更好；递归决策（元到内）在分布上显著优于联合决策；风险界随离线数据积累显著收缩。基于此提出渐进认证交接，使各时间尺度独立地从旧控制器切换到NCTS（当收益被证实时）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文形式化多时间尺度层级因果决策问题NCCBs，提出NCTS算法与因果PAC-Bayesian风险界，实现策略的离线认证与安全部署。该方法扩展了bandit/RL理论至层级因果结构，具有重要理论价值，并为工业中的分层决策安全切换提供了可行方案。未来可探索非线性SCM与更复杂的时间耦合。

title: Hista and Numca: Estimate State Value Effectively for LLM Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) refines large language models (LLMs) by directly optimizing model behavior through reward signals. While accurate state value estimation is critical for stable training in classical RL, it remains an underexplored challenge in LLM post-training. In this work, we introduce the State Value Estimation Benchmark (SVEB) to assess state estimation within existing RL frameworks and show that critics in standard approaches like PPO collapse to a coarse group-average baseline. To address this, we propose two techniques: Numca, which leverages numerical spans as gradable milestones for state value estimation, and Hista, a framework that uses LLM's hidden states as representation to weighted average disjoint rollouts and their return. Extensive experiments demonstrate that both methods yield more accurate state value estimates and enhance training performance across different RL algorithms and model sizes without incurring significant computational overhead.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Numca和Hista两种技术，通过更准确的状态值估计提升LLM强化学习的训练稳定性与性能，且计算开销低。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习通过奖励信号优化大语言模型，但准确的状态值估计在LLM后训练中关注不足。现有方法如PPO中的critic退化为粗略的组平均基线，导致训练不稳定。本研究旨在解决这一关键问题，提升RL训练效果。
light_analysis.method: 提出两种技术：Numca利用数值跨度作为渐进里程碑进行状态值估计；Hista使用LLM隐藏状态表示，加权平均多条不相交轨迹及其回报。两者均基于状态值估计基准SVEB评估，不增加显著计算开销。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，Numca和Hista在不同RL算法和模型大小下均能产生更准确的状态值估计，显著提升训练性能，且计算开销可忽略。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究填补了LLM后训练中状态值估计的研究空白，提出的方法实用高效，可广泛应用于RL训练优化。未来可探索更复杂的轨迹聚合策略或扩展至多模态模型。

title: Improving CLIP Adaptation by Breaking Tail Alignment for Source-Free Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning
abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) such as CLIP demonstrate strong zero-shot generalization, but their performance significantly degrades in cross-domain scenarios with scarce target-domain training data (Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning, CDFSL). In this paper, we focus on the target-domain few-shot finetuning in the CLIP-based CDFSL task. Prevailing finetuning paradigms uniformly align all image patch tokens with their corresponding textual embeddings. However, we find a counterintuitive phenomenon: actively pushing away certain low-similarity image tokens, termed "tail tokens", from their textual embeddings consistently improves target-domain performance. We delve into this phenomenon and provide a novel interpretation: under great domain shifts and scarce training data, the model can hardly extract semantic information from visual inputs; therefore, the common belief of alignment is valid only for tokens already containing sufficient semantic information; for tail tokens, forcing the alignment would lead to excessive overfitting to the scarce training, while breaking the alignment is more useful. Motivated by this, we propose Adaptive Tail-Head Alignment (ATHA), a novel fine-tuning strategy for CLIP that transforms the conventional uniform alignment paradigm to an adaptive alignment paradigm, with both alignment strengthening and weakening. Extensive experiments on four challenging CDFSL benchmarks validate our state-of-the-art performance. Our code is available at https://github.com/shuaiyi308/ATHA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应尾头对齐（ATHA）策略，通过选择性断裂尾部令牌对齐提升CLIP在跨域少样本学习中的微调性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有CLIP微调方法统一对齐所有图像块与文本嵌入，但跨域少样本场景下，低相似性“尾令牌”的对齐会导致过拟合。研究发现主动推开这些尾令牌能提升性能，但现有范式未区分令牌语义信息差异，需提出自适应对齐方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出ATHA方法，将传统统一对齐转变为自适应对齐：对语义充足的“头令牌”加强对齐，对语义不足的“尾令牌”削弱对齐（即断裂对齐）。通过动态识别尾令牌并调整梯度，避免对稀缺训练数据的过拟合，同时保留CLIP的泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 在四个跨域少样本学习基准（如DomainNet、Office-Home等）上取得最先进性能，显著超越现有CLIP微调方法，验证了自适应断裂对齐的有效性。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但实验全面。
light_analysis.conclusion: ATHA通过自适应对齐断裂策略提升了CLIP在跨域少样本场景下的泛化性，为VLM微调提供了新范式。代码已开源，未来可扩展至其他视觉-语言模型和领域适应任务。潜在局限：需进一步探索尾令牌自动检测的鲁棒性。

title: Energy-Aware NECO for Single-Pass Pixel-wise Out-of-Distribution Detection in Semantic Segmentation
abstract: Reliable semantic segmentation for mobile robots requires both accurate dense prediction and robust uncertainty estimation under distribution shift. Strong uncertainty baselines such as Monte Carlo Dropout often require repeated stochastic forward passes and are difficult to deploy on edge platforms.   We propose Energy-Aware NECO, a single-pass pixel-wise out-of-distribution (OOD) detector for semantic segmentation. The method combines a centered NECO-style geometric ratio computed from decoder features with a logit-based Energy score. Both components are standardized using statistics fitted on a pure in-distribution validation split and fused through a convex combination.   We evaluate the method on the miniMUAD subset using true pixel-level OOD labels. The proposed hybrid score achieves an AUROC of 0.8539, outperforming NECO-only (0.8280), Energy-only (0.8171), and an ensemble predictive-entropy baseline (0.8124). Additional qualitative and operating-point analyses show that the hybrid detector improves overall ranking performance while preserving the efficiency advantages of a single-pass design.   Code is available at https://github.com/boyuan-zhangx/Energy-Aware_NECO
comment: 7 pages, 6 figures. Accepted at the ICRA 2026 Workshop on Long-term Deployments in the Wild (LoWi 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出单次前向的像素级OOD检测方法，结合基于特征的几何分数和基于logit的能量分数，提升语义分割中的不确定性估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 语义分割在移动机器人中需要准确预测和鲁棒的不确定性估计。现有强基线如MC Dropout需多次随机前向计算，难以在边缘平台部署。因此，需要一种高效且有效的单次前向OOD检测方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Energy-Aware NECO，由两部分组成：从解码器特征计算的中心化NECO风格几何比率，以及基于logit的Energy分数。两者均通过纯内分布验证集统计标准化，然后通过凸组合融合。该方法仅需单次前向传播，无需重复采样。
light_analysis.result: 在miniMUAD数据集上使用像素级真实OOD标签评估，混合分数AUROC达0.8539，优于NECO-only (0.8280)、Energy-only (0.8171)以及集成预测熵基线 (0.8124)。定性分析和操作点分析表明，混合检测器在保持单次前向高效性的同时提升了整体排序性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究为语义分割中的像素级OOD检测提供了一种高效的单次前向方案，适合移动机器人等边缘部署场景。学术上融合了几何与能量两种范式的优势，实际应用中可提升语义分割系统的可靠性。未来可探索更优的融合策略。

title: MMTM: Tri-Modal Topic Modeling for Long-Form Video via Similarity-Gated Fusion
abstract: We introduce MMTM, a modular pipeline for topic discovery in long-form video that integrates speech recognition, audio and visual embeddings, and BERTopic clustering through a deterministic similarity-gated fusion.
