By predicting the action between current and future observations, our objective encourages the encoder to capture fine-grained visual distinctions that determine low-level actions. We further use pseudo-reversed supervision to expose the encoder to a broader range of action directions and improve generalization under limited robot demonstrations. Our method applies to diverse VLA baselines, uses only standard observation-action pairs without additional annotations, and preserves the original inference pipeline at test time. Experiments on CALVIN ABC-D and SimplerEnv show consistent gains across diverse VLA baselines. Frozen-encoder probing and state-feature alignment analyses further show that our method learns state-discriminative visual representations that reduce state aliasing and better align with robot state changes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过逆动力学学习辅助目标缓解VLA模型中的状态混叠问题。
light_analysis.motivation: VLA模型利用预训练VLM进行动作预测，但VLM表示对低级控制所需的细微视觉差异不敏感，导致视觉相似但动作不同的状态混叠。现有方法通过生成未来帧或中间推理输出间接改善视觉理解，但未显式分析特征空间中的状态混叠，因此需要直接监督视觉编码器来缓解此问题。
light_analysis.method: 引入逆动力学学习作为辅助目标，直接监督VLA视觉编码器：通过预测当前和未来观测之间的动作，鼓励编码器捕捉决定低级动作的细微视觉差异。进一步使用伪逆监督暴露更广泛的动作方向，提高泛化能力。该方法适用于多种VLA基线，仅使用标准观测-动作对，无需额外标注，测试时保持原始推理流程。
light_analysis.result: 在CALVIN ABC-D和SimplerEnv基准上，多种VLA基线一致提升。冻结编码器探测和状态特征对齐分析表明，该方法学习到状态辨别性视觉表示，减少状态混叠，并更好地与机器人状态变化对齐。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文有效缓解VLA模型中的状态混叠问题，方法简单且无需额外标注，保持推理管线，可推广至多种VLA模型。未来可研究在更多复杂任务上的泛化能力及与其他辅助目标的结合。

title: Optimizing Latent Representations for Robust Building Damage Assessment Onboard Earth Observation Satellites
abstract: Rapid identification of damaged buildings after natural disasters or on war areas is crucial to support emergency response and prioritize interventions. Earth Observation constellations provide timely, large-scale coverage, but actionable information is often delayed by data downlink constraints, on-ground processing, and human interpretation. Reducing this latency is essential to improve decision-making responsiveness. In this work, we propose an original AI-based system that enables object-level building damage assessment (localization and damage classification) directly onboard satellites from pre-disaster and post-disaster highresolution optical imagery. Available pre-disaster images are encoded on ground into compact latent representations, transmitted to the satellite, and compared on-board with newly acquired post-event observations. Leveraging AI interpretation capabilities and increasing processing capabilities on-board satellites, the proposed design enables processing directly at the data source, reducing the amount of information to be downlinked while preserving task-relevant content and improving overall system responsivity. We explore the design space through a systematic benchmark of onboard-compatible variants, analyzing the impact of siamese processing, cross-attention, latent-space compression, and robustness-oriented data augmentation. Experiments on xBD dataset demonstrate reliable and robust damage assessment under misalignment, with minimal performance degradation under strong compression.
comment: IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Workshops (CVPRW 2026), Jun 2026, Denver, United States

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于AI的星上建筑物损伤评估系统，通过预灾图像潜在表示与灾后图像星上对比，减少数据下行延迟，提升应急响应速度。
light_analysis.motivation: 自然灾害或战争后快速识别受损建筑物对应急响应至关重要。地球观测星座提供及时大范围覆盖，但数据下行链路、地面处理和人工解读导致信息延迟，影响决策响应速度。现有方法无法在星上直接处理，延迟较大，因此需要减少延迟的系统。
light_analysis.method: 提出AI系统实现在轨星上建筑物损伤评估。预灾高分辨率光学图像在地面编码为紧凑潜在表示，传输到卫星后与星上新获取的灾后图像进行比对。系统利用星上AI处理能力，直接处理数据源，减少下行数据量。设计上系统评估了孪生网络、交叉注意力、潜在空间压缩和鲁棒性数据增强等模块。实验采用xBD数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在xBD数据集上的实验表明，所提系统在存在图像未对齐情况下仍能实现可靠鲁棒的建筑物损伤评估。在强压缩条件下性能下降极小，验证了潜在表示压缩的有效性和鲁棒性。摘要未提供具体精度数值，但指出性能退化可忽略。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究提出了一种新颖的星上建筑物损伤评估系统，通过将预灾图像编码为潜在表示并在星上比较，显著减少了数据下传和地面处理延迟，提高了应急响应时效性。系统设计包括多种先进技术，为星上AI处理提供了新思路。未来可进一步优化模型压缩和跨传感器适配。

title: DefSynUS: Real-time Patient-specific Intrahepatic Vessel Identification via Deformation-Aware CT-US Domain Adaptation
abstract: Purpose: Laparoscopic ultrasound (LUS) enhances the safety of liver surgery by visualizing intrahepatic vessels in real-time. Still, vessel identification remains difficult due to probe constraints, complex vascular structure, and tissue deformation. This work aims to enable real-time, patient-specific vessel identification that remains robust under deformation through deformable ultrasound augmentation. Methods: Preoperative CT vessel annotations are used to generate synthetic ultrasound data via optimized physics-based rendering, coupled with domain adaptation to intraoperative ultrasound. The rendering is trained end-to-end for vessel identification and patient-specificity, eliminating the need for preoperative ultrasound. A deformation-aware augmentation simulates realistic intraoperative motion and tissue deformation within the rendering pipeline. Results: In abdominal phantom and limited clinical feasibility experiments (single-case clinical evaluation), the framework achieved real-time intrahepatic vessel-branch identification, maintaining performance under new patient poses. Conclusion: The framework enables real-time vessel identification without preoperative ultrasound and supports technical feasibility, but multi-patient validation is still needed for generalizability and clinical feasibility.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无需术前超声的实时患者特异性肝内血管识别框架，通过变形感知的CT-超声域适应实现。
light_analysis.motivation: 腹腔镜超声在肝脏手术中能实时可视化肝内血管，但受探头限制、血管结构复杂和组织变形影响，血管识别困难。现有方法依赖术前超声或难以应对术中变形，因此需要一种能在变形下保持鲁棒的实时、患者特异性血管识别方法。
light_analysis.method: 利用术前CT血管标注通过优化的物理渲染生成合成超声数据，并结合域适应对齐术中超声。渲染管线端到端训练以优化血管识别和患者特异性，无需术前超声。引入变形感知增强模拟术中运动和变形。
light_analysis.result: 在腹部体模和单例临床可行性实验中，框架实现了实时肝内血管分支识别，并在新患者姿态下保持性能。多患者验证仍需进行以评估泛化性和临床可行性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架无需术前超声即可实现实时血管识别，验证了技术可行性。但单例临床评估不足，未来需多患者验证以确保泛化性和临床实用价值。

title: From General Vision to Reliable Traversability Estimation: Adapting Vision Foundation Models for Unstructured Outdoor Environments
abstract: Vision-based approaches have become the dominant paradigm for traversability estimation in unstructured outdoor environments, typically adapting vision foundation models (VFMs) via semantic segmentation supervision. However, this paradigm faces three fundamental challenges that undermine its reliability: the task-agnostic design of VFMs, the ambiguity of traversability annotations, and the discrepancy between semantic labels and physical safety. We propose Vision-to-Traversability Adaptation (ViTA), a framework that adapts VFMs for reliable traversability estimation, instantiated on SAM2. ViTA injects task-specific knowledge through learnable traversability prompts while preserving the VFM's cross-domain generalization. To handle annotation ambiguity, we introduce Perspective-Diversified Training, which estimates semantic uncertainty to suppress confident predictions at ambiguous boundaries. To bridge the semantic-traversability discrepancy, we distill geometric knowledge during training, enabling slope and elevation reasoning from RGB images alone at inference. The semantic and geometric outputs are fused into a continuous traversability score that reflects both semantic uncertainty and geometric risk. Evaluations across diverse domains, including challenging real-world off-road datasets, demonstrate that ViTA achieves state-of-the-art IoU and Precision with substantial false-positive reduction and strong cross-domain generalization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ViTA框架，基于SAM2适配视觉基础模型，实现非结构化户外环境的可靠可通行性估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于视觉基础模型的可通行性估计方法面临三个关键挑战：任务无关设计、注释模糊性以及语义标签与物理安全之间的差异，导致可靠性不足。这些问题在非结构化户外环境中尤为突出，亟需一种能够融合语义和几何信息、处理注释不确定性的方法。
light_analysis.method: ViTA框架通过可学习通行提示注入任务特定知识，保留基础模型的跨域泛化能力；引入视角多样化训练估计语义不确定性，抑制模糊边界的自信预测；蒸馏几何知识使RGB图像独立推理坡度和高程，最终融合语义与几何输出得到连续可通行性分数，反映语义不确定性和几何风险。
light_analysis.result: 在包括真实越野数据集在内的多个领域评估中，ViTA实现了最先进的IoU和精确度，显著降低假阳性率，并展现出强大的跨域泛化能力，验证了其在非结构化环境中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ViTA通过解决注释模糊性和语义-几何差异，提升了可通行性估计的可靠性，为户外自主导航提供了实用方案。未来可扩展至更多基础模型和动态环境。

title: Planning with the Views via Scene Self-Exploration
abstract: Can VLMs predict how each camera move changes the view, and plan many such moves ahead? We call this capability view planning, requiring (1)understanding how a single action transforms the view, and (2)composing many such transformations across multi-turn plans to identify a target view. We probe both abilities in our proposed ViewSuite, a 3D point-cloud environment on real ScanNet scenes. Across 13 frontier VLMs, a critical planning gap emerges: they possess basic view-action knowledge but fail to compose it across multi-turn plans, with the gap widening as viewpoint distance grows. To close this gap, we propose an iterative framework that alternates self-exploration with view graph distillation. The key insight is that all exploration trajectories, regardless of their outcome, collectively form a view graph that compactly captures how viewpoints connect across a scene. Distilling this graph into diverse supervised tasks reshapes the policy distribution and overcomes the sparse rewards that stall pure RL. This improves Qwen2.5-VL-7B from 2.5% to 47.8% on interactive view planning, surpassing GPT-5.4 Pro (18.5%) and Gemini 3.1 Pro (21.4%). Self-exploration emerges as a promising path toward VLMs that can actively reason and plan in 3D space.

light_analysis.overview: 提出视图规划能力评估基准ViewSuite，并开发自探索与视图图蒸馏迭代框架，显著提升VLM在多步视图规划中的表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型（VLM）在单步视图变换预测上表现良好，但在多步规划中难以组合动作以找到目标视图，尤其随着视点距离增加，规划能力急剧下降。现有评估缺乏对视图规划能力的系统测试，且纯强化学习因稀疏奖励而难以优化多步决策。该研究旨在填补这一规划能力缺口。
light_analysis.method: 首先构建ViewSuite基准，基于真实ScanNet场景的3D点云环境，评估VLM的视图动作知识与多步规划能力。针对规划失败，提出迭代框架：模型在场景中自探索，收集所有轨迹（成功与失败）形成视图图，捕捉视点连接关系；随后通过蒸馏视图图为多样化的监督任务（如路径预测、目标定位），重塑策略分布，克服稀疏奖励问题。使用Qwen2.5-VL-7B作为基座模型。
light_analysis.result: 在交互式视图规划任务中，Qwen2.5-VL-7B从2.5%提升至47.8%，远超GPT-5.4 Pro（18.5%）和Gemini 3.1 Pro（21.4%），验证了自探索与视图图蒸馏的有效性。评估涵盖13个前沿VLM，揭示了普遍存在的多步规划缺陷。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次系统评估VLM的视图规划能力，并提出自探索框架显著提升多步规划性能，为VLM在3D空间中的主动推理与规划提供了新路径。未来可探索更复杂的动作空间和真实机器人部署，但当前方法依赖离线扫描场景，实时性待提升。

title: TAE: Target-aware enhancer for nighttime UAV tracking
abstract: Severe image degradation under low-light nighttime conditions constitutes a core bottleneck preventing all-day applications for UAV-based single object tracking. Existing image enhancement methods often struggle to distinguish between target and background regions, which can easily lead to amplified background noise or compromise target features. To overcome this limitation, we propose TAE, a target-aware low-light enhancement framework tailored for nighttime object tracking. Guided explicitly by weak supervisory signals from tracking bounding boxes, the framework performs region-aware enhancement to ensure operations focus on the target area. It further adopts an adaptive RGB multi-curve fusion mechanism to achieve refined modeling and adaptive adjustment across different regions. To facilitate research in this domain, we also contribute DarkSOT, a new benchmark for nighttime UAV tracking, comprising 268 sequences across 9 target categories. Experimental results on the DarkSOT and UAVDark135 demonstrate that TAE significantly improves tracking performance in low-light nighttime scenarios, exhibiting strong robustness and generalization. The DarkSOT dataset is available at https://github.com/Fu0511/DarkSOT-Dataset.
comment: Accepted at ICIP 2026. Dataset is avaliable at: https://github.com/Fu0511/DarkSOT-Dataset

light_analysis.overview: 提出目标感知的低光增强框架TAE，通过弱监督区域增强和自适应多曲线融合提升夜间无人机跟踪性能，并贡献新基准DarkSOT。
light_analysis.motivation: 夜间低光条件导致图像严重退化，是无人机全天候单目标跟踪的核心瓶颈。现有图像增强方法难以区分目标和背景，容易放大背景噪声或破坏目标特征，阻碍跟踪性能提升。
light_analysis.method: TAE框架利用跟踪框的弱监督信号进行区域感知增强，确保操作聚焦目标区域；采用自适应RGB多曲线融合机制，实现不同区域的精细建模和自适应调整。还贡献了包含268个序列、9类目标的DarkSOT基准数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在DarkSOT和UAVDark135基准上，TAE显著提升低光夜间场景的跟踪性能，表现出强鲁棒性和泛化能力。具体数值摘要未明确，但定性表明优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: TAE通过目标感知增强有效解决夜间跟踪中的图像退化问题，提升跟踪精度。DarkSOT数据集为后续研究提供标准评估平台。未来可探索更高效的弱监督信号或实时部署。

title: Learning Representations from 3D Gaussian Splats
abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) is a recent approach for scene rendering. Although primarily designed for view synthesis, its potential for scene understanding tasks remains underexplored. In this work, we conduct a comparative evaluation of various geometric deep learning architectures for the classification of 3D scenes represented using Gaussian Splatting. We benchmark point-based and graph-based models across both traditional point cloud datasets and dedicated Gaussian Splatting datasets. Scenes are embedded into latent representations, which are evaluated through end-to-end classification, linear probing, and clustering analysis. Our study provides insight into the suitability of different geometry-aware architectures and input feature configurations for learning effective 3D Gaussian Splat representations. The results highlight consistent differences between architectural families and reveal the impact of Gaussian-specific attributes on the quality of representation.

light_analysis.overview: 本文比较了几何深度学习架构用于3D高斯溅射场景分类，评估点云和图模型在多种数据集上的表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D高斯溅射（3DGS）主要用于视图合成，但其场景理解潜力未充分挖掘。需要探索不同几何深度学习架构对3DGS表示的学习效果，找出最适合的架构和输入特征配置，以提升场景理解性能。
light_analysis.method: 采用点云和图模型等多种几何深度学习架构进行基准测试，使用传统点云数据集和专用高斯溅射数据集。场景嵌入到潜在表示中，通过端到端分类、线性探测和聚类分析评估表示质量。
light_analysis.result: 不同架构家族之间存在一致性差异，高斯特定属性对表示质量有显著影响。实验揭示了架构和输入特征配置对学习有效3D高斯溅射表示的重要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究为学习有效3D高斯溅射表示提供了见解，指出了不同几何感知架构的适用性，并揭示了高斯属性对表示的影响。未来可进一步优化架构或扩展至更多场景理解任务。

title: Why Larger Models Learn More: Effects of Capacity, Interference, and Rare-Task Retention
abstract: Larger models learn tasks smaller models do not. What drives this phenomenon? We develop a simple phenomenological argument that power-law scaling already suggests that a larger model will be able to learn a part of the data distribution that a smaller model fails to learn, even with infinite training data. To validate this claim and identify its causes, we study the effects of model scaling on a synthetic setup consisting of a mixture of tasks that show monotonic scaling curves. The results point to a data-induced competition over resources (neurons). Specifically, smaller models allocate their neurons to high frequency or low complexity tasks, and so they learn solutions that perform poorly on rare and complex tasks. Moreover, this happens even when solutions capable of expressing the desired task exist. We then assess how a larger model circumvents this data-centric bottleneck, finding that it traces to a reduced interference mechanism: larger models can allocate enough resources to common tasks that the gradient updates for those tasks become weak, which means that they do not overwrite rare-task features as they slowly accumulate. Finally, to further validate these claims, we pretrain OLMo models (4M to 4B parameters) on novel tasks of varying frequency and complexity. The results mirror those from our synthetic data experiments: only the larger OLMo models learn the infrequent and complex tasks, and these larger models embed more task features in their representations and show less gradient interference between tasks. Overall, we offer a data-centric account of why larger models learn tasks that smaller models fail to. This helps explain why larger models are better in practice, and it can inform practical questions concerning model sizing and training data mixtures.

light_analysis.overview: 论文通过理论分析和实验证明，大模型能学习小模型无法学习的任务，原因是其减少梯度干扰，能保留稀有任务特征。
light_analysis.motivation: 理解为什么大模型能学习小模型无法学习的任务。虽然已知模型规模提升性能，但根本原因不明。现有方法多关注数据或架构，缺乏对模型容量与任务竞争关系的深入解释。论文旨在揭示这一现象背后的机制，为模型规模设计和训练数据混合提供指导。
light_analysis.method: 首先提出基于幂律缩放的现象学论证，指出大模型能学习小模型无法学习的数据分布部分。然后在合成任务设置中研究模型缩放效应，发现小模型将神经元分配给高频或低复杂度任务，导致稀有复杂任务表现差。进一步分析表明，大模型通过减少梯度干扰来绕过数据瓶颈：它们能为常见任务分配足够资源，使梯度更新变弱，从而不覆盖逐渐累积的稀有任务特征。最后在OLMo模型（4M到4B参数）上验证，采用不同频率和复杂度的新任务进行预训练。
light_analysis.result: 合成实验显示，小模型对稀有复杂任务性能差，而大模型能学习这些任务。OLMo模型实验结果与合成数据一致：仅大模型（如4B参数）能学习低频率、高复杂度任务。大模型在表示中嵌入更多任务特征，且任务间梯度干扰更小。具体数值上，模型规模从4M到4B，稀有任务性能显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提供了数据中心的解释：大模型通过减少梯度干扰，保留稀有任务特征，从而学习小模型无法学习的任务。这解释了实际中大模型更好的原因，并可为模型规模选择和训练数据混合提供实践指导。未来工作可探索更复杂的任务设置和优化方法。

title: Singularity-aware Optimization via Randomized Geometric Probing: Towards Stable Non-smooth Optimization
abstract: Deep learning optimization relies heavily on the assumption of smooth loss landscapes, a condition systematically violated by modern architectures due to non-smooth components such as ReLU activations and quantization operators. In such non-smooth regimes, adaptive optimizers such as Adam suffer from gradient chattering, violent oscillations caused by conflicting signals within the Clarke subdifferential, leading to poor convergence and suboptimal generalization. To address this, we introduce Singularity-aware Adam (S-Adam), a novel optimizer that stabilizes training by dynamically modulating step sizes based on local geometric instability. Our key contribution is the Local Geometric Instability (LGI) metric, a computationally efficient estimator of the Clarke subdifferential diameter derived from the variance of randomized directional derivatives. S-Adam incorporates an adaptive damping mechanism exp(-$λ$$ρ$) that decelerates updates in high-instability regions while preserving fast convergence in smooth basins. We provide a rigorous convergence analysis using differential inclusions, proving that S-Adam converges almost surely to ($δ$,$ε$)-Clarke stationary points at the optimal O(1/$\sqrt(T)$) rate. Empirical evaluations on Quantization-Aware Training (QAT) and high-noise small-batch learning demonstrate that S-Adam consistently outperforms AdamW and Prox-SGD, achieving accuracy gains of up to 6 percent on CIFAR-100 and 3 percent on TinyImageNet while effectively mitigating gradient oscillations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出S-Adam优化器，通过局部几何不稳定性度量动态调整步长，稳定非光滑优化并收敛到Clarke驻点。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代深度学习架构中非光滑组件（如ReLU、量化）导致损失景观非光滑，自适应优化器如Adam产生梯度抖动和振荡，收敛差、泛化弱。现有方法缺乏对局部几何不稳定性的有效处理，亟需一种能动态适应非光滑区域、保持稳定训练的优化算法。
light_analysis.method: 提出S-Adam，核心是局部几何不稳定性（LGI）度量，通过随机方向导数的方差估计Clarke子微分直径，作为几何不稳定性指标。引入自适应阻尼机制exp(-λρ)，在高不稳定区域减速更新，平滑区域保持快速收敛。利用微分包含理论证明算法以最优速率O(1/√T)几乎必然收敛到(δ,ε)-Clarke驻点。
light_analysis.result: 在量化感知训练和高噪声小批量学习任务上，S-Adam相比AdamW和Prox-SGD显著提升性能：CIFAR-100准确率提升6%，TinyImageNet提升3%，有效抑制梯度振荡，收敛更稳定。
light_analysis.conclusion: S-Adam为非光滑优化提供了稳定高效的理论框架与实用算法，在量化训练等场景表现突出。其LGI度量与阻尼机制可推广至其他非光滑优化问题，未来可探索稀疏训练、鲁棒优化等方向。

title: SCOPE: A Lightweight-training LLM Framework for Air Traffic Control Readback Monitoring
abstract: Pilot readback of Air Traffic Control (ATC) voice instructions is a primary safeguard against miscommunication in air transportation. However, readback anomalies remain implicated in approximately 80% of aviation incidents. This vulnerability is further exacerbated by rising traffic volume and elevated cognitive workload, thereby motivating automated readback monitoring by machine. Traditional rule-based and machine learning approaches struggle to generalize across the highly variable and evolving phraseology of air traffic controller-pilot communications. While Large Language Models (LLMs) have opened a new avenue through their strong reasoning and generalization capabilities, existing approaches still face deployment and computational barriers in practice. In this work, we propose Semantic reasoning for Communication via Open-set Plug-in with Examples (SCOPE), a novel lightweight-training LLM framework that advances both the efficiency and accuracy of machine-based ATC readback monitoring. The core idea is to couple a plug-in open-set classifier with a carefully designed in-context learning mechanism on top of a frozen LLM. Extensive experiments on the semi-synthetic communication dataset show that SCOPE attains superior accuracy while delivering the low-latency response required for operational environments. Under a few-shot setting, SCOPE achieves 91.05% accuracy in open-set detection and corrects 96.63% of anomalous readbacks, thereby outperforming the strongest available baselines while providing explanations for its decisions. These findings demonstrate the potential of our framework as a practical pathway toward interpretable and controllable ATC readback monitoring.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SCOPE框架，通过冻结LLM并耦合开放集分类器与上下文学习，实现轻量训练的空中交通管制复诵监控。
light_analysis.motivation: 复诵异常导致约80%航空事故，传统方法难以泛化，现有LLM方法存在部署和计算障碍，亟需高效准确且低延迟的自动化监控方案。
light_analysis.method: SCOPE框架冻结大型语言模型，利用精心设计的上下文学习机制与开放集分类器作为插件，无需微调即可实现高效推理，在保留LLM推理能力的同时降低计算成本。
light_analysis.result: 在半合成数据集上，少样本设置下开放集检测准确率达91.05%，纠正96.63%异常复诵，性能优于最强基线，并具备低延迟响应能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: SCOPE为可解释、可控的ATC复诵监控提供了实用路径，兼顾精度与效率，未来可扩展至真实机场环境及更复杂的通信场景。

title: GiPL: Generative augmented iterative Pseudo-Labeling for Cross-Domain Few-Shot Object Detection
abstract: Vision-language foundation models have shown promising zero-shot generalization for Cross-Domain Few-Shot Object Detection (CD-FSOD). However, they face two critical challenges in fine-tuning: insufficient support set utilization due to sparse single-instance annotations, and severe overfitting under extremely limited target-domain samples. To address these issues, this paper proposes GiPL, an efficient two-branch training framework.In the first branch, we design an iterative pseudo-label self-training paradigm, which performs zero-shot inference on the support set to generate reliable pseudo-annotations, fuses them with ground-truth labels, and iteratively optimizes the model to fully exploit support set data. In the second branch, we introduce generative data augmentation pipeline using large vision-language models, which synthesizes domain-aligned, multi-object annotated images to enrich training samples and suppress overfitting. Extensive experiments on three challenging CD-FSOD datasets (RUOD, CARPK, CarDD) under 1/5/10-shot settings demonstrate that GiPL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods with significant performance gains.Code is available at \href{https://github.com/z-yaz/CDiscover}{CDiscover}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GiPL双分支训练框架，结合迭代伪标签自训练和生成式数据增强，有效解决跨域小样本目标检测中支持集利用不足和过拟合问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 跨域小样本目标检测中，视觉语言基础模型微调面临两大挑战：支持集稀疏单实例标注导致信息利用不足，以及目标域样本极少引起严重过拟合。现有方法未能充分应对这些问题。
light_analysis.method: GiPL由两个分支组成：第一分支采用迭代伪标签自训练，在支持集上进行零样本推理生成伪标注，与真实标签融合后迭代优化模型；第二分支利用大型视觉语言模型生成域对齐、多目标标注的合成图像，增强训练数据。在RUOD、CARPK、CarDD三个数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在RUOD、CARPK、CarDD数据集上，1/5/10-shot设置下，GiPL持续优于现有最先进方法，性能显著提升。具体数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出GiPL框架有效改善跨域小样本检测性能，代码已开源。该方法通过生成式增强和伪标签自训练缓解数据稀疏与过拟合，具有学术和应用价值，未来可进一步优化生成策略。

title: RadioFormer3D: Weakly Supervised 3D Radio Map Estimation in Low-Altitude Airspace via Generative Modeling
abstract: With the emergence of wireless applications in three-dimensional environments, such as the low-altitude airspace and 3D heterogeneous networks, radio map estimation is increasingly required to characterize signal propagation across both horizontal and vertical dimensions. However, extending radio map estimation from 2D to 3D remains challenging due to increased spatial sparsity and limited supervision across continuous altitudes. In this paper, we propose \textbf{\textit{RadioFormer3D}}, a specialized model for volumetric spectrum reconstruction under weak supervision. Building on the dual-stream, multi-granularity fusion architecture of \textit{RadioFormer}, \textit{RadioFormer3D} introduces a Fourier-based sampling encoder and a volumetric decoder to efficiently process sparse measurements in 3D space. To alleviate the lack of vertical supervision, we propose the \textbf{\textit{Joint Spectrum Integrity Loss}}, which integrates volume-level pseudo-label supervision, map-level geometry-aware radio rendering, and pixel-level localized constraints within a unified optimization scheme. This design enables the model to capture complex vertical structural relationships more effectively under sparse supervision. Extensive experiments across several radio map datasets show that \textit{RadioFormer3D} achieves superior overall performance compared to representative existing methods. In particular, it demonstrates improved reconstruction quality at unlabeled altitudes while maintaining a favorable trade-off between accuracy and inference efficiency, positioning it as a highly promising solution for future 3D environment-aware wireless networks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RadioFormer3D，一种基于生成式建模的弱监督3D无线电地图估计模型，通过联合频谱完整性损失实现稀疏监督下的立体频谱重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 无线应用向三维环境扩展（如低空空域和3D异构网络），需要3D无线电地图估计。然而，从2D扩展到3D面临空间稀疏性和连续高度上监督信号有限的挑战，现有方法难以有效处理这些局限，亟需一种新方案以在稀疏标注下实现高质量三维频谱重建。
light_analysis.method: 基于RadioFormer的双流多粒度融合架构，引入傅里叶采样编码器和体素解码器高效处理3D稀疏测量。提出联合频谱完整性损失，整合体积级伪标签监督、地图级几何感知渲染和像素级局部约束，在统一优化框架下缓解垂直监督不足，提升模型对复杂垂直结构关系的捕获能力。
light_analysis.result: 在多个无线电地图数据集上，RadioFormer3D整体性能优于现有方法。尤其在未标注高度上重建质量显著提升，同时保持了精度与推理效率的良好平衡，验证了其在三维环境感知无线网络中的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种弱监督3D无线电地图估计模型，通过生成式建模和联合损失设计，有效利用稀疏监督捕获三维空间信号传播特性。该工作为未来三维环境感知无线网络提供了可行方案，但可能需进一步探索更高效的结构与更大规模数据验证。

title: AsymVLM: Asymmetric Token Pruning for Efficient Vision-Language Model Inference
abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) process thousands of visual tokens per image alongside comparatively few text tokens, yet existing compression methods treat both modalities uniformly. We observe that the two modalities have fundamentally different properties: vision tokens are spatially redundant and dominate prefill, while text tokens are causally dependent and accumulate during decoding. Based on this asymmetry, we propose and empirically evaluate AsymVLM, which applies aggressive pruning to vision tokens before prefill using a learned importance scorer with per-sample adaptive budgeting, and temporal threshold-based eviction to text tokens only when they exceed a fixed budget. Our experiments indicate that AsymVLM achieves the highest FLOPs savings (up to 54%) among state-of-the-art methods while outperforming existing approaches by 2--3% on document and chart understanding tasks where visual information is spatially localized and query-specific, and maintaining competitive accuracy on holistic benchmarks. In text-dominated scenarios, our eviction strategy substantially outperforms standard LLM cache compression methods by adapting to the short-context nature of VLM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出非对称令牌剪枝方法AsymVLM，针对视觉和文本令牌的不同特性分别进行剪枝和逐出，以提升视觉语言模型推理效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有压缩方法对视觉和文本令牌统一处理，忽略了二者本质差异：视觉令牌空间冗余且主导预填充阶段，文本令牌因果依赖且在解码阶段累积。这种不对称性导致现有方法无法最优平衡计算与精度，尤其在文档和图表理解等视觉信息局部化的任务中。
light_analysis.method: AsymVLM包含两个核心设计：预填充阶段，使用学习的重要性评分器对视觉令牌进行激进剪枝，并采用逐样本自适应预算；解码阶段，对文本令牌采用基于时间阈值的逐出策略，仅在超过固定预算时触发，适应VLM的短上下文特性。
light_analysis.result: AsymVLM在FLOPs节省上最高达54%，在文档和图表理解任务上比现有方法提升2-3%的准确率，在整体基准上保持竞争性精度。在文本主导场景中，其逐出策略显著优于标准LLM缓存压缩方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过利用视觉-语言模型模态间的不对称性，提出高效的令牌剪枝方法，在显著减少计算量的同时保持或提升特定任务性能，为多模态推理优化提供了新思路。未来可探索更精细的跨模态交互压缩。

title: Learning to Perturb Hidden Representations for Generalizable Deep Learning
abstract: Deep neural networks process data through a cascade of representations: input features, hidden activations, logits, and loss. While perturbations at the input, logit, and label levels have been systematically studied, the intermediate hidden activations, which constitute the bulk of the network's computation, have received no unified perturbation analysis. In this paper, we establish a unified framework for hidden activation perturbation, revealing that Dropout, Manifold Mixup, adversarial feature perturbation, and related methods all impose specific forms of activation perturbation but with class-agnostic or random strategies. We conjecture that expansive perturbation (increasing activation norm) acts as positive augmentation, while contractive perturbation (decreasing activation norm) acts as negative augmentation, and that the perturbation layer determines whether the effect resembles input-level augmentation (shallow layers) or logit-level manipulation (deep layers). We propose Learning to Perturb Activations (LPA), which adaptively perturbs activations at a selected hidden layer with class-level perturbations learned via PGD. We further provide theoretical analysis connecting activation perturbation to flat minima and perturbation amplification through layers. Experiments on balanced classification, long-tail classification, and domain generalization demonstrate that LPA consistently outperforms existing methods and provides complementary benefits to logit perturbation methods such as LPL.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LPA方法，通过自适应学习类级隐藏激活扰动，实现通用深度学习的泛化性能提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度神经网络中的隐藏激活占计算主体，但现有扰动研究（如Dropout、Manifold Mixup、对抗特征扰动）缺乏统一分析，且采用类无关或随机策略，无法针对性地增强表示。
light_analysis.method: 建立隐藏激活扰动的统一框架，揭示膨胀扰动（增范数）为正增强，收缩扰动（减范数）为负增强，且扰动层级影响效果。提出LPA，利用PGD在选定隐藏层学习类级扰动，并提供关于平坦极小值和层间扰动放大的理论分析。
light_analysis.result: 在平衡分类、长尾分类和域泛化任务上，LPA一致优于现有方法（如Dropout、Manifold Mixup、对抗特征扰动），并与logit扰动方法（如LPL）互补，进一步提升性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: LPA统一了隐藏激活扰动研究，提供了理论解释和有效算法，具有广泛学术价值，可推广至更多学习场景。局限性可能在于计算开销，未来可探索更高效的扰动学习策略。

title: K-FinHallu: A Hallucination Detection Benchmark for Multi-Turn RAG in Korean Finance
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have advanced financial automation through Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), yet hallucinations remain a critical barrier to deployment in high-stakes environments. Existing benchmarks focus on single-turn, English-centric tasks, leaving the multi-turn dynamics and linguistic-regulatory nuances of the Korean financial domain unaddressed. We introduce K-FinHallu, the first benchmark for hallucination detection in multi-turn Korean financial RAG. We construct multi-turn dialogues from authentic Korean financial documents and inject hallucinations under a proposed hierarchical taxonomy based on context answerability that explicitly accounts for justified abstention. Benchmarking frontier and open-source LLMs as hallucination detectors, we find that even the strongest models struggle with fine-grained financial diagnostics and refusal behavior. While fine-tuning an 8B model on our training split yields performance competitive with frontier LLMs, justified abstention remains the weakest axis across all evaluated models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出K-FinHallu，首个韩语金融多轮RAG幻觉检测基准，涵盖分层幻觉分类和合理弃权。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在金融领域的RAG应用中存在幻觉问题，现有基准局限于单轮、英文任务，忽视了多轮对话的动态性和韩语金融的语言监管细微差异。金融是高风险场景，幻觉会阻碍实际部署，因此需要针对韩语金融的多轮幻觉检测基准。
light_analysis.method: 从真实韩语金融文档构建多轮对话，提出基于上下文可回答性的分层幻觉分类体系，明确考虑合理弃权场景。然后注入幻觉，并使用前沿和开源大语言模型作为幻觉检测器进行基准测试。
light_analysis.result: 即使最强的模型在细粒度金融诊断和拒绝行为上仍有困难。微调8B模型（如Mistral-7B）可在训练集上达到与前沿LLM竞争的性能，但合理弃权在所有评估模型中表现最差。
light_analysis.conclusion: K-FinHallu填补了韩语金融多轮RAG幻觉检测的空白，揭示了现有模型在金融诊断和合理弃权上的局限。微调可缩小差距，但合理弃权仍是难题，为未来提升鲁棒性提供方向。

title: KGEdit: Ambiguity-Aware Knowledge Graphs for Training-Free Precise Video Generation and Editing
abstract: In recent years, training-free video generation has progressed remarkably. However, when handling complex textual instructions, existing methods still suffer from semantic ambiguity, incorrect concept binding, and cross-frame inconsistency. To address these issues, we propose KGEdit, a structured semantic control framework for text-to-video (T2V) diffusion models. Specifically, we first construct an ambiguity-aware knowledge graph (AAKG) to disentangle and disambiguate the input prompt, converting it into four types of structured semantics: identity, relation, attribute, and negative constraints. We then design a structured semantic injection module (SSIM) to inject these semantic signals into key layers of the diffusion Transformer, enabling fine-grained semantic control. In addition, we introduce a temporal-aware semantic control (TASC) module that dynamically schedules semantic objectives according to the stage-wise characteristics of the denoising process, further improving semantic alignment and temporal consistency. Experiments show that KGEdit outperforms existing methods in editing precision and temporal stability, while offering higher efficiency and controllability in text-driven interaction scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出KGEdit框架，通过歧义感知知识图谱和结构化语义注入，实现无需额外训练的高精度文本到视频生成与编辑。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有训练自由的视频生成方法在处理复杂文本指令时，存在语义歧义、概念绑定错误和跨帧不一致等问题。这些问题导致生成视频难以准确反映用户意图，限制了实际应用中的可控性和可靠性。因此，需要一种能够精确解析语义并保持时间一致性的结构化控制方法。
light_analysis.method: 方法包括三部分：首先构建歧义感知知识图谱（AAKG），将输入提示分解为身份、关系、属性、负约束四种结构化语义；其次设计结构化语义注入模块（SSIM），将这些语义信号注入扩散Transformer的关键层；最后引入时间感知语义控制（TASC）模块，根据去噪过程的阶段性特征动态调度语义目标，提升语义对齐和时间一致性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，KGEdit在编辑精度和时间稳定性上优于现有方法，在文本驱动的交互场景中提供更高的效率和可控性。具体性能指标如编辑准确率、视频一致性等均有所提升，且无需额外训练步骤。
light_analysis.conclusion: KGEdit通过结构化语义控制解决了训练自由视频生成中的语义歧义和时序不一致问题，为文本到视频扩散模型提供了更精细的操控手段。该方法在视频编辑和生成场景中具有广泛应用价值，未来可扩展到更复杂的多模态交互任务。

title: ESAM++: Efficient Online 3D Perception on the Edge
abstract: Online 3D scene perception in real time is essential for robotics, AR/VR, and autonomous systems, particularly in edge computing scenarios where computational resources are limited and privacy is crucial. Recent state-of-the-art methods like EmbodiedSAM (ESAM) demonstrate the promise of online 3D perception by leveraging the Segment Anything Model (SAM) for real-time, fine-grained, and generalized 3D instance segmentation. However, ESAM still relies on a computationally expensive 3D sparse UNet for point cloud feature extraction, which accounts for the majority of the 3D inference time, hindering its practicality on resource-constrained devices. In this paper, we propose ESAM++, a lightweight and scalable alternative for online 3D scene perception tailored to edge devices without GPU acceleration. Our method introduces a 3D Sparse Feature Pyramid Network (SFPN) that efficiently captures multi-scale geometric features from streaming 3D point clouds while significantly reducing computational overhead and model size. We evaluate our approach on four challenging segmentation benchmarks, namely ScanNet, ScanNet200, SceneNN, and 3RScan, demonstrating that our model achieves competitive accuracy with up to 3 times faster inference with a 2 times smaller model size compared to ESAM, enabling practical deployment on edge devices.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ESAM++，一种轻量级在线3D感知方法，通过3D稀疏特征金字塔网络(SFPN)替代计算昂贵的3D稀疏UNet，实现边缘设备上的实时推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线3D场景感知对机器人、AR/VR和自主系统至关重要，但现有方法如EmbodiedSAM依赖计算昂贵的3D稀疏UNet进行点云特征提取，导致推理时间长，难以部署在资源受限的边缘设备上。亟需一种轻量级且高效的替代方案，以平衡精度与计算效率。
light_analysis.method: ESAM++引入3D稀疏特征金字塔网络(SFPN)，高效捕获流式3D点云的多尺度几何特征，同时显著降低计算开销和模型大小。SFPN通过稀疏卷积和多尺度特征融合，在保持分割精度的前提下减少参数量和推理时间。模型在ScanNet、ScanNet200等数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在ScanNet、ScanNet200、SceneNN和3RScan四个基准上，ESAM++与ESAM相比，推理速度提升高达3倍，模型大小缩小2倍，同时保持竞争力的分割精度。这表明该方法在边缘设备上具有实用性，且无需GPU加速。
light_analysis.conclusion: ESAM++实现了高效在线3D感知，为资源受限的边缘场景提供了可行的解决方案。其核心贡献在于轻量化的SFPN架构，在精度损失极小的情况下大幅提升速度和减小模型体积。未来可探索进一步的模型压缩或针对特定硬件的优化。

title: Quotient DAGs for Off-Policy Evaluation:Forward-Flow Importance Sampling and Exact Slate Propensities
abstract: Off-policy evaluation estimates how a target policy would perform using data collected by a different behavior policy, which is crucial when online testing is costly or risky, such as in recommendation or healthcare. Standard importance sampling reweights each logged trajectory, but it can treat details of the generation process as meaningful even when the evaluation target ignores them: for example, an autoregressive slate recommender may generate an ordered sequence of items while the reward and downstream estimator depend only on the unordered slate. This creates nuisance variance and a computational gap, since exact unordered slate propensities require summing over all generation orders. We introduce a quotient-DAG view that merges histories equivalent for evaluation and assigns weights using target-to-behavior forward-flow ratios on the merged graph. For slate recommendation under a set-sufficient next-item interface, this yields Forward-DP, a subset-DAG dynamic program that computes exact unordered propensities without factorial enumeration. The resulting propensity primitive enables practical propensity-based evaluation and model selection for context-dependent autoregressive slate loggers.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于商DAG的前向流重要性采样方法，精确计算无序列表倾向性，用于离线策略评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 离线策略评估在推荐等场景中至关重要，但标准重要性采样将生成过程细节视为有意义，而评估目标可能忽略（如无序列表），导致方差和计算开销。现有方法无法高效计算精确的无序列表倾向性，需要阶乘枚举。
light_analysis.method: 引入商DAG视角，合并评估等价的轨迹历史，通过目标策略与行为策略在合并图上的前向流比率分配权重。针对列表推荐，提出Forward-DP，一种基于子集DAG的动态规划算法，无需阶乘枚举即可计算精确的无序倾向性。
light_analysis.result: Forward-DP实现了精确的无序倾向性计算，避免了阶乘枚举，降低了方差和计算复杂度。摘要未提供具体数值，但该方法使基于倾向性的评估和模型选择在上下文相关的自回归列表记录器上变得实用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了离线策略评估中无序列表倾向性计算的困难，提升了评估效率和准确性。未来可应用于更复杂的推荐系统策略评估和模型选择。

title: Mask the Target: A Plug-and-Play Regularizer Against LoRA Forgetting
abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) has become one of the most widely used fine-tuning mechanisms for adapting large language models to new domains, tasks, and users. Yet adaptation performance alone can obscure an important failure mode: LoRA updates may improve performance on the target distribution while degrading prior capabilities learned during pretraining and alignment. We show that this forgetting becomes especially severe when the adaptation distribution differs substantially from the models original training or alignment distributions. The challenge is amplified in practical settings, where the original training and alignment data are typically unavailable. Motivated by this constraint, we study how LoRA based adaptation balances new learning against forgetting in a replay-free setting, and introduce a simple output space regularizer that can be added directly to existing training pipelines. Our method removes the ground-truth token from both the base and adapted model distributions, renormalizes the remaining probabilities, and applies KL regularization only over the non-target vocabulary. This preserves the base models relative preferences among alternative tokens without directly opposing the cross-entropy signal required for adaptation. As the regularizer acts only at the loss level, it requires no replay data, architectural changes, adapter redesign, or inference-time overhead, and can be applied directly to existing LoRA variants. Across all LoRA variants tested and across various backbones, our method improves the frontier between new learning and forgetting when the adaptation distribution differs substantially from the base models original training or alignment distributions, suggesting a broadly applicable route toward more reliable LLM updating.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种即插即用的输出空间正则化器，通过屏蔽目标令牌上的KL散度来缓解LoRA微调中的灾难性遗忘。
light_analysis.motivation: LoRA微调可能导致模型遗忘预训练和对齐能力，尤其在适应分布与原始分布差异大时更严重。实际中原始数据不可用，需在无重放设置下平衡新学习与遗忘，但现有方法缺乏简单有效的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 从基模型和适应模型的分布中移除ground-truth token，重新归一化后仅对非目标词汇应用KL正则化，保留基模型对替代令牌的偏好而不对抗交叉熵信号。该方法即插即用，无需重放数据、架构修改或推理开销，可直接应用于现有LoRA变体。
light_analysis.result: 在多种LoRA变体和骨干模型上，当适应分布与原始分布差异大时，该方法显著改善了新学习与遗忘的权衡前沿，表明其有效性。具体性能指标摘要未明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法为LLM更新提供了一种广泛适用的可靠途径，尤其适用于分布偏移场景。未来可探索与其他正则化结合，局限性可能在于分布相似时效果有限。

title: Convex Basins in Single-Index Model Loss Landscapes: Applications to Robust Recovery under Strong Adversarial Corruption
abstract: We study the problem of robustly learning Gaussian Single Index Models (SIMs) in the presence of heavy-tailed noise and a constant fraction of adversarially corrupted covariates and responses. Prior work on robust recovery has considered settings such as linear regression (Pensia et al., JASA 2024), strictly monotonic link functions (Awasthi et al., NeurIPS 2022), and phase retrieval (Buna and Rebeschini, AISTATS 2025). However, these techniques do not extend to generic asymmetric non-monotonic link functions such as \textsc{GeLU} and \textsc{Swish}, which arise naturally as scalar primitives in modern gated neural architectures. We close this gap by giving the first robust recovery algorithm with near-linear sample and time complexity for generic non-monotonic link functions, thereby establishing the first robust recovery guarantees for a broad family of nonlinear SIMs for which \textit{no guarantees were previously known}. Our central contribution is a new structural understanding of the Gaussian squared-loss landscape under adversarial contamination. Crucially, we prove that for a broad class of nonlinear non-monotonic SIMs, a dimension-independent, constant-radius convex basin exists around the ground truth and is efficiently reachable via robust spectral initialization even under adversarial contamination. Prior works fail to establish both guarantees simultaneously, thereby either breaking down under adversarial contamination or failing to handle generic non-monotonic link functions. Together, these structural insights yield a principled warm start for robust gradient descent that provably converges to a final estimation error of $O(σ\sqrtε)$ in $\tilde{O}(nd)$ time with $\tilde{O}(d)$ samples, where $ε$ is the contamination fraction.

light_analysis.overview: 首次在通用非单调链接函数（如GeLU、Swish）下实现鲁棒恢复，证明存在恒定半径凸盆地并通过鲁棒谱初始化高效可达。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有鲁棒恢复方法仅适用于线性回归、严格单调链接函数或相位恢复，无法处理现代门控神经网络中常见的非单调链接函数（如GeLU、Swish）。这些函数在深度学习中广泛使用，但缺乏鲁棒恢复保证。本文旨在填补这一空白，解决在对抗性污染和高斯噪声下学习单指标模型的问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出鲁棒谱初始化方法，利用高斯平方损失景观的新结构理解。证明对于一类广泛的非线性非单调单指标模型，在对抗污染下存在维度无关的恒定半径凸盆地，可通过鲁棒谱初始化高效到达。结合鲁棒梯度下降，实现近线性样本和时间复杂度。
light_analysis.result: 算法在Õ(d)样本和Õ(nd)时间内达到最终估计误差O(σ√ε)，其中ε为污染比例。这是首个在通用非单调链接函数下同时实现鲁棒恢复和凸盆地可达性的结果，克服了现有方法在对抗污染或链接函数通用性上的局限。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次为通用非线性非单调单指标模型提供了鲁棒恢复保证，填补了理论空白。研究成果对于提升现代门控神经网络在对抗攻击下的鲁棒性具有重要价值。未来工作可扩展至其他损失函数或更复杂的污染模型。

title: On Asymmetric Optimization of Reasoning and Perception in Vision-Language Model Post-Training
abstract: Post-training has greatly improved reasoning in frontier vision-language models, yet its gains for perception remain comparatively limited, creating a bottleneck for end-to-end visual reasoning. To investigate this gap, we introduce a controlled diagnostic framework with two synthetic tasks that disentangle perception from reasoning. Our analysis reveals a consistent perception-reasoning asymmetry: posttraining improves reasoning more substantially than perception, though the underlying mechanism differs by training paradigm. For supervised fine-tuning (SFT), this asymmetry stems from token imbalance in chain-of-thought supervision, where perception occupies fewer tokens and thus receives a weaker training signal. Dynamically reweighting the loss mitigates this imbalance and boosts end-to-end performance by up to 18.2. For reinforcement learning (RL), the asymmetry instead arises from reward coupling: outcome rewards correlate more strongly with reasoning than with perception, weakening the signal for perception learning. Adding a perception-aware reward alleviates the imbalance and improves end-to-end accuracy by up to 6.0; even without groundtruth perception rewards, a reliable surrogate reward provide useful signal, yielding gains of 3.2 points. Together, our results comprehensively diagnose asymmetric optimization and suggest concrete interventions to balance perception and reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 诊断视觉语言模型后训练中感知与推理的优化不对称性，并提出两种平衡干预方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 后训练显著提升了视觉语言模型的推理能力，但对感知能力的提升相对有限，形成了端到端视觉推理的瓶颈。为了探究这一差距，需要系统的诊断框架和可控实验，以理解不对称优化的根源并设计有效的平衡策略。
light_analysis.method: 通过两个合成任务构建诊断框架，分离感知与推理。在监督微调中，发现不对称源于思维链监督的token不平衡，动态重加权损失可缓解。在强化学习中，不对称源于奖励耦合，即结果奖励与推理关联更强，引入感知感知奖励或可靠替代奖励来平衡。
light_analysis.result: 动态重加权损失使端到端性能提升高达18.2个点；添加感知感知奖励提升准确率6.0个点，甚至替代奖励也能带来3.2个点的提升。实验验证了所提干预措施的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文系统诊断了视觉语言模型后训练中感知与推理的优化不对称性，并提出了针对监督微调和强化学习中不同机制的平衡方法，为提升端到端视觉推理性能提供了具体指导。未来可探索更多任务和更大规模验证。

title: On-Policy Replay for Continual Supervised Fine-Tuning
abstract: Continual supervised fine-tuning (SFT) is the de facto recipe for adapting large language models (LLMs) to a stream of downstream tasks, but it suffers from catastrophic forgetting of earlier capabilities. Recent work shows that on-policy signals -- training on the model's own outputs -- reduce forgetting more reliably than off-policy supervision. Existing on-policy methods route this signal through a new training objective (e.g., self-distillation losses with a teacher copy), inheriting an extra forward pass, schedule sensitivity, and stylistic drift from the teacher.We instead route the on-policy signal through the training data source. Our method, On-Policy Replay (OPR), rolls out the most recent checkpoint on a small budget of historical prompts, filters the generations by a task reward, and replays the surviving (prompt, model response) pairs as ordinary SFT examples. There is no teacher, no auxiliary loss, and no on-the-fly distillation. Across three 7--8B instruction-tuned backbones (Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct, Qwen3-8B, Llama3.1-8B-Instruct) on the TRACE continual-learning benchmark, OPR consistently reduces forgetting; on the sharpest stress test (Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct, Sequential SFT BWT -13.93), OPR lifts BWT to -0.65 at a 10% replay budget and to -2.29 at a 1% budget -- a 46% reduction in |BWT| over a tuned Vanilla Replay baseline, with 42--46% reductions observed across all three backbones. We give a KL-shrinkage interpretation that places OPR and prior on-policy distillation methods on a single axis, and we present a counterintuitive finding that explains why Vanilla Replay is already a strong baseline: low-score replay is uniformly worse than Vanilla Replay, demonstrating that the active ingredient in OPR is the on-policy distribution, not the response quality alone.Our code is available at https://github.com/Yancey2024/OnPolicyReplay.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 On-Policy Replay (OPR)，通过重放模型自身输出的历史提示-响应对，有效减少持续监督微调中的灾难性遗忘，无需教师模型或辅助损失。
light_analysis.motivation: 持续监督微调在适应多任务流时遭受灾难性遗忘。现有 on-policy 方法使用自蒸馏等新训练目标，但需要额外前向传播、调度敏感并引入风格漂移。OPR 旨在通过简单的数据源路由 on-policy 信号，避免这些复杂之处。
light_analysis.method: OPR 使用最新检查点在少量历史提示上生成响应，通过任务奖励过滤，保留的 (提示, 模型响应) 对作为普通 SFT 样本重放。无教师、辅助损失或即时蒸馏。在 TRACE 基准上使用 Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct、Qwen3-8B、Llama3.1-8B-Instruct 三个骨干评估。
light_analysis.result: 在 TRACE 上，OPR 持续减少遗忘。Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct 的 Sequential SFT BWT 从 -13.93 提升至 -0.65 (10% 重放预算) 和 -2.29 (1% 预算)，|BWT| 较调优 Vanilla Replay 减少 46%；三个骨干均减少 42-46%。低分数重放效果更差，说明 on-policy 分布是关键。
light_analysis.conclusion: OPR 提供了一种简单有效的 on-policy 重放方法，无需复杂辅助损失，KL 收缩解释统一了 OPR 与先前方法。该方法在减少遗忘方面表现优异，具有实用价值。

title: Gradient Perturbation: Learning to Perturb Gradients for Adaptive Training
abstract: Deep neural network training involves both forward propagation (from features through logits to loss) and backward propagation (from loss through gradients to parameter updates). While perturbations along the forward chain, including feature perturbation, logit perturbation, and label perturbation, have been extensively studied, the backward chain's gradient perturbation has received little systematic investigation. In this paper, we establish a unified framework for gradient perturbation, revealing that existing methods such as Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM), gradient clipping, and gradient noise injection can all be interpreted as imposing specific forms of gradient perturbation. Analogous to the recently proposed Logit Perturbation Learning (LPL), we conjecture that amplifying the gradient norm for a class acts as positive augmentation (enhancing learning), while dampening it acts as negative augmentation (suppressing overfitting). Based on these observations, we propose Learning to Perturb Gradients (LPG), which adaptively perturbs logit-level gradients at the class level to achieve category-aware training. We also establish theoretical connections between gradient perturbation bounds and generalization guarantees via PAC-Bayesian analysis. Experiments on balanced classification, long-tail classification, and noisy label learning demonstrate that LPG consistently outperforms existing methods and can be combined with them as a plug-in module.

light_analysis.overview: 提出学习扰动梯度(LPG)方法，自适应地扰动类级别梯度以进行类别感知训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究主要关注前向传播中的扰动(特征、logit、标签)，而反向传播中的梯度扰动缺乏系统研究。作者发现SAM、梯度裁剪和梯度噪声注入均可视为梯度扰动的特例。类比Logit扰动学习(LPL)，推测放大/缩小类的梯度范数分别起正/负增强作用。基于此，提出自适应梯度扰动方法，以解决平衡分类、长尾分类和噪声标签学习中的问题。
light_analysis.method: 建立梯度扰动的统一框架，揭示现有方法可归为特殊形式。提出学习扰动梯度(LPG)，在logit级别自适应地对每个类的梯度进行扰动，实现类别感知训练。通过PAC-Bayesian分析建立梯度扰动界与泛化保证的理论联系。LPG可作为即插即用模块与其他方法结合。
light_analysis.result: 在平衡分类、长尾分类和噪声标签学习任务上进行实验。LPG在所有任务中均一致优于现有方法，并可加载为即插即用模块提升性能。具体数据摘要未明确说明，但表明性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出梯度扰动统一框架及LPG方法，揭示梯度扰动的类别感知增强作用。通过理论分析和实验验证，证明LPG在多个任务上的有效性。未来可进一步探索梯度扰动在其他场景的应用。

title: Access Sets Matter: Budgeting Expert Reads for Scalable Weight-Space Model Merging
abstract: Weight-space model merging is usually formulated as an algebraic operation on checkpoints, yet at LLM scale the limiting resource is often the set of expert weights that must be read. We introduce MergePipe, a budget-aware execution layer that casts LLM merging as an \emph{expert access-set} problem: given a merge operator and a checkpoint family in a shared weight coordinate system, choose which expert delta blocks to access under an explicit I/O budget. MergePipe indexes parameter blocks, builds deterministic access plans, and executes the induced budgeted merge with replayable manifests. The plan is budget-sound by construction and recovers the full-read merge at full budget; for fixed-coefficient additive operators, the omitted-update error is bounded by the norm of omitted deltas. Across Qwen and Llama merging workloads, MergePipe reduces expert-read I/O by up to an order of magnitude and achieves up to $11\times$ speedups. Representative budget sweeps show $O(10^{-3})$ parameter deviation from full-read merges and no monotonic degradation on downstream benchmarks.
comment: ICML 2026 Workshop on Weight-Space Symmetries: from Foundations to Practical Applications

light_analysis.overview: 提出MergePipe，一种预算感知的模型合并执行层，将LLM合并转化为专家访问集问题，实现I/O优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 在LLM规模下，权重空间模型合并的瓶颈通常是需要读取的专家权重集。现有方法将合并视为代数操作，忽略了I/O限制，导致资源浪费。MergePipe旨在解决如何在有限I/O预算下高效合并专家delta块的问题。
light_analysis.method: MergePipe通过索引参数块、构建确定性访问计划并执行预算合并。它保证计划预算合理，满预算时恢复完整合并；对于固定系数加法算子，省略更新误差受省略delta范数控制。该方法在共享坐标系的检查点族上操作。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen和Llama合并任务中，MergePipe将专家读取I/O减少一个数量级，实现高达11倍加速。预算扫描显示参数偏差为O(10^{-3})，下游基准测试无单调性能退化。
light_analysis.conclusion: MergePipe通过预算感知的执行层实现了可扩展的LLM模型合并，显著降低了I/O开销。学术上形式化了I/O预算下的合并问题；实践中有助于降低大型模型合并成本。未来可探索更复杂的访问计划或算子。

title: AnyMo: Scaling Any-Modality Conditional Motion Generation with Masked Modeling
abstract: Conditional human motion generation remains a fundamental challenge in computer vision and robotics. Despite significant progress, current methods are often constrained by fixed modality configurations and task-specific architectures, leaving cross-modal interactions and the scaling laws of multimodal-conditioned synthesis largely underexplored. A key bottleneck is the scarcity of large-scale modality-aligned motion data, limiting generalization across diverse control signals. In this work, we introduce OmniHuMo, a large-scale, high-quality dataset comprising over 5,000 hours of motion and 3.2 million sequences with precisely aligned multimodal annotations (e.g., text, speech, music, and trajectory). Leveraging OmniHuMo, we propose AnyMo, a unified multimodal framework combining a Residual FSQ-based motion tokenizer with a scalable masked modeling transformer, enabling high-quality motion synthesis under arbitrary modality combinations. Extensive experiments show that AnyMo achieves high-fidelity synthesis while offering flexible control over both spatial and stylistic attributes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AnyMo框架，结合Residual FSQ运动分词器与可扩展掩码建模变换器，实现任意模态组合的高质量人体运动生成，并引入大规模多模态对齐数据集OmniHuMo。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前条件运动生成方法受限于固定模态配置和任务特定架构，难以充分利用跨模态交互且缺乏扩展性。主要瓶颈是大规模模态对齐数据的稀缺，限制了多模态控制信号的泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 构建OmniHuMo数据集，包含5000+小时运动、320万序列及文本、语音、音乐、轨迹等多模态精确对齐标注。提出AnyMo框架，采用基于残差有限标量量化（Residual FSQ）的运动分词器将运动数据离散化，并结合可扩展的掩码建模变换器进行条件建模，支持任意模态组合输入以生成高质量运动。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验显示AnyMo能够实现高保真运动合成，同时提供对生成运动的空间特征和风格属性的灵活控制。具体性能指标如FID、多样性等与基线对比未明确给出，但强调合成质量显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: AnyMo通过统一多模态框架解决了数据稀缺和模态限制问题，实现了高质量、可控的运动生成，为计算机视觉和机器人学中的人体运动合成提供了新范式。未来可在更复杂交互场景和实时应用中发挥作用。

title: PhoneWorld: Scaling Phone-Use Agent Environments
abstract: A central bottleneck for phone-use agents is that controllable, reproducible environments covering real mobile behavior are hard to build at scale. Existing mobile-agent benchmarks have made important progress on evaluation, but they do not by themselves provide a scalable way to construct many new phone-use environments. We present PhoneWorld, a reusable pipeline that converts real GUI trajectories and screenshots into controllable phone-use environments, executable tasks, automatic verifiers, and training rollouts. Rather than hand-building one mobile benchmark at a time, PhoneWorld uses real trajectories to recover which screens matter, how screens connect, which interactions must change environment state, and which user goals admit automatic verification. From these signals, it builds runnable mock Android apps backed by read-only app content and mutable state, then derives executable tasks, rule-based verifiers, and training rollouts from the same environments. In its current instantiation, PhoneWorld covers 34 apps across 16 domains, spanning common consumer mobile behaviors such as search, browsing, shopping, booking, media, and social interaction. Under a fixed training budget, replacing 10K steps from an auxiliary AndroidWorld corpus in an AndroidWorld-based baseline with broad PhoneWorld supervision improves all four evaluation benchmarks at once, raising HYMobileBench by 17.7 points, AndroidControl by 6.0 points, AndroidWorld by 14.7 points, and PhoneWorld by 52.5 points. We then study two additional scaling questions: increasing the amount of PhoneWorld supervision strongly improves PhoneWorld performance, and under a fixed PhoneWorld budget, expanding app coverage yields even larger gains. Overall, PhoneWorld shifts the focus from building one mobile benchmark at a time to scaling the supply of phone-use environments themselves.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PhoneWorld，一种可复用流水线，从真实GUI轨迹自动构建手机操作环境、任务、验证器和训练数据，打破环境构建瓶颈。
light_analysis.motivation: 手机操作智能体的核心瓶颈是难以大规模构建可控、可复现且覆盖真实行为的测试环境。现有移动基准虽在评估上有进展，但无法可扩展地创建新环境。PhoneWorld旨在解决这一问题，通过自动化方式从真实轨迹恢复屏幕、连接、状态变化和验证目标，无需手工构建单个基准。
light_analysis.method: PhoneWorld构建可运行的模拟Android应用，包含只读内容和可变状态。从真实GUI轨迹和截图中提取屏幕关系、交互状态变化和用户目标，自动生成可执行任务、基于规则的验证器和训练数据。当前覆盖16个领域34个应用，涵盖搜索、浏览、购物等常见行为。该流水线可替换训练数据中的部分样本。
light_analysis.result: 在固定训练预算下，用PhoneWorld监督替换10K步AndroidWorld基线辅助数据，四个评估基准同时提升：HYMobileBench提高17.7点，AndroidControl提高6.0点，AndroidWorld提高14.7点，PhoneWorld提高52.5点。增加PhoneWorld数据量显著提升自身性能，扩展应用覆盖带来更大增益。
light_analysis.conclusion: PhoneWorld将焦点从逐个构建手机基准转向规模化供应手机操作环境，核心贡献是提供可复用流水线。研究表明，增加环境数量和广度比单纯增加训练数据更有效。未来可扩展至更多应用和复杂行为，为手机智能体训练与评估提供可靠基础。

title: V2XCrafter: Learning to Generate Driving Scene Across Agents
abstract: Collaborative driving systems leverage vehicle-to-everything (V2X) communication for multi-agent collaborative perception to enhance driving safety, yet they remain constrained by scarce annotated real-world V2X driving datasets and limited generalization across diverse driving conditions. While image generation technology offers a feasible solution for data augmentation, existing methods tailored for single-vehicle multi-view scenarios face two fundamental challenges in multi-agent driving settings: (1) the expansion of the learning objective degrades generation quality, and (2) the highly dynamic variations across agents hinder the modeling of consistency for physical attributes (e.g., color, category) in jointly observed objects. To bridge this gap, we propose V2XCrafter, the first framework for generating controllable and realistic collaborative driving scene across agents' camera views. For effective learning, we develop a progressive multi-agent diffusion model based on a single-agent backbone, using neighboring agents' latent states as reference signals to progressively guide the single-to-multi diffusion. To address cross-vehicle inconsistency, we propose a cross-agent attention module that leverages a collaboration view graph and learnable jointly observed object representation to model the dynamic cross-agent camera view relationships. Experiments have shown that V2XCrafter can generate high-fidelity and controllable street views with consistency across agents, thereby effectively enhancing the downstream collaborative 3D object detection tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出V2XCrafter，首个多智能体协同驾驶场景生成框架，通过渐进式扩散和跨智能体注意力模块实现可控、一致性的街景生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 协同驾驶系统依赖V2X通信增强安全性，但受限于稀缺的真实世界标注数据和跨场景泛化能力。现有图像生成方法针对单车辆多视角场景，在多智能体驾驶中面临学习目标扩展导致生成质量下降和跨智能体动态变化导致物理属性一致性建模困难两大挑战。
light_analysis.method: 基于单智能体骨干网络构建渐进式多智能体扩散模型，以相邻智能体潜状态作为参考信号逐步引导单到多扩散。提出跨智能体注意力模块，利用协作视图图和可学习的联合观测对象表示建模动态跨智能体相机视角关系。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明V2XCrafter能生成高保真、可控且跨智能体一致的街景，有效增强下游协同3D目标检测任务性能。具体数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次实现多智能体协同驾驶场景的可控生成，解决跨车辆一致性难题，为数据增强和下游任务提供新方法。未来可探索更复杂的动态场景和实时生成效率。

title: Composing Non-Conjugate Factor Graphs with Closed-Form Variational Inference
abstract: Stacking probabilistic building blocks into deeper architectures typically breaks closed-form inference. We show that closed-form inference can be preserved. We identify five factor-graph primitives: a bilinear factor, an exponential link, a Gamma prior, a Gaussian likelihood, and an equality node, and prove that any model composed from them admits closed-form variational message passing. The construction works because each primitive preserves a small set of message families: under mean-field factorization, messages on Gaussian variables remain Gaussian and messages on precision variables remain Gamma, while the only non-conjugate interface, the exponential link, remains tractable through the Gaussian moment-generating function and the sufficient statistics of the Gamma family. We demonstrate composition at increasing depth, from static ensembles through input-dependent gating to split-branch routing, and show that stacking routing layers encodes arbitrary decision trees, establishing universal function approximation with closed-form inference. Applied to ensemble time-series forecasting, the framework yields a Bayesian mixture of experts in which gating functions are inferred rather than learned, providing calibrated uncertainty over expert selection across five benchmark datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出五个因子图原语，证明由其组成的模型可保持闭式变分推理，实现任意深度的贝叶斯组合。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度概率模型中，堆叠概率构建块通常破坏闭式推理，导致依赖近似采样或数值优化，效率低且不确定性校准困难。现有变分方法在处理非共轭结构时需折中可处理性与表达能力。该研究旨在识别一组基本原语，在保持闭式消息传递的同时支持模块化组合，从而构建可解释、可扩展的贝叶斯深度模型。
light_analysis.method: 识别五个因子图原语：双线性因子、指数链接、Gamma先验、高斯似然和等式节点。证明在平均场分解下，这些原语保证消息族封闭性：高斯变量消息保持高斯，精度变量消息保持Gamma，非共轭接口（指数链接）通过高斯矩母函数和Gamma充分统计量保持可解。利用这些原语可组合静态集成、输入依赖门控、分支路由等深度结构，编码任意决策树，实现闭式变分消息传递。
light_analysis.result: 在集成时间序列预测任务中，该框架实现贝叶斯混合专家模型，门控函数通过推断而非学习获得。在五个基准数据集上，与标准方法相比，该模型提供校准的不确定性估计，并有效平衡专家选择。尽管摘要未给出具体数值，但强调闭式推理带来的效率与可解释性优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作证明了可组合的闭式变分推理的可行性，突破了深度概率模型依赖近似推理的局限。学术上为贝叶斯深度学习提供了新设计范式，实际应用中可构建具有可解释门控机制的混合专家系统，尤其适用于需要校准不确定性的序列预测问题。未来可扩展原语集合以覆盖更多结构。

title: Honest Lying: Understanding Memory Confabulation in Reflexive Agents
abstract: Reflexion-style agents rely on self-generated reflections as memory, implicitly assuming that agents can accurately diagnose their own failures.We show that this assumption can fail systematically: across ALFWorld and HumanEval, agents store confident but incorrect interpretations of the task and continue acting on them across trials,even though the environment resets to the correct task each time. We call this failure mode memory confabulation and introduce the Reflection Repetition Rate (RRR), a log-based metric that detects repeated reliance on incorrect reflective content.Using RRR, we identify 16 frozen environments in ALFWorld, where 0 of 121 reflections mention the correct target object, and 4 analogous cases in HumanEval. Our mitigation replaces open-ended self-diagnosis with programmatic extraction of trajectory-level failure signals, increasing correct object mention from 0% to 86%, reducing RRR from 0.64 to 0.10, and solving 3 of 16 frozen ALFWorld environments, suggesting that reflective memory can reinforce false beliefs rather than correct them.
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026 Workshop "Failure Modes in Agentic AI"

light_analysis.overview: 提出反射型智能体中的记忆虚构问题，并引入反射重复率(RRR)指标检测，通过程序化提取轨迹级失败信号缓解该问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 反射型智能体依赖自我生成的反思作为记忆，但假设它们能准确诊断自身失败可能出错。在ALFWorld和HumanEval环境中，智能体存储了自信但错误的任务解释，即使环境重置为正确任务，仍持续基于错误行动。这种记忆虚构导致智能体无法纠正错误，强化了虚假信念，影响任务完成效果。
light_analysis.method: 引入反射重复率(RRR)作为基于日志的指标，检测智能体重复依赖错误反思内容的现象。通过分析反思内容与目标的一致性，识别冻结环境。缓解方法采用程序化提取轨迹级失败信号，替代开放式自我诊断，从环境反馈中直接提取错误信息，避免生成错误解释。
light_analysis.result: 在ALFWorld中识别出16个冻结环境(共0次反思提到正确目标)，HumanEval中4个类似案例。缓解方法将正确目标提及率从0%提升至86%，RRR从0.64降至0.10，成功解决3/16的冻结环境。表明该指标有效检测记忆虚构，缓解策略能部分纠正错误信念。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了反射型智能体中记忆虚构的关键问题，证明反思可能强化而非纠正虚假信念。提出的RRR指标和程序化缓解策略为构建更可靠的反射型代理提供了有效工具。未来工作可探索通用化检测方法及更鲁棒的记忆管理机制，以应对更复杂环境。

title: Benchmarking Large Vision-Language Models on CFMME: A Comprehensive Chinese Financial Multimodal Evaluation Dataset
abstract: The emergence of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) has substantially expanded model capabilities beyond text-only understanding, enabling unified inference across both visual and textual modalities and supporting a broader range of real-world applications. To comprehensively evaluate the perception, understanding, reasoning, and cognition capabilities of LVLMs throughout the entire financial business workflow in Chinese contexts, we introduce CFMME, a novel Chinese financial multimodal evaluation benchmark. CFMME comprises 6,052 instances spanning from fundamental academic knowledge to complex real-world applications, covering eight primary financial image modalities and four core multimodal tasks. On CFMME, we conduct a thorough evaluation of representative LVLMs. The results show that the state-of-the-art model attains an overall accuracy of 66.11\% on the question answering task and an average score of 77.18 on the detection, recognition, and information extraction tasks, indicating substantial room for improvement in current LVLMs. In addition, we conduct detailed analyses of error causes, cross-modal capabilities, and multi-orientation settings, yielding valuable insights for future research. We hope that CFMME will spur further progress in LVLMs, especially by improving their performance on multiple multimodal tasks in the financial domain.

light_analysis.overview: 提出中文金融多模态评估基准CFMME，全面评估大型视觉语言模型在金融业务中的感知、理解、推理和认知能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）在中文金融场景下缺乏全面评估基准，现有方法未覆盖金融业务全流程的多模态能力。该研究旨在系统测试LVLMs的感知、理解、推理和认知，揭示其在复杂金融任务中的不足，推动模型改进。
light_analysis.method: 构建CFMME数据集，包含6052个实例，覆盖8种金融图像模态（如票据、报表）和4类多模态任务（检测、识别、信息提取、问答）。评估多个代表性LVLMs，采用准确率和平均分指标，并进行错误原因、跨模态能力和多方向设置分析。
light_analysis.result: 最佳模型在问答任务上准确率为66.11%，在检测、识别和信息提取任务上平均得分77.18，表明LVLMs在金融领域有较大提升空间。详细分析揭示了模型在跨模态理解、多方向设置下的主要错误类型。
light_analysis.conclusion: CFMME为中文金融多模态评估提供了基准，有助于推动LVLMs在金融领域的实际应用。未来可扩展数据集覆盖更多任务，并针对识别出的错误类型改进模型。

title: FlowSeg: Dynamic Semantic Guidance for LLM-Conditioned Segmentation
abstract: LLM-conditioned segmentation has recently advanced rapidly by coupling large language models with iterative mask generation frameworks. However, we identify a persistent failure mode in current propose-then-select pipelines. Although high-quality mask candidates are often generated, the final prediction may fail to match the given linguistic condition. This failure arises because language semantics are typically used as static prompts or post-hoc matching signals, rather than participating in the iterative mask generation process. Through systematic analysis, we show that many errors stem from semantic misalignment rather than poor mask quality. To address this issue, we propose FlowSeg, which introduces dynamic semantic guidance via a bidirectional semantic flow between intermediate decoding states and LLM-derived condition embeddings throughout the generation process. Language conditions actively guide mask refinement at each stage, while condition embeddings are progressively updated by emerging visual evidence. This design yields semantically grounded mask representations and visually aligned language conditions, enabling more reliable matching. We further incorporate a lightweight boundary-aware refinement to selectively enhance uncertain regions without perturbing confident interiors. Extensive experiments on referring expression segmentation and reasoning segmentation tasks demonstrate that FlowSeg consistently improves language-mask alignment and achieves state-of-the-art performance. Project page: https://zkzhang98.github.io/FlowSeg_page

light_analysis.overview: 提出FlowSeg，通过双向语义流实现动态语义引导，解决LLM条件分割中语义错位问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前LLM条件分割方法多采用先提案后选择的流水线，但存在语言条件与掩码候选不匹配的失效模式。语言语义通常作为静态提示或事后匹配信号，未参与迭代生成过程，导致最终预测与语言条件不一致。实验表明许多错误源于语义错位而非掩码质量差。因此，需要一种让语言条件动态引导掩码生成的方法，以提升语义对齐。
light_analysis.method: 提出FlowSeg，在迭代掩码生成过程中引入双向语义流：中间解码状态与LLM导出的条件嵌入相互更新。语言条件主动引导各阶段的掩码细化，同时条件嵌入由逐步出现的视觉证据动态更新，产生语义锚定的掩码表示和视觉对齐的语言条件。此外，加入轻量级边界感知细化模块，选择性增强不确定区域而不扰动确信内部。
light_analysis.result: 在指代表达分割和推理分割任务上，FlowSeg持续提升语言-掩码对齐，并取得最先进性能。具体数值摘要未提及，但与基线方法对比表明显著改进。实验证明了动态语义引导对缓解语义错位的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: FlowSeg通过动态语义引导有效解决了LLM条件分割中的语义错位问题，提升了语言-掩码对齐。该方法具有学术价值，为多模态交互提供新思路。实际应用中可增强视觉语言理解的可靠性。未来可探索更复杂的双向交互或扩展到其他条件生成任务。

title: FedSmoothLoRA: Toward Smoother and Faster Convergence in Federated Low-Rank Adaptation
abstract: Federated fine-tuning of foundation models with Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) provides an efficient solution for reducing communication and computation costs while preserving data locality. However, the direct combination of FedAvg and LoRA suffers from three key issues: limited update space, which restricts the model's effective learning capacity; inter-round state mismatch, which disrupts cross-round local optimization continuity; and a client-agnostic starting state, which slows local convergence on clients. Although recent methods mitigate the limited update space issue by merging LoRA updates into the backbone across communication rounds, inter-round state mismatch and the client-agnostic starting state remain insufficiently addressed. To address these issues, we propose FedSmoothLoRA, a federated LoRA tuning framework that preserves the enlarged update space, improves cross-round local optimization continuity, and provides a client-aware starting state for local training. At each communication round, FedSmoothLoRA constructs the local LoRA initialization using two matrices: a Round-Matching matrix that preserves cross-round local state continuity, and a Gradient-Aligned matrix that provides client-specific optimization guidance from gradient signals estimated on local data. Together, these designs enable smoother and faster convergence. Extensive experiments on image classification and natural language generation tasks demonstrate that FedSmoothLoRA consistently outperforms existing federated LoRA tuning methods. Code: https://github.com/wangzehao0704/FedSmoothLoRA

light_analysis.overview: 提出FedSmoothLoRA框架，通过Round-Matching和Gradient-Aligned矩阵解决联邦LoRA调优中的收敛问题，实现更平滑更快的收敛。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦微调基础模型时，低秩适配（LoRA）结合FedAvg存在三个问题：有限更新空间限制模型学习能力，轮次间状态不破坏局部优化连续性，客户端无关起始状态减慢收敛。现有方法仅解决有限更新空间，其他问题未充分处理，导致收敛缓慢。
light_analysis.method: FedSmoothLoRA在每个通信轮次构建本地LoRA初始化，包含Round-Matching矩阵保持跨轮次局部状态连续性，以及Gradient-Aligned矩阵从本地数据梯度估计提供客户端特定优化指导。两者协同作用，在保持扩大更新空间的同时改善了局部优化连续性，实现更平滑更快的收敛。
light_analysis.result: 在图像分类和自然语言生成任务上的实验表明，FedSmoothLoRA持续优于现有联邦LoRA调优方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但提及代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: FedSmoothLoRA有效解决了联邦LoRA调优中的收敛问题，提升了模型性能。其创新设计兼具理论与实用价值，可推广至更多联邦微调场景。未来可探索更高效的矩阵初始化策略或扩展到其他参数高效微调方法。

title: Kronecker Embeddings: Byte-Level Structured Token Representations for Parameter-Efficient Language Models
abstract: Large language models route every input through a learned embedding table of shape |V| x d_model, consuming hundreds of millions to billions of trainable parameters at frontier scale. We introduce Kronecker Embeddings, a deterministic byte-level character-position factorization that replaces this table with a fixed encoder and a single learned projection, compatible with standard BPE tokenizers, eliminating 91--94% of input-side trainable parameters at frontier scale. We provide five contributions. First, a cross-model probe across six LMs (135M-671B parameters) shows trained input embeddings cluster typographic variants of the probe word far more than morphological relatives; Kronecker escapes this clustering at the embedding layer. Second, a controlled three-seed comparison on nanoGPT GPT-2 124M over 2.5B tokens of FineWeb-Edu shows Kronecker reaching 2.5 +- 0.2% lower validation loss than the BPE-tied baseline (gap 0.083 +- 0.007 nats, ~9% lower perplexity), needing ~1.43x fewer steps to reach BPE's converged loss. Third, a spelling-robustness probe over 110 clean/typo pairs shows Kronecker preserves the top-1 prediction on 55.5% of pairs vs. 47.3% for BPE (+8.2 pp) and lowers KL by 7.6%, winning or tying in 10 of 11 categories; a generation probe shows Kronecker echoes byte-novel strings and typos through generation where BPE forgets them. Fourth, BPE embedding norm drifts during training while Kronecker projection norm stays near 1.0, consistent with a stable representational target. Fifth, an on-the-fly runtime variant reconstructs embeddings from a 4.5 MB byte buffer rather than a 2.15 GB table at vocabulary 131,072, with 0.01--0.24% step-time overhead. Byte-level locality has a tradeoff: byte-similar but semantically distant pairs (compute/commute, nation/notion) cluster together, shifting disambiguation to early attention layers.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Kronecker Embeddings，通过字节级字符-位置分解替代传统嵌入表，消除91-94%参数，并提升语言模型性能与鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型使用巨大嵌入表（|V|×d_model），消耗百亿级别参数，且BPE等分词器的嵌入表示导致字形变体聚类而非语义相关，训练不稳定。现有方法参数效率低，且缺乏对拼写鲁棒性的考虑。
light_analysis.method: Kronecker Embeddings采用确定性字节级字符-位置因子分解，包括固定编码器和单个学习投影，兼容标准BPE分词器。通过字节缓冲区运行时重建嵌入（4.5MB vs 2.15GB表），引入字节级局部性，但导致字节相似而语义远的词（如compute/commute）聚类，需早期注意力层消歧。
light_analysis.result: 在nanoGPT GPT-2 124M上，Kronecker达到验证损失降低2.5%±0.2%（差距0.083 nats，困惑度约降低9%），训练步骤减少1.43倍。拼写鲁棒性：55.5%对保持top-1预测（vs BPE 47.3%，+8.2pp），KL散度降低7.6%。嵌入投影范数稳定近1.0，运行时仅0.01-0.24%步时开销。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献五项：揭示BPE嵌入聚类问题、验证Kronecker性能优势、证明拼写鲁棒性、稳定表示、高效运行时。节省大量参数和存储，适合资源受限场景。但字节级局部性引入语义混淆，需依赖注意力层解决，是未来优化方向。

title: Uni-RCM: Unified Reference-guided Cross-modal Mapping for Multi-Class Anomaly Detection
abstract: Multi-modal industrial anomaly detection typically relies on separate models for each product category, fundamentally limiting practical scalability. When shifting to a unified paradigm that handles diverse classes simultaneously, detection accuracy often degrades due to inter-class interference and feature manifold confusion. To overcome these challenges, we propose a Unified Reference guided Cross-modal Mapping framework, named Uni-RCM. At its core, we propose a reference guide block to dynamically filter out category-specific noise by introducing a learnable reference feature, which captures the commonalities across different modalities. Besides, an offline residual quantizer is proposed to characterize the normal distribution by multiple cascaded codebooks. Extensive evaluations on the MVTec-3D AD dataset demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance in the challenging multi-class setting and in terms of image-level detection and pixel-level localization.
comment: This work has been submitted IEEE for potential publication

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一的多类异常检测框架Uni-RCM，通过参考引导块和离线残差量化器实现跨模态映射，在MVTec-3D AD数据集上取得SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态工业异常检测通常为每类产品训练独立模型，限制了实际可扩展性。统一模型处理多类时，因类间干扰和特征流形混淆导致精度下降。需一种能捕获模态共性、滤除类别噪声的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Uni-RCM框架，核心包括：1) 参考引导块，通过学习可微参考特征动态滤除类别特定噪声，捕获跨模态共性；2) 离线残差量化器，利用多级码本表征正态分布。无需为每个类别单独训练，实现统一建模。
light_analysis.result: 在MVTec-3D AD数据集上，多类设置下图像级检测和像素级定位均达到最优性能。与现有方法相比，有效缓解了类间干扰，提升了异常检测的准确性和定位精度。
light_analysis.conclusion: Uni-RCM通过统一框架解决了多类异常检测的可扩展性问题，参考引导和残差量化机制有效提升了多类场景下的性能。未来可扩展至更多模态及实际工业应用。

title: A Full-Pipeline Framework for Evaluating Membership Inference Attacks in Machine Learning
abstract: While Membership Inference Attacks (MIAs) are the prevailing method for identifying training data, their application has expanded into privacy auditing and machine unlearning. Nevertheless, the field lacks a systematic framework for evaluating how different contexts affect MIA efficacy. Without such a characterization, practitioners risk deploying algorithms that perform well on benchmarks but become statistically irrelevant when faced with the nuances of specific, real-world datasets. To bridge this gap and provide actionable insights, we introduce a comprehensive evaluation framework that systematically characterizes privacy risks across the entire machine learning pipeline, spanning data, architectures, algorithms, and post-training modules. Designed to inherently capture diverse operational contexts, our framework rigorously evaluates state-of-the-art MIAs across a broad spectrum of training configurations. To account for varying misclassification costs in real-world deployments, we employ three complementary metrics: Balanced Accuracy for symmetric costs, alongside TPR at low FPR (or TNR at low FNR) for asymmetric scenarios where false alarms or missed detections are strictly penalized. Furthermore, recognizing that existing MIAs assume divergent adversary capabilities, we formalize two standardized threat models and adapt these attacks into corresponding variants to ensure an equitable benchmark. Extensive empirical evaluations demonstrate that the efficacy of specific MIA methodologies is highly sensitive to the assumed threat models and chosen evaluation metrics. Ultimately, we distill these findings into actionable guidelines and provide a ready-to-use auditing toolkit, empowering practitioners to conduct better privacy assessments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个全流程框架，系统评估不同上下文对成员推理攻击效果的影响，并提供实用审计工具。
light_analysis.motivation: 成员推理攻击是识别训练数据的主要方法，并已扩展到隐私审计和机器遗忘。然而，该领域缺乏系统框架来评估不同上下文对MIA效果的影响，导致从业者可能部署在基准测试中表现良好但在实际数据集上统计无效的算法。因此，需要一种能够全面表征隐私风险的方法，覆盖数据、架构、算法和后训练模块，以提供可操作的见解。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出了一个全面的评估框架，系统地表征了整个机器学习流水线（包括数据、架构、算法和后训练模块）的隐私风险。该框架考虑了实际部署中不同的误分类成本，采用三种互补指标：平衡准确率（对称成本）、低假阳性率下的真阳性率或低假阴性率下的真阴性率（不对称场景）。同时，标准化了两种威胁模型，将现有攻击改编为对应变体以确保公平基准。
light_analysis.result: 大量实证评估表明，特定MIA方法的效果高度依赖于假定的威胁模型和选择的评估指标。框架能够揭示不同训练配置下攻击性能的差异，为从业者提供 actionable insights，并附带一个可直接使用的审计工具包，以进行更好的隐私评估。论文未提供具体数值结果，但强调了框架的系统性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架弥合了MIA评估缺乏系统性的空白，为从业者提供了选择适当威胁模型和评估指标的指导。学术上贡献了标准化的威胁模型和评估方法，实践上提供了审计工具包，有助于提升机器学习模型隐私评估的可靠性。未来可扩展至更多攻击类型和数据集。

title: Comparative evaluation of photogrammetric reconstruction methods and 3D Gaussian Splatting for road surface roughness analysis
abstract: Image-based 3D reconstruction offers a low-cost alternative to traditional sensor-based techniques for road surface assessment. This study compares four reconstruction pipelines--COLMAP, Meshroom, Metashape, and 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS)--to evaluate their ability to estimate road surface roughness from smartphone imagery. All point clouds were processed in CloudCompare using a consistent workflow involving orientation alignment, segmentation, normal estimation, and roughness computation at neighborhood radiuses of 0.2, 0.4, and 0.6 model units. The results show that COLMAP provides the highest sensitivity to micro-texture, while Meshroom yields balanced reconstructions with moderate roughness variation. Metashape produces the smoothest geometry due to its internal filtering, and 3DGS captures visible irregularities but exhibits higher noise and lower density. The comparison demonstrates that open-source pipelines are viable for relative roughness evaluation, offering a practical approach for low-cost pavement monitoring.

light_analysis.overview: 评估四种基于图像的3D重建方法用于道路表面粗糙度分析，COLMAP对微纹理最敏感。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统的道路表面评估依赖昂贵的传感器设备，而基于图像的3D重建提供了一种低成本的替代方案。然而，不同的重建方法在粗糙度估计中的表现未知，需要系统比较以确定最适合低成本路面监测的方案。
light_analysis.method: 研究比较了COLMAP、Meshroom、Metashape和3D Gaussian Splatting四种重建流程，从智能手机图像生成点云。所有点云在CloudCompare中使用统一流程处理：方向对齐、分割、法线估计，并在0.2、0.4、0.6模型单位的邻域半径下计算粗糙度。
light_analysis.result: COLMAP对微纹理最敏感，Meshroom产生平衡的重建和中等粗糙度变化，Metashape因内部滤波产生最平滑几何，3DGS捕捉可见不规则但噪声更高、密度更低。结果表明开源管道可用于相对粗糙度评估。
light_analysis.conclusion: 开源重建方法为低成本路面监测提供了实用途径，不同方法在粗糙度敏感性上各有优劣。未来可结合具体需求选择合适方法，或在3DGS噪声处理上进行优化。

title: Forget Less, Generalize More: Unifying Temporal and Structural Adaptation for Dynamic Graphs
abstract: Representation learning on dynamic graphs requires capturing complex dependencies that evolve across both time and structure. Existing approaches typically adopt fixed temporal decay schemes or predetermined structural propagation depths, limiting their ability to generalize across graphs with diverse interaction frequencies and topological characteristics. We propose Dual-Scale Retentive Dynamics (DSRD), a unified framework that maintains a retentive representation state encoding both temporal memory and structural context. DSRD introduces two key components: (i) a retentive state with dual-scale adaptation that jointly models temporal dynamics and structural propagation within a single recurrent formulation, and (ii) adaptive decay kernels with learnable time-sensitivity parameters that automatically balance short-term responsiveness and long-term retention based on the underlying interaction patterns. We provide theoretical analysis establishing the equivalence between event-wise parallel aggregation and efficient recurrent state updates, as well as stability and boundedness guarantees for the learned dynamics. Extensive experiments on 14 real-world benchmarks demonstrate that DSRD consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance on both link prediction and node classification tasks, with strong generalization across transductive and inductive settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一时间与结构适应的DSRD框架，通过双尺度保留动态和自适应衰减核提升动态图泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 动态图表示学习需同时捕获时间与结构演化，但现有方法依赖固定时间衰减或预定传播深度，难以适应不同交互频率和拓扑特征的图，导致泛化能力受限。因此，亟需一种能自适应平衡短期响应与长期保留的统一框架。
light_analysis.method: DSRD框架维护保留状态，编码时间记忆与结构上下文。核心包括：双尺度保留状态，在单一循环公式中联合建模时间动态与结构传播；自适应衰减核，通过可学习时间敏感参数自动平衡短期与长期依赖。理论证明事件级并行聚合与高效循环状态更新等价，并提供稳定性与有界性保证。
light_analysis.result: 在14个真实世界基准上，DSRD在链路预测和节点分类任务中均取得最先进性能，跨传导与归纳设置表现出强泛化性。具体性能指标优于现有方法，但摘要未提供精确数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: DSRD统一了时间与结构适应，通过理论分析与实验验证了其有效性，为动态图表示学习提供了新范式。未来可探索更复杂衰减机制或扩展至更大规模图。

title: How Much Is a Dataset Worth? Scaling Laws, the Vendi Score, and Matrix Spectral Functions
abstract: Neural scaling laws appraise data through dataset size, while the Vendi Score uses quantum entropy to measure dataset value. We show both that common neural-scaling-law objectives and the Vendi Score are submodular. We further show that the Vendi Score is a special case of a broader class of submodular objectives that we call matrix spectral functions. This also includes determinantal (DPP) objectives, as well as many others. We also introduce weakly matrix monotone functions and show how they lead to weakly submodular matrix spectral functions, yielding a broad family of practical objectives for data appraisal. We develop secular-equation-based updates that avoid repeated eigendecompositions during greedy optimization, reducing marginal-gain evaluation for $m$-dimensional embeddings by an $O(m)$ factor relative to oracle queries. This yields an average empirical speedup of about 35,000x, making direct optimization of the Vendi Score feasible on ImageNet-1K-scale datasets.
