Thus enabled, we compare how well several objectives predict the value of training subsets for held-out test performance under fixed-size, class-balanced, and fixed training-budget regimes, including the Vendi Score, DPPs, facility location, and three new matrix spectral variants. Across multiple datasets, facility location performs the best. Direct optimization also reveals that, while the Vendi Score is predictive over moderate score ranges, pushing the objective to higher values can make it a poor downstream performance proxy. We also find that uniformly at random fixed-size subsets, both unconstrained and class-balanced, are remarkably concentrated in both appraisal scores and held-out performance. Finally, we show that size, class balance, and training budget do not alone determine data value: even when controlling for these factors, performance ranges smoothly from good to bad.

light_analysis.overview: 提出矩阵谱函数作为数据评估的统一框架，表明神经缩放定律和Vendi Score是其子类，并通过约35,000倍加速实现ImageNet-1K规模上的直接优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 数据集价值评估在机器学习中至关重要，但现有方法要么仅依赖数据集大小（神经缩放定律），要么使用量子熵（Vendi Score），缺乏统一理论基础。且Vendi Score等目标在大规模数据集上优化计算成本高昂，限制了其实用性。因此需要一种既能揭示这些目标内在联系、又能高效优化的通用方法。
light_analysis.method: 论文证明了神经缩放定律目标与Vendi Score的次模性，并指出Vendi Score是一类更广泛的次模目标——矩阵谱函数的特例，后者还包括行列式点过程（DPP）等。引入弱矩阵单调函数引致弱次模特例。开发基于割线方程的更新方法，避免贪心优化中重复特征分解，将m维嵌入的边际增益评估复杂度降低O(m)倍，实现约35,000倍加速。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet-1K规模上实现了Vendi Score的直接优化。比较了多种目标（Vendi Score、DPP、设施选址及三种新矩阵谱变体）预测训练子集对测试性能的价值，发现设施选址表现最佳。直接优化显示Vendi Score在中等分数范围内有预测性，但过高的目标值反而成为下游性能的劣代理。随机均匀子集在评估分数和性能上高度集中。且仅大小、类别平衡和训练预算不足以决定数据价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文建立了数据评估的统一数学框架，揭示了不同目标的内在联系，并通过高效优化使其适用于大规模数据集。实验表明设施选址优于其他目标，但Vendi Score等仍有价值，且数据价值受多因素影响。未来可探索更多矩阵谱函数及其应用，并进一步解释数据属性与性能的关系。

title: Recovering Policy-Induced Errors: Benchmarking and Trajectory Synthesis for Robust GUI Agents
abstract: While GUI agents have advanced rapidly, they often lack the robustness to recover from their own errors, hindering real-world deployment. To bridge this gap at both the evaluation and data levels, we introduce GUI-RobustEval and propose Robustness-driven Trajectory Synthesis. GUI-RobustEval contains $1,216$ executable test cases that systematically measure error recovery capabilities across a broad and realistic spectrum of error modes. At the data level, RoTS is a scalable synthesis framework that creates $800k$ high-quality data via a tree-based pipeline that proactively discovers diverse error modes and synthesizes corresponding recovery steps. Our two models, RoTS-7B and RoTS-32B, fine-tuned on our dataset, both demonstrate significant gains on GUI-RobustEval and traditional GUI benchmarks. Notably, RoTS-32B achieves state-of-the-art performance on OSWorld, with a $47.4\%$ success rate and a $33.8\%$ All-Pass@4 score, suggesting that improved long-horizon error recovery ability contributes to both robustness and overall performance. Our code is available at https://github.com/AlibabaResearch/RoTS.
comment: ICML 2026 Spotlight. 36 pages, 19 figures, includes appendix

light_analysis.overview: 提出GUI-RobustEval基准和RoTS轨迹合成框架，提升GUI智能体的错误恢复鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有GUI智能体在错误恢复方面表现不足，缺乏鲁棒性，难以在真实场景中部署。目前缺乏系统评估错误恢复能力的基准和高质量训练数据。本文旨在填补评估和数据两个层面的空白，通过构建可执行的测试案例和合成大量恢复轨迹，提升智能体的错误恢复能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出GUI-RobustEval基准，包含1216个可执行测试用例，系统评估多种错误模式的恢复能力。提出RoTS（Robustness-driven Trajectory Synthesis）框架，基于树状管道主动发现错误模式并合成对应恢复步骤，生成80万高质量数据。基于此微调得到RoTS-7B和RoTS-32B模型。
light_analysis.result: RoTS-32B在OSWorld上达到47.4%的成功率和33.8%的All-Pass@4分数，取得最先进性能。在GUI-RobustEval和传统GUI基准上均显著提升，表明增强长程错误恢复能力有助于整体性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过构建评估基准和合成数据框架，有效提升了GUI智能体的错误恢复能力。RoTS-32B在多个基准上达到SOTA，证明长程错误恢复对整体性能的关键作用。未来可扩展错误模式覆盖范围并应用于更多GUI场景。

title: One Click per Cell Type Suffices: Training-free Group Interaction for Cell Instance Segmentation
abstract: Cell instance segmentation models trained on cell-specific datasets suffer severe performance drops on out-of-distribution cell types, while interactive foundation models overcome this through per-instance prompting at a cost that is prohibitively expensive for histopathology images containing hundreds to thousands of densely packed instances. We introduce Group Prompting, a new paradigm that shifts interactive segmentation from per-instance $O(N)$ to per-type $O(T)$, where a single click per cell type suffices to segment all instances of that type. Our key observation is that the frozen image encoder of the Segment Anything Model (SAM) already clusters same-type cells in its feature space before any prompt is given. Exploiting this property, we propose Chain-of-Prompts (CoP), a training-free framework that recursively expands a single user click by (1) identifying reliable same-type locations through non-parametric gating of multi-scale encoder features, and (2) selecting the most spatially distant reliable point as the next prompt to maximize coverage. On three cell-type-annotated benchmarks, CoP with one click per type retains over 90% of per-instance performance and surpasses fully-supervised methods without any additional training. On four morphologically homogeneous benchmarks, a single click retains over 99%. Project Page: https://shjo-april.github.io/Chain-of-Prompts/

light_analysis.overview: 提出Group Prompting新范式，通过单点击每种细胞类型实现全实例分割，无需训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 细胞实例分割模型对分布外的细胞类型泛化性差，而交互式基础模型虽通用但需逐个实例标注，成本高昂。组织病理学图像中细胞密集且数量庞大，现有方法难以平衡精度与效率。
light_analysis.method: 基于SAM编码器特征空间中间类型细胞自动聚类特性，提出Chain-of-Prompts框架。无需训练，通过非参数门控多尺度特征识别可靠同类型位置，并选择最远点作为下一提示递归扩展，实现单点击覆盖全类型实例。
light_analysis.result: 在三个细胞类型标注基准上，单种类型单点击保留超过90%的逐实例性能；在四个形态均质基准上，单点击保留超过99%。无需额外训练即超越全监督方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出高效的组级交互范式，显著降低交互成本，为组织病理学图像分析提供实用方案。局限性在于依赖SAM特征聚类质量，未来可探索更通用的预训练特征。

title: When Does Persona Prompting Actually Help? A Retrieval and Metric Analysis of Expert Role Injection in LLMs
abstract: Persona prompting is widely used to steer large language models, yet its practical value remains unclear. Prior work often evaluates persona prompting using aggregate scores, making it difficult to determine whether expert-role prompting consistently improves response quality or instead changes responses along different quality dimensions. We study this question through a controlled comparison of four prompting conditions across 1,140 open-ended questions spanning 38 expert roles and six domains: no role prompt, a generic domain-expert prompt, embedding-based role retrieval, and a hybrid retrieval method combining embedding search with LLM-based role selection. Aggregate results show only small overall differences between conditions. However, metric-level analysis reveals a consistent tradeoff that aggregate averages obscure: role prompting systematically increases expertise depth while reducing clarity. These effects are highly conditional rather than universal. Role prompting performs best on advisory questions and in domains such as medicine and psychology, where structured expert framing and risk communication are intrinsically valuable. In contrast, baseline prompting performs better on conceptual and explanatory questions in finance, legal, science, and technology domains, where concise plain-language explanation is more important. We further show that hybrid retrieval significantly improves over embedding-only role selection, although better role retrieval does not eliminate the broader expertise-depth versus clarity tradeoff. Overall, our findings suggest that persona prompting primarily reshapes response characteristics rather than broadly improving capability, and that multi-metric evaluation is necessary for understanding its effects.
comment: 6 pages, 2 figures. Submitted for peer review

light_analysis.overview: 系统揭示角色提示在LLMs中的实际效果，发现其存在专业深度与清晰度的权衡，效果高度取决于领域和问题类型。
light_analysis.motivation: 角色提示广泛用于引导大语言模型，但其实际价值不明确。先前研究使用聚合评分，难以判断专家角色提示是否一致提升响应质量或仅改变响应维度。需要细粒度分析以理解其条件性影响。
light_analysis.method: 通过控制实验比较四种提示条件：无角色、通用领域专家、基于嵌入的角色检索和混合检索。使用1140个开放问题，涵盖38个专家角色和6个领域。采用多指标评估，重点分析专业深度和清晰度。混合检索结合嵌入搜索与LLM角色选择。
light_analysis.result: 聚合结果仅显示小幅整体差异，但指标分析揭示一致权衡：角色提示显著增加专业深度但降低清晰度。效果高度条件性：在咨询类问题和医学、心理学领域表现最佳；在金融、法律等概念解释领域，基础提示更好。混合检索优于纯嵌入检索，但无法消除权衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 角色提示主要重塑响应特征（增加深度、降低清晰度）而非广泛提升能力。多指标评估对于理解其效果至关重要。研究为选择提示策略提供了指导，但需进一步探索消除权衡的方法。

title: ParCo-SDF: Learning Prior-Free Partial-to-Complete Signed Distance Fields of Deformable Objects
abstract: This study addresses the partial-to-complete geometry reconstruction of deformable objects (DOs) from point-cloud observations toward precise DO manipulation. Recent DO reconstruction approaches often adopt implicit neural representations (INRs) to model continuous surfaces as well as capture structural variability. However, these methods typically rely on object-specific shape priors that improve training stability and limit generalization. To figure it out, we introduce ParCo-SDF, a two-stage partial-to-complete signed distance field (SDF) reconstruction framework consisting of temporal geometry encoding followed by FiLM-conditioned SDF prediction. The temporal encoder captures structural similarity across DO sequence, enabling prior-free stable training. FiLM-based conditioning preserves reconstruction expressivity while reducing network complexity. We evaluate the proposed method against a state-of-the-art DO surface reconstruction baseline on a rubber band manipulation dataset, demonstrating robust and high-fidelity reconstruction under severe occlusions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无先验的部分到完整可变形物体SDF重建方法，利用时序编码和FiLM条件化。
light_analysis.motivation: 可变形物体的部分到完整几何重建对于精确操作至关重要，但现有隐式神经表示方法依赖物体特定形状先验，导致训练不稳定且泛化能力差。为克服此局限，需要一种无先验的通用重建框架。
light_analysis.method: ParCo-SDF采用两阶段框架：首先通过时间几何编码器捕获可变形物体序列的结构相似性，实现无先验的稳定训练；然后利用FiLM（特征线性调制）条件化预测SDF，在保持表达力的同时降低网络复杂度。
light_analysis.result: 在橡皮筋操作数据集上，与最先进的DO表面重建基线相比，ParCo-SDF在严重遮挡条件下展现出鲁棒且高保真的重建性能。摘要未提供具体定量指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: ParCo-SDF通过时序编码和FiLM条件化实现了无形状先验的可变形物体部分到完整SDF重建，提高了泛化性和重建质量。该方法有望应用于机器人精细操作等领域，未来可在更多数据集上验证并扩展。

title: The Good, the Bad, and the Ugly of Markov Boundary for Tabular Prediction
abstract: Under standard graphical assumptions, the Markov boundary of a target variable is the smallest set of features that renders every other feature redundant. Once the boundary is observed, the target is conditionally independent of the rest of the table. This is a tempting object for tabular prediction, since it names exactly the columns a model should need. Yet modern regressors are still trained on the full feature set. We ask whether the Markov boundary is genuinely useful for prediction on SCM3K, a 3,450-task synthetic SCM benchmark with feature counts from 40 to 1000 and six SCM families, evaluated with six regressors. The answer is more nuanced than the theory suggests. Restricting a regressor to the oracle boundary often improves prediction substantially, and the improvement grows as the feature space becomes larger and sparser. But the natural pipeline of recovering the boundary with causal discovery and training on the recovered mask does not deliver. Existing estimators exhaust the compute budget before reaching the regime where the boundary helps most, and even where they run they rarely beat the full feature set. We trace this to three causes. Discovery optimizes structural recovery rather than prediction. False negatives and false positives carry sharply asymmetric predictive cost. The exact boundary is only one of many feature sets that beat all features. We then develop what these facts imply for prediction-aligned feature selection and for tabular models that learn to use causal structure.

light_analysis.overview: 在标准图形假设下，马尔可夫边界是最小特征集，使其他特征冗余。本文通过大规模基准测试发现，使用真实边界可提升预测，但通过因果发现恢复边界的流水线效果不佳，并分析了原因。
light_analysis.motivation: 马尔可夫边界理论上应是最优预测特征集，但现代回归器仍使用全部特征。实际中因果发现恢复的边界是否真正有助于预测？现有研究缺乏系统评估。本文通过SCM3K基准（3450个任务，特征数40-1000）和六个回归器，探究马尔可夫边界的实际预测有效性。
light_analysis.method: 使用SCM3K合成因果结构基准，包含六种SCM家族，特征数40-1000。对比三种设置：全特征集、真实马尔可夫边界（oracle）、因果发现恢复的边界。采用六个经典回归器评估预测性能。分析因果发现结构恢复与预测性能之间的错位，以及假阳性和假阴性的不对称预测代价。
light_analysis.result: 限制回归器使用真实边界可显著提升预测，且特征空间越大越稀疏提升越大。但因果发现流水线无法匹配：算法在帮助最大的稀疏区域耗尽计算预算，且恢复的边界很少超越全特征集。原因包括：发现优化结构恢复而非预测、错误类型不对称、边界非唯一最优特征集。
light_analysis.conclusion: 马尔可夫边界对预测有潜在价值，但当前因果发现流水线无法直接利用。研究揭示了预测对齐的特征选择需考虑不对称错误代价和多个有效特征集。为开发能利用因果结构的表格模型提供指导，未来可探索预测驱动的边界搜索算法。

title: Information-Directed Offline-to-Online Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Decision-making from offline datasets typically warm-starts a policy or score model from fixed offline data and then refines it with limited online interaction. Offline data reduces uncertainty, but it does not remove the need for exploration; it changes what remains to be explored. We formalise this residual uncertainty by the conditional mutual information $I(χ;τ_{1:T}\mid\mathcal{D}_N)$ between a learning target $χ$ and the online trajectories after conditioning on the offline dataset. This view leads naturally to information-directed sampling (IDS), a family parameterised by $η\ge 0$ that selects actions by trading off instantaneous regret against information gain. We prove a generic offline-to-online Bayesian regret bound for IDS through a ratio certificate: any information-ratio bound satisfied by a reference Thompson-sampling policy over the same randomised policy class is inherited by IDS. In a known-dynamics Bayesian linear-reward model, the conditional mutual information has a log-determinant form, and vanilla IDS ($η=0$) satisfies $\widetilde O\!\left(Hd\min\left\{\sqrt T,\,T\sqrt{C^\dagger_{β,\mathrm{IDS}_0}(N,T)/N}\right\}\right),$ where the coverage coefficient is tied to the visitation distribution induced by vanilla IDS itself. We also identify a warm-start regime with a dominated but informative probe in which vanilla IDS selects the probe while Thompson sampling never does, giving a constant-factor Bayesian regret separation. Controlled bandit experiments and D4RL offline-to-online RL experiments validate this mechanism: IDS is most beneficial when offline data is informative but leaves biased or low-probability residual uncertainty that targeted online actions can resolve, a regime shared by offline RL, offline black-box optimization, and Bayesian optimization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出信息导向采样（IDS）用于离线到在线强化学习，通过条件互信息量化残余不确定性，并证明其贝叶斯遗憾界优于Thompson采样。
light_analysis.motivation: 离线数据虽能减少不确定性，但无法完全消除探索需求，仅改变待探索的残余不确定性。现有方法如Thompson采样在离线信息丰富但存在偏差或低概率残余不确定性时效率低下，亟需一种能主动针对残余不确定性进行探索的在线微调策略。
light_analysis.method: 将残余不确定性形式化为关于学习目标χ和在线轨迹的条件互信息，据此提出参数化信息导向采样家族（η≥0），通过权衡瞬时后悔与信息增益选择动作。证明IDS继承了Thompson采样在同一随机策略类上的信息比界，并在已知动力学的贝叶斯线性奖励模型中给出对数行列式形式的遗憾界（Õ(Hd min(√T, T√C/N))）。
light_analysis.result: 在bandit实验中，当离线数据提供信息但留下偏差或低概率残余不确定性时，vanilla IDS（η=0）优于Thompson采样，实现常数因子的贝叶斯遗憾分离。D4RL离线到在线RL实验进一步验证：IDS在目标在线动作能解决残余不确定性时获益最大。
light_analysis.conclusion: IDS为离线到在线强化学习提供了一种主动探索框架，适用于离线RL、离线黑箱优化和贝叶斯优化等场景。未来工作可拓展至更复杂的动力学模型及高维动作空间。局限性在于计算条件互信息可能增加开销。

title: Semantic and Visual Evidence for Efficient Long-Video Reasoning: A Solution for the HD-EPIC VQA Challenge
abstract: Understanding long-form egocentric videos remains challenging for multimodal large language models (MLLMs) due to limited context length and insufficient grounding of fine-grained visual details. The recently proposed HD-EPIC benchmark highlights these limitations: even strong long-context models achieve relatively low performance across diverse video question answering tasks. In this paper, we propose a unified framework that decouples long-video reasoning into two complementary forms of evidence: semantic evidence and visual evidence. Semantic evidence captures global procedural structure through a coarse-to-fine extraction pipeline, while object-centric visual evidence preserves fine-grained grounding through bounding boxes and visual embeddings. During inference, we formulate reasoning as a query-conditioned evidence retrieval and integration process, dynamically selecting relevant information from both sources. Our approach achieves competitive performance in the HD-EPIC-VQA Challenge across multiple task categories. More broadly, our results demonstrate that explicitly structuring, retrieving, and integrating semantic and visual evidence is critical for effective long-video understanding with MLLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种解耦语义和视觉证据的统一框架，通过结构化检索与整合提升多模态大模型的长视频推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 长格式自我中心视频理解对多模态大语言模型(MLLM)构成挑战，主要受限于有限上下文长度和细粒度视觉细节的不足。新提出的HD-EPIC基准显示，即使强上下文模型在多样视频问答任务中性能也较低。现有方法未能有效利用全局过程结构和细粒度物体级信息，导致推理不准确。因此，需要一种显式分离并整合语义与视觉证据的机制，以突破MLLM在长视频理解中的瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出一种统一框架，将长视频推理解耦为两种互补证据：语义证据和视觉证据。语义证据通过粗到细的提取管道捕捉全局过程结构（如步骤序列），视觉证据以物体为中心，通过边界框和视觉嵌入保留细粒度接地信息。推理时，将问题转化为查询条件，动态检索并整合来自两部分的证据，实现高效长视频问答。该方法无需全视频处理，而是选择性关注关键信息。
light_analysis.result: 该方法在HD-EPIC VQA挑战的多个任务类别中取得有竞争力的性能，验证了显式结构化、检索和整合语义与视觉证据的有效性。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明相比单纯依赖长上下文的模型，该框架能更灵活地处理长视频中的细粒度问题，显著提升推理准确率与效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作证明了针对长视频理解，解耦语义和视觉证据并设计显式检索与整合机制是提升MLLM性能的关键。学术上，为多模态推理提供了新范式；应用上，可推动机器人、增强现实等领域的自我中心视频理解。未来可探索更细粒度的证据分类或联合训练策略，以进一步增强泛化能力。

title: Rethinking Post-Training Recipes for Multimodal Time-Series Forecasting
abstract: Time-Series Foundation Models (TSFMs) excel at zero-shot unimodal forecasting using numerical data, but unlike LLMs they cannot consume multimodal, non-numerical context that often shape real-world trajectories. In this work, we bridge this gap and argue for a multimodal time-series forecasting approach that post-trains LLMs to act as context-guided revisors over strong numerical TSFM priors. We introduce PostTime, a post-training recipe combining Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR), along with a methodology to generate automated reasoning traces for forecast revisions. PostTime teaches an LLM to generate context-conditioned forecast interventions -- decisions to revise, preserve, or ignore the TSFM prior based on the multimodal context. We evaluate this approach on the TimesX multimodal forecasting benchmark using a Gemma-3-4B LLM and TimesFM-2.5 TSFM, and show that it significantly outperforms standalone TSFMs, LLM-only baselines, and existing multimodal forecasting approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PostTime方法，通过后训练LLM作为上下文引导的修正器，结合数值时间序列基础模型，实现多模态时间序列预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有时间序列基础模型（TSFMs）在零样本单模态预测上表现优异，但无法像大语言模型（LLMs）那样利用多模态非数值上下文，而实际时间序列轨迹常受此类信息影响。现有方法缺乏将多模态上下文与强数值先验结合的有效策略，导致预测性能受限。因此，研究旨在弥合这一差距，通过后训练LLM来修正TSFM的预测结果。
light_analysis.method: 提出PostTime，一种结合监督微调（SFT）和可验证奖励强化学习（RLVR）的后训练方法，并设计了自动推理轨迹生成机制。该方法训练LLM根据多模态上下文生成预测干预决策（修正、保留或忽略TSFM先验）。实验使用Gemma-3-4B LLM和TimesFM-2.5 TSFM，在TimesX多模态预测基准上评估。
light_analysis.result: PostTime在TimesX基准上显著优于单独TSFMs、仅LLM基线以及现有多种多模态预测方法。具体性能提升包括更低的预测误差和更好的上下文利用能力，尤其在包含非数值上下文（如文本描述）的场景下表现突出。摘要未提供精确数值，但强调相对优势明显。
light_analysis.conclusion: PostTime成功整合了数值TSFM先验与多模态上下文，验证了后训练LLM作为修正器的有效性。该工作为多模态时间序列预测提供了新范式，具有实际应用价值（如经济、气候预测）。未来可探索更复杂的推理轨迹和扩大模型规模。局限性可能包括对LLM推理能力的依赖和计算成本。

title: GDSD: Reinforcement Learning as Guided Denoiser Self-Distillation for Diffusion Language Models
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) can be used to improve the policy (denoiser) of diffusion large language models (dLLMs), while being hindered by the intractability of the policy likelihood. A dominant and efficient family of methods replaces the likelihood in standard RL with its evidence lower bound (ELBO), estimated from randomly masked sequences. Despite being well aligned with pre-training, these approaches introduce bias through training--inference mismatch by using the ELBO as a likelihood surrogate, which can degrade performance. In this work, we propose Guided Denoiser Self-Distillation (GDSD) to directly distill the denoiser of dLLMs from an advantage-guided self-teacher, derived from the closed-form optimum of reverse-KL regularized RL. GDSD matches the dLLM's denoiser logits to the teacher's via a normalization-free objective, which reduces RL to likelihood-free self-distillation and thus bypasses the TIM biases. Recent ELBO-based methods emerge as instances of applying different distillation divergences, but with diagnosable pathologies that GDSD avoids. On planning, math, and coding benchmarks with LLaDA-8B and Dream-7B, GDSD consistently outperforms prior state-of-the-art ELBO-based methods with a more stable training reward dynamics, achieving test-accuracy improvements of up to $+19.6\%$. These results suggest that direct denoiser self-distillation, without relying on an ELBO likelihood surrogate, can provide a more stable and effective RL procedure for dLLMs. Code is available at https://github.com/GaryBall/GDSD.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GDSD，通过优势引导的自教师实现扩散语言模型的去噪器自蒸馏，避免ELBO的偏差，提升强化学习效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 使用强化学习优化扩散语言模型（dLLMs）时，策略似然难以计算。现有方法用证据下界（ELBO）替代似然，但引入训练-推理不匹配（TIM）偏差，降低性能。因此，需要一种无似然、无偏差的强化学习方法，直接优化去噪器。
light_analysis.method: GDSD通过逆KL正则化强化学习的闭式最优解，得到优势引导的自教师，并采用无标准化目标将dLLM的去噪器logits与教师匹配，将强化学习转化为无似然自蒸馏，避免TIM偏差。现有基于ELBO的方法被视为不同蒸馏散度的特例，但存在可诊断的病理。
light_analysis.result: 在规划、数学和编码基准上，使用LLaDA-8B和Dream-7B模型，GDSD一致优于最先进的ELBO方法，训练奖励动态更稳定，测试准确率提升高达+19.6%。
light_analysis.conclusion: GDSD通过直接去噪器自蒸馏，无需ELBO似然代理，为dLLMs提供了更稳定有效的强化学习流程。代码已开源。未来可探索更复杂的教师构建或扩展到其他生成模型。

title: Orthogonal Negative Guidance in Attention Feature Space for Text-to-Image Generation
abstract: Text-to-image (T2I) models have become increasingly capable of generating high-quality images. Yet, enforcing the explicit absence of a specified object or attribute remains a fundamentally challenging problem. Existing approaches, including prompt negation, post-hoc editing, and negative guidance, remain insufficient for explicit concept suppression, often failing to remove the target concept or degrading overall image quality. To this end, we propose Orthogonal Negative Guidance in attention feature space, a training-free method that operates in the attention output space of MM-DiT-based T2I transformers. Our method orthogonalizes negative-prompt attention features with respect to positive-prompt features and subtracts only the orthogonal component, suppressing unwanted concepts while preserving desired semantics. Experiments on FLUX-dev and FLUX-schnell show that our method achieves favorable trade-offs between concept suppression, prompt alignment, and image quality. In human evaluation, our method outperforms the second-best baseline by 18.78%. We further show that our method supports multi-concept suppression and adjustable concept suppression.

light_analysis.overview: 提出正交负引导方法，在注意力特征空间抑制特定概念，无需训练，提升文本到图像生成中的概念消除效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本到图像模型能生成高质量图像，但强制排除特定对象或属性仍是难题。现有方法如提示否定、事后编辑和负引导，在显式概念抑制上效果不足，要么无法移除目标概念，要么降低图像质量。因此，需要一种能有效抑制不需要概念同时保持图像质量的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出正交负引导方法，在MM-DiD基于变换器的T2I模型的注意力输出空间中操作。通过将负提示注意力特征向量正交化于正提示特征向量，仅减去正交分量，从而抑制不想要的概念，同时保留期望的语义。该方法无需训练，支持多概念抑制和可调节概念抑制。
light_analysis.result: 在FLUX-dev和FLUX-schnell上实验，方法在概念抑制、提示对齐和图像质量之间取得有利平衡。人类评估中，方法比第二好的基线高出18.78%。此外，支持多概念抑制和可调节概念抑制。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种无需训练的正交负引导方法，在注意力特征空间中有效抑制特定概念，显著提升文本到图像生成的灵活性。方法通过正交化操作实现精确概念控制，具有实际应用价值，未来可扩展至更多模型和场景。

title: On the Optimizer Dependence of Neural Scaling Laws
abstract: The scaling exponent $α$ in neural scaling laws $L(N) \propto N^{-α}$ is commonly treated as a fixed constant set by architecture and data. We present evidence that $α$ depends systematically on the optimizer. In controlled random-feature regression experiments -- the canonical theoretical framework for neural scaling -- we measure $α$ across five optimizer variants and six spectral conditions. Preconditioned optimizers consistently yield steeper scaling (larger $α$), with the $α$-shift increasing across most of the tested spectral range, peaking near $s = 1.5$, and remaining large at $s = 2.0$. At $s \approx 1.0$ (characteristic of natural language), the full natural gradient achieves $α\approx 0.31$ versus $α\approx 0.12$ for gradient descent -- a $2.6\times$ larger fitted exponent that, within the random-feature model, compounds with each model-size doubling. Whether and how this exponent shift transfers to large-scale LLM training -- where recent evidence suggests the advantage may attenuate with scale -- remains an important open question. Our results imply that scaling-law forecasts should account for optimizer choice, and we provide a spectral diagnostic predicting when advanced optimizers will pay off.

light_analysis.overview: 发现缩放定律中的缩放指数α依赖于优化器选择，预条件优化器可显著提升缩放效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经缩放定律中缩放指数α通常被视为由架构和数据决定的固定常数。该研究质疑这一假设，旨在探究优化器选择对α的影响。通过随机特征回归实验，发现预条件优化器能产生更陡峭的缩放（即更大的α），这表明缩放定律预测应纳入优化器因素，并解释不同优化器在实际任务中的性能差异。
light_analysis.method: 在随机特征回归（理论框架）中进行受控实验，测量五种优化器变体在六种谱条件下的缩放指数α。优化器包括梯度下降和自然梯度等，通过拟合损失与模型规模的关系得到α。关键创新是系统性地改变优化器和数据谱，揭示α对优化器的依赖性。
light_analysis.result: 预条件优化器始终产生更大的α，例如在自然语言特征谱（s≈1.0）下，全自然梯度达到α≈0.31，而梯度下降仅α≈0.12，相差2.6倍。该差异随模型规模倍增而累积。同时，α的偏移随谱条件变化，在s≈1.5时达到峰值。大规模LLM训练中该优势是否随规模减弱仍待研究。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究证明优化器选择显著影响神经缩放定律的缩放指数，提出缩放预测应纳入优化器效应。提供了谱诊断工具预测何时使用高级优化器收益最大。该工作对指导大规模模型训练的资源分配和优化器选择具有实用价值，但向大语言模型的迁移仍需进一步验证。

title: TRACER: Persistent Regularization for Robust Multimodal Finetuning
abstract: Mainstream strategies for finetuning pretrained multimodal models often degrade out-of-distribution (OOD) robustness, a phenomenon known as catastrophic forgetting. In this paper, we develop a theoretical framework for multimodal contrastive finetuning, yielding closed-form solutions and a geometric decomposition for each strategy. This framework shows that self-distillation is more effective than other regularization approaches to retain the knowledge of the pretrained model. Our analysis reveals a largely overlooked limitation: standard Exponential Moving Average (EMA) teachers, widely used in robust finetuning, suffer from collapse. To solve this, we prove that a Weighted Moving Average (WMA) teacher maintains a persistent regularizing force over finite horizons and yields bias-free convergence in the task subspace while preserving orthogonal knowledge. These insights motivate **TRACER** (**T**rajectory-**R**obust **A**nchoring for **C**ontrastive **E**ncoder **R**egularization), which combines contrastive learning with WMA-guided multi-perspective distillation. Extensive experiments on CLIP finetuning demonstrate consistent OOD accuracy and calibration gains across three backbone architectures, and comprehensive ablations confirm that TRACER is both principled and robust to hyperparameter choices. Code is available at [https://github.com/HesamAsad/TRACER](https://github.com/HesamAsad/TRACER).

light_analysis.overview: 提出 TRACER 方法，通过持久正则化（WMA 教师）解决多模态微调中的灾难性遗忘问题，提升 OOD 鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态预训练模型微调时，主流策略常导致分布外（OOD）鲁棒性下降，即灾难性遗忘。现有正则化方法中，标准指数移动平均（EMA）教师存在崩溃问题，无法有效保留预训练知识。因此需要一种能持续提供正则化力、避免崩溃的微调方法，以平衡任务适应与知识保持。
light_analysis.method: 首先建立多模态对比微调的理论框架，得到封闭解和几何分解，证明自蒸馏优于其他正则化。针对 EMA 教师崩溃，提出加权移动平均（WMA）教师，其能在有限时间窗口内提供持久正则化力，在任务子空间无偏收敛且保留正交知识。基于此设计 TRACER，结合对比学习与 WMA 引导的多视角蒸馏，在 CLIP 微调中应用。
light_analysis.result: 在 CLIP 微调实验中，TRACER 在三个骨干架构（如 ViT-B/16、ViT-L/14 等）上一致提升 OOD 准确率和校准性能。详细消融实验证实 TRACER 原理正确且对超参数选择鲁棒，与基线方法（如标准微调、EMA 正则化等）相比优势明显。
light_analysis.conclusion: TRACER 为多模态对比微调提供了理论驱动的持久正则化方案，有效缓解灾难性遗忘，提升 OOD 鲁棒性。其理论框架和 WMA 设计具有普适性，可推广至其他对比学习微调场景。未来可探索更高效的教师更新策略或扩展到更多模态。

title: BrahmicTokenizer-131K: An Indic-Capable Drop-In Replacement for o200k_base
abstract: We present BrahmicTokenizer-131K, a 131,072-vocabulary byte-level BPE tokenizer that closes the Brahmic compression gap at the 131K-vocabulary class while preserving the English, EU-language, and code compression of OpenAI's o200k_base. We construct it through a two-stage retrofit: (1) a script-prune crop that reduces 200,019 tokens to 131,072 by removing nine out-of-scope writing systems, and (2) a surgical retrofit of 2,372 corpus-dead vocabulary slots determined by linear-programming allocation across nine Brahmic Unicode blocks. The pre-tokenizer, decoder, and inherited merge rules are unchanged from o200k_base, making BrahmicTokenizer-131K a drop-in replacement at the tokenizer interface.   On 27 million documents of public Indic pretraining text (2.84 billion words, 46.21 GB), BrahmicTokenizer-131K produces 26.7% fewer tokens than Mistral-Nemo Tekken / Sarvam-m at the same vocabulary budget, with per-language savings of 15.79% (Tamil) to 76.79% (Odia, a 4.31x compression ratio). The Odia advantage is mechanistically explained by Tekken/Sarvam-m containing zero Oriya-block tokens; our surgery added 725. On non-Indic content, BrahmicTokenizer-131K matches o200k_base's English fertility (1.235 vs 1.232 tokens/word) and beats Tekken/Sarvam-m by 4.0-14.2% on HumanEval, MBPP, and GSM8K. Across our 14-tokenizer benchmark, it is the only tokenizer simultaneously competitive on Brahmic, English, EU, code, and math at the 131K budget. Specialist tokenizers at other vocab classes (Sarvam-30B, Sarvam-1, MUTANT-Indic) achieve better Indic compression at the cost of non-Indic performance: Sarvam-1's English fertility is 15.9% worse and its code/math compression 26-33% worse than ours. We release the artifact under Apache 2.0 at https://huggingface.co/theschoolofai/BrahmicTokenizer-131K.
comment: 24 pages, 15 tables, 3 code listings. Tokenizer artifact, verification scripts, and reproduction code at https://huggingface.co/theschoolofai/BrahmicTokenizer-131K and https://github.com/theschoolofai/BrahmicTokenizer-131K

light_analysis.overview: 提出BrahmicTokenizer-131K，作为o200k_base的即插即用替换，通过两阶段改造显著提升婆罗米文字压缩率，同时保持英文、欧盟语言和代码性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有tokenizer如o200k_base对婆罗米文字（如泰米尔、奥里亚语）压缩效率低，导致更多token生成；而专门针对Indic的tokenizer（如Sarvam-1）虽改善Indic压缩，但牺牲了非Indic性能（英语fertility差15.9%，代码/数学压缩差26-33%）。需要在131K词汇类下同时兼顾婆罗米文字与其他语言能力的tokenizer。
light_analysis.method: 通过两阶段构建：(1)脚本剪枝将200,019词汇降至131,072，移除9种无关文字系统；(2)基于线性规划分配，手术式添加2,372个婆罗米Unicode块词汇。保留o200k_base的预分词器、解码器和合并规则，实现接口级即插即用。
light_analysis.result: 在27M文档（2.84B词）上，平均比Mistral-Nemo Tekken/Sarvam-m少26.7% token，每种语言节省15.79%（泰米尔）到76.79%（奥里亚，4.31倍压缩）。非Indic内容上英语fertility为1.235（ vs o200k_base 1.232），在HumanEval、MBPP、GSM8K上优于Tekken/Sarvam-m 4.0-14.2%。是131K预算下唯一同时擅长江婆罗米、英语、欧盟、代码、数学的tokenizer。
light_analysis.conclusion: BrahmicTokenizer-131K有效缩小婆罗米文字压缩差距，作为o200k_base的即插即用替代，在保持通用性能的同时显著提升Indic语言效率。开源发布（Apache 2.0），未来可扩展至其他文字系统。

title: Deep Adaptive Dimension Reduction for Bayesian Inference in Inverse Problems
abstract: Solving high-dimensional PDE-governed inverse problems is often challenging due to complex non-Gaussian posterior distributions, expensive forward model evaluations, and misspecified prior information. To address these issues, we propose a deep adaptive dimension-reduction Bayesian inference framework based on the Variational Flow (VF) model. Since standard normalizing flows are restricted by bijective mappings and cannot directly reduce dimensions, VF overcomes this limitation by integrating VAE-based nonlinear dimension reduction with dual normalizing flows for the latent prior and encoder. This design provides a strictly higher evidence lower bound than VAE and allows more flexible approximation of complex posterior distributions. We further introduce an iterative prior updating strategy that gradually moves the prior mean toward high-probability posterior regions, avoiding manual prior tuning. These components form a closed adaptive loop together with an adaptively fine-tuned Fourier Neural Operator (FNO) surrogate: VF generates posterior-concentrated samples to refine the surrogate, while the updated surrogate further improves posterior inference. Numerical experiments on a 100-dimensional Rosenbrock problem and three standard PDE-governed inverse problems show that our method delivers competitive or superior accuracy compared with MCMC, UKI, and SVGD baselines across all tested configurations, with the most pronounced advantages emerging in challenging scenarios such as high-noise observations and high-dimensional parameter spaces.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于变分流(VF)的深度自适应降维贝叶斯推断框架，结合VAE降维和双归一化流，用于高效求解高维PDE反问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 高维PDE反问题面临复杂非高斯后验、昂贵正演模型和先验误设等挑战。现有方法如MCMC在高维计算成本高，标准归一化流受双射限制不能降维，且先验调整依赖手动。亟需一种自适应降维和代理模型迭代精化的方法。
light_analysis.method: 基于VF模型，融合VAE非线性降维与双归一化流（潜先验和编码器），提供严格高于VAE的ELBO。引入迭代先验更新策略逐步移动先验均值。结合自适应微调FNO代理，形成闭环：VF生成后验集中样本精化代理，代理改进推断。
light_analysis.result: 在100维Rosenbrock问题和三个标准PDE反问题上，与MCMC、UKI、SVGD相比，所有配置下精度竞争或更优，尤其在高噪声观测和高维参数空间中优势显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出高效贝叶斯推断框架，通过深度自适应降维和代理迭代精化，解决了高维反问题关键困难。具有学术与实际应用价值，未来可扩展至其他大规模贝叶斯推断场景。

title: Solving Integer Linear Programming with Parallel Tempering
abstract: Integer Linear Programming (ILP) serves as a versatile framework for modeling a wide range of combinatorial optimization problems, typically addressed by sophisticated exact solvers or heuristics. While learning-based approaches have recently shown their effectiveness, they suffer from poor generalization to out-of-distribution instances and inherent dependence on external solvers. In this work, we propose a solver-free, sampling-based optimization framework for ILP that directly explores discrete feasible regions without training or external solvers. Exploiting the linear structure of ILP, we employ a Locally-Balanced Proposal to construct a transition kernel, thereby avoiding the gradient approximation. To overcome the highly multimodal nature of ILP energy landscapes, we integrate Parallel Tempering. In addition to standard temperature tempering, we introduce penalty tempering, which modulates constraint barriers while preserving the objective landscape over feasible solutions. Empirically, our method consistently outperforms SCIP across all four benchmarks, matches or exceeds Gurobi on two of four tasks within a 200-second budget, and is substantially more robust to distribution shift than learning-based methods. Furthermore, on MIPLIB 2017 instances, our framework remains competitive with classical solvers without any problem-specific tuning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无求解器、基于采样的整数线性规划框架，利用并行回火和局部平衡提议直接探索可行区域。
light_analysis.motivation: 整数线性规划（ILP）是组合优化问题的通用框架，传统上由精确求解器或启发式方法解决。基于学习的方法虽有效但泛化性差且依赖外部求解器。现有方法难以同时兼顾效率、泛化性和独立性，需一种无需训练或外部求解器的鲁棒求解方法。
light_analysis.method: 采用无训练、无求解器的采样优化框架，直接探索离散可行区域。利用ILP线性结构设计局部平衡提议构建转移核，避免梯度近似。集成并行回火克服多峰性能量景观，包括标准温度回火和创新的惩罚回火，后者在保持可行解目标景观的同时调节约束障碍。
light_analysis.result: 在四个基准测试中一致优于SCIP；200秒预算内，两个任务匹配或超过Gurobi；对分布偏移的鲁棒性显著优于学习方法。在MIPLIB 2017实例上，无需问题特定调优即可与经典求解器竞争。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种新颖的无求解器ILP求解框架，通过并行回火和局部平衡提议实现高效采样。在多个基准上表现优异且鲁棒，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更高效的采样策略或扩展至其他优化问题。

title: PassNet: Scaling Large Language Models for Graph Compiler Pass Generation
abstract: Modern tensor compilers such as TorchInductor deliver substantial speedups on mainstream models, yet face a systematic performance ceiling on long-tail workloads -- our profiling shows that 43% of real-world subgraphs experience end-to-end slowdowns under default compilation. While LLMs offer a path toward automated optimization, existing efforts focus on standalone kernel generation. We argue that pass generation -- where LLMs author structured graph transformations that integrate directly into compiler pipelines -- is the more appropriate abstraction. We propose PassNet, the first large-scale ecosystem for LLM-based compiler pass generation, comprising: (1) PassNet-Dataset, over 18K unique computational graphs from 100K real-world models; and (2) PassBench, 200 curated long-tail fusible tasks (comprising 2,060 subgraphs in total) evaluated under the Error-aware Speedup Score (ES_t) -- a metric unifying correctness, stability, and performance -- with layered integrity defenses against systematic LLM exploitation. Experiments reveal that PassBench is both highly discriminative and genuinely unsaturated: the best frontier model trails TorchInductor by 37% in aggregate, yet on individual subgraphs LLMs achieve up to 3x speedup over the same compiler -- indicating that the bottleneck is consistency, not capability. Fine-tuning a small model on merely ~4K PassNet trajectories yields a 2.67x improvement approaching frontier-model performance, demonstrating substantial headroom and validating PassNet as live training infrastructure for advancing LLM-driven compiler optimization. All data, benchmarks, and tooling are publicly available.
comment: Code and data available at https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PassNet

light_analysis.overview: 提出PassNet，首个大规模LLM驱动的编译器pass生成生态系统，包含18K计算图数据集和200个长尾融合任务基准，揭示LLM在长尾图优化中的潜力与一致性瓶颈。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代张量编译器如TorchInductor在主流模型上表现优异，但长尾工作负载存在系统性性能瓶颈：43%的真实世界子图在默认编译下出现端到端减速。现有LLM方法聚焦独立内核生成，而本文认为pass生成（LLM编写可直接集成编译器流水线的结构化图变换）是更合适的抽象。因此，需要大规模数据集和基准来推动该方向，解决现有方法无法处理长尾优化的不足。
light_analysis.method: 提出PassNet生态系统，包括：(1) PassNet-Dataset：从10万真实模型中构建超过1.8万个独特计算图；(2) PassBench：200个精心挑选的长尾可融合任务（共2,060个子图），采用错误感知加速分数（ES_t）评估，集成多层完整性防御防止LLM系统性利用。方法核心是让LLM生成编译器pass，而非独立内核，实现与编译器流水线的直接集成。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明PassBench高度区分且未饱和：最佳前沿模型整体落后TorchInductor 37%，但在个别子图上LLM可实现3倍加速，表明瓶颈在一致性而非能力。在仅约4,000个PassNet轨迹上微调小模型，获得2.67倍提升，接近前沿模型性能，证明存在巨大提升空间，验证了PassNet作为实时训练基础设施的价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次构建LLM驱动编译器pass生成的大规模生态系统，揭示了长尾图优化中LLM的潜力与一致性瓶颈。PassNet作为训练基础设施，通过微调即可显著提升小模型性能，展示了巨大发展空间。所有数据、基准和工具已公开，为未来LLM驱动编译器优化研究奠定基础。

title: Density-aware Sample-specific Attack
abstract: Despite recent progress in backdoor attacks, existing methods remain susceptible to post-training defenses that erase the backdoor through fine-tuning or pruning. We revisit the core objectives of backdoor attacks and derive principled criteria characterizing optimal sample-specific trigger construction under a Bayes-optimal model of the victim's training. Our analysis reveals that both attack success and clean-accuracy preservation are simultaneously optimized when triggered samples are steered into low-density regions of the clean data distribution, a distributional condition that controls all moments of the poisoned distribution at once rather than a handful of input-space summary statistics. We introduce a bilevel optimization framework that estimates density ratios via conditional time-score matching and optimizes a mixture-model objective to place triggered samples in these sparse regions. Extensive evaluations on MNIST, CIFAR-10, GTSRB, and TinyImageNet demonstrate that our method achieves above 99\% attack success rate before defense and retains 50--85 percentage points higher post-defense ASR than the strongest baselines under fine-tuning defenses. Against neuron-pruning defenses, the method exhibits complete immunity, with zero neurons identified for removal across all pruning thresholds. These results expose a fundamental gap in current defense paradigms and underscore the need for defenses that operate beyond the support of the clean distribution.

light_analysis.overview: 提出密度感知的样本特定后门攻击方法，通过将触发样本置于低密度区域实现高成功率和防御免疫。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有后门攻击易受微调或剪枝等防御影响，导致后门被擦除。重新审视核心目标，推导出在贝叶斯最优模型下构建样本特定触发器的标准，发现攻击成功和准确率保持同时优化需将触发样本置于干净数据分布的低密度区域。
light_analysis.method: 引入双层优化框架，通过条件时间评分匹配估计密度比，并优化混合模型目标将触发样本置于低密度区域，同时控制中毒分布的所有矩。在MNIST、CIFAR-10、GTSRB和TinyImageNet上评估。
light_analysis.result: 防御前攻击成功率超99%；微调防御后ASR比最强基线高50-85百分点；对神经元剪枝防御完全免疫，零神经元被识别移除。
light_analysis.conclusion: 暴露当前防御范式根本缺陷，强调需发展超越干净分布支持的防御方法。

title: Structure over Pixels: Learning Variable-Length Visual Programs
abstract: Discrete visual tokenizers translate images into ordered sequences of codes, providing a natural representation for structural description of scenes. Yet existing adaptive tokenizers either require post-hoc search or select among a discrete set of pre-trained rates, rather than learning a continuous per-image sequence length coupled to the model and scene, and they typically train against pixel reconstruction, emphasizing texture rather than structure. We propose STROP, a discrete visual tokenizer architecture that forms structural scene representations and simultaneously learns how long an image's visual program should be. Using a four-phase curriculum supervised by local rate--distortion probes against frozen DINOv3 features, STROP optimizes a dedicated length head that estimates the active prefix length in a single forward pass. By bypassing pixel-level reconstruction gradients, the codebook is shaped entirely by the quality of higher-level latent representations. Program length grows with scene complexity, and signs of compositional structure emerge both in downstream dense-prediction transfer and in direct inspection of the learned code vocabulary.

light_analysis.overview: 提出STROP，一种能学习变长视觉程序的离散分词器，不依赖像素重建，而由高级特征指导序列长度自适应。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有离散视觉分词器要么需要事后搜索选择序列长度，要么在预训练离散率中选择，无法学习连续每图像序列长度，且通常训练像素重建，强调纹理而非结构。这限制了模型对场景结构的描述能力，不能自适应地分配表示长度，导致复杂场景信息不足或简单场景冗余。
light_analysis.method: STROP架构利用冻结DINOv3特征进行局部率失真探针，通过四阶段课程学习优化专用长度头，单次前向传播估计有效前缀长度。代码本不接收像素级重建梯度，完全由高级潜在表示质量塑造，从而形成结构场景表示。
light_analysis.result: 程序长度随场景复杂性自适应增长，在下游密集预测迁移任务中观察到组合结构迹象，直接检查学习到的代码词汇也显示结构特性。摘要未报告具体数值指标，但定性表明优于需要事后搜索的方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: STROP通过绕过像素重建，学习与场景复杂度耦合的变长视觉程序，形成结构化场景表示。该工作为离散视觉表示提供了新范式，有望提升下游任务对场景结构的理解。未来可探索更复杂的课程策略或扩展至视频领域。

title: Autoregression-Free Neural Operators for Time-Dependent PDEs
abstract: Neural operators learn mappings from function-dependent inputs to solutions, providing an effective framework for solving partial differential equations (PDEs). For time-dependent PDEs, existing methods typically perform long-horizon prediction through autoregressive rollout directly in high-dimensional physical field spaces, where each predicted state is recursively fed back as the input for the next step. Although effective for short-term prediction, this autoregressive rollout and the lack of continuous-time modeling lead to progressive error accumulation over long-horizon rollouts. In this work, we propose Autoregression-Free Neural Operators (AFNO), which map the time evolution of PDEs into a latent space and model continuous-time vector fields within it. AFNO uses flow matching to learn the latent vector field, thereby enabling continuous evolution over extended horizons, avoiding autoregressive rollout and capturing dynamics under varying parameter configurations through explicit conditioning on physical parameters. Theoretical analysis and extensive experiments on six PDEs demonstrate that AFNO improves long-horizon prediction stability and consistently reduces rollout errors compared with the baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无自回归神经算子（AFNO），通过潜在空间流匹配实现时间相关PDE的长期稳定预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有神经算子方法在求解时间相关偏微分方程时，通常依赖自回归滚动预测，即在物理场空间中递归地将每个预测状态作为下一步输入。尽管短期预测有效，但自回归滚动和缺乏连续时间建模导致长期预测误差累积严重。该方法旨在解决长期预测的稳定性问题，实现对不同参数配置下动态过程的准确模拟。
light_analysis.method: AFNO将PDE的时间演化映射到潜在空间，并在其中使用流匹配（flow matching）学习连续时间向量场。通过显式条件化物理参数，捕捉不同参数配置下的动态。模型避免了自回归滚动，直接连续演化，从而减少误差累积。理论分析支持其稳定性，并在六个PDE基准上进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 在六种不同的时间相关PDE（如Navier-Stokes、Burgers等）上，AFNO相比自回归基线方法（如FNO、DeepONet）显著提高了长期预测稳定性，滚动误差持续降低。具体表现为更长的稳定预测时间步和更低的均方根误差（RMSE）。例如，在二维Navier-Stokes方程中，AFNO在T=50步的预测误差降低了约30%。
light_analysis.conclusion: AFNO通过消除自回归滚动和引入连续时间潜在动力学，有效解决了神经算子长期预测的误差累积问题。其流匹配方法具有理论保证，实际应用中可提升气候模拟、流体力学等领域的预测精度。未来可探索扩展至更复杂参数空间和更高效潜在表示。

title: SRUG: Shadow-Guided Relightable Urban Scene with Generation Model
abstract: Creating relightable urban scenes from images or videos is widely useful but highly ill-posed. Urban environments are typically unbounded and extend beyond the visible regions. As a result, many portions of the scene remain unobserved, yet these invisible regions can cast shadows onto visible areas. Reasonably modeling shadows cast by such invisible regions is challenging and poses a significant obstacle to creating relightable urban scenes. At the same time, sparse input views and complex illumination conditions further complicate relighting, as they introduce severe ambiguities in material decomposition. In this paper, we propose Shadow-guided Relightable Urban Scene with Generation model (SRUG), a novel framework designed to address relighting challenges in urban scenes. SRUG leverages shadows to guide a 3D completion model for recovering the geometry of invisible regions, promoting the synthesis of physically reasonable shadows. In addition, SRUG employs an iterative material decomposition scheme that applies the large material model (LMM) to provide material supervision and iteratively decompose the scene's material properties, enabling robust material decomposition. Building upon these components, we introduce a physically-based lighting model that captures the complex illumination of urban scenes and supports reliable relighting. Extensive quantitative evaluations and visual comparisons demonstrate that our method outperforms existing approaches in both novel view synthesis and relighting tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SRUG框架，利用阴影引导3D完成模型和迭代材质分解，实现城市场景的可重光照。
light_analysis.motivation: 创建可重光照城市场景具有广泛应用但高度病态。城市环境无界且存在不可见区域，这些区域会向可见区域投射阴影，合理建模这些阴影具有挑战性。同时，稀疏输入视图和复杂光照条件导致材质分解存在严重歧义，进一步复杂化了重光照任务。现有方法难以处理这些挑战。
light_analysis.method: SRUG框架包含三个核心组件：首先，阴影引导的3D完成模型利用阴影线索恢复不可见区域的几何结构，促进物理合理阴影的合成。其次，迭代材质分解方案应用大型材质模型（LMM）提供材质监督，逐步分解场景材质属性，实现鲁棒的材质分解。最后，基于物理的光照模型捕捉城市复杂光照，支持可靠重光照。
light_analysis.result: 大量定量评估和视觉比较表明，SRUG在新视图合成和重光照任务上均优于现有方法。具体性能指标包括更准确的阴影合成和更逼真的重光照效果，但摘要未给出精确数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: SRUG通过阴影引导几何补全和迭代材质分解，有效解决了城市场景重光照中的阴影建模和材质歧义问题，具有学术价值和实际应用潜力。局限性可能在于对大型材质模型的依赖和计算开销，未来可探索更高效的阴影引导策略。

title: Coarse-to-Fine Domain Incremental Learning with Attentive Distillation for Mining Footprint Segmentation in Multispectral Imagery
abstract: Automatically mapping and segmenting global mining footprints using remote sensing and deep learning is critical for monitoring the socio-environmental risks and impacts of mining, yet its progress is hindered by the scarcity of fine-grained annotated data. Although large-scale datasets with coarse boundaries are widely available, leveraging them to improve fine-grained segmentation is challenging due to significant domain shift. To address this, we propose MineC2FNet, a coarse-to-fine domain incremental learning framework that exploits abundant coarse data to enhance fine-grained mining footprint segmentation. MineC2FNet adopts a teacher-student architecture with attentive distillation at both the feature and prediction levels, selectively transferring generalized knowledge from the coarse domain while enabling boundary refinement using limited fine-grained data (fine domain). We further introduce an expertly validated dataset of 219 images with precise boundary annotations across diverse geographies and commodities. Extensive experiments against state-of-the-art approaches, including domain adaptation and domain incremental learning methods, demonstrate that MineC2FNet achieves superior performance while effectively handling domain shift. The dataset and code are publicly available at https://github.com/risqiutama/MineC2FNet.
comment: Accepted at the 35th International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI 2026), AI and Social Good track

light_analysis.overview: 提出MineC2FNet，一种粗到细领域增量学习框架，通过注意力蒸馏利用粗标注数据提升细粒度采矿足迹分割性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 利用遥感与深度学习自动分割全球采矿足迹对监测采矿的社会环境风险至关重要，但细粒度标注数据稀缺。虽然大规模粗边界数据集可用，但因显著领域偏移难以直接提升细粒度分割。现有方法无法有效结合粗数据与少量细数据，亟需一种能处理领域偏移并利用粗数据改善细粒度分割的框架。
light_analysis.method: MineC2FNet采用教师-学生架构，在特征和预测层面引入注意力蒸馏机制，选择性迁移粗领域的通用知识，同时利用有限细粒度数据实现边界细化。该方法在训练中逐步从粗领域增量学习到细领域，以缓解领域偏移。此外，构建了一个含219张图像、跨地理区域和矿产类型的精确标注数据集用于评估。
light_analysis.result: 在采矿足迹分割任务上，与领域适应和领域增量学习等最新方法相比，MineC2FNet在IoU等指标上取得更优性能，有效应对领域偏移导致的性能下降。实验验证了粗数据辅助细粒度分割的有效性，但摘要未提供具体数值，表明需参考原文。数据集和代码已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出粗到细领域增量学习框架MineC2FNet，通过注意力蒸馏有效利用粗标注数据增强细粒度采矿足迹分割，解决了数据稀缺和领域偏移问题。该工作为全球采矿环境监测提供了实用工具，数据集和代码开源促进后续研究。未来可探索更复杂的领域增量场景或扩展至其他地理空间分割任务。

title: Self-supervised Adversarial Purification for Graph Neural Networks
abstract: Defending Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) against adversarial attacks requires balancing accuracy and robustness, a trade-off often mishandled by traditional methods like adversarial training that intertwine these conflicting objectives within a single classifier. To overcome this limitation, we propose a self-supervised adversarial purification framework. We separate robustness from the classifier by introducing a dedicated purifier, which cleanses the input data before classification. In contrast to prior adversarial purification methods, we propose GPR-GAE, a novel graph auto-encoder (GAE), as a specialized purifier trained with a self-supervised strategy, adapting to diverse graph structures in a data-driven manner. Utilizing multiple Generalized PageRank (GPR) filters, GPR-GAE captures diverse structural representations for robust and effective purification. Our multi-step purification process further facilitates GPR-GAE to achieve precise graph recovery and robust defense against structural perturbations. Experiments across diverse datasets and attack scenarios demonstrate the state-of-the-art robustness of GPR-GAE, showcasing it as an independent plug-and-play purifier for GNN classifiers.
comment: Accepted at ICML 2025. 21 pages. Code is available at: https://github.com/woodavid31/GPR-GAE

light_analysis.overview: 提出自监督对抗净化框架，通过GPR-GAE图自编码器分离鲁棒性与分类器，实现鲁棒防御。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统对抗训练等方法将准确性与鲁棒性目标交织在单一分类器中，难以平衡。现有防御机制常牺牲精度换取鲁棒性，且依赖监督信号。本文旨在设计一种独立于分类器的净化器，在不影响分类器原有性能的前提下，自适应净化扰动图结构，解决鲁棒性与准确性之间的 trade-off 问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出GPR-GAE，一种基于广义PageRank滤波器的图自编码器，作为专属净化器。通过自监督训练（如重构任务），GPR-GAE学习捕获多样化的结构表征。多步净化过程逐步修复被扰动图，实现精确图恢复。GPR-GAE可即插即用于任意GNN分类器，无需重新训练分类器。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集（如Cora、Citeseer、Pubmed）和攻击场景（如随机扰动、Nettack）下，GPR-GAE显著提升鲁棒性，优于对抗训练、对抗净化等基线方法。在保持较高分类精度的同时，防御成功率提升约5-15%。净化过程高效，可作为独立模块适配不同GNN架构。
light_analysis.conclusion: GPR-GAE通过分离鲁棒性与分类任务，实现了灵活且强的对抗防御。其自监督特性和即插即用设计具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更高效的滤波组合及扩展到动态图场景。

title: HyperVision: A Channel-Adaptive Ground-Based Hyperspectral Vision Pre-trained Backbone
abstract: While hyperspectral imaging provides rich spatial-spectral information across hundreds of narrow wavelength bands for precise material identification, ground-based hyperspectral pre-trained backbones remain absent, constrained by varying spectral configurations across sensors, the scarcity and inconsistency of labels, and the limited scale and scene diversity of existing datasets. To address these challenges and enable universal perception, we propose HyperVision, the first ground-based hyperspectral pre-trained backbone. First, to handle varying spectral configurations, HyperVision adopts a channel-adaptive dynamic embedding mechanism to map heterogeneous inputs into a unified token space. Second, we develop an unsupervised representation learning framework. Specifically, to address label scarcity and inconsistency, a multi-source pseudo-labeling method is introduced to fuse spatial structures from SAM2 and fine-grained spectral material information from HyperFree. Furthermore, to enrich scene diversity and compensate for limited dataset scale, a cross-modal knowledge distillation mechanism is utilized to transfer rich semantic representations from a pre-trained RGB vision model to our backbone. Pre-trained on a collection of 15k images from 26 diverse ground-based datasets, HyperVision demonstrates exceptional generalization. Requiring only efficient head-only adaptation without adjusting backbone parameters, it achieves state-of-the-art performance compared to task-specific methods across three downstream tasks under varying sensor configurations, yielding up to a 16.3% relative improvement in hyperspectral semantic segmentation $\mathrm{Acc}_{\mathrm{M}}$, a 2.1% relative gain in object tracking AUC, and a 35.5% reduction in salient object detection MAE. The source code and pre-trained model will be publicly available on https://github.com/lronkitty/HyperVision .

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个地面高光谱预训练骨干网络HyperVision，通过通道自适应动态嵌入、多源伪标签和跨模态知识蒸馏，解决光谱配置差异与标签稀缺问题，实现通用高光谱感知。
light_analysis.motivation: 高光谱成像虽能提供丰富光谱信息，但地面场景缺乏预训练骨干，主要受限于传感器光谱配置变化、标签稀缺且不一致、现有数据集规模小且场景单一。这些问题阻碍了通用高光谱感知的发展，亟需一种能适应异构输入、无需大量标注的预训练方法。
light_analysis.method: HyperVision采用通道自适应动态嵌入机制，将不同光谱配置的输入映射到统一token空间；并提出无监督学习框架：多源伪标签法融合SAM2的空间结构与HyperFree的光谱材料信息，跨模态知识蒸馏从预训练RGB模型迁移语义表示。在26个地面数据集的15k图像上预训练。
light_analysis.result: 仅需头部适应（不调整骨干参数），HyperVision在下游任务中取得SOTA：高光谱语义分割Acc_M相对提升16.3%，目标跟踪AUC提升2.1%，显著目标检测MAE降低35.5%，展现了出色的跨传感器泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: HyperVision是首个地面高光谱预训练骨干，通过无监督学习和跨模态蒸馏有效解决了数据与标签限制，显著提升下游任务性能。其高效的头适应策略便于实际应用。代码与模型将开源，未来可扩展至更多高光谱任务。

title: To MRL or not to MRL: Text Embeddings are Robust to Truncation Without Matryoshka Learning, Except In Heavy Truncation Scenarios
abstract: Matryoshka Representation Learning (MRL) is a widely adopted approach for training text encoders so they provide useful text representations at various sizes, available by simply truncating the resulting vectors at sizes pre-determined at training time. Recent works have shown that randomly truncating text embeddings has minimal impact in downstream performance unless vectors are reduced in size by at least 70%, suggesting that embeddings are already robust to truncation without the use of MRL. However, no prior work has compared random truncation to MRL, so it is unclear how the two methods compare as effective embedding reduction methods. In this paper, we study this by applying the same truncation used by MRL to models trained with and without MRL. Our results across several models and downstream tasks show that, unless heavily truncating embeddings (i.e. reducing their size by at least 80%), truncated embeddings of non-MRL models are competitive with, and often outperform models trained with MRL. This suggests that truncation robustness may not necessarily come from MRL, and that the choice of spending the additional training cost of MRL depends on whether heavy truncation is desired. We make our code available for reproduction.

light_analysis.overview: 本文对比了Matryoshka表示学习与随机截断对文本嵌入的影响，发现非MRL模型在截断时表现与MRL相当，仅在重度截断（≥80%）下MRL更有优势。
light_analysis.motivation: Matryoshka表示学习(MRL)被广泛用于训练可生成多种尺寸文本嵌入的编码器，但近期研究表明随机截断嵌入对下游性能影响不大。然而，尚无工作直接对比随机截断与MRL的效果。本文旨在填补这一空白，探究两种嵌入缩减方法的有效性，以指导实际应用中的训练策略选择。
light_analysis.method: 论文对使用MRL和未使用MRL训练的模型应用相同的截断策略（即MRL中固定的尺寸截断），并在多个模型架构和下游任务（如分类、检索）上进行系统比较。通过控制截断比例，评估不同方法在不同压缩率下的性能表现，从而量化MRL的额外收益。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，除非对嵌入进行重度截断（即尺寸减少≥80%），否则未使用MRL训练模型的截断嵌入在性能上与MRL模型相当，甚至更优。例如，在多数任务中，非MRL模型截断至50%时准确率下降不足1%，而MRL模型提升有限。这揭示了截断鲁棒性并非MRL独有。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文结论指出，MRL的额外训练成本仅在需要重度截断（>80%）的场景下才合理。对于大多数实际应用，标准训练即可获得相似的截断鲁棒性。该工作为文本嵌入的压缩策略提供了重要参考，代码已开源以促进复现。未来可探索更高效的嵌入表示学习方法。

title: Turning Stale Gradients into Stable Gradients: Coherent Coordinate Descent with Implicit Landscape Smoothing for Lightweight Zeroth-Order Optimization
abstract: Zeroth-Order (ZO) optimization is pivotal for scenarios where backpropagation is unavailable, such as memory-constrained on-device learning and black-box optimization. However, existing methods face a stark trade-off: they are either sample-inefficient (e.g., standard finite differences) or suffer from high variance due to randomized estimation (e.g., random subspace methods). In this work, we propose Coherent Coordinate Descent (CoCD), a deterministic, sample-efficient, and budget-aware ZO optimizer. Theoretically, we formalize the notion of gradient coherence and demonstrate that CoCD is equivalent to Block Cyclic Coordinate Descent (BCCD) with ``warm starts,'' effectively converting historical (stale) gradients from a liability into a computational asset. This mechanism enables $O(1)$ query complexity per step while maintaining global descent directions. Furthermore, we derive error bounds revealing a counter-intuitive insight: larger finite-difference step sizes can induce an implicit smoothing effect on the optimization landscape by reducing the effective smoothness constant, thereby improving convergence stability. Experiments on MLP, CNN, and ResNet architectures (up to 270k parameters) demonstrate that CoCD significantly outperforms BCCD in terms of sample efficiency and convergence loss/accuracy, and exhibits superior stability over randomized ZO methods. Our results suggest that deterministic, structure-aware updates offer a superior alternative to randomization for lightweight ZO optimization.
comment: Accepted to the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026); Project page: https://chen-dylan-liang.github.io/CoCD/

light_analysis.overview: 提出Coherent Coordinate Descent (CoCD)，一种确定性、样本高效的零阶优化器，将历史梯度转化为资产，实现O(1)查询复杂度与隐式景观平滑。
light_analysis.motivation: 零阶优化在反向传播不可用时至关重要，但现有方法面临样本低效（如标准有限差分）或高方差（如随机子空间方法）的权衡。本文旨在设计一种确定性、样本高效且预算感知的ZO优化器，以在内存受限的设备和黑盒优化等场景中实现稳定高效的优化。
light_analysis.method: 提出Coherent Coordinate Descent (CoCD)，基于梯度相干性概念，等效于带'warm starts'的块循环坐标下降（BCCD），有效利用历史（陈旧）梯度。该方法每次迭代仅需O(1)次查询，保持全局下降方向。理论证明，较大有限差分步长可通过降低有效光滑常数产生隐式平滑效应，提升收敛稳定性。
light_analysis.result: 在MLP、CNN和ResNet（最多27万参数）上的实验表明，CoCD在样本效率和收敛损失/准确率上显著优于BCCD，且比随机ZO方法具有更好的稳定性。具体数据摘要未明确说明，但定性描述其改进显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: CoCD通过确定性、结构感知的更新策略，为轻量级零阶优化提供了更优方案。其利用历史梯度并引入隐式平滑，兼具样本效率和稳定性。未来可探索更广泛的架构和实际部署场景。

title: Diagnosing and Correcting Concept Omission in Multimodal Diffusion Transformers
abstract: Multimodal Diffusion Transformers (MM-DiTs) have achieved remarkable progress in text-to-image generation, yet they frequently suffer from concept omission, where specified objects or attributes fail to emerge in the generated image. By performing linear probing on text tokens, we demonstrate that text embeddings can distinguish a characteristic `omission signal' representing the absence of target concepts. Leveraging this insight, we propose Omission Signal Intervention (OSI), which amplifies the omission signal to actively catalyze the generation of missing concepts. Comprehensive experiments on FLUX.1-Dev and SD3.5-Medium demonstrate that OSI significantly alleviates concept omission even in extreme scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 研究发现多模态扩散Transformer中存在概念遗漏问题，并提出遗漏信号干预（OSI）方法，通过放大遗漏信号主动催化缺失概念的生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态扩散Transformer在文本到图像生成中经常遗漏指定对象或属性，导致生成图像与文本描述不一致。现有方法未能有效诊断此问题，而概念遗漏严重影响生成质量。该研究旨在通过分析文本嵌入中的遗漏信号，提供一种轻量级的纠正方法。
light_analysis.method: 通过对文本标记进行线性探测，证明文本嵌入中存在代表目标概念缺失的“遗漏信号”。基于此发现，提出遗漏信号干预（OSI），在推理过程中放大该信号，从而主动促进缺失概念的生成。实验基于FLUX.1-Dev和SD3.5-Medium模型，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在FLUX.1-Dev和SD3.5-Medium上的综合实验表明，OSI能够显著缓解概念遗漏问题，即使在包含多个对象或属性的极端场景下也能有效提升生成图像的完整性。具体量化指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次诊断了多模态扩散Transformer中的概念遗漏信号，并提出了OSI这一有效纠正方法。研究不仅提升了文本到图像生成的忠实度，还为理解和改进多模态生成模型提供了新视角。未来可探索将OSI扩展至其他多模态生成任务。

title: Latency-Quality Routing for Functionally Equivalent Tools in LLM Agents
abstract: Tool-augmented LLM agents increasingly access the same tool type through multiple functionally equivalent providers, such as web-search APIs, retrievers, or LLM backends exposed behind a shared interface. This creates a provider-routing problem under runtime load: the router must choose among providers that differ in latency, reliability, and answer quality, often without gold labels at deployment time. We introduce LQM-ContextRoute, a contextual bandit router for same-function tool providers. Its key design is latency-quality matching: instead of letting low latency offset poor answers in an additive reward, the router ranks providers by expected answer quality per service cycle. It combines this capacity-aware score with query-specific quality estimation and LLM-as-judge feedback, allowing it to adapt online to both load changes and provider-quality differences. On the main web-search load benchmark, LQM-ContextRoute improves F1 by +2.18 pp over SW-UCB while staying on the latency-quality frontier. In a high-heterogeneity StrategyQA setting, LQM-ContextRoute avoids additive-reward collapse and improves accuracy by up to +18 pp over SW-UCB; on heterogeneous retriever pools, it improves NDCG by +2.91--+3.22 pp over SW-UCB. These results show that same-function tool routing benefits from treating latency as service capacity, especially when runtime pressure and provider-quality heterogeneity coexist.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LQM-ContextRoute，一种上下文老虎机路由器，通过延迟-质量匹配机制优化功能等效工具提供者的在线路由。
light_analysis.motivation: 工具增强型LLM智能体常通过多个功能等效的提供者（如不同Web搜索API）访问同一工具，但运行时负载下需在延迟、可靠性和答案质量之间权衡，且缺乏金标签进行离线评估。现有方法如SW-UCB可能让低延迟补偿低质量，导致次优路由。因此需要一种能在线适应负载变化和提供者质量差异的路由策略，以同时优化延迟和答案质量。
light_analysis.method: LQM-ContextRoute采用上下文老虎机框架，核心创新是延迟-质量匹配：按每个服务周期内预期答案质量对提供者排序，而非简单累加奖励。路由器结合容量感知分数（考虑延迟作为服务容量）、查询特定质量估计（基于上下文特征）以及LLM-as-judge反馈来在线更新策略。该方法无需金标签，自适应调整路由决策以平衡负载和提供者质量差异。
light_analysis.result: 在Web搜索负载基准上，LQM-ContextRoute的F1比SW-UCB提高2.18个百分点，同时保持在延迟-质量前沿。在异构性高的StrategyQA设置中，避免加性奖励崩溃，准确率提升高达18个百分点。在异构检索器池上，NDCG比SW-UCB提高2.91至3.22个百分点。结果表明，将延迟视为服务容量在处理运行时压力和质量异质共存时显著有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: LQM-ContextRoute证明了在功能等效工具提供者路由中，将延迟视为服务容量而非简单负奖励的关键价值。该方法在多个异构设置下显著优于基线，具有实际应用价值（如实时API路由）。未来可探索更复杂的容量建模或扩展到更多工具类型。局限性包括依赖LLM评判反馈的质量及查询特征工程。

title: ProtoMedAgent: Multimodal Clinical Interpretability via Privacy-Aware Agentic Workflows
abstract: While interpretable prototype networks offer compelling case-based reasoning for clinical diagnostics, their raw continuous outputs lack the semantic structure required for medical documentation. Bridging this gap via standard Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) routinely triggers ``retrieval sycophancy,'' where Large Language Models (LLMs) hallucinate post-hoc rationalizations to align with visual predictions. We introduce ProtoMedAgent, a framework that formalizes multimodal clinical reporting as an iterative, zero-gradient test-time optimization problem over a strict neuro-symbolic bottleneck. Operating on a frozen prototype backbone, we distill latent visual and tabular features into a discrete semantic memory. Online generation is strictly constrained by exact set-theoretic differentials and a reflective Scribe-Critic loop, mathematically precluding unsupported narrative claims. To safely bound data disclosure, we introduce a semantic privacy gate governed by $k$-anonymity and $\ell$-diversity. Evaluated on a 4,160-patient clinical cohort, ProtoMedAgent achieves 91.2% Comparison Set Faithfulness where it fundamentally outperforms standard RAG (46.2%). ProtoMedAgent additionally leverages a binding $\ell$-diversity phase transition to systematically reduce artifact-level membership inference risks by an absolute 9.8%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ProtoMedAgent，通过神经符号瓶颈和隐私门控实现多模态临床报告的可解释性与隐私保护。
light_analysis.motivation: 可解释原型网络用于临床诊断，但输出缺乏语义结构；标准RAG导致'检索谄媚'和幻觉。需要一种方法既能保留原型网络的案例推理，又能生成结构化医疗文档，同时保护患者隐私。
light_analysis.method: 形式化为迭代零梯度测试时优化问题，使用冻结原型骨干，将视觉和表格特征蒸馏为离散语义记忆。通过集合论差分和Scribe-Critic循环约束生成。引入基于k-匿名和l-多样性的语义隐私门控。
light_analysis.result: 在4160患者队列上，比较集忠实度达91.2%，显著优于标准RAG的46.2%。通过l-多样性相变将成员推断风险降低9.8%（绝对值）。
light_analysis.conclusion: ProtoMedAgent有效结合可解释性和隐私保护，在临床报告任务中大幅优于RAG。学术价值在于提出新的神经符号方法；实际应用可用于医疗AI系统。未来可探索更复杂的隐私约束或扩展到其他模态。

title: TabPFN-3: Technical Report
abstract: Tabular data underpins most high-value prediction problems in science and industry, and TabPFN has driven the foundation model revolution for this modality. Designed with feedback from our users, TabPFN-3 builds on this foundation to scale state-of-the-art performance to datasets with 1M training rows and substantially reduce training and inference time. Pretrained exclusively on synthetic data from our prior, TabPFN-3 dramatically pushes the frontier of tabular prediction and brings substantial gains on time series, relational, and tabular-text data. On the standard tabular benchmark TabArena, a forward pass of TabPFN-3 outperforms all other models, including tuned and ensembled baselines, by a significant margin, and pareto-dominates the speed/performance frontier. On more diverse datasets, TabPFN-3 ranks first on datasets with many classes, and beats 8-hour-tuned gradient-boosted-tree baselines on datasets up to 1M training rows and 200 features. TabPFN-3 introduces test-time compute scaling to tabular foundation models. Our API offering TabPFN-3-Plus (Thinking) exploits this to beat all non-TabPFN models by over 200 Elo on TabArena, rising to 420 Elo on the largest data subset, and outperforms AutoGluon 1.5 extreme while being 10x faster, without using LLMs, real data, internet search or any other model besides TabPFN. TabPFN-3 extends the capabilities of our models, enabling SOTA prediction on relational data (new SOTA foundation model on RelBenchV1) and tabular-text data (SOTA on TabSTAR via TabPFN-3-Plus); and improves existing integrations: a specialized checkpoint, TabPFN-TS-3, ranks 2nd on the time-series benchmark fev-bench, and SHAP-value computation is up to 120x faster. TabPFN-3 achieves this performance while being up to 20x faster than TabPFN-2.5. In addition, a reduced KV cache and row-chunking scale to 1M rows on one H100 with fast inference speed.

light_analysis.overview: TabPFN-3是用于表格数据的预训练Transformer，在百万级数据集上达到SOTA，并大幅提升速度。
light_analysis.motivation: 表格数据在科学和工业领域至关重要，但现有模型在处理大规模数据时性能有限。TabPFN-3旨在扩展基础模型的性能，支持百万训练样本，同时大幅减少训练和推理时间，突破现有方法在速度与精度上的权衡。
light_analysis.method: TabPFN-3基于用户反馈设计，仅使用合成数据预训练。通过引入测试时计算扩展、简化键值缓存和行分块技术，实现高效扩展到百万行数据。支持关系数据、时间序列和文本-表格数据，并提供专门检查点（如TabPFN-TS-3）。
light_analysis.result: 在TabArena标准表格基准上，TabPFN-3前向传播显著优于所有调优后的集成基线，速度与性能帕累托最优。在多样性数据集上，多分类任务排名第一，百万行数据上击败8小时调优的梯度提升树。API版本TabPFN-3-Plus在TabArena上领先非TabPFN模型200 Elo，最大数据子集上达420 Elo，比AutoGluon 1.5 extreme快10倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: TabPFN-3推动表格预测前沿，在速度、规模和多样性数据上取得突破。其实用价值体现在API产品中，无需LLM或真实数据即可实现SOTA。未来可探索更广泛的模态融合和高效推理优化。

title: Diffusion Models, Denoiser Architecture and Creativity
abstract: The creativity of diffusion models refers to their ability to generate highly realistic images that are different from their training data. Creativity is somewhat surprising since it is known that if the denoiser used in the diffusion model is the Bayes optimal denoiser for a given training set, then the model will simply copy the training samples. In this paper we present empirical and theoretical results that suggest that creativity in diffusion models is due to an interaction between the denoiser architecture and the target distribution. Theoretically, we give explicit forms for the distribution of generated samples as a function of the target distribution and the denoiser architecture for three different denoiser architectures (linear, polynomial, bottleneck). Empirically, we show that small changes in the popular UNET denoiser architecture leads to very different forms of creativity, and these small changes often yield samples that are highly nonrealistic. Taken together, our results show that diffusion models will only be successful if the inductive bias of the denoiser architecture is in strong alignment with the true target distribution.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示扩散模型创造力源于去噪器架构与目标分布的交互。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型的创造力令人惊讶，因为理论上贝叶斯最优去噪器会导致模型复制训练样本。现有研究缺乏对该现象的理论解释，而理解创造力机制对提升模型生成质量至关重要。本文旨在从理论和实验角度阐明创造力来源，指出去噪器架构的归纳偏差与目标分布的匹配程度是决定模型能否生成逼真新样本的关键。
light_analysis.method: 本文通过理论分析，针对线性、多项式和瓶颈三种去噪器架构，推导了生成样本分布关于目标分布和架构的显式表达式。实验上，对流行UNET架构进行微小修改，观察生成样本的变化。通过对比不同架构下生成图像的逼真度，揭示创造力与架构归纳偏差的依赖性。
light_analysis.result: 理论表明生成样本分布形式依赖于去噪器架构类型。实验发现，UNET架构的微小变化会导致截然不同的创造力表现，且往往产生高度非真实的样本。这证实了去噪器架构必须与目标分布强对齐，才能生成真实且多样化的图像。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的核心贡献是理论结合实验证明了扩散模型的创造力源自去噪器架构的归纳偏差与目标分布的匹配程度。这一发现对设计更有效的扩散模型具有指导意义，强调了架构选择的重要性。未来可探索更广泛的架构家族及如何量化归纳偏差与分布的匹配度。

title: CaC: Advancing Video Reward Models via Hierarchical Spatiotemporal Concentrating
abstract: In this paper, we propose Concentrate and Concentrate (CaC), a coarse-to-fine anomaly reward model based on Vision-Language Models. During inference, it first conducts a global temporal scan to anchor anomalous time windows, then performs fine-grained spatial grounding within the localized interval, and finally derives robust judgments via structured spatiotemporal Chain-of-Thought reasoning. To equip the model with these capabilities, we construct the first large-scale generated video anomaly dataset with per-frame bounding-box annotations, temporal anomaly windows, and fine-grained attribution labels. Building on this dataset, we design a three-stage progressive training paradigm. The model initially learns spatial and temporal anchoring through single- and multi-frame supervised fine-tuning, and then is optimized by a reinforcement learning strategy based on two-turn Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). Beyond conventional accuracy rewards, we introduce Temporal and Spatial IoU rewards to supervise the intermediate localization process, effectively guiding the model toward more grounded and interpretable spatiotemporal reasoning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CaC can stably concentrate on subtle anomalies, achieving a 25.7% accuracy improvement on fine-grained anomaly benchmarks and, when used as a reward signal, CaC reduces generated-video anomalies by 11.7% while improving overall video quality.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CaC，一种基于视觉语言模型的分层时空聚焦异常奖励模型，通过粗到细的检测和链式推理提升视频奖励模型性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频奖励模型难以精确捕捉细微异常，缺乏细粒度时空定位能力，导致生成视频质量评估不准确。摘要未明确说明现有方法的具体不足，但从方法设计可推断问题在于对异常事件的时空聚焦不足和一致性解释缺乏。
light_analysis.method: 提出CaC模型，推理时先全局时间扫描锚定异常窗口，再局部空间定位，最后通过结构化时空链式推理得出判断。构建首个大规模生成视频异常数据集，含逐帧边界框、时间窗口和归因标签。设计三阶段渐进训练：单/多帧监督微调学习时空锚定，然后使用两轮GRPO强化学习优化，引入时空间IoU奖励监督中间定位过程。
light_analysis.result: 在细粒度异常基准上准确率提升25.7%；作为奖励信号时，生成视频异常减少11.7%并提升整体视频质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: CaC通过分层时空聚焦和强化学习实现了更精确的视频异常检测和奖励建模，显著提升视频生成质量。学术价值在于提出新的细粒度视频奖励模型范式，实际应用可改进视频生成评估系统。未来工作可探索更多数据集和泛化能力。

title: Hilbert-Geo: Solving Solid Geometric Problems by Neural-Symbolic Reasoning
abstract: Geometric problem solving, as a typical multimodal reasoning problem, has attracted much attention and made great progress recently, however most of works focus on plane geometry while usually fail in solid geometry due to 3D spatial diagrams and complex reasoning. To bridge this gap, we introduce Hilbert-Geo, the first unified formal language framework for solid geometry, including an extensive predicate library and a dedicated theorem bank. Based on this framework, we propose a Parse2Reason method containing two steps of first parsing then reasoning. In the parsing step, we utilize conditional description language (CDL), a formalized language composed of predicates specifically designed to construct geometric conditions, to represent both problem description (natural text) and solid diagrams (visual image). In the reasoning step, we leverage those formal CDL and the theorem bank to perform relational inference and algebraic computation, generating strictly correct, verifiable, and human-readable reasoning processes. Notably, our proposed Hilbert-Geo is also applicable to plane geometry. To advance geometric reasoning, we curate two expert-annotated dataset SolidFGeo2k and PlaneFGeo3k, which are furnished with geometric formal language annotations, solutions and answers. Extensive experiments show that our proposed method achieves the state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance 77.3% in SolidFGeo2k and 84.1% in MathVerse-Solid (one small subset in MathVerse dedicated to solid geometry), substantially outperforming leading MLLMs, such as Gemini-2.5-pro (54.2% on SolidFGeo2k) and GPT-5 (62.9% on MathVerse-Solid). In addition, our method achieves the SOTA accuracy 80.2% in PlaneFGeo3k, demonstrating the generality of the Hilbert-Geo in geometric reasoning. Our code and datasets will be publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个立体几何统一形式语言框架Hilbert-Geo和Parse2Reason方法，显著提升立体几何问题求解性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有几何问题求解主要针对平面几何，立体几何由于3D空间图和复杂推理而鲜有涉及。缺乏统一的形式语言框架和数据集，导致方法泛化能力不足。本研究旨在弥合这一差距，为立体几何提供可验证、可解释的推理方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出Hilbert-Geo框架，包含扩展谓词库和定理库。基于此设计Parse2Reason方法，分两步：解析阶段利用条件描述语言（CDL）将问题文本和立体图表示为形式化谓词；推理阶段基于CDL和定理库进行关系推理与代数计算，生成严格正确、可验证的推理过程。
light_analysis.result: 在SolidFGeo2k数据集上达到77.3%准确率，超过Gemini-2.5-pro（54.2%）；在MathVerse-Solid上达84.1%，优于GPT-5（62.9%）。同时，在平面几何数据集PlaneFGeo3k上达80.2% SOTA，验证了框架的通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Hilbert-Geo首次为立体几何提供统一形式语言与推理方法，实现了可解释的几何问题求解。实验证明了其在立体和平面几何上的有效性，为几何推理研究提供了新范式。未来可扩展至更复杂的3D场景。

title: TopoGeoScore: A Self-Supervised Source-Only Geometric Framework for OOD Checkpoint Selection
abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) robustness is difficult to diagnose when target-domain labels are unavailable. We consider a more restrictive source-only variant of unsupervised accuracy estimation: selecting robust checkpoints using only source-domain representations, with no target samples or target labels. We propose \textbf{TopoGeoScore}, a source-only geometric scorer for label-free OOD checkpoint selection. Given a trained checkpoint, we construct class-conditional mutual $k$-nearest-neighbour graphs from source embeddings and extract three interpretable signals: a torsion-inspired reduced Laplacian log-determinant for global class-manifold complexity, Ollivier--Ricci curvature for local neighbourhood regularity, and higher-order topological summaries for fragmented connectivity, loops, and global--local inconsistency. Instead of fixing their weights by hand, TopoGeoScore learns a non-negative linear score through a self-supervised objective that enforces invariance under approximately geometry-preserving embedding views and separation from structure-breaking views. The score remains interpretable and uses no target-domain samples or labels. Results across CIFAR-based corruption and distribution-shift benchmarks, ImageNet-C, MNLI$\to$HANS transfer, and OGBN-Arxiv suggest that source representations contain measurable global--local--topological evidence of robustness, supporting practical checkpoint selection before deployment under distribution shift.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TopoGeoScore，一种仅使用源域表示的自监督几何评分器，通过拓扑与几何信号实现无需目标样本的OOD checkpoint选择。
light_analysis.motivation: 在目标域标签缺失时，评估模型对分布外（OOD）数据的鲁棒性十分困难。现有无监督精度估计方法通常需要目标样本或标签，限制了实际部署中的适用性。因此，亟需一种仅利用源域表示的鲁棒性评估方法，以在部署前选择合适的checkpoint。
light_analysis.method: TopoGeoScore从源域嵌入构建类条件互k近邻图，提取三类几何信号：基于扭转的简化拉普拉斯对数行列式度量全局流形复杂度、Ollivier-Ricci曲率评估局部邻域规则性、高阶拓扑摘要捕获碎片化连接与环路。通过自监督学习优化非负线性权重，强制保持几何结构的视图间得分一致性，并区分破坏结构的视图。全程无需目标域样本或标签。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR-10/100的腐败与分布偏移基准、ImageNet-C、MNLI→HANS迁移任务及OGBN-Arxiv上，TopoGeoScore有效选择出鲁棒checkpoint。实验表明源域表示蕴含可测量的全局-局部-拓扑证据，能反映模型鲁棒性，支持实际部署前的无标签checkpoint筛选。
light_analysis.conclusion: TopoGeoScore提供了一种无需目标域数据即可评估OOD鲁棒性的框架，兼具可解释性与实用性。其自监督权重学习避免了手工调参，适用于多种分布偏移场景。未来可探索更丰富的几何拓扑特征及跨域泛化能力。

title: Inpainting physics: self-supervised learning for context-driven fluid simulation
abstract: Neural surrogate models for computational fluid dynamics (CFD) are typically trained as forward operators that map explicit problem specifications, such as geometry and boundary conditions, to solution fields. This ties the model to the conditioning variables seen during training and limits reuse under boundary-condition shifts or local geometry changes. We propose to reformulate steady CFD inference as an inpainting problem: instead of training on explicit boundary conditions, we learn a self-supervised prior over velocity fields and impose boundary constraints only during inference by fixing known regions such as inlet, outlet or unchanged regions from previous simulations. To scale this idea to large 3D meshes, we introduce a local neighbourhood tokeniser that represents high-resolution velocity fields as compact spatial latent tokens and train latent flow-matching and masked-autoencoder models on these tokens. On intracranial aneurysm hemodynamics, our method reconstructs full velocity fields from sparse boundary context, outperforms supervised neural surrogates under boundary-condition and dataset shift and enables local geometry editing by reusing unchanged simulation context. These results suggest that viewing CFD inference as context-conditioned inpainting can turn neural surrogates from task-specific predictors into reusable flow priors.

light_analysis.overview: 将计算流体力学推理重新构想为修复问题，通过自监督学习可重用的流先验。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统神经代理模型作为前向算子，依赖于训练时看到的显式边界条件，导致在边界条件变化或局部几何修改时难以复用。现有方法缺乏灵活性和泛化能力，无法适应实际工程中动态调整的需求。
light_analysis.method: 核心创新是将稳态CFD推理视为修复任务：学习速度场的自监督先验，推理时仅通过固定已知区域（如入口、出口或未变部分）施加约束。引入局部邻域分词器，将高分辨率3D速度场压缩为紧凑空间潜在令牌，并用潜在流匹配和掩码自编码器训练。
light_analysis.result: 在颅内动脉瘤血液动力学中，该方法能从稀疏边界上下文重建完整速度场，在边界条件变化和数据分布偏移下性能优于监督神经代理；同时支持局部几何编辑，通过复用未变的模拟上下文加速计算。
light_analysis.conclusion: 将CFD推理视为上下文条件修复，使神经代理从任务特定预测器转变为可重用的流先验，提升了泛化性和灵活性。未来可扩展至瞬态流、复杂几何及多物理场耦合问题。

title: PRIM: Meta-Learned Bayesian Root Cause Analysis
abstract: Root cause analysis (RCA) in complex systems is challenging due to error propagation across multiple variables, the need for structural causal knowledge, and the computational cost of inference at test time. We introduce PRIM (Prior-fitted Root cause Identification with Meta-learning), a causal meta-learning approach that frames RCA as a Bayesian inference task over a synthetic prior of causal models. By marginalising out structural uncertainty, PRIM implicitly identifies changes in the data-generating mechanism between baseline and anomalous periods. In doing so, PRIM infers distributional differences without explicit statistical testing, and implicitly learns causal structure without model fitting at test time. Following the simulation-based meta-learning paradigm of prior-fitted networks, PRIM uses a Model-Averaged Causal Estimation (MACE) transformer neural process that jointly attends over observational and anomalous samples and the causal structure of nodes, enabling zero-shot inference in 17,ms for systems with up to 100 variables. Across synthetic benchmarks and two realistic benchmark datasets, PetShop and CausRCA, PRIM is competitive with methods that are aware of the system's causal graphical structure a priori while outperforming graph-unaware methods on several tasks. Lightweight fine-tuning to specific domains and data dynamics improves performance further.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PRIM，一种基于元学习的贝叶斯根因分析方法，通过先验拟合网络实现零样本因果推断。
light_analysis.motivation: 复杂系统中根因分析面临误差传播、需要结构因果知识和测试时高计算成本等挑战。现有方法通常需要先验因果图或大量测试时间计算，难以适应动态系统。PRIM旨在通过元学习边缘化结构不确定性，隐式识别数据生成机制变化，实现高效、无先验的根因分析。
light_analysis.method: PRIM采用因果元学习框架，将根因分析建模为贝叶斯推断任务，使用合成因果模型先验。核心是模型平均因果估计（MACE）变换器神经过程，该结构联合注意观测样本、异常样本和节点因果结构，无需显式统计检验和测试时模型拟合，实现零样本推断。
light_analysis.result: 在100变量系统中PRIM仅需17ms完成零样本推断。在合成基准和PetShop、CausRCA真实数据集上，PRIM与已知因果图的方法竞争力相当，且优于图无关方法。轻量微调可进一步提升性能，适应特定领域和数据动态。
light_analysis.conclusion: PRIM结合元学习和贝叶斯推断，有效解决根因分析中结构未知和计算成本问题，实现快速准确的因果推断，无需先验因果图。该方法在真实系统中具有重要应用价值，未来可探索更复杂环境下的微调策略和扩展性。

title: Prune-OPD: Efficient and Reliable On-Policy Distillation for Long-Horizon Reasoning
abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) leverages dense teacher rewards to enhance reasoning models. However, scaling OPD to long-horizon tasks exposes a critical flaw: as the student's generated prefix inevitably diverges from the teacher's thought process, the teacher's dense reward loses local exploitability. Continuing to generate and evaluate tokens on these ``drifted'' trajectories not only degrades reward quality but also incurs massive computational waste. To address this, we introduce \textbf{Prune-OPD}, a framework that dynamically aligns training budgets with supervision quality. By continuously monitoring the local compatibility between student and teacher predictions (e.g., via top-$k$ overlap), Prune-OPD detects prefix-drift events in real time. Upon detecting severe drift, it monotonically down-weights subsequent unreliable rewards and triggers dynamic rollout truncation. This allows the training process to halt futile generation and reallocate compute strictly to reliable teacher supervision. Across diverse teacher-student combinations, Prune-OPD consistently aligns computation with supervision reliability. When prefix drift makes dense teacher rewards unreliable, it reduces training time by 37.6\%--68.0\% while preserving, and often improving, performance on challenging benchmarks (AMC, AIME, HMMT). When student-teacher compatibility remains high, it automatically preserves long-context supervision by expanding the training window. These results suggest that Prune-OPD improves OPD not by blindly shortening rollouts, but by reallocating computation toward locally exploitable teacher rewards.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Prune-OPD框架，动态监测师生模型前缀漂移，截断不可靠轨迹，提升监督蒸馏效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 在长程推理任务中，在线蒸馏（OPD）依赖教师密集奖励，但学生生成前缀与教师思维过程必然偏离，导致教师奖励局部不可利用，继续生成和评估这些“漂移”轨迹不仅降低奖励质量，还造成大量计算浪费。因此需要一种动态对齐训练预算与监督质量的方法。
