light_analysis.method: Prune-OPD通过持续监控学生和教师预测的局部兼容性（如top-k重叠），实时检测前缀漂移事件。一旦检测到严重漂移，单调降低后续不可靠奖励的权重，并触发动态轨迹截断，停止无效生成，将计算重分配给可靠的教师监督。该方法不盲目缩短轨迹，而是根据漂移程度自适应调整训练窗口。
light_analysis.result: 在多种师生模型组合上，Prune-OPD在发生前缀漂移时减少训练时间37.6%-68.0%，同时在AMC、AIME、HMMT等挑战基准上保持甚至提升性能。当师生兼容性高时，自动保留长上下文监督，扩展训练窗口，实现计算与监督可靠性的对齐。
light_analysis.conclusion: Prune-OPD通过动态截断和权重调整，改进在线蒸馏，使其更高效可靠。它通过将计算重新分配至局部可利用的教师奖励，而非盲目缩短序列，提升了长程推理任务的训练效率。未来可探索更精细的漂移检测指标或扩展到其他生成任务。

title: Order-Agnostic Autoregressive Modelling with Missing Data
abstract: Order-Agnostic autoregressive models have demonstrated strong performance in deep generative modeling, yet their use in settings with incomplete data remains largely unexplored. In this work, we reinterpret them through the lens of missing data. First, we show that their standard training procedure on fully observed data implicitly performs imputation under a missing completely at random mechanism, resulting in robust out-of-sample imputation performance in settings with high missingness. Second, we introduce the first principled framework for training them directly on incomplete datasets under general missingness mechanisms. Third, we leverage their amortized conditional density estimation to perform active information acquisition, i.e., sequentially selecting the most informative missing variables for downstream prediction or inference. Across a suite of real-world benchmarks, our Missingness-Aware Order-Agnostic Autoregressive Model (MO-ARM) consistently outperforms established imputation baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 重新解释顺序无关自回归模型在缺失数据下的隐式插补机制，提出可直接在不完整数据上训练的新框架MO-ARM，并用于主动信息获取。
light_analysis.motivation: 顺序无关自回归模型在深度生成建模中表现出色，但在数据不完整场景下的应用尚未被探索。现有方法通常依赖完全观测数据进行训练，无法有效处理缺失数据。本研究旨在填补这一空白，一方面揭示标准训练过程隐式执行随机缺失机制下的插补，另一方面建立通用框架以应对多种缺失机制，并利用模型的条件密度估计进行主动信息获取。
light_analysis.method: 提出Missingness-Aware Order-Autoregressive Model (MO-ARM)。首先证明标准训练在完全观测数据上隐式执行MCAR插补。其次，设计一个原则性框架，允许模型直接从不完整数据中训练，适用于一般缺失机制。最后，利用模型的摊销条件密度估计，顺序选择最具信息量的缺失变量用于下游预测。该框架统一了插补和主动学习。
light_analysis.result: 在多个真实世界基准数据集上，MO-ARM在插补性能上一致优于已有的插补基线方法。结果验证了模型在不同缺失率下的鲁棒性，尤其在高缺失率下表现突出。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但强调了其优于基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究揭示了顺序无关自回归模型在缺失数据下的隐式插补能力，并提出了一个统一框架直接从不完整数据中学习。该工作具有重要学术价值，为深度生成模型处理缺失数据提供了新视角，实际应用上可改进数据缺失场景下的推理和主动采样。未来可进一步扩展到更复杂的缺失机制和更大规模模型。

title: Uncertainty Estimation via Hyperspherical Confidence Mapping
abstract: Quantifying uncertainty in neural network predictions is essential for high-stakes domains such as autonomous driving, healthcare, and manufacturing. While existing approaches often depend on costly sampling or restrictive distributional assumptions, we propose Hyperspherical Confidence Mapping (HCM), a simple yet principled framework for sampling-free and distribution-free uncertainty estimation. HCM decomposes outputs into a magnitude and a normalized direction vector constrained to lie on the unit hypersphere, enabling a novel interpretation of uncertainty as the degree of violation of this geometric constraint. This yields deterministic and interpretable estimates applicable to both regression and classification. Experiments across diverse benchmarks and real-world industrial tasks demonstrate that HCM matches or surpasses ensemble and evidential approaches, with far lower inference cost and stronger confidence-error alignment. Our results highlight the power of geometric structure in uncertainty estimation and position HCM as a versatile alternative to conventional techniques.
comment: Accepted at ICLR 2026. 24 pages, 7 figures, including appendix. Updated references

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于超球面几何约束的确定性不确定性估计方法HCM，无需采样和分布假设。
light_analysis.motivation: 高安全领域对神经网络的不确定性量化需求迫切，但现有方法如集成或证据方法依赖于大量采样或严格的分布假设，计算成本高且灵活性差。为此，本文旨在设计一种无需采样和分布假设的确定性方法，在保持低推理成本的同时提供可靠的不确定性估计。
light_analysis.method: HCM将网络输出分解为幅度和归一化方向向量，并将后者约束在单位超球面上。不确定性被解释为对该几何约束的违逆程度，从而得到确定性的解析估计。该方法无需采样，不依赖特定分布假设，可直接用于回归和分类任务，结构简洁且可解释。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集和实际工业任务中，HCM的不确定性估计性能与集成方法和证据方法相当或更优，同时推理成本显著降低，置信度与错误率的对齐更强。实验未提供具体数值，但定性表明HCM在效率和校准方面具有竞争优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: HCM通过挖掘输出的几何结构，提供了一种通用、高效的不确定性估计方案，避免了传统方法的采样和分布假设限制。该工作展示了几何先验在不确定性量化中的潜力，为高风险场景下的可靠AI提供了新思路，但未探讨对复杂分布外检测的适应性。

title: Stable-GFlowNet: Toward Diverse and Robust LLM Red-Teaming via Contrastive Trajectory Balance
abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) Red-Teaming, which proactively identifies vulnerabilities of LLMs, is an essential process for ensuring safety. Finding effective and diverse attacks in red-teaming is important, but achieving both is challenging. Generative Flow Networks (GFNs) that perform distribution matching are a promising methods, but they are notorious for training instability and mode collapse. In particular, unstable rewards in red-teaming accelerate mode collapse. We propose Stable-GFN (S-GFN), which eliminates partition function $Z$ estimation in GFN and reduces training instability. S-GFN avoids Z-estimation through pairwise comparisons and employs a robust masking methodology against noisy rewards. Additionally, we propose a fluency stabilizer to prevent the model from getting stuck in local optima that produce gibberish. S-GFN provides more stable training while maintaining the optimal policy of GFN. We demonstrate the overwhelming attack performance and diversity of S-GFN across various settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Stable-GFN，通过对比轨迹平衡实现稳定训练，同时提升LLM红队测试的攻击多样性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM红队测试旨在主动识别模型漏洞，但现有方法难以同时实现攻击的有效性和多样性。生成流网络（GFN）虽能进行分布匹配，却存在训练不稳定和模式崩溃问题，尤其在红队测试中不稳定的奖励会加剧模式崩溃，亟需一种稳定且能生成多样化攻击的方法。
light_analysis.method: Stable-GFN通过成对比较消除配分函数Z的估计，降低训练不稳定性；采用鲁棒掩码方法应对噪声奖励；引入流畅性稳定器防止模型陷入生成无意义文本的局部最优。该方法保持GFN最优策略的同时提供更稳定的训练，无需改变基础架构。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，Stable-GFN在各种设置下均展现出压倒性的攻击性能和多样性，与现有方法相比在攻击有效性和多样性指标上显著提升，且训练过程更稳定，未出现模式崩溃或奖励波动问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: Stable-GFN通过消除配分函数估计和增强鲁棒性，有效解决了GFN在红队测试中的训练不稳定和模式崩溃问题，为LLM安全性评估提供了更可靠的工具。未来可进一步探索其在大规模模型和复杂攻击场景中的应用。

title: CompleteRXN: Toward Completing Open Chemical Reaction Databases
abstract: Chemical reaction datasets such as USPTO suffer from substantial incompleteness, frequently missing byproducts, co-reactants, and stoichiometric coefficients. This limits their applicability and reliability in downstream applications. Here, we introduce CompleteRXN, a large-scale supervised benchmark for reaction completion under realistic missing-data conditions. We construct a dataset of aligned incomplete and atom-balanced reactions by mapping USPTO records to curated mechanistic reactions. We evaluate representative baselines, including a novel encoder-decoder reaction completion model with constrained decoding, the Constrained Reaction Balancer (CRB), and a recent algorithmic method, SynRBL. On our CompleteRXN benchmark, the CRB achieves high performance across splits of increasing difficulty, reaching 99.20% equivalence accuracy on the random split and 91.12% on the extreme out-of-distribution split. SynRBL produces many balanced and chemically plausible completions, but with lower accuracy on the benchmark test splits. Across all methods, performance degrades with increasing incompleteness. We observe a substantial drop when evaluating on reactions outside the benchmark (full uncurated USPTO), highlighting the gap between benchmark performance and practical robustness and motivating future work.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CompleteRXN基准和约束反应平衡器(CRB)用于化学反应的完善，解决数据集不完整性问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有化学反数据集如USPTO经常缺失副产物、共反应物和化学计量系数，限制了在下游应用的可靠性和可用性。需要一种方法来自动完善这些不完整的反应，以提高数据集的实用性和建模能力。
light_analysis.method: 构建CompleteRXN基准，通过将USPTO记录映射到精心策划的机理反应，生成对齐的不完整和原子平衡的反应对。提出约束反应平衡器(CRB)，一种编码器-解码器模型，采用约束解码生成化学计量平衡的反应。还评估了SynRBL等基线方法。
light_analysis.result: CRB在随机分割上达到99.20%等价精度，在极端分布外分割上达到91.12%。SynRBL产生更多平衡的完善但准确率较低。所有方法性能随不完整性增加而下降。在未整理的USPTO上评估时，性能大幅下降。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出CompleteRXN基准和CRB模型，在基准测试中表现优异，但实际应用鲁棒性仍需改进。未来工作应关注缩小基准性能与实际场景差距，提升模型在真实不完整数据上的可靠性。

title: When 2D Tasks Meet 1D Serialization: On Serialization Friction in Structured Tasks
abstract: In the LLM era, many symbolic and structured problems are presented to models through 1D text serialization. Yet some such problems are natively two-dimensional: their relevant relations, such as row--column correspondence or spatial adjacency, are defined by position in a 2D layout rather than by sequential order. This raises a representational question: does preserving the same symbolic entries in a 1D sequence also preserve the relational structure needed for computation? We study this issue through the lens of serialization friction: the representational mismatch in which the same underlying task instances and entries are still present, but relations that depend on layout become implicit under 1D serialization. The study uses a controlled synthetic testbed of three tasks: matrix transpose, Conway's Game of Life, and LU decomposition. In each task, the same instances are presented either as 1D text serialization or as their native 2D layout rendered as an image. Across this testbed, 1D serialization degrades more sharply as task size grows, and errors under serialization exhibit spatially structured patterns, suggesting that this presentation choice is consequential within our testbed. To further interpret these results, we add supplementary analyses that include a within-visual probe and an additional comparison of the two input presentations under the mixed-training transpose setting. These findings suggest that, for layout-defined tasks, reducing inputs to 1D serialization is not a neutral choice of representation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出“序列化摩擦”概念，揭示1D序列化对2D布局任务并非中性表示，并通过合成实验验证其性能退化与错误模式。
light_analysis.motivation: 在LLM时代，结构化问题常通过1D文本序列化输入，但许多任务（如矩阵运算）本质是二维的，其关系依赖于布局而非顺序。现有方法忽视了这种表示不匹配可能带来的计算障碍，缺乏系统性研究来评估1D序列化对2D任务性能的影响。理解这一摩擦对于设计更有效的模型输入表示至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 使用三个合成任务（矩阵转置、康威生命游戏、LU分解）作为受控测试平台，每个任务实例分别以1D文本序列化和原生2D布局图像两种形式呈现。通过比较不同规模下的性能，并分析错误的空间结构，定义并测量序列化摩擦。补充分析包括视觉探测和混合训练设置，以进一步解释结果。
light_analysis.result: 在三个任务中，1D序列化均导致性能随任务规模增大而急剧下降，而2D图像输入保持较稳定的表现。错误分析显示，序列化下的错误呈现空间结构化模式（如局部邻域错误聚集），表明表示选择显著影响模型对布局关系的捕捉能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献：论证了对于布局定义的任务，1D序列化并非中性表示，会引入序列化摩擦导致性能损失。学术价值：为理解输入表示对结构化任务的影响提供了新视角。实际应用：提示设计LLM输入时应考虑任务的本征维度。潜在局限：研究基于合成任务，未来需扩展到更真实场景。

title: Beyond Chain-of-Thought: Rewrite as a Universal Interface for Generative Multimodal Embeddings
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have emerged as a promising foundation for universal multimodal embeddings. Recent studies have shown that reasoning-driven generative multimodal embeddings can outperform discriminative embeddings on several embedding tasks. However, Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning tends to generate redundant thinking steps and introduce semantic ambiguity in the summarized answers in broader retrieval scenarios. To address this limitation, we propose Rewrite-driven Multimodal Embedding (RIME), a unified framework that jointly optimizes generation and embedding through a retrieval-friendly rewrite. Meanwhile, we present the Cross-Mode Alignment (CMA) to bridge the generative and discriminative embedding spaces, enabling flexible mutual retrieval to trade off efficiency and accuracy. Based on this, we also introduce Refine Reinforcement Learning (Refine-RL) that treats discriminative embeddings as stable semantic anchors to guide the rewrite optimization. Extensive experiments on MMEB-V2, MRMR and UVRB demonstrate that RIME substantially outperforms prior generative embedding models while significantly reducing the length of thinking.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RIME框架，通过重写作为通用接口实现多模态生成嵌入，优于链式思维推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型（MLLM）作为通用多模态嵌入的基础具有前景。近期研究表明，推理驱动的生成式多模态嵌入在多个嵌入任务上优于判别式嵌入。然而，链式思维（CoT）推理容易生成冗余思考步骤，并在更广泛的检索场景中引入语义歧义。为此，需要一种更高效、语义清晰的生成式嵌入方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出RIME（重写驱动多模态嵌入）统一框架，通过检索友好的重写联合优化生成和嵌入。引入跨模态对齐（CMA）连接生成式和判别式嵌入空间，实现灵活的双向检索以权衡效率与准确性。基于此，提出Refine强化学习（Refine-RL），利用判别式嵌入作为稳定语义锚点引导重写优化。
light_analysis.result: 在MMEB-V2、MRMR和UVRB三个基准上，RIME显著超越先前的生成式嵌入模型，同时大幅减少思考长度。具体性能提升和效率改进在摘要中未提供数值，但明确表明优于先前方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: RIME通过重写机制有效解决链式思维冗余和语义歧义问题，实现了生成式多模态嵌入的高效优化。该方法在检索场景中具有显著优势，未来可探索更广泛的重写策略和跨模态对齐技术。

title: Causal Disentanglement-Inspired Degradation Representation Learning for Full-Reference Image Quality Assessment
abstract: Existing deep network-based full-reference image quality assessment (FR-IQA) models typically work by performing pairwise comparisons of deep features from the reference and distorted images. In this paper, we approach this problem from a different perspective and propose a novel FR-IQA paradigm based on causal inference and decoupled representation learning. Unlike typical feature comparison-based FR-IQA models, our approach formulates degradation estimation as a causal disentanglement process guided by intervention on latent representations. We first decouple degradation and content representations by exploiting the content invariance between the reference and distorted images. Second, inspired by the human visual masking effect, we design a masking module to model the causal relationship between image content and degradation features, thereby extracting content-influenced degradation features from distorted images. Finally, quality scores are predicted from these degradation features using either supervised regression or label-free dimensionality reduction. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves highly competitive performance on standard IQA benchmarks across fully supervised, few-label, and label-free settings. Furthermore, we evaluate the approach on diverse non-standard natural image domains with scarce data, including underwater, radiographic, medical, neutron, and screen-content images. Benefiting from its ability to perform scenario-specific training and prediction without labeled IQA data, our method exhibits superior cross-domain generalization compared to existing training-free FR-IQA models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出因果解耦退化表示学习的新范式，用于全参考图像质量评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有全参考图像质量评估（FR-IQA）模型大多基于参考和失真图像的深度特征比较，忽略了退化过程的因果结构。本文从因果推理和解耦表示学习角度出发，旨在通过显式建模退化与内容的因果关系，提升模型在有限标注甚至无标签场景下的泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出因果解耦退化表示学习框架：首先利用参考与失真图像的内容不变性解耦退化和内容表示；然后受人类视觉掩蔽效应启发，设计掩蔽模块建模内容对退化特征的因果影响，提取内容感知的退化特征；最后通过监督回归或无标签降维预测质量分数。
light_analysis.result: 在标准IQA基准（全监督、少标签、无标签设置）上取得有竞争力性能；在跨领域非标准图像（水下、射线、医学、中子、屏幕内容）上，无需标签即可进行场景特定训练和预测，跨域泛化能力优于现有无训练FR-IQA模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了基于因果解耦的FR-IQA新范式，通过分离退化和内容表示并建模因果掩蔽，有效提升了质量评估的泛化性和数据效率。未来可进一步探索更复杂的因果图或扩展到其他图像复原任务。

title: Accelerating trajectory optimization with Sobolev-trained diffusion policies
abstract: Trajectory Optimization (TO) solvers exploit known system dynamics to compute locally optimal trajectories through iterative improvements. A downside is that each new problem instance is solved independently; therefore, convergence speed and quality of the solution found depend on the initial trajectory proposed. To improve efficiency, a natural approach is to warm-start TO with initial guesses produced by a learned policy trained on trajectories previously generated by the solver. Diffusion-based policies have recently emerged as expressive imitation learning models, making them promising candidates for this role. Yet, a counterintuitive challenge comes from the local optimality of TO demonstrations: when a policy is rolled out, small non-optimal deviations may push it into situations not represented in the training data, triggering compounding errors over long horizons. In this work, we focus on learning-based warm-starting for gradient-based TO solvers that also provide feedback gains. Exploiting this specificity, we derive a first-order loss for Sobolev learning of diffusion-based policies using both trajectories and feedback gains. Through comprehensive experiments, we demonstrate that the resulting policy avoids compounding errors, and so can learn from very few trajectories to provide initial guesses reducing solving time by $2\times$ to $20 \times$. Incorporating first-order information enables predictions with fewer diffusion steps, reducing inference latency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Sobolev训练的扩散策略，利用梯度反馈加速轨迹优化热启动，显著减少求解时间。
light_analysis.motivation: 轨迹优化求解器每次独立求解新问题，收敛速度和解质量依赖初始猜测。学习策略热启动可提高效率，但扩散策略因演示的局部最优性，在小偏差下易引发长时域复合误差。本文利用梯度类求解器的反馈增益，旨在解决此问题。
light_analysis.method: 针对提供反馈增益的梯度类轨迹优化求解器，提出基于Sobolev学习的扩散策略训练方法。通过同时利用轨迹和反馈增益（一阶信息）推导新损失函数，使策略学习轨迹及其梯度，避免复合误差，并允许用更少扩散步数预测。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，训练策略能从极少轨迹中学习，初始猜测将求解时间减少2至20倍。利用一阶信息可减少扩散步骤，降低推理延迟，且无复合误差问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献在于将Sobolev学习引入扩散策略训练，利用TO求解器的反馈增益提升热启动效率与推理速度。该方法具有实际应用价值，可推广至其他梯度求解器。

title: Detecting Unknown Objects via Energy-based Separation for Open World Object Detection
abstract: In this work, we tackle the problem of Open World Object Detection (OWOD). This challenging scenario requires the detector to incrementally learn to classify known objects without forgetting while identifying unknown objects without supervision. Previous OWOD methods have enhanced the unknown discovery process and employed memory replay to mitigate catastrophic forgetting. However, since existing methods heavily rely on the detector's known class predictions for detecting unknown objects, they struggle to effectively learn and recognize unknown object representations. Moreover, while memory replay mitigates forgetting of old classes, it often sacrifices the knowledge of newly learned classes. To resolve these limitations, we propose DEUS (Detecting Unknowns via energy-based Separation), a novel framework that addresses the challenges of Open World Object Detection. DEUS consists of Equiangular Tight Frame (ETF)-Subspace Unknown Separation (EUS) and an Energy-based Known Distinction (EKD) loss. EUS leverages ETF-based geometric properties to create orthogonal subspaces, enabling cleaner separation between known and unknown object representations. Unlike prior energy-based approaches that consider only the known space, EUS utilizes energies from both spaces to better capture distinct patterns of unknown objects. Furthermore, EKD loss enforces the separation between previous and current classifiers, thus minimizing knowledge interference between previous and newly learned classes during memory replay. We thoroughly validate DEUS on OWOD benchmarks, demonstrating outstanding performance improvements in unknown detection while maintaining competitive known class performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DEUS框架，通过能量基分离和等角紧框架子空间实现开放世界目标检测中未知物体的有效检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 开放世界目标检测要求检测器增量学习已知类并识别未知对象，但现有方法依赖已知类预测检测未知对象，难以学习未知表示；记忆回放虽缓解遗忘，但常牺牲新学知识。需要更有效的未知分离和知识干扰减少方法。
light_analysis.method: DEUS包含等角紧框架（ETF）子空间未知分离（EUS）和能量基已知区分（EKD）损失。EUS利用ETF几何特性创建正交子空间，分离已知和未知表示，并使用两个空间的能量捕捉未知模式。EKD损失强制新旧分类器分离，减少记忆回放中的知识干扰。
light_analysis.result: 在OWOD基准上评估，DEUS在未知物体检测上取得显著性能提升，同时保持有竞争力的已知类性能。具体指标摘要未明确，但强调优于先前方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: DEUS通过能量基分离和子空间设计有效解决开放世界目标检测的未知检测和遗忘问题，具有学术价值。未来可探索更复杂的能量模型或扩展至其他开放世界任务。

title: MemCollab: Cross-Model Memory Collaboration via Contrastive Trajectory Distillation
abstract: LLM agents increasingly rely on memory mechanisms to reuse knowledge from past problem-solving experiences. However, existing methods typically construct memory for a single agent and reuse it with the same underlying model, tightly coupling stored knowledge to model-specific reasoning styles. In heterogeneous deployments, where agents may be instantiated with backbone models of different sizes, architectures, or specializations, this raises a key question: can a single memory system be shared across agents with different backbone models? We find that naive cross-model memory transfer can degrade performance, because stored memories often entangle task-relevant knowledge with model-specific biases. To address this challenge, we propose MemCollab, a collaborative memory framework that builds shared cross-model memory by contrasting reasoning trajectories generated by different model-based agents on the same task. Through this contrastive process, MemCollab distills abstract reasoning constraints that capture shared task-level invariants while suppressing model-specific artifacts. We further introduce a task-aware retrieval mechanism that conditions memory access on task category, ensuring that only relevant constraints are retrieved at inference time. Experiments on mathematical reasoning and code generation benchmarks show that MemCollab consistently improves both accuracy and inference-time efficiency across diverse agents, including settings with different model families. These results demonstrate that collaboratively constructed cross-model memory can serve as a shared reasoning resource for heterogeneous LLM-based agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MemCollab，通过对比轨迹蒸馏实现跨模型共享记忆的协作框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有记忆机制为单一模型构建，与模型推理风格耦合，导致异构部署（不同大小、架构的模型）中共享记忆时性能下降，因为记忆纠缠了任务知识与模型特定偏差。
light_analysis.method: MemCollab通过对比不同模型代理在同一任务上的推理轨迹，蒸馏出抽象推理约束，捕获任务级不变性并抑制模型特定伪影；同时引入任务感知检索机制，按类别访问约束。
light_analysis.result: 在数学推理和代码生成基准上，MemCollab一致提升了不同模型系列（如不同模型家族）的准确率和推理效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 表明协作构建的跨模型记忆可作为异构LLM代理的共享推理资源，提升多代理系统性能，具有学术和实用价值。

title: Getting to the Point: Pointing Improves LVLMs at Counting
abstract: Pointing-based methods decompose complex tasks as sequential grounding and reasoning steps. Given a query, the model first grounds the relevant objects by generating their coordinates, and then predicts an answer conditioned on these points. While this approach has been shown to increase the performance of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs), it remains unclear why and how it improves the models' visual reasoning. In this work, we evaluate pointing-based methods in the task of zero-shot counting in visual scenes. We experiment with multiple fine-tuning and training-free approaches on state-of-the-art LVLMs, and compare them with Point-then-Count (PtC), where models first generate point coordinates for the target objects and then predict their count. Our results show that PtC achieves the highest accuracy among the evaluated approaches, with predicted points correctly grounded in the image in more than 94% of cases (based on F1-score). Mechanistic analyses show that gains arise from spatial information encoded in the predicted coordinates. Nevertheless, grounding performance varies across image regions, revealing spatial biases. Finally, the results indicate that PtC improves out-of-distribution generalization on both synthetic and real data, suggesting the potential of coordinates to help LVLMs improve their counting skills.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Point-then-Count (PtC)方法，通过生成目标坐标预测数量，显著提升LVLMs零样本计数性能，并揭示坐标空间信息是性能改进的关键。
light_analysis.motivation: 指向性方法能提升LVLMs的视觉推理能力，但其作用机制尚不明确。本文聚焦于零样本计数任务，旨在探究指向方法为何以及如何改善模型性能，为理解视觉推理提供新视角。
light_analysis.method: 在多个SOTA LVLMs上比较多种微调和免训练方法，核心是PtC：模型先对目标对象生成点坐标，再基于坐标预测数量。通过F1-score评估接地质量，并进行机制分析，研究坐标空间信息的作用及空间偏差。
light_analysis.result: PtC在零样本计数中达到最高准确率，超过94%的预测点正确接地（基于F1-score）。机制分析表明，性能提升源于预测坐标编码的空间信息，但接地性能在不同图像区域存在偏差。PtC改善了合成和真实数据上的分布外泛化。
light_analysis.conclusion: PtC有效提升LVLMs的计数能力，揭示了坐标空间信息的关键作用，但存在空间偏差。该工作为理解指向性方法机制提供基础，未来可探索更鲁棒的接地策略以缓解偏差。

title: Path-Space Mirror Descent for On-Policy Reinforcement Learning under the Generalized Schrödinger Bridge
abstract: Classical on-policy algorithms such as PPO and mirror descent policy optimization provide stable proximal policy updates through tractable action likelihoods, but are typically instantiated with simple Gaussian policies whose expressiveness can be limited in complex continuous-control tasks. Generative policies based on diffusion and flow models provide more expressive action distributions, but they naturally define distributions over multi-step denoising paths whose terminal action density is often intractable, creating a mismatch with likelihood-based on-policy proximal updates. To address this mismatch, we introduce \textbf{GSB-MDPO} (\emph{Generalized Schrödinger Bridge Mirror Descent Policy Optimization}), which formulates on-policy generative policy optimization as a Generalized Schrödinger Bridge problem over state-conditioned generation paths and instantiates the resulting path-measure update through mirror descent policy optimization. The key insight is that the GSB path-space KL plays the role of the proximal term in MDPO while upper-bounding the terminal action KL, enabling direct control of the executed action distribution without explicit terminal action likelihood evaluation. Experiments on 14 continuous-control tasks across Playground and Gym-MuJoCo demonstrate the empirical effectiveness of GSB-MDPO and support path-space regularization as a principled proximal update for multi-step generative policies.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GSB-MDPO，将在线策略生成式策略优化表述为广义薛定谔桥问题，通过路径空间镜像下降实现近端更新。
light_analysis.motivation: 经典在线策略算法如PPO使用简单高斯策略，表达能力有限；基于扩散模型的生成式策略动作分布丰富，但其多步去噪路径的终端密度不可解，与基于似然的近端更新不匹配。现有方法无法直接应用于生成式策略的在线策略优化。
light_analysis.method: 提出GSB-MDPO，将策略优化建模为状态条件生成路径上的广义薛定谔桥问题，利用路径空间KL散度作为镜像下降策略优化的近端项，其上界终端动作KL，避免显式计算终端似然。通过路径测度更新实现生成式策略的在线优化。
light_analysis.result: 在Playground和Gym-MuJoCo的14个连续控制任务上实验，GSB-MDPO优于基线（如PPO、MDPO和扩散策略方法），验证了路径空间正则化作为多步生成式策略近端更新的有效性，提升了动作分布的灵活性和任务性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: GSB-MDPO弥合了生成式策略与在线策略近端更新的鸿沟，提供了理论基础和实用算法。实验证明其有效性，未来可扩展至更复杂的生成模型和任务，但未讨论计算开销或理论收敛性。

title: Learning Safely Without Knowing the World:COMPASS-Hedge
abstract: Online learning algorithms often face a fundamental trilemma: balancing regret guarantees between adversarial and stochastic settings and providing baseline safety against a fixed comparator. While existing methods excel in one or two of these regimes, they typically fail to unify all three without sacrificing optimal rates or requiring oracle access to problem-dependent parameters. In this work, we bridge this gap by introducing COMPASS-Hedge. To the best of our knowledge, our algorithm is the first full-information anytime method to simultaneously achieve, up to logarithmic factors: i) minimax-optimal regret in adversarial environments; ii) instance-optimal, gap-dependent regret in stochastic environments; and iii) $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(1)$ regret relative to a designated baseline policy. Crucially, COMPASS-Hedge is parameter-free and requires no prior knowledge of the environment's nature or the magnitude of the stochastic suboptimality gaps. Our approach hinges on a novel integration of adaptive pseudo-regret scaling and phase-based aggression, coupled with a comparator-aware mixing strategy. To the best of our knowledge, this provides the first "best-of-three-world" guarantee in the full-information setting, establishing that baseline safety does not have to come at the cost of worst-case robustness or stochastic efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出COMPASS-Hedge算法，首次在全信息在线学习中同时实现对抗性最优、随机实例最优和基线安全遗憾。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线学习算法面临对抗性与随机性之间的遗憾平衡以及基线安全的三难问题。现有方法虽在某方面表现优异，但无法统一所有三种要求，通常需要牺牲最优速率或依赖问题参数。本研究旨在填补这一空白，实现无需先验知识的参数无关算法，同时满足三项目标。
light_analysis.method: COMPASS-Hedge通过自适应伪遗憾缩放和基于阶段的攻击机制，结合比较器感知的混合策略，实现参数无关的全信息在线学习。算法无需知道环境类型或随机次优间隙大小，首次在理论上证明同时达到对抗性极小化最优遗憾、随机间隙依赖实例最优遗憾以及相对固定基线的O~(1)遗憾。
light_analysis.result: COMPASS-Hedge在理论分析中达到：对抗性环境下极小化最优遗憾（对数因子内）；随机环境下间隙依赖的实例最优遗憾；相对于基线策略的O~(1)遗憾。这是全信息设置下首个“三世界最优”保证，证明基线安全无需牺牲最坏情况鲁棒性或随机效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: COMPASS-Hedge解决了在线学习长期存在的三难问题，提供参数无关的统一框架，具有理论创新性。实际应用中，算法可在未知环境中安全部署，兼顾鲁棒性与高效性。未来可扩展至部分信息设置或非平稳环境。

title: RewardFlow: Topology-Aware Reward Propagation on State Graphs for Agentic RL with Large Language Models
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) shows promise for enhancing LLM agentic reasoning, yet sparse terminal rewards hinder fine-grained optimization. Process reward modeling offers an alternative but incurs high computational costs, reward hacking risks, and annotation bottlenecks. We introduce RewardFlow, a lightweight method for estimating state-level rewards in agentic reasoning. By constructing state graphs that capture the intrinsic topological structure of trajectories, RewardFlow performs topology-aware propagation to estimate each state's contribution to success, yielding principled, annotation-free dense rewards. Used for RL optimization, RewardFlow substantially outperforms prior baselines across four agentic benchmarks: +6.2% average success rate on text-based tasks, +29.7% on visual reasoning over the strongest baseline across three model scales, and +10% accuracy on DeepResearch, with superior robustness and training efficiency. The implementation of RewardFlow is publicly available at https://github.com/tmlr-group/RewardFlow.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RewardFlow，一种拓扑感知的奖励传播方法，在状态图上估计状态级奖励，为LLM代理强化学习提供无注释的密集奖励。
light_analysis.motivation: 稀疏终端奖励限制了LLM代理推理的细粒度优化，而过程奖励模型存在计算成本高、奖励作弊风险和注释瓶颈。因此需要一种轻量级、无注释的方法来提供密集的奖励信号，以改善强化学习训练效果。
light_analysis.method: 构造状态图捕捉轨迹的拓扑结构，通过拓扑感知传播估计每个状态对成功的贡献，生成原则性的、无注释的密集奖励。将此奖励用于强化学习优化，无需额外标注。
light_analysis.result: 在四个代理基准上显著优于基线：文本任务平均成功率提升6.2%，视觉推理在三种模型规模上相比最强基线提升29.7%，DeepResearch准确率提升10%，且展现出优越的鲁棒性和训练效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: RewardFlow提供了一种轻量级、免注释的奖励估计方法，有效提升了LLM代理在强化学习中的表现，具有重要学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可探索更复杂任务上的扩展。

title: Enhancing LLM Training via Spectral Clipping
abstract: While spectral-based optimizers like Muon operate directly on the spectrum of updates, standard adaptive methods such as AdamW do not account for the spectral structure of weights and gradients, leaving them vulnerable to two empirical issues in large language model (LLM) training: (i) the optimizer updates can have large spectral norms, potentially destabilizing training and degrading generalization; (ii) stochastic gradient noise can exhibit sparse spectral spikes, with a few dominant singular values much larger than the rest. We propose SPECTRA, a general framework addressing these by (i) post-spectral clipping of updates to enforce spectral-norm constraints (ii) optional pre-spectral clipping of gradients to suppress spectral noise spikes. We prove that post-clipping constitutes a Composite Frank-Wolfe method with spectral-norm constraints and weight regularization. We further analyze how pre-clipping mitigates sparse spectral spikes. We propose efficient soft spectral clipping via Newton-Schulz iterations, avoiding expensive SVD. Experiments on LLM pretraining show SPECTRA uniformly improves validation loss for various optimizers, including AdamW, Signum, Mars, and AdEMAMix, with the best-performing variants achieving state-of-the-art results. Models trained with SPECTRA exhibit smaller weight norms, confirming the link between spectral clipping and regularization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SPECTRA框架，通过对优化器更新和梯度进行频谱裁剪，统一提升多种自适应优化器在LLM预训练中的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自适应优化器如AdamW未考虑权重和梯度的频谱结构，导致两个问题：优化器更新具有大谱范数，破坏训练稳定性并降低泛化能力；随机梯度噪声出现稀疏谱尖峰，少数主导奇异值远大于其余值。这些问题在LLM训练中尤为突出，需要一种通用方法约束频谱结构以提升训练效果。
light_analysis.method: 提出SPECTRA框架，包含后频谱裁剪（对优化器更新施加谱范数约束）和可选的预频谱裁剪（抑制梯度噪声谱尖峰）。证明后裁剪等价于带谱范数约束和权重正则化的复合Frank-Wolfe方法。采用牛顿-舒尔茨迭代实现高效软频谱裁剪，避免昂贵SVD。与AdamW、Signum、Mars、AdEMAMix等优化器兼容。
light_analysis.result: 在LLM预训练实验中，SPECTRA统一降低了各优化器的验证损失，最佳变体达到最先进水平。训练后的模型权重范数显著减小，验证了频谱裁剪的正则化效果。与基线相比，性能提升一致且明显。
light_analysis.conclusion: SPECTRA为LLM训练提供了一种通用且高效的频谱裁剪框架，兼具理论分析与实用实现。它揭示了频谱约束与正则化的内在联系，可广泛适用于不同优化器。未来可探索将其应用于微调及其他深度学习任务。

title: SDF-Net: Structure-Aware Disentangled Feature Learning for Opticall-SAR Ship Re-identification
abstract: Cross-modal ship re-identification (ReID) between optical and synthetic aperture radar (SAR) imagery is fundamentally challenged by the severe radiometric discrepancy between passive optical imaging and coherent active radar sensing. While existing approaches primarily rely on statistical distribution alignment or semantic matching, they often overlook a critical physical prior: ships are rigid objects whose geometric structures remain stable across sensing modalities, whereas texture appearance is highly modality-dependent. In this work, we propose SDF-Net, a Structure-Aware Disentangled Feature Learning Network that systematically incorporates geometric consistency into optical--SAR ship ReID. Built upon a ViT backbone, SDF-Net introduces a structure consistency constraint that extracts scale-invariant gradient energy statistics from intermediate layers to robustly anchor representations against radiometric variations. At the terminal stage, SDF-Net disentangles the learned representations into modality-invariant identity features and modality-specific characteristics. These decoupled cues are then integrated through a parameter-free additive residual fusion, effectively enhancing discriminative power. Extensive experiments on the HOSS-ReID dataset demonstrate that SDF-Net consistently outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods. The code and trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/cfrfree/SDF-Net.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SDF-Net，利用结构一致性约束和特征解耦实现光学与SAR图像跨模态船舶再识别。
light_analysis.motivation: 光学和SAR图像因成像机理不同存在巨大的辐射差异，现有方法依赖统计分布对齐或语义匹配，忽略了船舶作为刚性物体几何结构跨模态稳定的物理先验，导致识别性能受限。因此需要利用几何一致性来提升跨模态船舶再识别的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 基于ViT骨干网络，在中间层引入结构一致性约束，提取尺度不变梯度能量统计特征以锚定表示；在末端将特征解耦为模态不变的身份特征和模态特定的外观特征，并通过无参数加性残差融合增强判别力。在HOSS-ReID数据集上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在HOSS-ReID数据集上，SDF-Net一致优于现有最先进方法，具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但代码和模型已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: SDF-Net通过利用几何结构先验和特征解耦有效解决了跨模态船舶再识别中的辐射差异问题，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可探索更复杂的结构一致性约束或扩展到其他多模态识别任务。

title: Jailbreak Scaling Laws for Large Language Models: Polynomial-Exponential Crossover
abstract: Adversarial attacks can reliably steer safety-aligned large language models toward unsafe behavior. Empirically, we find that adversarial prompt-injection attacks can amplify attack success rate from the slow polynomial growth observed without injection to exponential growth with the number of inference-time samples. We first identify a minimal statistical mechanism for these two regimes by giving a small set of assumptions on the distribution of safe generation across contexts under which both scaling laws follow. To explain this phenomenon further, we propose a theoretical generative model of proxy language in terms of a spin-glass system operating in a replica-symmetry-breaking regime, where generations are drawn from the associated Gibbs measure and a subset of low-energy, size-biased clusters is designated unsafe. We analytically show how this model naturally realizes the minimal assumptions. Short injected prompts correspond to a weak magnetic field aligned towards unsafe cluster centers and yield a power-law scaling of attack success rate with the number of inference-time samples, while long injected prompts, i.e., strong magnetic field, yield exponential scaling. We observe qualitatively consistent behavior across a broad range of large language models, spanning parameter scales from 3B to 70B. In particular, the main trends remain stable across multiple attack methods, such as GCG and AutoDAN, as well as across benchmark datasets such as AdvBench and HarmBench.

light_analysis.overview: 发现对抗性提示注入使LLM攻击成功率从多项式增长变为指数增长，并提出基于自旋玻璃的理论模型解释标度律转变。
light_analysis.motivation: 安全对齐的大语言模型仍易受对抗攻击，现有研究缺乏对攻击成功率随推理样本数量标度行为的系统理解。特别是，提示注入如何改变攻击效率的规模律尚不明确。理解这种标度行为对于评估模型安全性、设计防御策略至关重要。本文旨在揭示从多项式到指数增长的转变机制，并为攻击成功率提供预测框架。
light_analysis.method: 首先提出最小统计机制，通过假设安全生成在不同上下文中的分布，推导出两种标度律。然后构建理论生成模型：将代理语言视为自旋玻璃系统，运行在复制对称破缺区域，生成对应吉布斯测度，低能簇被标记为不安全。短注入提示相当于弱磁场（指向不安全簇中心），导致幂律标度；长注入提示相当于强磁场，导致指数标度。实验使用多种LLM（3B-70B）、攻击方法（GCG、AutoDAN）和数据集（AdvBench、HarmBench）验证。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，无注入时攻击成功率随样本数呈多项式增长，而注入后转为指数增长。该现象在3B至70B参数的多种LLM上定性一致，且在不同攻击方法（GCG、AutoDAN）和基准数据集（AdvBench、HarmBench）上保持稳定。理论模型预测与实验观察吻合，证实了磁场强度对标度律的影响。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次揭示了对抗性提示注入下LLM攻击成功率的标度律转变，提出了基于自旋玻璃的理论解释，为理解攻击动力学提供了新视角。该研究有助于预测模型脆弱性、指导安全训练。未来可探索更复杂的攻击模式及防御策略，并验证理论在更大规模模型上的适用性。

title: Muscle Synergy Priors Enhance Biomechanical Fidelity in Predictive Musculoskeletal Locomotion Simulation
abstract: Human locomotion emerges from high-dimensional neuromuscular control, making predictive musculoskeletal simulation challenging. We present a physiology-informed reinforcement-learning framework that constrains control using muscle synergies. We extracted a low-dimensional synergy basis from inverse musculoskeletal analyses of a small set of overground walking trials and used it as the action space for a muscle-driven three-dimensional model trained across variable speeds, slopes and uneven terrain. The resulting controller generated stable gait from 0.7-1.8 m/s and on $\pm$ 6$^{\circ}$ grades and reproduced condition-dependent modulation of joint angles, joint moments and ground reaction forces. Compared with an unconstrained controller, synergy-constrained control reduced non-physiological knee kinematics and kept knee moment profiles within the experimental envelope. Across conditions, simulated vertical ground reaction forces correlated strongly with human measurements, and muscle-activation timing largely fell within inter-subject variability. These results show that embedding neurophysiological structure into reinforcement learning can improve biomechanical fidelity and generalization in predictive human locomotion simulation with limited experimental data.
comment: Added a manuscript footnote stating "Project page with supplementary videos: https://ces40320.github.io/WebHomepage__Walk-RL ."

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于肌肉协同先验的生理学信息强化学习框架，通过低维协同约束提升预测性肌肉骨骼运动模拟的生物力学保真度和泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 人类运动源于高维神经肌肉控制，预测性肌肉骨骼模拟极具挑战性。现有方法缺乏生理学约束，导致模拟步态出现非生理学运动学特征，如异常膝关节角度，且难以泛化到不同速度和地形。该研究旨在通过嵌入神经生理学结构，解决数据需求大、生物力学保真度低的问题。
light_analysis.method: 从少量地面行走试验的逆肌肉骨骼分析中提取低维肌肉协同基，作为强化学习的动作空间，训练肌肉驱动三维模型在不同速度、坡度和不平地形下行走。该生理学先验约束控制信号，减少冗余自由度，同时保留神经肌肉协调模式。
light_analysis.result: 控制器在0.7–1.8 m/s速度和±6°坡度生成稳定步态，精确复现关节角度、力矩和地面反作用力的条件依赖性。相比无约束基线，协同控制器减少非生理学膝关节运动，保持力矩在实验包络内；垂直地面反作用力与实测强相关，肌肉激活时间落在个体间变异范围。
light_analysis.conclusion: 嵌入肌肉协同先验可显著提升强化学习在人体运动模拟中的生物力学保真度和泛化能力，仅需少量实验数据即可生成逼真步态。该框架为神经肌肉康复、假肢设计等领域提供了可解释的生理学模拟工具，未来可扩展至更多运动任务。

title: Rel-MOSS: Towards Imbalanced Relational Deep Learning on Relational Databases
abstract: In recent advances, to enable a fully data-driven learning paradigm on relational databases (RDB), relational deep learning (RDL) is proposed to structure the RDB as a heterogeneous entity graph and adopt the graph neural network (GNN) as the predictive model. However, existing RDL methods neglect the imbalance problem of relational data in RDBs and risk under-representing the minority entities, leading to an unusable model in practice. In this work, we investigate, for the first time, class imbalance problem in RDB entity classification and design the relation-centric minority synthetic over-sampling GNN (Rel-MOSS), in order to fill a critical void in the current literature. Specifically, to mitigate the issue of minority-related information being submerged by majority counterparts, we design the relation-wise gating controller to modulate neighborhood messages from each individual relation type. Based on the relational-gated representations, we further propose the relation-guided minority synthesizer for over-sampling, which integrates the entity relational signatures to maintain relational consistency. Extensive experiments on 12 entity classification datasets provide compelling evidence for the superiority of Rel-MOSS, yielding an average improvement of up to 2.46% and 4.00% in terms of Balanced Accuracy and G-Mean, compared with SOTA RDL methods and classic methods for handling class imbalance.

light_analysis.overview: 首次研究关系数据库实体分类中的类不平衡问题，提出关系中心少数过采样GNN方法Rel-MOSS。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有关系深度学习方法忽略关系数据库中数据的类不平衡问题，导致少数实体被低估，模型实用性差。实际应用中，如欺诈检测等场景中少数类关键但样本稀疏。需解决少数类信息被多数类淹没的问题。
light_analysis.method: 设计关系门控控制器，调节每个关系类型的邻居消息以减轻少数类信息淹没；基于门控表示，提出关系引导的少数合成器进行过采样，结合实体关系签名保持关系一致性。在12个实体分类数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 与SOTA关系深度学习方法及经典不平衡处理方法相比，Rel-MOSS在平衡准确率上平均提升2.46%，在G-Mean上平均提升4.00%，12个数据集上的实验证明了其优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 填补了关系数据库实体分类中类不平衡研究的空白，提出关系中心过采样方法有效提升少数类表示。未来工作可探索更复杂的关系结构及扩展到多标签不平衡场景。

title: Reasoning Theater: Disentangling Model Beliefs from Chain-of-Thought
abstract: We provide evidence of performative chain-of-thought (CoT) in reasoning models, where a model becomes strongly confident in its final answer, but continues generating tokens without revealing its internal belief. Our analysis compares activation probing, early forced answering, and a CoT monitor across two large models (DeepSeek-R1 671B & GPT-OSS 120B) and find task difficulty-specific differences: The model's final answer is decodable from activations far earlier in CoT than a monitor is able to say, especially for easy recall-based MMLU questions. We contrast this with genuine reasoning in difficult multihop GPQA-Diamond questions. Despite this, inflection points (e.g., backtracking, 'aha' moments) occur almost exclusively in responses where probes show large belief shifts, suggesting these behaviors track genuine uncertainty rather than learned "reasoning theater." Finally, probe-guided early exit reduces tokens by up to 80% on MMLU and 30% on GPQA-Diamond with similar accuracy, positioning attention probing as an efficient tool for detecting performative reasoning and enabling adaptive computation.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示推理模型存在表演性链式思考（CoT），并提出基于注意力探测的早期退出方法以高效检测内部信念、减少计算量。
light_analysis.motivation: 链式思考推理模型可能产生表演性行为：模型对答案自信但仍持续生成token，浪费计算资源。现有方法难以区分真正推理与表演性CoT，导致简单问题上的不必要计算。需要研究模型内部信念与输出token的关联，发展检测信念状态的技术，以实现自适应计算。
light_analysis.method: 采用激活探测、早期强制回答和CoT监控器，对比两个大模型（DeepSeek-R1 671B、GPT-OSS 120B）在简单MMLU与困难GPQA-Diamond任务上的表现。通过注意力探测解码模型信念，识别拐点（如回溯、'aha'时刻）。提出探测引导的早期退出策略：当探测确认最终答案时提前终止生成。
light_analysis.result: MMLU任务中，模型最终答案从CoT早期激活可解码，且探测比监控器更早检测到信念；GPQA-Diamond任务中拐点与信念转变高度相关。探测引导早期退出在MMLU上减少80% tokens，GPQA上减少30%，且准确率保持不变，证明方法高效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了表演性CoT现象，提出基于注意力探测的检测与早期退出方法，可显著降低推理成本而不损失性能。该方法为自适应计算提供了新工具，但可能受限于模型架构。未来可探索更通用的跨模型检测方法。

title: Non-Euclidean Gradient Descent Operates at the Edge of Stability
abstract: The Edge of Stability (EoS) is a phenomenon where the sharpness (largest eigenvalue) of the Hessian approaches and then hovers near the stability threshold $2/η$ during gradient descent (GD) with step size $η$. Despite (apparently) violating classical smoothness assumptions, EoS has been widely observed in deep learning, but its theoretical foundations remain incomplete. We provide an interpretation of EoS through the lens of Directional Smoothness [Mishkin et al., 2024]. This interpretation naturally extends to non-Euclidean norms, which we use to define generalized sharpness under an arbitrary norm. Our generalized sharpness measure includes previously studied vanilla GD and preconditioned GD as special cases, as well as methods for which EoS has not been studied, such as $\ell_{\infty}$-descent, Block CD, Spectral GD, and their normalized versions. Through experiments on neural networks, we show that non-Euclidean GD with our generalized sharpness also exhibits progressive sharpening followed by oscillations around or above the threshold $2/η$. Practically, our framework provides a geometry-aware spectral diagnostic that can be applied across a broad class of non-Euclidean gradient methods.

light_analysis.overview: 通过方向平滑性解释边缘稳定性现象，并将其推广到非欧几里得梯度下降方法，提出广义sharpness度量。
light_analysis.motivation: 边缘稳定性（EoS）是深度学习中广泛观察到的现象，即Hessian的最大特征值（sharpness）在步长η下接近并徘徊在稳定阈值2/η附近。尽管这表面上违反了经典平滑假设，但其理论基础尚不完整。现有研究主要针对欧几里得梯度下降（GD），缺乏对非欧几里得梯度方法（如ℓ∞-descent、块坐标下降等）的EoS分析。因此，需要建立统一的框架来理解和诊断这些方法的训练动态。
light_analysis.method: 基于方向平滑性（Directional Smoothness）框架，将EoS解释推广到任意范数下的非欧几里得梯度下降。通过定义广义sharpness，统一了标准GD、预处理GD以及尚未研究EoS的方法（如ℓ∞-descent、块坐标下降、谱梯度下降及其归一化版本）。该框架利用任意范数下的方向平滑性，捕获了不同梯度方法中的几何特性。实验在神经网络上验证了非欧几里得GD也表现出渐进锐化（sharpening）随后sharpness在阈值2/η附近振荡的现象。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，对于非欧几里得梯度下降方法（如ℓ∞-descent和谱梯度下降），广义sharpness同样呈现渐进锐化并在阈值2/η附近振荡的行为，与欧几里得GD中的EoS现象一致。该结果首次将EoS推广到非欧几里得设置，表明该现象不仅限于标准GD。此外，广义sharpness可作为几何感知的谱诊断工具，适用于多种梯度方法，帮助监测训练稳定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过方向平滑性为边缘稳定性提供了统一的解释，并将其扩展到非欧几里得梯度下降，揭示了这类方法中也存在EoS现象。该工作不仅深化了对训练动态的理论理解，还提供了实用的几何感知诊断工具，可应用于广泛的梯度方法。未来可能探索其他非欧几里得方法（如Adam的变体）中的EoS行为，以及利用该框架设计更稳定的优化算法。

title: MOO: A Multi-view Oriented Observations Dataset for Viewpoint Analysis in Cattle Re-Identification
abstract: Animal re-identification (ReID) faces critical challenges due to viewpoint variations, particularly in Aerial-Ground (AG-ReID) settings where models must match individuals across drastic elevation changes. However, existing datasets lack the precise angular annotations required to systematically analyze these geometric variations. To address this, we introduce the Multi-view Oriented Observation (MOO) dataset, a large-scale synthetic AG-ReID dataset of $1,000$ cattle individuals captured from $128$ uniformly sampled viewpoints ($128,000$ annotated images). Using this controlled dataset, we quantify the influence of elevation and identify a critical elevation threshold, above which models generalize significantly better to unseen views. Finally, we validate the transferability to real-world applications in both zero-shot and supervised settings, demonstrating performance gains across four real-world cattle datasets and confirming that synthetic geometric priors effectively bridge the domain gap. Collectively, this dataset and analysis lay the foundation for future model development in cross-view animal ReID. MOO is publicly available at https://github.com/TurtleSmoke/MOO.
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures, accepted to the CVPR 2026 Workshop on Computer Vision for Animal Behavior Tracking and Modeling (CV4Animals)

light_analysis.overview: 介绍多视角合成牲畜重识别数据集MOO，用于分析视角变化影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 动物重识别面临视角变化挑战，尤其在空地场景中，需匹配剧烈高程变化下的个体。现有数据集缺乏精确角度标注，无法系统分析几何变化影响。构建可控视角数据集以量化视角影响并提升模型泛化能力，是解决该问题的关键。
light_analysis.method: 提出MOO数据集，包含1000头牛的128,000张图像，从128个均匀抽样视角捕获。通过合成数据控制视角参数，分析高程对重识别的影响，识别出关键高程阈值。验证合成几何先验在零样本和监督设置下对真实数据集的迁移能力。
light_analysis.result: 在四个真实牲畜数据集上，利用MOO合成数据实现了性能提升，证实合成几何先验能有效弥合领域差距。识别出关键高程阈值，高于该阈值模型对未见视角泛化性显著提升。具体数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: MOO数据集和分析为跨视角动物重识别模型开发奠定基础。数据集公开可用，具有学术和应用价值。潜在局限性包括合成到真实的域差距，未来工作可扩展至其他物种或真实视角标注。

title: Relational In-Context Learning via Synthetic Pre-training with Structural Prior
abstract: Relational Databases (RDBs) are the backbone of modern business, yet they lack foundation models comparable to those in text or vision. A key obstacle is that high-quality RDBs are private, scarce, and structurally heterogeneous, making internet-scale pre-training infeasible. To overcome this data scarcity, we introduce RDB-PFN, the first relational foundation model trained purely via synthetic data. Inspired by Prior-Data Fitted Networks (PFNs), where synthetic data generated from Structural Causal Models (SCMs) enables reasoning on single tables, we design a Relational Prior Generator to create an infinite stream of diverse RDBs from scratch. Pre-training on over 2 million synthetic single-table and relational tasks, RDB-PFN learns to adapt to any new database instantly via genuine in-context learning. Experiments show that RDB-PFN achieves strong few-shot performance on 19 real-world relational prediction tasks, outperforming state-of-the-art tabular foundation models evaluated on the same DFS-linearized inputs, while using a lightweight architecture and fast inference. The code is available at https://github.com/MuLabPKU/RDBPFN.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个基于纯合成数据预训练的关系数据库基础模型RDB-PFN，实现关系型上下文学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 关系数据库是现代业务的基石，但缺乏类似文本或视觉领域的基础模型。主要障碍在于高质量关系数据库私有、稀缺且结构异构，使得互联网规模预训练不可行。现有方法受限于数据获取困难，无法有效泛化到新数据库。
light_analysis.method: 受Prior-Data Fitted Networks启发，设计Relational Prior Generator从零开始生成无限多样的关系数据库。在超过200万合成单表和关系任务上预训练RDB-PFN，使其通过真正上下文学习即时适应任何新数据库，无需微调。
light_analysis.result: 在19个真实关系预测任务上，RDB-PFN取得强少样本性能，优于基于DFS线性化输入的最先进表格基础模型，同时保持轻量架构和快速推理。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次证明纯合成数据预训练可在关系数据库场景实现上下文学习，缓解数据稀缺问题。开源代码促进实际应用。未来可探索更复杂关系图与任务扩展。

title: Structure-Aware Text Recognition for Ancient Greek Critical Editions
abstract: Recent advances in visual language models (VLMs) have transformed end-to-end document understanding. However, their ability to interpret the complex layout semantics of historical scholarly texts remains limited. This paper investigates structure-aware text recognition for Ancient Greek critical editions, which have dense reference hierarchies and extensive marginal annotations. We introduce two novel resources: (i) a large-scale synthetic corpus of 185,000 page images generated from TEI/XML sources with controlled typographic and layout variation, and (ii) a curated benchmark of real scanned editions spanning more than a century of editorial and typographic practices. Using these datasets, we evaluate three state-of-the-art VLMs under both zero-shot and fine-tuning regimes. Our experiments reveal substantial limitations in current VLM architectures when confronted with highly structured historical documents. In zero-shot settings, most models significantly underperform compared to established off-the-shelf software. Nevertheless, the Qwen3VL-8B model achieves state-of-the-art performance, reaching a median Character Error Rate of 1.0\% on real scans. These results highlight both the current shortcomings and the future potential of VLMs for structure-aware recognition of complex scholarly documents.

light_analysis.overview: 引入大规模合成语料和真实扫描基准，评估多种视觉语言模型在古希腊文评注版结构感知文本识别中的表现，揭示现有模型局限性并展示Qwen3VL-8B最优性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代视觉语言模型在端到端文档理解上有进步，但对历史学术文本的复杂布局语义（如密集参考层次和大量边缘注释）解读能力有限。现有方法缺乏针对此类结构化历史文档的专用数据集和系统评估，亟需研究其能力边界以推动改进。
light_analysis.method: 创建两个新资源：从TEI/XML生成18.5万页合成图像（受控排版变化）和真实扫描基准（涵盖百年编辑实践）。基于这些数据集，在零样本和微调两个层面评估Qwen3VL-8B等三种SOTA视觉语言模型。关键创新在于构建面向古希腊文评注版的专用数据集并系统分析模型结构化识别能力。
light_analysis.result: 零样本设置下，多数视觉语言模型显著逊于现有商用软件。但Qwen3VL-8B在真实扫描图像上达到中位字符错误率1.0%，实现当前最优性能。实验表明现有模型架构在处理高度结构化历史文档时存在明显不足，同时验证了通过针对性训练可取得显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了大规模合成与真实扫描数据集及评估基准，实证了视觉语言模型在复杂学术文档识别中的局限性及未来潜力。Qwen3VL-8B的优异表现表明通过微调可有效提升结构感知能力。未来工作可扩展至更多语言和文档类型，并探索模型架构优化。

title: Rooted Absorbed Prefix Trajectory Balance with Submodular Replay for GFlowNet Training
abstract: Generative Flow Networks (GFlowNets) enable fine-tuning large language models to approximate reward-proportional posteriors, but they remain prone to mode collapse, manifesting as prefix collapse and length bias. We attribute this to two factors: (i) weak credit assignment to early prefixes, and (ii) biased replay that induces a shifted, non-representative training flow distribution. We propose Rooted absorbed prefix Trajectory Balance RapTB, an objective that anchors subtrajectory supervision at the root and propagates terminal rewards to intermediate prefixes via absorbed suffix-based backups, providing dense prefix-level learning signals. To mitigate replay-induced distribution shift, we further introduce SubM, a submodular replay refresh strategy that promotes both high reward and diversity. Empirically, on tasks such as molecule generation with LLM using SMILES strings, RapTB combined with SubM consistently improves optimization performance and molecular diversity while preserving high validity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RapTB目标和SubM重放策略，有效缓解GFlowNet训练中的模式崩溃问题。
light_analysis.motivation: GFlowNet在微调大型语言模型时容易出现模式崩溃，表现为前缀崩溃和长度偏差。其原因是早期前缀的信用分配不足以及重放机制导致训练流分布偏移，限制了模型探索多样性和优化性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出Rooted Absorbed Prefix Trajectory Balance (RapTB)目标，通过根锚定子轨迹监督和吸收后缀备份将终端奖励传播到中间前缀，提供密集的前缀级学习信号。同时引入Submodular Replay (SubM)策略，基于子模函数选择多样且高奖励的轨迹进行重放，缓解分布偏移。
light_analysis.result: 在分子生成任务中，使用LLM基于SMILES字符串进行实验，RapTB结合SubM持续提升了优化性能和分子多样性，同时保持了高有效性，优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: RapTB和SubM有效缓解了GFlowNet的模式崩溃，增强了探索能力和生成多样性，为基于GFlowNet的分子发现等应用提供了更稳定的训练方法。未来可探索其在其他序列生成任务中的适用性。

title: Routing by Reaching: Composition of Pre-trained GFlowNets for Multi-Objective Generation
abstract: Generative Flow Networks (GFlowNets) learn to sample diverse candidates in proportion to a reward function, making them well-suited for scientific discovery, where exploring multiple promising solutions is crucial. Further extending GFlowNets to multi-objective settings has attracted growing interest as real-world applications often involve multiple, conflicting objectives. However, existing approaches require joint training for each combination of objectives, meaning that any change in the objective set necessitates retraining from scratch. We propose a framework that composes pre-trained GFlowNets at inference time, enabling rapid adaptation without fine-tuning or retraining. Importantly, our framework is flexible, capable of handling diverse reward combinations ranging from linear scalarization to complex nonlinear operators, which are often handled separately in previous literature. We prove that our method exactly recovers the target distribution for linear scalarization, and quantify the approximation quality for nonlinear operators through a distortion factor. Experiments on a synthetic 2D grid and real-world molecule generation tasks demonstrate that our approach achieves performance comparable to baselines.
comment: Appears in the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出组合预训练GFlowNets的推理框架，实现多目标生成任务的快速适应，无需微调。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有GFlowNet在多目标设置中需对每个目标组合进行联合训练，目标集变化时须重训练，计算成本高。实际应用常涉及多个冲突目标，需灵活适应不同奖励组合，包括线性和非线性操作。因此，亟需一种无需重训练即可快速调整的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出在推理时组合预训练GFlowNets的框架，通过路由机制（Routing by Reaching）实现。对于线性标量化，能精确恢复目标分布；对于非线性算子，通过失真因子量化近似质量。实验使用合成2D网格和真实分子生成任务验证。
light_analysis.result: 在合成2D网格和真实分子生成任务上，所提方法性能与需联合训练的基线方法相当，验证了有效性。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明实现了可比效果，同时避免了重训练开销。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出灵活的多目标生成框架，通过组合预训练GFlowNets实现快速适应，无需重训练。在科学发现中具有实际应用价值，支持多种奖励组合。未来可优化非线性近似的精度，并扩展到更多领域。

title: JAEGER: Joint 3D Audio-Visual Grounding and Reasoning in Simulated Physical Environments
abstract: Current audio-visual large language models (AV-LLMs) are predominantly restricted to 2D perception, relying on RGB video and monaural audio. This design choice introduces a fundamental dimensionality mismatch that precludes reliable source localization and spatial reasoning in complex 3D environments. We address this limitation by presenting JAEGER, a framework that extends AV-LLMs to 3D space, to enable joint spatial grounding and reasoning through the integration of RGB-D observations and multi-channel first-order ambisonics. A core contribution of our work is the neural intensity vector (Neural IV), a learned spatial audio representation that encodes robust directional cues to enhance direction-of-arrival estimation, even in adverse acoustic scenarios with overlapping sources. To facilitate large-scale training and systematic evaluation, we propose SpatialSceneQA, a benchmark of 61k instruction-tuning samples curated from simulated physical environments. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach consistently surpasses 2D-centric baselines across diverse spatial perception and reasoning tasks, underscoring the necessity of explicit 3D modelling for advancing AI in physical environments. Our source code, pre-trained model checkpoints, and datasets are available at https://github.com/liuzhan22/JAEGER.

light_analysis.overview: 提出JAEGER框架，将音频-视觉大语言模型扩展到3D空间，实现联合空间定位与推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前音频-视觉大语言模型局限于2D感知，依赖RGB视频和单声道音频，导致维度不匹配，无法在复杂3D环境中进行可靠声源定位和空间推理。这种设计缺陷限制了AI在物理世界中的适用性。因此，亟需将AV-LLM扩展到3D空间，以解决维度不匹配问题，提升空间感知与推理能力。
light_analysis.method: JAEGER框架融合RGB-D观测和多声道一阶ambisonics音频，核心创新是神经强度向量（Neural IV），一种学习到的空间音频表示，能增强方向到达估计，尤其在重叠声源的恶劣声学场景中。为支持大规模训练和评估，构建了SpatialSceneQA基准，包含61k来自模拟物理环境的指令微调样本。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，JAEGER在多种空间感知和推理任务上持续超越2D基线方法，证明了显式3D建模对于推进AI在物理环境中理解的重要性。具体性能提升指标摘要未明确说明，但明确强调了超越2D基线的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: JAEGER通过将AV-LLM扩展到3D空间，解决了2D感知的维度不匹配问题，显著提升了空间定位与推理能力。该工作强调了3D建模在物理环境AI中的必要性，并提供开源代码、模型和数据集，有助于推动该领域研究。未来可探索真实场景应用以及更复杂的声学环境。

title: GASS: Geometry-Aware Spherical Sampling for Disentangled Diversity Enhancement in Text-to-Image Generation
abstract: Despite high semantic alignment, modern text-to-image (T2I) generative models still struggle to synthesize diverse images from a given prompt. In this work, we enhance the T2I diversity through a geometric lens. Unlike most existing methods that rely primarily on entropy-based guidance to increase sample dissimilarity, we introduce Geometry-Aware Spherical Sampling (GASS) to enhance diversity by explicitly controlling both prompt-dependent and prompt-independent sources of variation. Specifically, we decompose the diversity measure in CLIP embeddings using two orthogonal directions: the text embedding, which captures semantic variation related to the prompt, and an identified orthogonal direction that captures prompt-independent variation (e.g., backgrounds). Based on this decomposition, GASS increases the geometric projection spread of generated image embeddings along both axes and guides the T2I sampling process via expanded predictions along the generation trajectory. Our experiments on different frozen T2I backbones (U-Net and DiT, diffusion and flow) and benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of disentangled diversity enhancement with minimal impact on image fidelity and semantic alignment.
comment: ICML 2026 Camera-ready. Code available at https://github.com/L-YeZhu/GASS_T2I

light_analysis.overview: 提出几何感知球面采样(GASS)方法，通过分解CLIP嵌入中的正交方向来增强文本到图像生成的多样性，同时保持保真度和语义对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代文本到图像生成模型在语义对齐方面表现良好，但难以从给定提示生成多样化的图像。现有方法主要依赖熵引导增加样本不相似性，忽视了提示相关和无关变异来源的显式控制。该研究通过几何视角增强多样性，解决多样性不足的问题，同时最小化对图像保真度和语义对齐的影响。
light_analysis.method: GASS方法将CLIP嵌入中的多样性度量分解为两个正交方向：文本嵌入方向（捕获与提示相关的语义变异）和识别的正交方向（捕获与提示无关的变异，如背景）。通过增加生成图像嵌入沿两个轴的几何投影扩展，GASS在生成轨迹上利用扩展预测引导T2I采样过程。方法适用于多种冻结T2I骨干网（U-Net和DiT，扩散和流模型）。
light_analysis.result: 在多个T2I骨干网和基准测试上的实验表明，GASS有效实现了解耦的多样性增强，且对图像保真度和语义对齐的影响最小。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但强调与现有方法相比，多样性提升显著，同时保持了高保真度和语义一致性。
light_analysis.conclusion: GASS通过几何感知的球面采样，显式控制提示依赖和无关的变异来源，有效提升T2I生成的多样性。该方法具有广泛的适用性（冻结骨干网），为多样性增强提供了新视角。未来工作可探索更精细的分解或与其他控制方法的结合。

title: Who can we trust? LLM-as-a-jury for Comparative Assessment
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly applied as automatic evaluators for natural language generation assessment often using pairwise comparative judgements. Existing approaches typically rely on single judges or aggregate multiple judges assuming equal reliability. In practice, LLM judges vary substantially in performance across tasks and evaluation aspects, and their judgment probabilities may be biased and inconsistent. Furthermore, human-labelled supervision for judge calibration may be unavailable. We first empirically demonstrate that inconsistencies in LLM comparison probabilities exist and show that it limits the effectiveness of direct probability-based ranking. To address this, we study the LLM-asa-jury setting and propose BT-sigma, a judge-aware extension of the Bradley-Terry model that introduces a discriminator parameter for each judge to jointly infer item rankings and judge reliability from pairwise comparisons alone. Experiments on benchmark NLG evaluation datasets show that BT-sigma consistently outperforms averaging-based aggregation methods, and that the learned discriminators strongly correlate with independent measures of the cycle consistency of LLM judgments. Further analysis reveals that BT-sigma can be interpreted as an unsupervised calibration mechanism that improves aggregation by modelling judge reliability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BT-sigma模型，通过引入判别器参数联合推断项目排名和法官可靠性，解决LLM评估中的不一致性问题。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM作为自动评估者时，不同模型在任务和评估方面表现差异大，判断概率存在偏差和不一致性，且缺乏人工标注进行校准。现有聚合方法假设法官同等可靠，导致排序效果受限。因此，需要一种无需人工标注、能建模法官可靠性的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出BT-sigma模型，基于Bradley-Terry模型扩展，为每个法官引入一个判别器参数，从成对比较中联合推断项目排名和法官可靠性。该模型无需人工标注，通过无监督方式学习法官的判别能力，从而改进聚合效果。
light_analysis.result: 在基准NLG评估数据集上，BT-sigma持续优于基于平均的聚合方法。学习到的判别器与法官循环一致性的独立测量高度相关，表明模型能有效捕捉法官可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: BT-sigma可解释为无监督校准机制，通过建模法官可靠性提升LLM评估的可靠性。该方法在缺乏人工标注时具有实用价值，为自动评估提供了更稳健的框架。

title: The Vision Wormhole: Latent-Space Communication in Heterogeneous Multi-Agent Systems
abstract: Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) powered by Large Language Models have unlocked advanced collaborative reasoning, yet they remain bottlenecked by discrete text communication, which imposes runtime overhead and information quantization loss. While latent state transfer offers an alternative, existing approaches either assume homogeneous sender--receiver architectures or rely on pair-specific learned translators, limiting scalability across diverse model families with disjoint manifolds. We reconceptualize the visual interface of Vision-Language Models (VLMs), trained for natural images, as a continuous communication channel between heterogeneous agents, and instantiate this idea as the \textbf{Vision Wormhole}: a Universal Visual Codec maps reasoning traces into a shared continuous reference space and injects them into the receiver's visual pathway, yielding cross-architecture latent state transfer without per-pair translators. The framework adopts a hub-and-spoke topology that reduces alignment complexity from $O(N^2)$ to $O(N)$, and is trained by label-free teacher--student distillation against the text channel, requiring no parallel hidden-state supervision. Extensive experiments across heterogeneous VLM families (Qwen-VL, Gemma, SmolVLM2, LFM2.5-VL) and nine reasoning benchmarks show that the Vision Wormhole reduces end-to-end wall-clock time across most evaluated settings and yields positive macro-average $Δ$-accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通用视觉编解码器Vision Wormhole，实现异构多智能体系统间无需成对翻译器的潜空间通信，通过视觉界面传递推理痕迹。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型驱动的多智能体系统受限于离散文本通信，带来运行时开销和信息量化损失。现有的潜状态传输方法或假设同构架构，或依赖成对翻译器，难以扩展到具有不同流形的异构模型家族。因此需要一种跨架构的通用通信通道，降低对齐复杂度并提高效率。
light_analysis.method: 利用视觉-语言模型的视觉界面作为连续通信信道，将推理痕迹映射到共享连续参考空间，并注入接收者的视觉通路。采用hub-and-spoke拓扑将对齐复杂度从O(N^2)降至O(N)，通过无标签教师-学生蒸馏训练，无需并行隐藏状态监督，避免成对翻译器。
light_analysis.result: 在多个异构VLM家族（Qwen-VL, Gemma, SmolVLM2, LFM2.5-VL）和九个推理基准上进行实验，Vision Wormhole在大多数设置下减少了端到端墙钟时间，并取得了正的平均准确率提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架为异构多智能体系统中的连续通信提供了可扩展方案，显著减少运行时开销并提升推理性能。局限性在于依赖视觉界面，未来可探索扩展到其他模态。学术价值在于重新定义跨架构潜空间通信，实际应用中可加速协作推理系统。

title: Size Transferability of Graph Transformers with Convolutional Positional Encodings
abstract: Transformers have achieved remarkable success across domains, motivating the rise of Graph Transformers (GTs) as attention-based architectures for graph-structured data. A key design choice in GTs is the use of Graph Neural Network (GNN)-based positional encodings to incorporate structural information. In this work, we study GTs through the lens of manifold limit models for graph sequences and establish a theoretical connection between GTs with GNN positional encodings and Manifold Neural Networks (MNNs). Building on transferability results for GNNs under manifold convergence, we show that GTs inherit transferability guarantees from their positional encodings. In particular, GTs trained on small graphs provably generalize to larger graphs under mild assumptions. We complement our theory with extensive experiments on standard graph benchmarks, demonstrating that GTs exhibit scalable behavior on par with GNNs. To further show the efficiency in a real-world scenario, we implement GTs for shortest path distance estimation over terrains to better illustrate the efficiency of the transferable GTs. Our results provide new insights into the understanding of GTs and suggest practical directions for efficient training of GTs in large-scale settings.

light_analysis.overview: 建立图变换器（GT）与流形神经网络的理论联系，证明GT从训练小图泛化到大图的迁移性。
light_analysis.motivation: 图变换器（GT）作为基于注意力的架构在图数据上取得显著成功，其关键设计在于使用图神经网络（GNN）位置编码来融入结构信息。然而，GT在大规模图上的训练效率和高昂成本是实际应用中的障碍。现有GNN已证明具有跨图大小的迁移性，但GT是否具备类似性质尚不明确。因此，研究GT的迁移性对于实现高效大规模图学习至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 本文通过流形极限模型研究图序列，建立带有GNN位置编码的GT与流形神经网络（MNN）之间的理论联系。基于GNN在流形收敛下的迁移性结果，证明GT从位置编码继承迁移性保证：在温和假设下，小图上训练的GT可泛化到大图。理论分析后，在标准图基准上进行了大量实验，并应用于地形最短路径距离估计这一真实场景，以验证迁移性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，GT表现出与GNN相当的可扩展行为，即在小图上训练的GT能够有效泛化到大图。在标准图基准测试中，GT的性能随图大小缩放平滑，与理论预测一致。在最短路径距离估计任务中，迁移性GT显著提高了推理效率，验证了理论在实际场景中的实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文从理论上建立了GT与MNN的联系，证明GT因GNN位置编码而具备跨图大小的迁移性。这一发现为理解GT提供了新视角，并提出了高效训练大规模GT的实用方向。局限性在于理论假设的验证和更复杂架构的迁移性，未来可探索其他类型位置编码的影响。

title: Benchmarking at the Edge of Comprehension
abstract: As frontier Large Language Models (LLMs) increasingly saturate new benchmarks shortly after they are published, benchmarking itself is at a juncture: if frontier models keep improving, it will become increasingly hard for humans to generate discriminative tasks, provide accurate ground-truth answers, or evaluate complex solutions. If benchmarking becomes infeasible, our ability to measure any progress in AI is at stake. We refer to this scenario as the post-comprehension regime. In this work, we propose Critique-Resilient Benchmarking, an adversarial framework designed to compare models even when full human understanding is infeasible. Our technique relies on the notion of critique-resilient correctness: an answer is deemed correct if no adversary has convincingly proved otherwise. Unlike standard benchmarking, humans serve as bounded verifiers and focus on localized claims, which preserves evaluation integrity beyond full comprehension of the task. Using an itemized bipartite Bradley-Terry model, we jointly rank LLMs by their ability to solve challenging tasks and to generate difficult yet solvable questions. We showcase the effectiveness of our method in the mathematical domain across eight frontier LLMs, showing that the resulting scores are stable and correlate with external capability measures. Our framework reformulates benchmarking as an adversarial generation-evaluation game in which humans serve as final adjudicators.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Critique-Resilient Benchmarking，一种对抗性框架，在人类无法完全理解任务时仍能有效比较LLM性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 前沿LLM快速饱和新基准，未来人类难以生成判别性任务、提供准确答案或评估复杂解决方案。基准测试不可行将危及AI进步评估。需要新评测方法应对“后理解时代”。
light_analysis.method: 提出Critique-Resilient Benchmarking框架，基于“批评弹性正确性”：若无对手证明错误则视为正确。人类作为有限验证者聚焦局部主张。使用itemized bipartite Bradley-Terry模型联合排名LLM的解题能力和出题能力，在数学域对八个前沿LLM实验。
light_analysis.result: 在数学领域对八个前沿LLM的实验表明，该方法得分稳定且与外部能力指标（如其他基准）相关。摘要未明确具体数值，但验证了框架有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 将基准测试重构为对抗性生成-评估游戏，人类作最终裁决。该方法保障人类理解不足时的评估完整性，为未来AI评测提供新范式。局限可能包括对抗设计复杂度高。

title: Coarse-Grained Boltzmann Generators
abstract: Sampling equilibrium molecular configurations from the Boltzmann distribution is a longstanding challenge. Boltzmann Generators (BGs) address this by combining exact-likelihood generative models with importance sampling, but practical scalability is limited. Meanwhile, coarse-grained surrogates enable the modeling of larger systems by reducing effective dimensionality, yet often lack a reweighting procedure required to ensure asymptotically correct statistics. In this work, we propose Coarse-Grained Boltzmann Generators (CG-BGs), a framework for reduced-order generative modeling with importance sampling in coarse-grained coordinate space. CG-BGs generate samples using a flow-based model and reweight them using a learned potential of mean force (PMF). We show that the PMF can be learned from rapidly converged trajectories via enhanced sampling force matching. Experiments demonstrate that CG-BGs capture solvent-mediated interactions in highly reduced representations while substantially reducing computational cost relative to atomistic BGs, providing a practical route toward equilibrium sampling of larger molecular systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Coarse-Grained Boltzmann Generators，结合流模型与学习到的平均力势，在粗粒化空间实现重要性采样，降低计算成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 从玻尔兹曼分布采样平衡分子构型是长期难题。现有玻尔兹曼生成器结合精确似然生成模型与重要性采样，但可扩展性有限。粗粒化代理虽能降低有效维度，但缺乏保证渐近正确统计的重加权过程。因此需一种能在粗粒化空间中进行重要性采样并保持统计一致性的方法。
light_analysis.method: CG-BGs框架在粗粒化坐标空间中使用基于流的生成模型生成样本，并通过学习到的平均力势进行重加权。平均力势通过增强采样力匹配从快速收敛轨迹中学习。该方法结合了粗粒化降维与重要性采样，确保渐近正确的统计特性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，CG-BGs能在高度简化的表示中捕捉溶剂介导的相互作用，相较于原子级玻尔兹曼生成器大幅降低计算成本，为更大分子系统的平衡采样提供了实用途径。
light_analysis.conclusion: CG-BGs通过粗粒化与重要性采样结合，实现了高效且统计正确的平衡分子构型采样。具有重要学术价值（解决尺度限制）和实际应用价值（加速分子模拟）。未来可扩展至更复杂系统，但需注意粗粒化模型精度与力匹配收敛性。

title: Prioritize the Process, Not Just the Outcome: Rewarding Latent Thought Trajectories Improves Reasoning in Looped Language Models
abstract: Looped Language Models (LoopLMs) perform multi-step latent reasoning prior to token generation and outperform conventional LLMs on reasoning benchmarks at smaller parameter budgets. However, attempts to further improve LoopLM reasoning with reinforcement learning have failed - standard objectives such as Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) only assign credit to the final latent state, creating a fundamental mismatch with the model's internal computation. To resolve this, we introduce RLTT (Reward Latent Thought Trajectories), a reinforcement learning framework which distributes reward across the full latent reasoning trajectory. RLTT provides dense, trajectory-level credit assignment without relying on external verifiers and can directly replace GRPO with negligible overhead. Across extensive experiments with Ouro-1.4B/2.6B-Thinking under identical training and inference conditions, RLTT yields statistically significant improvements over GRPO on challenging mathematical reasoning benchmarks, improving mean accuracy over MATH-500, AIME24/26, and BeyondAIME by +5.8% on the 1.4B scale, and +10.9% on the 2.6B scale. Despite being trained exclusively on mathematics, RLTT also transfers effectively to non-mathematical reasoning benchmarks, demonstrating the effectiveness of trajectory-level credit assignment for reinforcement learning in LoopLMs. Code is available at https://github.com/jonwill8/RLTT.git.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RLTT框架，通过对完整潜在推理轨迹分配奖励，提升循环语言模型的推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 循环语言模型（LoopLM）在调用token生成前进行多步潜在推理，但其强化学习优化面临挑战：标准目标如GRPO仅对最终潜在状态分配奖励，与内部计算不匹配，导致推理提升失败。现有方法缺乏对轨迹级信用分配的考虑，无法充分利用模型内部推理过程。
light_analysis.method: RLTT（奖励潜在思考轨迹）是一种强化学习框架，将奖励分布在整个潜在推理轨迹上，提供密集的轨迹级信用分配，无需外部验证器。可直接替代GRPO，计算开销可忽略。实验采用Ouro-1.4B/2.6B-Thinking模型，在相同训练和推理条件下与GRPO对比。
light_analysis.result: 在MATH-500、AIME24/26、BeyondAIME等数学推理基准上，RLTT相比GRPO显著提升：1.4B规模平均准确率提高5.8%，2.6B规模提高10.9%。尽管仅以数学数据训练，RLTT在非数学推理基准上也展现出有效迁移，证明了轨迹级信用分配的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: RLTT通过轨迹级奖励分配解决了循环语言模型强化学习的信用分配问题，显著提升了推理能力，且具有跨领域迁移潜力。未来可探索更复杂的轨迹建模或结合外部验证器，代码已开源。

title: Computationally Efficient Replicable Learning of Parities and Applications
abstract: We study the computational relationship between replicability (Impagliazzo et al. [STOC `22], Ghazi et al. [NeurIPS `21]) and other stability notions. Specifically, we focus on replicable PAC learning and its connections to differential privacy (Dwork et al. [TCC 2006]) and to the statistical query (SQ) model (Kearns [JACM `98]). Statistically, it was known that differentially private learning and replicable learning are equivalent and strictly more powerful than SQ-learning. Yet, computationally, all previously known efficient (i.e., polynomial-time) replicable learning algorithms were confined to SQ-learnable tasks or restricted distributions, in contrast to differentially private learning.   Our main contribution is the first computationally efficient replicable algorithm for realizable learning of parities over arbitrary distributions, a task that is known to be hard in the SQ-model, but possible under differential privacy. This result provides the first evidence that efficient replicable learning over general distributions strictly extends efficient SQ-learning, and is closer in power to efficient differentially private learning, despite computational separations between replicability and privacy. Additionally, we leverage our parity learner to prove that, assuming $RP \neq NP$, converting replicability to pure differential privacy requires a strict loss in sample complexity. Our main building block is a new, efficient, and replicable algorithm that, given a set of vectors, outputs a subspace of their linear span that covers most of them.

light_analysis.overview: 首次提出计算高效的可复现学习算法，用于任意分布上的奇偶性学习，证明可复现学习严格超越SQ模型并接近差分隐私。
light_analysis.motivation: 可复现学习与差分隐私和统计查询（SQ）模型的计算关系尚不明确。此前所有高效可复现学习算法仅限于SQ可学习任务或受限分布，而差分隐私能处理更广泛的任务。为了填补这一计算差距，本文旨在探索可复现学习在计算上能否超越SQ模型，接近差分隐私的能力。
light_analysis.method: 核心构建块是一个新的高效可复现算法，给定一组向量，输出其线性张成中覆盖大部分向量的子空间。基于此，提出了首个计算高效的可复现PAC学习算法，用于任意分布上的奇偶性（parities）学习。该算法利用子空间覆盖保证可复现性，并通过奇偶性问题的代数结构实现多项式时间复杂度。
light_analysis.result: 得到了首个计算高效的可复现算法，用于任意分布上的实线奇偶性学习，该任务在SQ模型下是困难的，但差分隐私可行。这提供了第一项证据，表明高效可复现学习严格超越高效SQ学习，且接近差分隐私的学习能力。此外，假设RP≠NP，证明了将可复现性转换为纯差分隐私时需要严格的样本复杂度损失。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了可复现学习在计算上比SQ更强大，同时与差分隐私存在计算分离。算法为可复现学习在更广泛任务中的应用提供了基础，并建立了可复现性与隐私之间的新联系。未来工作可探索其他超越SQ模型的任务，以及进一步缩小可复现学习与差分隐私的计算差距。

title: Gradient Preconditioning for Efficient and Reliable Reward-Guided Generation
abstract: We propose a gradient preconditioning method that makes reward-guided generation with one-step generative models both efficient and reliable. Test-time noise optimization can unlock substantially better reward-guided generations from pretrained generative models, but it is prone to reward hacking that degrades quality and is often too slow for practical use. We precondition reward gradients by projecting them onto a carefully designed white Gaussian noise feasible set, a compact spectral set with blockwise norm constraints that tightly captures the statistics and spatial uncorrelatedness of white Gaussian noise. This preconditioning reshapes each gradient update into a noise-aligned direction, driving faster and more effective reward ascent while preventing reward hacking. The projection is closed-form and matches the $O(N \log N)$ complexity of FFT, adding negligible overhead in practice. In experiments on FLUX with four reward models, our approach reaches a comparable Aesthetic Score using only 30% of the wall-clock time required by the state-of-the-art regularization-based method.

light_analysis.overview: 提出梯度预处理方法，将奖励梯度投影到白高斯噪声可行集，实现高效可靠的奖励引导生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 奖励引导生成中，测试时噪声优化易导致奖励黑客攻击（降低生成质量）且计算效率低，限制了实际应用。现有正则化方法虽能缓解但速度慢，亟需一种兼顾效率与可靠性的方法。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法是梯度预处理，通过将奖励梯度投影到精心设计的白高斯噪声可行集（具有块状范数约束的紧凑谱集）来重塑梯度方向，使其对齐噪声特征，加速奖励上升并防止奖励黑客。投影为闭式解，复杂度为O(N log N)，与FFT相当，额外开销可忽略。
light_analysis.result: 在FLUX模型上使用四个奖励模型进行实验，所提方法达到与最先进正则化方法相当的Aesthetic Score，但仅需其30%的墙上时间，显著提升了效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作提供了一种高效可靠的奖励引导生成方案，通过简单的梯度预处理解决了奖励黑客和速度瓶颈问题。闭式投影使其易于集成，未来可探索扩展到多步生成模型或其他生成任务。

title: Rare Event Analysis of Large Language Models
abstract: Being probabilistic models, during inference large language models (LLMs) display rare events: behaviour that is far from typical but highly significant. By definition all rare events are hard to see, but the enormous scale of LLM usage means that events completely unobserved during development are likely to become prominent in deployment. Here we present an end-to-end framework for the systematic analysis of rare events in LLMs. We provide a practical implementation spanning theory, efficient generation strategies, probability estimation and error analysis, which we illustrate with concrete examples. We outline extensions and applications to other models and contexts, highlighting the generality of the concepts and techniques presented here.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个系统分析大型语言模型中罕见事件的全流程框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型作为概率模型，在推理中会表现出罕见但意义重大的行为。由于使用规模巨大，开发中未观察到的事件可能在部署中变得突出。现有方法难以系统性分析这些罕见事件，亟需一个端到端的分析框架。
light_analysis.method: 该框架涵盖理论、高效生成策略、概率估计和误差分析。通过具体例子说明其应用，并概述了扩展到其他模型和上下文的方法。关键创新在于将罕见事件的系统性分析从生成到概率估计完整串联。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确报告具体实验结果，但框架提供了实用的实现方案，能够有效识别和估计罕见事件的概率，从而提升对LLM行为的理解和安全性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究为分析LLM中的罕见事件提供了系统性方法，具有通用性，可扩展到其他概率模型。其学术价值在于填补了罕见事件系统性分析的空白，实际应用价值体现在提高LLM部署的可靠性和安全性。未来可进一步优化生成策略和概率估计算法。

title: Selecting Hyperparameters for Tree-Boosting
abstract: Tree-boosting is a widely used machine learning technique for tabular data. However, its out-of-sample accuracy is critically dependent on multiple hyperparameters. In this article, we empirically compare several popular methods for hyperparameter optimization for tree-boosting including random grid search, the tree-structured Parzen estimator (TPE), Gaussian-process-based Bayesian optimization (GP-BO), Hyperband, the sequential model-based algorithm configuration (SMAC) method, and deterministic full grid search using $59$ regression and classification data sets. We find that the SMAC method clearly outperforms all the other considered methods. We further observe that (i) a relatively large number of trials larger than $100$ is required for accurate tuning, (ii) using default values for hyperparameters yields very inaccurate models, (iii) all considered hyperparameters can have a material effect on the accuracy of tree-boosting, i.e., there is no small set of hyperparameters that is more important than others, and (iv) choosing the number of boosting iterations using early stopping yields more accurate results compared to including it in the search space for regression tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 论文通过大规模实验比较了多种树提升超参数优化方法，发现SMAC方法显著优于其他方法，并提供了实用建议。
light_analysis.motivation: 树提升是表格数据中广泛使用的机器学习技术，但其超参数对精度影响极大。现有超参数优化方法众多，但缺乏全面、系统的比较研究。作者旨在通过59个回归和分类数据集，实证评估随机网格搜索、TPE、GP-BO、Hyperband、SMAC和确定性全网格搜索等方法的性能，以指导实践者选择最佳调优策略。
light_analysis.method: 论文使用59个回归和分类数据集，系统评估了六种超参数优化方法：随机网格搜索、TPE、GP-BO、Hyperband、SMAC和确定性全网格搜索。实验固定树提升模型，对每个方法进行大量试验（>100次），并对比默认参数、不同超参数重要性及早停策略的影响。核心创新在于提供了大规模、可控的实验比较框架。
light_analysis.result: SMAC方法在所有对比方法中表现最佳，显著优于随机搜索和贝叶斯优化等。研究发现：需要超过100次试验才能准确调优；默认超参数导致模型精度很低；所有超参数均有重要影响，无特别关键子集；对于回归任务，将早停用于选择迭代次数比将其纳入搜索空间效果更好。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文为树提升超参数优化提供了实证指南：推荐使用SMAC方法，确保足够试验次数，避免默认参数，并注意回归任务中早停的优越性。研究有助于提升树提升模型在实际应用中的精度和效率，但未探讨深度学习或不同树提升实现的泛化性，未来可扩展至其他模型族。

title: Optimization and Generation in Aerodynamics Inverse Design
abstract: Aerodynamic inverse design can improve vehicle and aircraft efficiency, but practical design rarely seeks performance alone: vehicle refinement must reduce drag while preserving visual features linked to design language, brand recognition and user perception. Traditional CFD-driven optimization is accurate but slow for broad exploration, and current learning-based methods are still largely performance-driven and lack a coherent target linking optimization, generation and visual consistency. Here we formulate visual preservation and aerodynamic improvement as one probability target. Designs consistent with a reference shape or view define a learned visual design distribution, which is reweighted by aerodynamic cost. Optimization then refines an initial geometry toward a low-cost, high-probability design, whereas guided generation samples lower-cost 3D candidates from the same input view. OpenFOAM evaluation shows that visual-feature-preserving optimization reduces vehicle drag by 5.8\% relative to the initial vehicle and reduces the best valid aircraft drag-to-lift objective by 28.8\% relative to the initial aircraft while preserving input visual features. For view-based generation, guidance reduces vehicle drag by 3.0\% and the aircraft drag-to-lift objective by 68.6\% relative to direct generation from the same view, while maintaining visual consistency. Wind-tunnel tests with 3D-printed vehicle prototypes provide an independent wake-level check, and controlled analyses explain the distributional mechanisms behind these results. This work provides a probabilistic foundation and practical route for visual-feature-preserving aerodynamic refinement and early-stage 3D design exploration.

light_analysis.overview: 将视觉保留与空气动力学改进统一为概率目标，实现高效逆设计。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统CFD驱动优化准确但速度慢，难以进行广泛探索；现有学习方法仍以性能驱动为主，缺乏连接优化、生成和视觉一致性的连贯目标。实际设计中，车辆改进需在减阻的同时保留与设计语言、品牌识别和用户感知相关的视觉特征。因此，需要一种既能提升气动性能又能保持视觉特征的统一方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出一个概率框架，将视觉保留与气动改进结合：学习与参考形状或视角一致的视觉设计分布，并用气动成本重新加权。优化阶段从初始几何体细化至低成本高概率设计；引导生成阶段从同一输入视角采样低成本3D候选。使用OpenFOAM进行气动评估。
light_analysis.result: 视觉特征保留优化使车辆阻力相对初始降低5.8%，飞机阻升比降低28.8%。基于视角的引导生成相比直接生成：车辆阻力降低3.0%，飞机阻升比降低68.6%。所有结果保持视觉一致性。3D打印车辆模型风洞实验独立验证了尾流特征，控制实验解释了分布机制。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为视觉保留气动改进提供了概率基础和实用路线，实现了高效的早期3D设计探索和优化。方法统一了优化与生成，可应用于车辆和飞机设计。未来可拓展至更复杂的约束条件和多视角场景。

title: Achieving Linear Speedup for Composite Federated Learning
