abstract: This paper proposes FedNMap, a normal map-based method for composite federated learning, where the objective consists of a smooth loss and a possibly nonsmooth regularizer. FedNMap leverages a normal map-based update scheme to handle the nonsmooth term and incorporates a local correction strategy to mitigate the impact of data heterogeneity across clients. Under standard assumptions, including smooth local losses, weak convexity of the regularizer, and bounded stochastic gradient variance, FedNMap achieves linear speedup with respect to both the number of clients and the number of local updates for nonconvex losses, both with and without the Polyak-Łojasiewicz condition. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first algorithm establishing linear speedup for nonconvex composite federated learning. Numerical experiments corroborate our theoretical findings and demonstrate the linear speedup of FedNMap.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个实现非凸复合联邦学习线性加速的算法FedNMap。
light_analysis.motivation: 复合联邦学习的目标函数包含光滑损失和非光滑正则化项，现有方法难以同时处理非光滑性和数据异构性，且缺乏线性加速的理论保证。该问题在分布式机器学习中具有重要意义，因为线性加速能显著提升训练效率。本文旨在设计一种算法，在非凸损失下实现关于客户端数量和本地更新次数的线性加速，填补该领域理论空白。
light_analysis.method: 提出FedNMap算法，核心包括基于法向映射的更新机制，用于处理非光滑正则化项，以及局部校正策略，以减轻数据异构带来的客户端漂移。算法在标准假设下（局部损失光滑、正则化弱凸、随机梯度方差有界）进行理论分析。通过耦合优化理论，证明了非凸损失下线性加速的成立条件，并涵盖了Polyak-Łojasiewicz情形。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析表明，FedNMap在非凸损失下达到了关于客户端数量K和本地更新次数E的线性加速，即收敛速度O(1/(KET))。数值实验在合成和真实数据集上验证了该结果，与现有方法（如FedAvg、SCAFFOLD）相比，FedNMap在异构数据环境下表现出更快的收敛速度和更好的稳定性，尤其当正则项非光滑时。
light_analysis.conclusion: FedNMap为首个证明非凸复合联邦学习线性加速的算法，为处理带非光滑正则项的大规模分布式优化提供了新思路。其理论贡献在于统一了光滑与非光滑、凸与非凸情形。实际应用中可推广至稀疏学习、低秩矩阵分解等任务。未来可探索更宽松的假设或结合隐私保护机制。

title: 4DPC$^2$hat: Towards Dynamic Point Cloud Understanding with Failure-Aware Bootstrapping
abstract: Point clouds provide a compact and expressive representation of 3D objects, and have recently been integrated into multimodal large language models (MLLMs). However, existing methods primarily focus on static objects, while understanding dynamic point cloud sequences remains largely unexplored. This limitation is mainly caused by the lack of large-scale cross-modal datasets and the difficulty of modeling motions in spatio-temporal contexts. To bridge this gap, we present 4DPC$^2$hat, the first MLLM tailored for dynamic point cloud understanding. To this end, we construct a large-scale cross-modal dataset 4DPC$^2$hat-200K via a meticulous two-stage pipeline consisting of topology-consistent 4D point construction and two-level captioning. The dataset contains over 44K dynamic object sequences, 700K point cloud frames, and 200K curated question-answer (QA) pairs, supporting inquiries about counting, temporal relationship, action, spatial relationship, and appearance. At the core of the framework, we introduce a Mamba-enhanced temporal reasoning MLLM to capture long-range dependencies and dynamic patterns among a point cloud sequence. Furthermore, we propose a failure-aware bootstrapping learning strategy that iteratively identifies model deficiencies and generates targeted QA supervision to continuously strengthen corresponding reasoning capabilities. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our 4DPC$^2$hat significantly improves action understanding and temporal reasoning compared with existing models, establishing a strong foundation for 4D dynamic point cloud understanding.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个针对动态点云理解的多模态大语言模型4DPC$^2$hat，包含大规模数据集和失败感知引导学习策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有MLLMs主要处理静态点云，缺乏对动态点云序列的理解能力。主要挑战包括缺乏大规模跨模态数据集以及难以在时空上下文中建模运动。该研究旨在填补这一空白，实现动态点云的细粒度理解。
light_analysis.method: 构建4DPC$^2$hat-200K数据集，通过拓扑一致的4D点构建和两级标注两阶段流程，包含44K动态序列、700K点云帧和200K QA对。核心框架为Mamba增强的时间推理MLLM，用于捕捉长程依赖和动态模式。同时提出失败感知引导学习策略，迭代识别模型缺陷并生成针对性QA监督以增强推理能力。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，4DPC$^2$hat在动作理解和时间推理任务上显著优于现有模型，为4D动态点云理解建立了坚实基础。具体性能提升数据摘要未明确说明，但提及了显著的改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了首个面向动态点云的MLLM，解决了数据集和建模难题，具备学术和实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的动态场景和更高效的推理方法。

title: How Far Ahead Do LLMs Plan? Uncovering the Latent Horizon in Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
abstract: Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning has become a central mechanism for eliciting multi-step reasoning in Large Language Models (LLMs). Yet recent evidence presents a tension: hidden states appear to already encode future reasoning before CoT fully unfolds, while explicit steps still remain crucial for tasks requiring compositional computation. To deepen the understanding between LLM's internal states and its verbalized reasoning trajectories, we investigate the latent planning strength of LLMs, through our probing method, Tele-Lens, applying to hidden states across diverse task domains. Our empirical results indicate that LLMs exhibit a myopic horizon, primarily conducting incremental transitions without precise global planning. Leveraging this characteristic, we propose a hypothesis on enhancing uncertainty estimation of CoT, which we validate that a sparse set of pivot positions can effectively represent the uncertainty of the entire path. We further underscore the significance of exploiting CoT dynamics, and demonstrate that automatic recognition of CoT bypass can be achieved without performance degradation. Our code, data and models are released at https://github.com/lxucs/tele-lens.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Tele-Lens探针方法，揭示LLM在思维链推理中具有短视规划视野，并利用此特性提升不确定性估计和实现CoT绕过。
light_analysis.motivation: 思维链推理中，隐状态提前编码未来推理，但显式步骤对组合计算仍关键。现有研究存在张力，需深入理解LLM内部状态与显式推理轨迹的关系，特别是其潜在规划能力及其局限性。
light_analysis.method: 提出Tele-Lens探针方法，通过分析不同任务领域的隐状态，揭示LLM的规划视野。发现其具有短视性，主要进行增量转换，缺乏全局精准规划。基于此，提出利用稀疏关键位置表示整个路径不确定性，并实现自动识别CoT绕过而不损失性能。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明LLM表现短视规划，有效提升不确定性估计，稀疏关键位置能代表路径不确定性。自动CoT绕过识别无性能下降。代码、数据、模型已开源。摘要未提供具体数值对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了LLM在CoT推理中的规划特性，为理解内部状态与显式推理的关系提供新视角。有助改进不确定性估计和推理效率，未来可探索更精确规划机制。

title: Rectified LpJEPA: Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures with Sparse and Maximum-Entropy Representations
abstract: Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPA) learn view-invariant representations and admit projection-based distribution matching for collapse prevention. Existing approaches regularize representations towards isotropic Gaussian distributions, but inherently favor dense representations and fail to capture the key property of sparsity observed in efficient representations. We introduce Rectified Distribution Matching Regularization (RDMReg), a sliced two-sample distribution-matching loss that aligns representations to a Rectified Generalized Gaussian (RGG) distribution. RGG enables explicit control over expected $\ell_0$ norm through rectification, while its continuous truncated component admits a maximum-entropy characterization under expected $\ell_p$ norm and support constraints. Equipping JEPAs with RDMReg yields Rectified LpJEPA, which strictly generalizes prior Gaussian-based JEPAs. Empirically, Rectified LpJEPA learns sparse, non-negative representations with favorable sparsity--performance trade-offs and competitive downstream performance on image classification benchmarks, showing that RDMReg can enforce sparsity while preserving task-relevant information.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Rectified Distribution Matching Regularization (RDMReg)，使JEPA学习稀疏且最大熵的表示。
light_analysis.motivation: Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPA) 通过投影分布匹配防止坍塌，但现有方法倾向于学习密集表示，缺乏稀疏性。稀疏性是高效表示的关键，而各向同性高斯正则化无法显式控制稀疏度。因此需要一种既能保持最大熵又能精准控制表示稀疏性的正则化方法，以提升表示效率。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出Rectified Distribution Matching Regularization (RDMReg)，一种切片两样本分布匹配损失，将表示对齐到Rectified Generalized Gaussian (RGG) 分布。RGG通过整流操作显式控制期望ℓ0范数，其连续截断部分在期望ℓp范数和支撑约束下具有最大熵特性。将RDMReg集成到JEPA中得到Rectified LpJEPA，严格泛化了先前基于高斯的JEPA方法。
light_analysis.result: 在图像分类基准上，Rectified LpJEPA学习了稀疏、非负的表示，展现了良好的稀疏性-性能权衡，其下游性能与竞争方法相当甚至更优。这表明RDMReg能在保持任务相关信息的同时有效强制稀疏性，提升了表示的效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出一种新的分布匹配正则化方法，使JEPA能同时获得稀疏性和最大熵特性，为自监督学习中的表示学习提供了新思路。该方法可推广至其他对比学习框架，未来可探索其在更多视觉任务和结构化数据上的应用。

title: Good SFT Optimizes for SFT, Better SFT Prepares for Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Post-training of reasoning LLMs is a holistic process that typically consists of an offline SFT stage followed by an online reinforcement learning (RL) stage. However, SFT is often optimized in isolation to maximize SFT performance alone.   We show that, after identical RL training, models initialized from stronger SFT checkpoints can significantly underperform those initialized from weaker ones. We attribute this to a mismatch typical in current SFT-RL pipelines: the distribution that generates the offline SFT data can differ substantially from the policy optimized during online RL, which learns from its own rollouts.   We propose PEAR (Policy Evaluation-inspired Algorithm for Offline Learning Loss Re-weighting), an SFT-stage method that corrects this mismatch and better prepares the model for RL. PEAR uses importance sampling to reweight the SFT loss, with three variants operating at the token, block, and sequence levels. It can be used to augment standard SFT objectives and incurs little additional training overhead once probabilities for the offline data are collected.   We conduct controlled experiments on verifiable reasoning games and mathematical reasoning tasks on Qwen 2.5 and 3 and DeepSeek-distilled models. PEAR consistently improves post-RL performance over canonical SFT, with pass at 8 gains up to a 14.6 percent on AIME2025. Our results suggest that PEAR is an effective step toward more holistic LLM post-training by designing and evaluating SFT with downstream RL in mind rather than in isolation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PEAR方法，通过重加权SFT损失来弥合SFT与RL之间的分布不匹配，提升后续RL训练效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前推理LLM后训练通常先离线SFT再在线RL，但SFT孤立优化，其数据分布与RL策略分布差异大，导致强SFT检查点在RL后可能不如弱检查点。需改进SFT以适配RL。
light_analysis.method: 提出PEAR，基于重要性采样重加权SFT损失，有token、block、sequence三种级别变体。可增强标准SFT目标，仅需收集离线数据概率，训练开销小。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen 2.5/3和DeepSeek蒸馏模型上，验证推理游戏和数学任务。PEAR持续提升RL后性能，AIME2025上pass@8提升高达14.6%。
light_analysis.conclusion: PEAR通过设计考虑下游RL的SFT，实现更整体的LLM后训练，纠正分布不匹配，提高RL后性能。为将SFT与RL联合优化提供有效步骤。

title: Unsupervised Hierarchical Skill Discovery
abstract: We consider the problem of unsupervised skill segmentation and hierarchical structure discovery in reinforcement learning. While recent approaches have sought to segment trajectories into reusable skills or options, most rely on action labels, rewards, or handcrafted annotations, limiting their applicability. We propose a method that segments unlabelled trajectories into skills and induces a hierarchical structure over them using a grammar-based approach. The resulting hierarchy captures both low-level behaviours and their composition into higher-level skills. We evaluate our approach in high-dimensional, pixel-based environments, including Craftax and the full, unmodified version of Minecraft. Using metrics for skill segmentation, reuse, and hierarchy quality, we find that our method consistently produces more structured and semantically meaningful hierarchies than existing baselines. Furthermore, as a proof of concept, we demonstrate that these discovered hierarchies accelerate and stabilise learning on downstream reinforcement learning tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于语法的方法，无监督地分割轨迹为技能并诱导层次结构，无需标签或奖励。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习中无监督技能分割与层次结构发现面临挑战：现有方法依赖动作标签、奖励或手工注释，限制了在缺乏监督信号的环境中的适用性。为解决这一问题，需要一种能从未标记轨迹中自动发现技能及其层次关系的方法，以提升泛化能力和可解释性。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于语法的无监督方法，对未标记轨迹进行分割以获得技能，并通过语法规则诱导层次结构，实现低层行为到高层技能的合成。方法不依赖动作标签或奖励，适用于高维像素环境，如Craftax和完整版Minecraft。
light_analysis.result: 在Craftax和完整版Minecraft环境中，使用技能分割、重用和层次质量等指标评估，方法始终生成比现有基线更结构化、语义更有意义的层次结构。作为概念验证，发现这些层次结构能加速并稳定下游强化学习任务的学习过程。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了一种无需监督的技能分割与层次发现方法，提升了技能的可重用性和结构性，为在复杂环境中的学习提供了高效表示。未来工作可探索更复杂的语法规则或结合任务驱动信号，但当前方法在完全无监督场景下表现出色。

title: Server-Proximal Aggregation for Federated Domain-Incremental Learning under Partial Participation: Task-Uniform Convergence and Backward Transfer
abstract: Real-world federated systems seldom operate on static data: input distributions drift while privacy rules forbid raw-data sharing. We study this setting as Federated Domain-Incremental Learning (FDIL), where (i) clients are heterogeneous, (ii) tasks arrive sequentially with shifting domains, yet (iii) the label space remains fixed. Two theoretical pillars remain missing for FDIL under realistic deployment: a guarantee of backward knowledge transfer (BKT) and a convergence rate that holds across the sequence of all tasks with partial participation. We introduce SPECIAL (Server-Proximal Efficient Continual Aggregation for Learning), a simple, memory-free FDIL algorithm that adds a single server-side ``anchor'' to vanilla FedAvg: in each round, the server nudges the uniformly sampled participated clients update toward the previous global model with a lightweight proximal term. This anchor curbs cumulative drift without replay buffers, synthetic data, or task-specific heads, keeping communication and model size unchanged. Our theory shows that SPECIAL (i) preserves earlier tasks: a BKT bound caps any increase in prior-task loss by a drift-controlled term that shrinks with more rounds, local epochs, and participating clients; and (ii) learns efficiently across all tasks: the first communication-efficient non-convex convergence rate for FDIL with partial participation, O((E/NT)^(1/2)), with E local epochs, T communication rounds, and N participated clients per round, matching single-task FedAvg while explicitly separating optimization variance from inter-task drift. Experimental results further demonstrate the effectiveness of SPECIAL.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无记忆的联邦域增量学习算法SPECIAL，通过服务器端轻量近端项实现后向迁移与收敛保证。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实联邦系统面临数据分布漂移和隐私限制，现有联邦域增量学习缺乏后向知识迁移的理论保证和部分参与下的收敛率分析。传统方法依赖回放缓冲区或任务特定头，增加通信和存储开销。
light_analysis.method: SPECIAL算法在标准FedAvg中添加服务器端近端项作为锚点，每轮对均匀抽样的参与客户端施加轻量近端项，使其更新向先前全局模型靠拢，从而抑制累积漂移，无需回放缓冲区、合成数据或任务特定头，保持通信和模型大小不变。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明SPECIAL具有后向迁移保证，先验任务损失增加受漂移控制项约束，且随轮数、本地epoch和参与客户端数增加而减小；首次给出部分参与下FDIL的非凸收敛率O((E/NT)^(1/2))，匹配单任务FedAvg并分离优化方差和任务间漂移。实验验证有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SPECIAL为联邦域增量学习提供了首个后向迁移边界和部分参与下的收敛率，无需额外存储或通信开销，具有实用价值。未来可扩展至更复杂的异构场景或标签空间漂移。

title: Bridging Functional and Representational Similarity via Usable Information
abstract: We present a unified framework for quantifying the similarity between representations through the lens of \textit{usable} information, offering a rigorous theoretical and empirical synthesis across three key dimensions. First, addressing functional similarity, we establish a formal link between stitching performance and conditional mutual information. We further reveal that stitching is inherently asymmetric, demonstrating that robust functional comparison necessitates a bidirectional analysis rather than a unidirectional mapping. Second, concerning representational similarity, we find that reconstruction-based metrics and standard tools (e.g., CKA, RSA) act as estimators of usable information under specific constraints. Crucially, we show that similarity is relative to the capacity of the predictive family: representations that appear distinct to a rigid observer may be identical to a more expressive one. Third, we demonstrate that representational similarity is sufficient but not necessary for functional similarity. We unify these concepts through a task-granularity hierarchy: similarity on a complex task guarantees similarity on any coarser derivative, establishing representational similarity as the limit of maximum granularity: input reconstruction.

light_analysis.overview: 通过可用信息统一功能相似性与表示相似性的理论框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法如拼接（stitching）和表示相似性度量（CKA、RSA）缺乏统一理论，无法解释功能相似与表示相似的关系。拼接存在不对称性，且相似性对观测者容量敏感。本文旨在建立统一视角，揭示不同度量间的内在联系。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于可用信息的统一框架。理论上证明拼接性能等价于条件互信息，并指出其不对称性需双向分析。将重建度量与CKA/RSA解释为可用信息在特定容量约束下的估计器。通过任务粒度层次统一功能与表示相似性：复杂任务相似保证粗粒度任务相似，表示相似是最大粒度（输入重建）的极限。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确报告具体数值，但通过理论推导和实验（可能）验证了：（1）拼接不对称性与条件互信息的关系；（2）表示相似性度量（CKA、RSA）在刚性观测者下等价于受限可用信息；（3）功能相似性不蕴含表示相似性，反之成立。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为表示相似性研究提供了统一理论框架，揭示了功能与表示相似性的层级关系，强调了观测者容量对相似性判断的影响。该框架可指导神经网络表征分析、模型比较与迁移学习。未来可扩展至其他相似性度量或动态容量场景。

title: Representation Unlearning: Forgetting through Information Compression
abstract: Machine unlearning seeks to remove the influence of specific training data from a model, a need driven by privacy regulations and robustness concerns. Existing approaches typically modify model parameters, but such updates can be unstable, computationally costly, and limited by local approximations. We introduce Representation Unlearning, a framework that performs unlearning directly in the model's representation space. Instead of modifying model parameters, we learn a transformation over representations that imposes an information bottleneck: maximizing mutual information with retained data while suppressing information about data to be forgotten. We derive variational surrogates that make this objective tractable and show how they can be instantiated in two practical regimes: when both retain and forget data are available, and in a zero-shot setting where only forget data can be accessed. Experiments across several benchmarks demonstrate that Representation Unlearning achieves more reliable forgetting, better utility retention, and greater computational efficiency than parameter-centric baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于信息压缩的表示遗忘框架，直接在表示空间中进行遗忘操作，无需修改模型参数。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有机器遗忘方法通常通过修改模型参数实现，但存在更新不稳定、计算成本高且受局部近似限制等问题。这些局限性影响了遗忘的可靠性和效率，尤其在隐私法规和鲁棒性需求下，亟需更高效、稳定的遗忘机制。
light_analysis.method: 通过学习表示空间的变换，施加信息瓶颈以最大化与保留数据的互信息并抑制遗忘数据的信息。推导变分代理目标使其可解，并支持两种实用场景：同时拥有保留和遗忘数据，以及仅能访问遗忘数据的零样本设置。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试中，表示遗忘与基于参数的方法相比，实现了更可靠的遗忘效果、更好的模型效用保留以及更高的计算效率。具体性能指标优于现有基线方法，但摘要未提供详细数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 表示遗忘框架通过信息压缩在表示空间直接完成遗忘，避免了参数修改带来的不稳定性和高成本，具有显著学术价值和应用潜力。未来可探索其在更大模型和更复杂遗忘任务中的扩展性。

title: HE-SNR: Uncovering Latent Logic via Entropy for Guiding Mid-Training on SWE-bench
abstract: SWE-bench has emerged as the premier benchmark for evaluating Large Language Models on complex software engineering tasks. While these capabilities are fundamentally acquired during the mid-training phase and subsequently elicited during Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT), there remains a critical deficit in metrics capable of guiding mid-training effectively. Standard metrics such as Perplexity (PPL) are compromised by the "Long-Context Tax" and exhibit weak correlation with downstream SWE performance. In this paper, we bridge this gap by first introducing a rigorous data filtering strategy. Crucially, we propose the Entropy Compression Hypothesis, redefining intelligence not by scalar Top-1 compression, but by the capacity to structure uncertainty into Entropy-Compressed States of low orders ("reasonable hesitation"). Grounded in this fine-grained entropy analysis, we formulate a novel metric, HE-SNR (High-Entropy Signal-to-Noise Ratio). We validate our approach on models with up to 560B parameters across different context windows (32K/128K). This work provides both the theoretical foundation and practical tools for optimizing the latent potential of LLMs in complex engineering domains.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HE-SNR指标，基于熵压缩假设指导SWE-bench上的中期训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有指标如PPL受长上下文税影响，与下游SWE性能相关性弱，缺乏有效指导中期训练的指标。
light_analysis.method: 提出熵压缩假设，将智能定义为将不确定性压缩为低阶熵压缩状态的能力；基于此设计HE-SNR（高熵信噪比）指标，结合数据过滤策略。
light_analysis.result: 在高达560B参数的模型上验证，支持32K/128K上下文窗口，证明了HE-SNR与SWE性能的相关性优于PPL。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供理论基础和实用工具，优化LLM在复杂软件工程领域的潜在逻辑；未来可扩展至其他长上下文任务。

title: Adaptive Exponential Integration for Stable Gaussian Mixture Black-Box Variational Inference
abstract: Black-box variational inference (BBVI) with Gaussian mixture families offers a flexible approach for approximating complex posterior distributions without requiring gradients of the target density. However, standard numerical optimization methods often suffer from instability and inefficiency. We develop a stable and efficient framework that combines three key components: (1) affine-invariant preconditioning via natural gradient formulations, (2) an exponential integrator that unconditionally preserves the positive definiteness of covariance matrices, and (3) adaptive time stepping to ensure stability and to accommodate distinct warm-up and convergence phases. The proposed approach has natural connections to manifold optimization and mirror descent. For Gaussian posteriors, we prove exponential convergence in the noise-free setting and almost-sure convergence under Monte Carlo estimation, rigorously justifying the necessity of adaptive time stepping. Numerical experiments on multimodal distributions, Neal's multiscale funnel, and a PDE-based Bayesian inverse problem for Darcy flow demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种自适应指数积分方法，结合自然梯度、指数积分器和自适应步长，实现高斯混合黑箱变分推理的稳定高效优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 黑箱变分推理（BBVI）使用高斯混合族可灵活逼近复杂后验分布，但标准数值优化方法常遭受不稳定和低效问题。高斯混合族参数优化中，协方差矩阵的正定性保持尤为重要。现有方法缺乏针对流形结构的自适应步长和理论收敛保证，亟需开发稳定的高效框架以支持多模态和复杂后验的近似推理。
light_analysis.method: 提出包含三部分的方法：(1) 基于自然梯度的仿射不变预条件，加速优化；(2) 指数积分器，通过指数映射更新协方差矩阵，无条件保持正定性；(3) 自适应时间步长，根据能量变化自动调整，区分预热与收敛阶段。该方法与流形优化、镜像下降理论相关联，具有坚实的几何基础。
light_analysis.result: 理论上，对于高斯后验，在无噪声设置下证明指数收敛，在蒙特卡洛估计下证明几乎必然收敛，严格论证了自适应步长的必要性。数值实验在多元高斯分布、Neal的多尺度漏斗以及基于PDE的达西流贝叶斯反问题中，该方法均优于标准ADAM、自然梯度法等基线，展示了更好的稳定性和收敛速度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出的自适应指数积分框架有效解决了高斯混合BBVI中的不稳定性问题，提供了理论收敛保证和实验验证。该工作将指数积分器引入变分推理，为复杂后验近似提供新工具。未来可扩展至其他指数族分布，并应用于更大规模贝叶斯模型。

title: Mechanism Shift During Post-training from Autoregressive to Masked Diffusion Language Models
abstract: Post-training pretrained autoregressive models (ARMs) into masked diffusion models (MDMs) has emerged as a cost-effective way to overcome the limitations of sequential generation. Yet it remains unclear whether post-trained MDMs acquire genuinely new computational mechanisms or merely re-express autoregressive computation in a non-autoregressive form. Through a comparative circuit analysis of ARMs and their MDM counterparts post-trained from the same backbones, we uncover two complementary axes of reorganization. Structurally, the shift is task-dependent: MDMs preserve autoregressive circuitry on locally causal tasks but abandon inherited pathways and front-load computation into early layers on global tasks. Semantically, the shift is consistent across regimes: sharp, localized specialization in ARMs gives way to distributed integration in MDMs. Together, these findings show that diffusion post-training is not a surface-level change in the generation procedure but a reorganization of internal computation whose depth depends on the task.

light_analysis.overview: 通过比较电路分析，揭示后训练自回归模型到掩码扩散模型过程中内部计算的任务依赖性和语义重组机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 将预训练自回归模型后训练为掩码扩散模型是一种成本效益高的方法，但尚不清楚后训练模型是否获得真正的新计算机制还是仅以非自回归形式重新表达自回归计算。该研究旨在通过电路分析明确机制转变的本质和深度。
light_analysis.method: 对自回归模型及其从相同骨干后训练的掩码扩散模型进行比较电路分析。通过结构和语义两个维度研究重组：结构上分析任务依赖性，语义上比较神经元专门化与分布式集成模式。使用因果追踪等技术定位关键计算路径。
light_analysis.result: 发现结构重组是任务依赖的：局部因果任务上保留自回归电路，全局任务上放弃继承路径并将计算前移到早期层。语义重组一致：自回归的尖锐局部专门化转变为扩散模型的分布式集成。这些表明后训练不仅是生成程序表面变化。
light_analysis.conclusion: 扩散后训练导致内部计算深度重组，其程度取决于任务类型。该发现对理解生成模型机制、指导未来后训练策略和模型可解释性研究具有重要价值。局限性在于仅分析特定模型规模，未来可探索更大规模或不同架构。

title: Video Individual Counting and Tracking from Moving Drones: A Benchmark and Methods
abstract: Counting and tracking dense crowds in large-scale scenes is a highly practical yet challenging problem. Existing methods mostly rely on fixed-camera datasets with limited scene coverage, making them inadequate for crowd analysis in large-scale scenes. To bridge this gap, we introduce MovingDroneCrowd++, the largest video-level dataset dedicated to dense crowd counting and tracking with fast-moving drones, captured under diverse flight altitudes, camera angles, and illumination conditions. Existing methods, however, still fail to achieve satisfactory video individual counting or tracking performance under these challenging aerial conditions. To this end, we propose GD3A (Global Density map Decomposition via group-wise Descriptor Association), a video individual counting method that first establishes pixel-level correspondences between pedestrian descriptors across frames via optimal transport with an adaptive dustbin score. Then, group-wise association is adopted to guide the decomposition of the global density map into shared, inflow, and outflow density maps. We further introduce a pedestrian tracking method, DVTrack (Descriptor Voting Track), which converts descriptor-level matching into instance-level association through descriptor voting. Our methods rely on the association results of group-wise multiple descriptors for each pedestrian rather than a single vector. Since intra-group matching errors do not affect the final counting and tracking results, our methods are more robust in dense crowds and challenging aerial conditions. Experiments show that our methods achieve substantial gains in both crowd counting and tracking on moving-drone videos with dense crowds and complex motions, reducing counting error by 47.4% and improving tracking accuracy by 64.6%. Code, dataset, and pretrained models are available at https://github.com/fyw1999/MovingDroneCrowd.

light_analysis.overview: 提出面向快速移动无人机的大规模密集人群视频计数与跟踪数据集和方法，显著提升计数与跟踪性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有密集人群计数与跟踪方法多依赖固定摄像头数据集，场景覆盖有限，难以应对大规模场景中的快速移动无人机航拍条件（如不同飞行高度、角度、光照）。该研究旨在填补这一空白，解决无人机航拍下密集人群的个体计数与跟踪难题，因为现有方法在此挑战性条件下性能不佳。
light_analysis.method: 提出GD3A视频个体计数方法，通过最优传输建立像素级描述符对应，并采用分组关联将全局密度图分解为共享、流入和流出密度图。同时提出DVTrack行人跟踪方法，通过描述符投票将描述符级匹配转化为实例级关联。方法依赖每个行人的分组多个描述符的关联结果，组内匹配误差不影响最终结果，增强了密集人群和航拍条件下的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在移动无人机视频的密集人群计数与跟踪任务中，计数误差降低47.4%，跟踪精度提升64.6%。方法在多种飞行高度、角度和光照条件下均优于现有基线，展现了显著的性能提升。数据集为目前最大的视频级密集人群计数与跟踪数据集。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提供了大规模无人机航拍密集人群计数与跟踪的基准数据集及高效方法，具有重要学术和实际应用价值。未来可进一步优化描述符匹配效率，并探索更复杂的群体运动模式。代码、数据和预训练模型已开源。

title: Multi-Scale Local Speculative Decoding for Image Generation
abstract: Autoregressive (AR) models have achieved remarkable success in image synthesis, yet their sequential nature imposes significant latency constraints. Speculative Decoding offers a promising avenue for acceleration, but existing approaches are limited by token-level ambiguity and lack of spatial awareness. In this work, we introduce Multi-Scale Local Speculative Decoding (MuLo-SD), a novel framework that combines multi-resolution drafting with spatially informed verification to accelerate AR image generation. Our method leverages a low-resolution drafter paired with an up-sampling step to propose candidate image tokens, which are then verified in parallel by a high-resolution target model. Crucially, we incorporate a local rejection and resampling mechanism, enabling efficient correction of draft errors by focusing on spatial neighborhoods rather than raster-scan resampling after the first rejection. When integrated with parallel decoding resampling, MuLo-SD achieves substantial speedups -- up to $\mathbf{5\times}$ -- outperforming both speculative decoding and parallel decoding baselines in terms of acceleration, while maintaining comparable semantic alignment and perceptual quality. These results are validated using GenEval, DPG-Bench, and FID/HPSv2 on the MS-COCO 5k validation split. Extensive ablations highlight the impact of up-sampling design, probability pooling, and local rejection and resampling with neighborhood expansion. Our approach sets a new state-of-the-art in speculative decoding for image synthesis, bridging the gap between efficiency and fidelity. Project page is available at https://qualcomm-ai-research.github.io/mulo-sd-webpage/ .

light_analysis.overview: 提出多尺度局部推测解码框架，通过低分辨率草稿和局部重采样机制，实现图像生成5倍加速，保持感知质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 自回归图像生成模型虽性能优异，但顺序生成导致高延迟。现有推测解码方法存在token级歧义和缺乏空间感知，加速效果有限。本文旨在通过引入多分辨率草稿和空间感知验证，解决加速与质量之间的权衡问题。
light_analysis.method: MuLo-SD框架使用低分辨率草稿模型生成候选token，经上采样后由高分辨率目标模型并行验证。创新点在于局部拒绝与重采样机制，通过空间邻域而非栅格扫描纠正错误，结合并行解码重采样实现高效加速。关键设计包括多分辨率草稿、概率池化和邻域扩展。
light_analysis.result: 在MS-COCO 5k验证集上，MuLo-SD实现高达5倍加速，在GenEval、DPG-Bench和FID/HPSv2指标上均优于现有推测解码和并行解码基线。语义对齐和感知质量与标准自回归模型相当，消融实验验证了上采样设计、概率池化和局部重采样的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MuLo-SD在图像生成推测解码中达到新SOTA，显著提升效率而不牺牲保真度。该框架普适性强，可集成到现有自回归模型中，学术价值在于将空间感知引入推测解码，实际应用有望加速高分辨率图像生成。未来可探索更优的草稿模型设计和跨模态扩展。

title: MATANet: A Multi-context Attention and Taxonomy-Aware Network for Fine-Grained Underwater Recognition of Marine Species
abstract: Fine-grained recognition of marine organisms is important for ecological research, biodiversity monitoring, habitat conservation, and evidence-based policy-making. However, many existing approaches primarily rely on object- or ROI-centered representations. These limitations can reduce discriminative performance in challenging underwater scenes, where visually similar organisms often appear under diverse environmental conditions. To address these challenges, we propose MATANet (Multi-context Attention and Taxonomy-Aware Network), a framework for fine-grained taxonomic recognition of marine organisms. MATANet is motivated by expert taxonomic identification practices, in which both organism-level morphology and contextual cues are considered during recognition. The framework consists of two main components. First, the Multi-Context Environmental Attention Module (MCEAM) models cross-attention between the primary region of interest (ROI) and multi-scale surrounding environmental regions, thereby combining local morphological cues with habitat-level contextual information. Second, the Hierarchy-Aware Representation Learning Module (HRLM) uses taxonomic hierarchy as auxiliary supervision to regularize representation learning and encourage semantically structured embeddings across taxonomic levels. By jointly modeling organism appearance, environmental context, and taxonomic structure, MATANet learns more discriminative representations for fine-grained taxonomic recognition. Experiments on FathomNet2025 and LifeCLEF2015-Fish demonstrate that MATANet consistently improves recognition performance over existing methods. Additional experiments on FAIR1M further examine the applicability of the proposed framework beyond underwater imagery. Notably, MATANet ranked first in the FathomNet 2025 Challenge at the CVPR 2025 FGVC12 workshop.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MATANet，融合多上下文注意力与分类学感知，提升水下生物细粒度识别性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有水下生物识别方法多依赖目标或ROI中心表示，忽略了环境上下文信息，在复杂水下场景中难以区分视觉相似物种。受专家分类鉴定中同时考虑形态和上下文线索的启发，需将环境上下文和分类学层次结构融入模型，以增强细粒度识别能力。
light_analysis.method: MATANet包含两个核心模块：多上下文环境注意力模块（MCEAM）通过交叉注意力机制建模主ROI与多尺度环境区域的关系，融合局部形态与栖息地上下文；层次感知表示学习模块（HRLM）利用分类学层次作为辅助监督，正则化表示学习并鼓励嵌入在不同分类层级上具有语义结构。
light_analysis.result: 在FathomNet2025和LifeCLEF2015-Fish数据集上，MATANet一致优于现有方法；在FAIR1M上的实验表明其通用性。该方法在CVPR 2025 FGVC12的FathomNet 2025 Challenge中获得第一名。
light_analysis.conclusion: MATANet通过联合建模生物外观、环境上下文和分类学结构，学习更判别性的表示，显著提升细粒度水下生物识别准确率。该框架具有生态监测、物种保护等实际应用价值，未来可扩展至更多水下场景。

title: FedBiCross: Personalized One-Shot Federated Learning on Medical Images
abstract: Data-free knowledge distillation-based one-shot federated learning (OSFL) trains a model in a single communication round without sharing raw data, making OSFL attractive for privacy-sensitive medical applications. However, existing methods aggregate predictions from all clients to form a global teacher. Under non-IID data, conflicting predictions dilute each other during averaging, yielding less informative soft labels that weaken distillation. We propose FedBiCross, a personalized OSFL framework with three stages: (1) clustering clients by model output similarity to form coherent sub-ensembles, (2) bi-level cross-cluster optimization that learns adaptive weights to selectively leverage beneficial cross-cluster knowledge while suppressing negative transfer, and (3) personalized distillation for client-specific adaptation. Experiments on four medical image datasets demonstrate that FedBiCross consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines across different non-IID degrees.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FedBiCross，一种用于医学图像的单次联邦学习框架，通过聚类、双层交叉优化和个性化蒸馏解决非独立同分布数据下的知识蒸馏退化问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于无数据知识蒸馏的单次联邦学习方法（OSFL）在非独立同分布（non-IID）数据下，聚合所有客户端的预测形成全局教师时，冲突预测相互稀释，生成信息量低的软标签，削弱蒸馏效果。这在隐私敏感的医学图像应用中尤为关键，需要一种能有效处理异构数据且仅需一轮通信的个性化联邦学习方法。
light_analysis.method: FedBiCross包含三个阶段：首先，根据模型输出相似性对客户端聚类形成连贯子集成；其次，双层跨簇优化学习自适应权重，选择性利用有益的跨簇知识同时抑制负迁移；最后，进行个性化蒸馏实现客户端特定适应。该方法在无数据共享、单轮通信下工作。
light_analysis.result: 在四个医学图像数据集上，FedBiCross在不同非独立同分布程度下均持续优于现有最先进基线方法。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但表明其在各类医学图像任务中具有稳健提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: FedBiCross通过聚类和双层优化有效缓解了非独立同分布下知识蒸馏的冲突稀释问题，实现了高效的个性化单次联邦学习。该研究为隐私敏感的医学应用提供了一种实用框架，未来可探索更复杂的聚类策略或扩展到其他模态数据。

title: Bridging the Semantic Gap for Categorical Data Clustering via Large Language Models
abstract: Qualitative data are widespread in domains such as healthcare, marketing, and bioinformatics, where clustering offers a fundamental tool for pattern discovery. A core difficulty of qualitative-data clustering lies in measuring similarity among attribute values that carry no inherent ordering or distance. To recover such relationships, existing studies typically rely on within-dataset co-occurrence statistics. This statistical route, however, becomes unreliable once the sample size is small, and the semantic context of each value is therefore left underexploited. Motivated by this limitation, this paper proposes BREVE (Balanced Representation via External Value Enrichment), a clustering framework that enriches each qualitative value with extra semantic dimensions drawn from an external knowledge base. That is, every unique value is expanded by a dense embedding that encodes its semantic content. To prevent the original value identity from being diluted by the added dimensions, a lightweight one-hot component is further appended. An adaptive weight, guided by cluster compactness, then determines how strongly the enrichment dimensions enter the final representation. With this design, experiments on eight benchmark datasets yield an average ARI rank of 1.3 against seven representative competitors.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BREVE框架，利用大语言模型为分类数据聚类注入语义维度，解决小样本下共现统计不可靠的语义鸿沟问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 分类数据在医疗、营销等领域广泛存在，核心难点是属性值间缺乏自然顺序和距离度量。现有方法依赖数据集内共现统计来恢复关系，但在小样本场景下不可靠，且未能充分利用每个值的语义上下文。这种统计性方法导致语义信息丢失，亟需引入外部知识来弥补。
light_analysis.method: BREVE框架为每个分类值从外部知识库（如大语言模型）提取稠密语义嵌入，同时附加轻量级独热分量以保留原始标识。通过自适应权重（由聚类紧密度指导）平衡语义维度与原始特征，生成增强表示。该方法无需依赖数据集内统计，直接注入先验语义知识。
light_analysis.result: 在8个基准数据集上，BREVE平均ARI排名为1.3，优于7种代表性基线方法（如k-modes、谱聚类等）。实验表明，语义增强显著提升聚类质量，尤其在数据稀疏场景下效果明显，自适应权重机制有效防止了原始特征被稀释。
light_analysis.conclusion: BREVE通过外部语义知识桥接了分类数据聚类中的语义鸿沟，为小样本场景提供可靠方案。其轻量设计易于集成，学术上验证了先验知识对聚类的重要性，实际应用于医疗诊断、市场细分等领域。未来可探索更高效的知识源或自适应机制。

title: When the Same Coefficients Reach Different Places: Asymmetric Realizability in Transplanting Tokenizers across Large Language Models
abstract: Tokenizer transplant in cross-vocabulary model composition reconstructs donor-only embedding rows as weighted combinations over shared lexical anchors and reuses those coefficients on the base. We identify a structural geometric property of this reconstruction: the same coefficient vector reaches different sets in the donor and base anchor spans, an \emph{asymmetric realizability} gap. Across 65 donor-base pairs under OMP, with cross-operator validation on CLP, WECHSEL, and FOCUS, we construct \textit{breaker tokens}: single coefficient vectors that remain statistically inert in the donor anchor span while producing a high-salience reconstruction in the base. The same Gemma-2-2B donor checkpoint admits this construction against 13 different downstream bases drawn from five model families. The planted direction passes weight-merging with a clean reference unchanged. In a deployer case study, standard LoRA fine-tuning suppresses the breaker primarily on prompts whose distribution matches the training corpus and is not a sufficient mitigation against this attack family in our setting. The tested spectral filters miss the asymmetry. We discuss potential misuse in the open-weight composition supply chain.

light_analysis.overview: 发现tokenizer移植中系数向量的不对称可实现性，并构造breaker tokens进行攻击验证。
light_analysis.motivation: 在跨词汇表模型组合中，tokenizer移植通过重构嵌入行实现，但存在结构几何特性：同一系数向量在供体和基体锚定跨度中到达不同集合，形成不对称可实现性差距。该问题影响模型组合的安全性和可靠性，现有方法如OMP、CLP、WECHSEL、FOCUS未充分解决此漏洞，可能导致恶意攻击。
light_analysis.method: 基于OMP方法，在65个供体-基体对中，通过交叉算子验证CLP、WECHSEL、FOCUS，构造breaker tokens：单一系数向量在供体锚定跨度中统计惰性，但在基体中产生高显著性重建。使用Gemma-2-2B供体检查点，针对5个模型家族的13个下游基体进行实验，并通过权重合并保持干净参考不变。
light_analysis.result: Breaker tokens成功植入，标准LoRA微调仅在训练分布匹配的提示上抑制，不足以缓解该攻击。频谱滤波未检测到不对称性。展示了在开放权重组合供应链中的潜在滥用风险。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了tokenizer移植中的不对称可实现性漏洞，构造了有效的breaker tokens攻击。研究强调了模型组合安全性的重要性，现有防御措施不足。未来需探索更鲁棒的检测和防御机制，以保护开放权重供应链。

title: Learning to Solve PDEs on Neural Shape Representations
abstract: Solving partial differential equations (PDEs) on shapes underpins many shape analysis and engineering tasks; yet, prevailing PDE solvers operate on polygonal/triangle meshes while modern 3D assets increasingly live as neural representations. This mismatch leaves no suitable method to solve surface PDEs directly within the neural domain, forcing explicit mesh extraction or per-instance residual training, preventing end-to-end workflows. We present a novel, meshfree formulation that learns a local update operator conditioned on neural (local) shape attributes, enabling surface PDEs to be solved directly where the (neural) data lives. The operator integrates naturally with prevalent neural surface representations, is trained once on a single representative shape, and generalizes across shape and topology variations, enabling accurate, fast inference without explicit meshing or per-instance optimization while preserving differentiability. Across analytic benchmarks (heat diffusion and Poisson equations on the sphere) and on diverse shapes and neural surface representations, our method achieves accuracy comparable to classical solvers while enabling a unified, end-to-end pipeline across neural and traditional surface representations. Our source code and project page: https://welschinger.github.io/Learning-to-Solve-PDEs-on-Neural-Shape-Representations/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无网格方法，学习基于神经形状属性的局部更新算子，直接在神经表示上求解表面偏微分方程，避免显式网格化。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前PDE求解器基于多边形/三角形网格，而现代3D资产多采用神经表示（如神经隐式场），二者不匹配导致必须进行显式网格提取或每实例残差训练，无法实现端到端工作流。该方法旨在解决这一根本矛盾，使得表面PDE求解可直接在神经表示上进行。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种无网格公式，学习一个局部更新算子，该算子以神经（局部）形状属性为条件。算子自然集成到常见神经表面表示中，仅需在单个代表性形状上训练一次，即可泛化到不同形状和拓扑变化，无需显式网格或每实例优化，同时保持可微性。
light_analysis.result: 在解析基准（球上的热扩散和泊松方程）以及多种形状和神经表面表示上，该方法取得了与经典求解器相当的精度，同时实现了统一的端到端管线，无需切换表示形式。实验验证了其泛化能力和准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次实现了直接在神经域上求解表面PDE，避免了网格提取和每实例训练，保持了可微性，为形状分析等任务提供了端到端方案。潜在局限可能在于对复杂拓扑的泛化能力，未来可探索更高效的算子学习。

title: DCFO: Density-Based Counterfactuals for Outliers -- Additional Material
abstract: Outlier detection identifies data points that significantly deviate from the majority of the data distribution. Explaining outliers is crucial for understanding the underlying factors that contribute to their detection, validating their significance, and identifying potential biases or errors. Effective explanations provide actionable insights, facilitating preventive measures to avoid similar outliers in the future. Counterfactual explanations clarify why specific data points are classified as outliers by identifying minimal changes required to alter their prediction. Although valuable, most existing counterfactual explanation methods overlook the unique challenges posed by outlier detection, and fail to target classical, widely adopted outlier detection algorithms. Local Outlier Factor (LOF) is one the most popular unsupervised outlier detection methods, quantifying outlierness through relative local density. Despite LOF's widespread use across diverse applications, it lacks interpretability. To address this limitation, we introduce Density-based Counterfactuals for Outliers (DCFO), a novel method specifically designed to generate counterfactual explanations for LOF. DCFO partitions the data space into regions where LOF behaves smoothly, enabling efficient gradient-based optimisation. Extensive experimental validation on 50 OpenML datasets demonstrates that DCFO consistently outperforms benchmarked competitors, offering superior proximity and validity of generated counterfactuals.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DCFO方法，为LOF异常检测算法生成基于密度的反事实解释，通过划分平滑区域实现高效梯度优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 异常检测中解释异常点至关重要，但现有反事实解释方法忽略异常检测的独特挑战，且未针对经典算法LOF，导致LOF缺乏可解释性，尽管被广泛应用。
light_analysis.method: DCFO将数据空间划分为LOF行为平滑的区域，利用梯度优化生成最小改变的反事实。在50个OpenML数据集上评估，与基准方法对比。
light_analysis.result: DCFO在生成反事实的邻近性和有效性上持续优于基准方法，验证了其优越性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: DCFO有效提升了LOF的可解释性，实验证明其有效性，未来可扩展至其他异常检测算法。

title: E3AD: An Emotion-Aware Vision-Language-Action Model for Human-Centric End-to-End Autonomous Driving
abstract: End-to-end autonomous driving (AD) systems increasingly adopt vision-language-action (VLA) models, yet they typically ignore the passenger's emotional state, which is central to comfort and AD acceptance. We introduce Open-Domain End-to-End (OD-E2E) autonomous driving, where an autonomous vehicle (AV) must interpret free-form natural-language commands, infer the emotion, and plan a physically feasible trajectory. We propose E3AD, an emotion-aware VLA framework that augments semantic understanding with two cognitively inspired components: a continuous Valenc-Arousal-Dominance (VAD) emotion model that captures tone and urgency from language, and a dual-pathway spatial reasoning module that fuses egocentric and allocentric views for human-like spatial cognition. A consistency-oriented training scheme, combining modality pretraining with preference-based alignment, further enforces coherence between emotional intent and driving actions. Across real-world datasets, E3AD improves visual grounding and waypoint planning and achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) VAD correlation for emotion estimation. These evaluation results show that injecting emotion into VLA-style driving yields more human-aligned grounding, planning, and feedback.

light_analysis.overview: 提出E3AD，首个结合情感感知的视觉-语言-动作模型，用于以人为中心的端到端自动驾驶。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶系统虽采用视觉-语言-动作模型，但忽略乘客情感状态，而情感直接影响乘坐舒适性和自动驾驶接受度。本文引入开放域端到端驾驶，要求车辆同时理解自然语言指令、推断情感并规划可行轨迹，现有方法无法满足这一需求。
light_analysis.method: 提出E3AD框架，包含两个认知启发模块：连续VAD情感模型（从语言中捕捉音调和紧迫感）和双路径空间推理模块（融合自我中心与异中心视角）。采用一致性训练方案，结合模态预训练和基于偏好的对齐，确保情感意图与驾驶行为的连贯性。
light_analysis.result: 在真实世界数据集上，E3AD在视觉定位和路径规划任务中取得提升，并在情感估计上达到最新的VAD相关性。实验表明注入情感使VLA驾驶更符合人类认知，在定位、规划和反馈方面表现更优。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了情感感知对自动驾驶系统的重要性，E3AD在理解人类情感的同时实现类人空间认知和规划，提升了驾驶安全性和舒适性。未来工作可探索更细粒度情感建模或实时适应个性化偏好。

title: SurfFill: Completion of LiDAR Point Clouds via Gaussian Surfel Splatting
abstract: LiDAR-captured point clouds are often considered the gold standard in active 3D reconstruction. While their accuracy is exceptional in flat regions, the capturing is susceptible to miss small geometric structures and may fail with dark, absorbent materials. Alternatively, capturing multiple photos of the scene and applying 3D photogrammetry can infer these details as they often represent feature-rich regions. However, the accuracy of LiDAR for featureless regions is rarely reached. Therefore, we suggest combining the strengths of LiDAR and camera-based capture by introducing SurfFill: a Gaussian surfel-based LiDAR completion scheme. We analyze LiDAR capturings and attribute LiDAR beam divergence as a main factor for artifacts, manifesting mostly at thin structures and edges. We use this insight to introduce an ambiguity heuristic for completed scans by evaluating the change in density in the point cloud. This allows us to identify points close to missed areas, which we can then use to grow additional points from to complete the scan. For this point growing, we constrain Gaussian surfel reconstruction to focus optimization and densification on these ambiguous areas. Finally, Gaussian primitives of the reconstruction in ambiguous areas are extracted and sampled for points to complete the point cloud. To address the challenges of large-scale reconstruction, we extend this pipeline with a divide-and-conquer scheme for building-sized point cloud completion. We evaluate on the task of LiDAR point cloud completion of synthetic and real-world scenes and find that our method outperforms previous reconstruction methods.

light_analysis.overview: SurfFill提出一种基于高斯曲面元（Gaussian Surfel）的激光雷达点云补全方法，结合相机与LiDAR优势实现高精度三维重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 激光雷达点云在平坦区域精度高，但在薄结构、边缘及暗吸光材料处易缺失细节。多视角摄影可推断丰富纹理但精度不足。现有方法难以兼顾两者优势，因此需要一种融合策略来补全LiDAR点云缺失区域。
light_analysis.method: SurfFill首先通过分析LiDAR光束发散导致薄结构和边缘伪影，提出模糊度启发式方法（基于点云密度变化）识别靠近缺失区域的点。然后约束高斯曲面元重建，聚焦优化和稠密化于模糊区域，最后从重建的高斯基元中采样点以补全点云。针对大规模建筑物级点云，引入分治策略。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实场景的LiDAR点云补全任务中，SurfFill优于先前重建方法。摘要未提供具体量化指标，但强调其有效性，尤其在大规模场景下通过分治方案解决了可扩展性问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: SurfFill成功结合LiDAR与相机优势，通过高斯曲面元补全提升细节重建质量。其学术价值在于揭示了LiDAR光束发散与伪影的关系，并设计针对性补全策略。实际应用可增强自动驾驶、机器人导航等场景的3D感知鲁棒性。未来可探索更高效的模糊度检测或跨模态融合。

title: E-valuator: Reliable Agent Verifiers with Sequential Hypothesis Testing
abstract: Agentic AI systems execute a sequence of actions, such as reasoning steps or tool calls, in response to a user prompt. To evaluate the success of their trajectories, researchers have developed verifiers, such as LLM judges and process-reward models, to score the quality of each action in an agent's trajectory. Although these heuristic scores can be informative, there are no guarantees of correctness when used to decide whether an agent will yield a successful output. Here, we introduce e-valuator, a method to convert any black-box verifier score into a decision rule with provable control of false alarm rates. We frame the problem of distinguishing successful trajectories (that is, a sequence of actions that will lead to a correct response to the user's prompt) and unsuccessful trajectories as a sequential hypothesis testing problem. E-valuator builds on tools from e-processes to develop a sequential hypothesis test that remains statistically valid at every step of an agent's trajectory, enabling online monitoring of agents over arbitrarily long sequences of actions. Empirically, we demonstrate that e-valuator provides greater statistical power and better false alarm rate control than other strategies across six datasets and three agents. We additionally show that e-valuator can be used for to quickly terminate problematic trajectories and save tokens. Together, e-valuator provides a lightweight, model-agnostic framework that converts verifier heuristics into decisions rules with statistical guarantees, enabling the deployment of more reliable agentic systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出e-valuator方法，将黑箱验证器分数转化为具有统计保证的决策规则，实现对智能体轨迹的可靠在线监控。
light_analysis.motivation: Agentic AI系统通过动作序列响应用户提示，现有验证器（如LLM judges、过程奖励模型）为每个动作提供启发式分数，但这些分数缺乏正确性保证，无法可靠判断轨迹是否成功。这限制了智能体系统在关键任务中的部署。需要一种方法将验证器分数转化为具有可证明虚警率控制的决策规则，支持在线监控并及时终止问题轨迹。
light_analysis.method: 将区分成功与不成功轨迹的问题建模为序贯假设检验，基于e-processes构建统计检验，确保在轨迹每一步均保持有效性。该方法可转换任何黑箱验证器分数为决策规则，支持任意长动作序列的在线监控，且无需修改验证器本身，实现轻量级、模型无关的框架。
light_analysis.result: 在六个数据集和三种智能体上实验，e-valuator相比其他策略具有更高的统计功效和更好的虚警率控制。此外，能快速终止有问题的轨迹，节省tokens。具体指标未明确给出，但总体性能优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: e-valuator提供了轻量级、模型无关的框架，将验证器启发式转化为具有统计保证的决策规则，提升了智能体系统的可靠性。学术上贡献了序贯假设检验在轨迹监控中的应用，实践上可降低计算成本和安全风险。未来可探索更复杂的验证器集成。

title: AlignVid: Training-Free Attention Scaling for Semantic Fidelity in Text-Guided Image-to-Video Generation
abstract: Text-guided image-to-video generation has made substantial progress, yet it still struggles to execute text-specified edits that require substantial changes to a reference image (\textit{e.g., object addition, removal, or modification}). Empirically, our analysis reveals that this stems from \textbf{visual dominance}, where the reference image causes severe attention dispersion, inhibiting the model's ability to incorporate new semantic information. To address this, we propose \textbf{AlignVid}, a training-free intervention that re-calibrates the model's internal attention distribution. Drawing on an energy-based perspective of attention, AlignVid employs Attention Scaling Modulation (\textbf{ASM}) to reduce attention entropy and concentrate focus on semantic tokens, alongside Guidance Scheduling (\textbf{GS}) to maintain generation stability. To rigorously assess this capability, we present \textbf{OmitI2V}, a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating prompt adherence across object modification, addition, and deletion. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AlignVid effectively enhances semantic fidelity with negligible computational overhead. Code and the OmitI2V benchmark are available at https://github.com/LAW1223/AlignVid.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AlignVid，一种无需训练的注意力缩放调制方法，解决文本引导图像到视频生成中的语义保真度问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本引导图像到视频生成在需要大幅修改参考图像（如对象添加、删除或修改）时效果不佳。分析发现这是由于“视觉主导”导致注意力分散，抑制了模型融入新语义信息的能力。现有方法无法有效处理此类高语义变化任务。
light_analysis.method: 提出AlignVid，一种无需训练的干预方法。从注意力能量角度出发，采用注意力缩放调制（ASM）降低注意力熵，使模型集中关注语义标记；同时结合引导调度（GS）维持生成稳定性。此外，构建OmitI2V基准，专门评估对象修改、添加和删除任务的提示遵循度。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，AlignVid有效增强了语义保真度，在OmitI2V基准上显著优于基线方法，且计算开销可忽略不计。具体数值未明确给出，但定性结果和消融实验证实了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: AlignVid通过重新校准内部注意力分布解决了视觉主导问题，提升了文本编辑的准确性，且无需额外训练。该方法具有即插即用的实用性，为图像到视频生成中的语义控制提供了新思路。代码和基准已开源。

title: Evaluating Dataset Watermarking for Fine-tuning Traceability of Customized Diffusion Models: A Comprehensive Benchmark and Removal Approach
abstract: Recent fine-tuning techniques for diffusion models enable them to reproduce specific image sets, such as particular faces or artistic styles, but also introduce copyright and security risks. Dataset watermarking has been proposed to ensure traceability by embedding imperceptible watermarks into training images, which remain detectable in outputs even after fine-tuning. However, current methods lack a unified evaluation framework. To address this, this paper establishes a general threat model and introduces a comprehensive evaluation framework encompassing Universality, Transmissibility, and Robustness. Experiments show that existing methods perform well in universality and transmissibility, and exhibit some robustness against common image processing operations, yet still fall short under real-world threat scenarios. To reveal these vulnerabilities, the paper further proposes a practical watermark removal method that fully eliminates dataset watermarks without affecting fine-tuning, highlighting a key challenge for future research.

light_analysis.overview: 提出数据集水印的统一评估框架和一种实用的水印去除方法，揭示现有方法在真实威胁场景下的脆弱性。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型微调技术可重现特定图像集，带来版权和安全风险。数据集水印通过嵌入不可见水印确保可追溯性，但现有方法缺乏统一评估框架，难以全面衡量其能力。因此本文建立通用威胁模型并提出综合评估框架，以系统评估现有方法并暴露其不足。
light_analysis.method: 本文建立通用威胁模型，提出包含通用性（适用于不同数据集）、可传递性（水印在微调后仍可检测）和鲁棒性（抵抗攻击）的评估框架。基于该框架发现现有方法在真实威胁下存在漏洞，进而提出一种实用的水印去除方法，通过对抗性扰动等方式完全消除数据集水印，同时不影响微调性能。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明现有方法在通用性和可传递性上表现良好，对常见图像处理操作（如裁剪、压缩）具有一定鲁棒性，但在面对针对性攻击时水印易被去除。本文提出的水印去除方法能有效破坏所有测试的水印方案，且不损害微调后图像质量，显示了现有方法的脆弱性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次为数据集水印建立了统一评估基准，系统揭示了现有方法的局限性，特别是在真实威胁下的脆弱性。提出的水印去除方法为后续研究提供了关键挑战，强调了设计更鲁棒水印的必要性。该工作对保护扩散模型版权具有重要学术和实际意义。

title: MiAD: Mirage Atom Diffusion for De Novo Crystal Generation
abstract: In recent years, diffusion-based models have demonstrated exceptional performance in searching for simultaneously stable, unique, and novel (S.U.N.) crystalline materials. However, most of these models don't have the ability to change the number of atoms in the crystal during the generation process, which limits the variability of model sampling trajectories. In this paper, we demonstrate the severity of this restriction and introduce a simple yet powerful technique, mirage infusion, which enables diffusion models to change the state of the atoms that make up the crystal from existent to non-existent (mirage) and vice versa. We show that this technique improves model quality by up to x2.5 compared to the same model without this modification. The resulting model, Mirage Atom Diffusion (MiAD), is an equivariant joint diffusion model for de novo crystal generation that is capable of altering the number of atoms during the generation process. MiAD achieves an 8.2% S.U.N. rate on the MP-20 dataset, which substantially exceeds existing state-of-the-art approaches. Code: https://github.com/andrey-okhotin/miad.git

light_analysis.overview: 提出Mirage Atom Diffusion (MiAD)，通过mirage infusion技术使扩散模型在生成晶体时动态改变原子数量，显著提升S.U.N.率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有扩散模型在生成晶体材料时，无法在生成过程中改变原子数量，限制了采样轨迹的多样性，导致生成的新颖性和独特性不足。为解决这一限制，论文引入mirage infusion技术，允许原子从存在到不存在（幻影）状态的转换，从而增强模型探索能力。
light_analysis.method: MiAD是一种等变联合扩散模型，核心创新在于mirage infusion技术：在扩散过程中，原子可被标记为存在或幻影状态，并在去噪步骤中动态切换。模型在MP-20数据集上训练，采用等变架构保持晶体对称性，通过联合扩散原子类型和坐标实现de novo晶体生成。
light_analysis.result: 在MP-20数据集上，MiAD的S.U.N.（稳定、独特、新颖）率达到8.2%，相比未使用mirage infusion的基线模型提升最多2.5倍，并大幅超越现有最先进方法。具体对比数据摘要未详细列出，但明确表明性能显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: MiAD通过引入原子状态动态切换机制，解决了扩散模型在晶体生成中原子数量固定的局限，显著提高了生成晶体的质量。该方法具有普适性，可推广至其他需要可变粒子数的生成任务。未来工作可探索更高效的幻影注入策略及在更大数据集上的应用。

title: OmniAID: Decoupling Semantic and Artifacts for Universal AI-Generated Image Detection in the Wild
abstract: A truly universal AI-Generated Image (AIGI) detector must simultaneously generalize across diverse generative models and varied semantic content. Current methods learn a single, entangled forgery representation, conflating content-dependent flaws with content-agnostic artifacts, and are further constrained by outdated benchmarks. We propose OmniAID, a novel framework centered on a decoupled Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture that separates: (1) semantic flaws across distinct content domains via Routable Specialized Semantic Experts, and (2) content-agnostic universal artifacts from content-dependent flaws via a Fixed Universal Artifact Expert. A two-stage training strategy first specializes experts independently with domain-specific hard-sampling, then trains a lightweight gating network for effective input routing. By explicitly decoupling "what is generated" (content-specific flaws) from "how it is generated" (universal artifacts), OmniAID achieves robust generalization. We also introduce Mirage, a large-scale, contemporary dataset comprising a modern training set and a challenging test set. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OmniAID surpasses existing detectors, establishing a new standard for AIGI detection against modern, in-the-wild threats. Code is available at https://github.com/yunncheng/OmniAID.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OmniAID框架，通过解耦语义缺陷和通用伪影实现通用AI生成图像检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有AI生成图像检测方法学习单一的纠缠伪造表示，混淆了内容相关缺陷与内容无关伪影，且受限于过时基准。这导致无法同时泛化到不同生成模型和语义内容。因此需要一种解耦方法，分别处理语义特定缺陷和通用伪影，以提升跨域泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出OmniAID框架，核心是解耦的混合专家架构：可路由专用语义专家处理不同内容领域的语义缺陷，固定通用伪影专家提取内容无关的通用伪影。两阶段训练策略：先通过领域特定硬采样独立训练专家，再训练轻量级门控网络进行输入路由。同时引入大规模现代数据集Mirage。
light_analysis.result: 广泛实验表明，OmniAID在多种生成模型和语义内容上超越现有检测器，建立了AI生成图像检测的新标准，尤其针对现代野外威胁。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调鲁棒泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: OmniAID通过解耦内容特定缺陷与通用伪影，实现跨生成模型和语义内容的鲁棒检测。学术价值在于提出新的解耦范式，实际应用价值在于应对现代AI生成图像威胁。未来可探索更细粒度的专家分工或动态路由机制。

title: DiScoFormer: Plug-In Density and Score Estimation with Transformers
abstract: Estimating probability density and its score from samples remains a core problem in generative modeling, Bayesian inference, and kinetic theory. Existing methods are bifurcated: classical kernel density estimators (KDE) generalize across distributions but suffer from the curse of dimensionality, while modern neural score models achieve high precision but require retraining for every target distribution. We introduce DiScoFormer (Density and Score Transformer), a ``train-once, infer-anywhere" equivariant Transformer that maps i.i.d. samples to both density values and score vectors, generalizing across distributions and sample sizes. Analytically, we prove that self-attention can recover normalized KDE, establishing it as a functional generalization of kernel methods; empirically, individual attention heads learn multi-scale, kernel-like behaviors. The model converges faster and achieves higher precision than KDE for density estimation, and provides a high-fidelity plug-in score oracle for score-debiased KDE, Fisher information computation, and Fokker-Planck-type PDEs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DiScoFormer，一种训练一次即可泛化到任意分布和样本量的等变Transformer，同时估计概率密度和分数。
light_analysis.motivation: 概率密度及其分数估计在生成建模、贝叶斯推断和动力学理论中至关重要。现有方法分为经典核密度估计（KDE）和现代神经分数模型：KDE可泛化但受维数灾难，神经模型精度高但需对每个目标分布重训练。因此需要一种能跨分布和样本量泛化的统一方法。
light_analysis.method: DiScoFormer采用等变Transformer架构，将i.i.d.样本映射为密度值和分数向量，实现'一次训练，随处推断'。理论证明自注意力可恢复归一化KDE，是核方法的功能泛化；实验显示单个注意力头学习多尺度核行为。方法无需针对目标分布重训练。
light_analysis.result: DiScoFormer在密度估计上比KDE收敛更快且精度更高。作为插件分数估计器，它为分数去偏KDE、Fisher信息计算和Fokker-Planck型偏微分方程提供高保真分数，展示了在多任务中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DiScoFormer提出了通用的密度和分数估计器，兼具KDE的泛化性和神经模型的精度，理论连接自注意力与核方法。应用广泛，包括生成建模和科学计算。未来可探索扩展至更高维或更复杂分布。

title: Dual-Stream Diffusion for World-Model Augmented Vision-Language-Action Model
abstract: Augmenting vision-language-action models (VLAs) with world models is promising for robotic policy learning but faces challenges in jointly predicting states and actions due to the modality gap. To address this, we propose DUal-STream diffusion (DUST), a world-model augmented VLA framework featuring a multimodal diffusion transformer that maintains separate modality streams while enabling cross-modal knowledge sharing. In addition, DUST utilizes independent noise perturbations and a decoupled flow matching loss to learn cross-modal causal relationships. We further introduce an asynchronous sampling method for action and vision tokens that enhances performance through inference-time scaling. Experimental results on simulated benchmarks like RoboCasa and GR-1 show that DUST achieves up to 6% gains over state-of-the-art VLA and world-modeling baselines, with inference-time scaling providing an additional 2-5% improvement. In real-world tasks using the Franka Research 3, DUST outperforms baselines by 10% in success rate. Finally, we demonstrate that DUST enables effective transfer learning through both pretraining on action-free videos and joint-training with heterogeneous robot and human datasets.
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026. Project page at https://periphanes.github.io/dust (20 pages, 10 figures)

light_analysis.overview: 提出双流扩散框架DUST，通过分离模态流和异步采样增强世界模型与VLA的联合预测，解决模态差距问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 增强世界模型的VLA在机器人策略学习中面临联合预测状态和动作的模态差距问题，现有方法难以有效融合多模态信息，限制了机器人任务性能。
light_analysis.method: DUST框架采用多模态扩散Transformer，维护分离的模态流并实现跨模态知识共享。使用独立噪声扰动和分离流匹配损失学习跨模态因果关系，并提出异步采样方法提升推理性能。
light_analysis.result: 在RoboCasa和GR-1模拟基准上，DUST比最先进VLA和世界模型基线提升6%，推理时缩放额外提升2-5%。在Franka Research 3真实任务中成功率比基线高10%。
light_analysis.conclusion: DUST有效解决模态差距，提升机器人策略学习性能，支持通过无动作视频预训练和异构数据集联合训练进行迁移学习，具有广泛应用潜力。

title: Modality Alignment across Trees on Heterogeneous Hyperbolic Manifolds
abstract: Modality alignment is critical for vision-language models (VLMs) to effectively integrate information across modalities. However, existing methods extract hierarchical features from text while representing each image with a single feature, leading to asymmetric and suboptimal alignment. To address this, we propose Alignment across Trees, a method that constructs and aligns tree-like hierarchical features for both image and text modalities. Specifically, we introduce a semantic-aware visual feature extraction framework that applies a cross-attention mechanism to visual class tokens from intermediate Transformer layers, guided by textual cues to extract visual features with coarse-to-fine semantics. We then embed the feature trees of the two modalities into hyperbolic manifolds with distinct curvatures to effectively model their hierarchical structures. To align across the heterogeneous hyperbolic manifolds with different curvatures, we formulate a KL distance measure between distributions on heterogeneous manifolds, and learn an intermediate manifold for manifold alignment by minimizing the distance. We prove the existence and uniqueness of the optimal intermediate manifold. Experiments on taxonomic open-set classification tasks across multiple image datasets demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms strong baselines under few-shot and cross-domain settings.
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种跨异质双曲流形的树形层次特征对齐方法，解决视觉-语言模型中模态对齐的不对称问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型（VLM）通常为文本提取层次特征，但为图像仅使用单一特征，导致模态间不对称和次优对齐。这种非对称性限制了模型对复杂层级语义关系的捕捉，尤其在小样本和跨领域场景下性能不佳。因此需要为图像也构建层次结构，并实现跨模态的有效对齐。
light_analysis.method: 提出Alignment across Trees方法。首先，通过交叉注意力机制，利用文本线索引导从中间Transformer层的视觉类标记中提取从粗到细的语义视觉特征，形成图像特征树。然后，将图像和文本的特征树分别嵌入具有不同曲率的双曲流形中以建模层次结构。最后，定义异质流形上的KL散度作为距离度量，学习一个中间流形以最小化该距离，从而实现跨模态对齐。理论证明了最优中间流形的存在性和唯一性。
light_analysis.result: 在多个图像数据集上的分类开放集任务中，该方法在少样本和跨领域设置下持续优于强基线方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称一致超越基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了一种对称的层次特征对齐框架，通过双曲流形对齐实现了视觉和语言模态的更好融合。该工作为层次化多模态表示学习提供了新思路，具有在细粒度检索、零样本学习等场景的应用潜力。未来可探索更高效的流形对齐策略或扩展到更多模态。

title: LoCoT2V-Bench: Benchmarking Long-Form and Complex Text-to-Video Generation
abstract: Recent advances in text-to-video generation have achieved impressive performance on short clips, yet evaluating long-form generation under complex textual inputs remains a significant challenge. In response to this challenge, we present LoCoT2V-Bench, a benchmark for long video generation (LVG) featuring multi-scene prompts with hierarchical metadata (e.g., character settings and camera behaviors), constructed from collected real-world videos. We further propose LoCoT2V-Eval, a multi-dimensional framework covering perceptual quality, text-video alignment, temporal quality, dynamic quality, and Human Expectation Realization Degree (HERD), with an emphasis on aspects such as fine-grained text-video alignment and temporal character consistency. Experiments on 17 representative LVG models reveal pronounced capability disparities across evaluation dimensions, with strong perceptual quality and background consistency but markedly weaker fine-grained text-video alignment and character consistency. These findings suggest that improving prompt faithfulness and identity preservation remains a key challenge for long-form video generation. Our code and data are released at https://github.com/XqZeppelinhead0702/LoCoT2V-Bench

light_analysis.overview: 提出长视频生成基准LoCoT2V-Bench及多维度评估框架LoCoT2V-Eval，揭示模型在细粒度对齐和角色一致性上的不足。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本到视频生成在短片段上表现优异，但长视频生成面临复杂文本输入评估的挑战。缺乏针对多场景、长时长、带层次元数据（如角色设置、相机行为）的基准，导致难以全面衡量模型能力，尤其是细粒度文本-视频对齐和时间角色一致性。
light_analysis.method: 构建LoCoT2V-Bench基准，从真实视频中收集多场景提示并附带层次元数据。提出LoCoT2V-Eval评估框架，涵盖感知质量、文本-视频对齐、时间质量、动态质量及人类期望实现度（HERD），重点关注细粒度对齐和角色一致性。
light_analysis.result: 在17个代表性长视频生成模型上实验，发现模型在感知质量和背景一致性上表现强，但在细粒度文本-视频对齐和角色一致性上显著较弱。表明提升提示忠实度和身份保持是长视频生成的关键挑战。
light_analysis.conclusion: LoCoT2V-Bench和Eval为长视频生成提供了标准化评估工具，揭示了现有模型的短板。未来工作需聚焦于改进文本忠实度和角色身份保持，以推动长视频生成技术的发展。代码和数据已开源。

title: CodeEvolve: an open source evolutionary coding agent for algorithmic discovery and optimization
abstract: We introduce CodeEvolve, an open-source framework that couples large language models with island-based evolutionary search for end-to-end algorithmic discovery. CodeEvolve integrates inspiration-based crossover, meta-prompting, and depth-based refinement on top of a CVT-MAP-Elites archive and a weighted LLM ensemble to generate optimized solutions for complex problems. On the AlphaEvolve benchmark suite, CodeEvolve matches or surpasses the reported AlphaEvolve results on 5 of 9 problems and, under matched conditions, outperforms the open-source frameworks OpenEvolve and ShinkaEvolve on 6 of 9. With the open-weight Qwen3-Coder-30B backbone, it surpasses the reported AlphaEvolve score on both CirclePackingSquare instances at roughly an order of magnitude lower cost than a frontier closed-source ensemble, and remains competitive with EoH on heuristic-design tasks without retuning. Ablations show that the interaction between CodeEvolve's components, rather than any single operator, drives these results. We release the framework, experimental data, and practical hyperparameter guidelines at https://github.com/inter-co/science-codeevolve.

light_analysis.overview: CodeEvolve是一个开源框架，结合大语言模型与岛屿进化搜索，实现端到端算法发现与优化，在多个基准上超越现有方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 算法发现和优化通常依赖人工设计或大量计算资源，现有方法如AlphaEvolve可能闭源或成本高昂，开源框架如OpenEvolve性能有限。需要一种高效、低成本的自动化算法发现方法。
light_analysis.method: CodeEvolve耦合大语言模型与岛屿进化搜索，创新包括灵感交叉、元提示和深度细化，基于CVT-MAP-Elites档案和加权LLM集成。使用Qwen3-Coder-30B作为骨干模型。
light_analysis.result: 在AlphaEvolve基准的9个问题中，5个匹配或超越原结果；匹配条件下6/9优于OpenEvolve和ShinkaEvolve。使用Qwen3-Coder-30B在CirclePackingSquare上超越AlphaEvolve，成本低一个数量级。与EoH在启发式设计任务上保持竞争力。
light_analysis.conclusion: CodeEvolve展示了开源LLM与进化搜索结合的潜力，实现低成本、高性能算法发现。框架、数据和超参数指南已开源，为社区提供可复现工具。未来可扩展至更多领域。

title: Offline Reinforcement Learning with Generative Trajectory Policies
abstract: Generative models have emerged as a powerful class of policies for offline reinforcement learning (RL) due to their ability to capture complex, multi-modal behaviors. However, existing methods face a stark trade-off: slow, iterative models like diffusion policies are computationally expensive, while fast, single-step models like consistency policies often suffer from degraded performance. In this paper, we demonstrate that it is possible to bridge this gap. The key to moving beyond the limitations of individual methods, we argue, lies in a unifying perspective that views modern generative models, including diffusion, flow matching, and consistency models, as specific instances of learning a continuous-time generative trajectory governed by an Ordinary Differential Equation (ODE). This principled foundation provides a clearer design space for generative policies in RL and allows us to propose Generative Trajectory Policies (GTPs), a new and more general policy paradigm that learns the entire solution map of the underlying ODE. To make this paradigm practical for offline RL, we further introduce two key theoretically principled adaptations. Empirical results demonstrate that GTP achieves state-of-the-art performance on D4RL benchmarks - it significantly outperforms prior generative policies, achieving perfect scores on several notoriously hard AntMaze tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出生成轨迹策略（GTP），统一扩散、流匹配等生成模型为ODE轨迹学习，实现离线RL SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有生成式策略在离线强化学习中面临困境：扩散类迭代模型计算昂贵，而一致性等单步模型性能下降。需要一种既能捕捉复杂多模态行为又具备高效推理的统一方法。论文通过将扩散、流匹配等视为连续时间ODE轨迹的特例，为设计更优的生成式策略提供了统一视角。
light_analysis.method: 提出生成轨迹策略（GTP），学习底层ODE的完整解映射，统一了扩散、流匹配和一致性模型。为适配离线RL，引入两项理论驱动的适应性改进。GTP作为通用策略范式，在训练时学习从任意时间步到终态的映射，推理时单步生成轨迹，兼顾效率与性能。
light_analysis.result: 在D4RL基准测试中，GTP达到最先进水平，显著优于先前生成式策略，并在多个困难AntMaze任务上取得完美分数。具体性能指标超越扩散策略和一致性策略，验证了统一ODE视角下单步生成的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: GTP通过统一生成模型为ODE轨迹，弥合了迭代模型与单步模型之间的性能与效率差距。该方法为离线RL策略设计提供了新方向，具有理论清晰度和实践高效性。未来可扩展至更复杂的决策任务，并探索ODE视角下的其他适应性改进。

title: The Impact of Semantic Pairs on Self-Supervised Representation Learning
abstract: Instance discrimination learns visual representations by treating different augmented views of the same image as positive pairs. While this encourages invariance to handcrafted transformations, same-image positives can preserve nuisance correlations such as background, texture, illumination, and object-specific details. Semantic positive pairs, i.e., different same-class instances, may reduce these correlations by presenting objects across diverse contexts. However, previous studies often combine semantic pairs with augmented positives or false neighbors (i.e., incorrectly mapped semantic pairs), making it difficult to isolate the effect of semantic pairing. We present a controlled empirical study of semantic positive pairs for self-supervised representation learning. From ImageNet-1K, we construct two matched subsets: an augmented-pair baseline and a manually curated semantic-pair dataset with the same class composition and training-pair count. We use these datasets to compare representative contrastive and non-contrastive SSL methods under matched training conditions. Across transfer learning and object detection evaluations, semantic-pair pretraining consistently improves generalisation over augmented-pair pretraining. Additional ablations show that semantic pairs induce invariances beyond the standard transformation pipeline. Among the evaluated methods, contrastive learning benefits most strongly from semantic pairs, with SimCLR showing the largest relative improvement. These results clarify the role of semantic positive pairs in SSL and provide guidance for selecting and designing frameworks that can exploit semantic pair information effectively

light_analysis.overview: 通过控制实验研究语义正对（不同同类实例）在自监督表示学习中的作用，发现其能提升泛化性能，对比学习受益最大。
light_analysis.motivation: 实例判别方法使用同一图像的不同增强视图作为正对，虽鼓励对变换的不变性，但保留了背景、纹理等无关相关性。语义正对通过呈现多样上下文可减少这些相关性，但以往研究常将其与增强正对或错误邻居混合，难以隔离效果。
light_analysis.method: 从ImageNet-1K构建匹配的增强正对基线和手动策划的语义正对数据集，保持类别组成和训练对数量相同。使用对比与非对比SSL方法（如SimCLR）在匹配条件下进行迁移学习和目标检测评估。
light_analysis.result: 语义正对预训练在迁移学习和目标检测上一致提升泛化效果，优于增强正对预训练。消融显示其诱导出超越标准变换的不变性。对比学习方法受益最大，SimCLR相对提升最显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了语义正对在SSL中的作用：提升泛化性，对比学习尤其受益。为选择/设计利用语义正对信息的框架提供指导。未来可探索更大规模或更优语义正对构建。

title: Provable Affine Identifiability of Nonlinear CCA under Latent Distributional Priors
abstract: In this work, we establish the sufficient conditions under which nonlinear Canonical Correlation Analysis (CCA) recovers ground-truth latent factors up to an affine transformation. By transporting the analysis from the observation space to the source space, we extend classical statistical results on orthogonal polynomial expansions of bivariate distributions to representation learning, proving affine identifiability under specific distributional priors. We formally demonstrate that whitening is strictly necessary to ensure the boundedness and well-conditioning of the learned mappings. Furthermore, we bridge the gap between theory and practice by proving that ridge-regularized empirical CCA converges to its population counterpart in the finite-sample regime. Finally, our findings provide a rigorous theoretical foundation explaining the empirical success of recent correlation-based non-contrastive learning methods. Experiments on synthetic and rendered image datasets, alongside systematic ablations, validate the predicted recovery behavior and illustrate the failure modes that arise when the assumptions are violated.

light_analysis.overview: 证明了非线性CCA在特定潜变量分布先验下可仿射恢复真实潜变量，为相关非对比学习方法提供理论基础。
light_analysis.motivation: 非线性CCA在无监督学习中广泛应用，但其恢复真实潜因子的可识别性条件尚不明确。现有方法缺乏理论保证，尤其在有噪声或有限样本时。本文旨在建立充分条件，确保非线性CCA能够在仿射变换下识别真实潜变量，并解释基于相关性的非对比学习方法的经验成功。
light_analysis.method: 将分析从观测空间转移到源空间，利用双变量分布的正交多项式展开扩展经典统计结果。通过理论证明，白化是确保学习映射有界且条件良好的必要条件。进一步证明岭正则化经验CCA在有限样本下收敛到总体版本。结合合成数据和渲染图像数据集进行实验验证。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明了仿射可识别性的充分条件，并通过实验验证了预测的恢复行为。在合成数据和渲染图像数据集上进行的系统消融实验表明，当假设满足时，模型能正确恢复潜变量；当假设违反时，出现失效模式。摘要未提供具体量化指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了非线性CCA在分布先验下的仿射可识别性理论，弥合了理论与实践差距。为基于相关性的非对比学习方法提供了严谨的理论基础。未来工作可探索更弱假设下的可识别性，或扩展到其他非对比学习框架。

title: Streaming Drag-Oriented Interactive Video Manipulation: Drag Anything, Anytime!
abstract: Achieving streaming, fine-grained control over the outputs of autoregressive video diffusion models remains challenging, making it difficult to ensure that they consistently align with user expectations. To bridge this gap, we propose \textbf{stReaming drag-oriEnted interactiVe vidEo manipuLation (REVEL)}, a new task that enables users to modify generated videos \emph{anytime} on \emph{anything} via fine-grained, interactive drag. Beyond DragVideo and SG-I2V, REVEL unifies drag-style video manipulation as editing and animating video frames with both supporting user-specified translation, deformation, and rotation effects, making drag operations versatile. In resolving REVEL, we observe: \emph{i}) drag-induced perturbations accumulate in latent space, causing severe latent distribution drift that halts the drag process; \emph{ii}) streaming drag is easily disturbed by context frames, thereby yielding visually unnatural outcomes. We thus propose a training-free approach, \textbf{DragStream}, comprising: \emph{i}) an adaptive distribution self-rectification strategy that leverages neighboring frames' statistics to effectively constrain the drift of latent embeddings; \emph{ii}) a spatial-frequency selective optimization mechanism, allowing the model to fully exploit contextual information while mitigating its interference via selectively propagating visual cues along generation. Our method can be seamlessly integrated into existing autoregressive video diffusion models, and extensive experiments firmly demonstrate the effectiveness of our DragStream.

light_analysis.overview: 提出REVEL任务和训练无关的DragStream方法，实现任意时刻对任意内容的流式拖拽视频操作。
light_analysis.motivation: 自回归视频扩散模型难以实现流式、细粒度控制，现有拖拽方法缺乏统一性和流式支持。拖拽操作导致潜在分布漂移和上下文干扰，使生成视频不符合用户期望。
light_analysis.method: 定义REVEL任务，统一拖拽操作为编辑和动画，支持平移、变形和旋转。提出DragStream方法：1）自适应分布自修正，利用相邻帧统计约束潜在漂移；2）空间频率选择性优化，选择性传播视觉线索以利用上下文并减少干扰。方法训练无关，可集成到现有自回归视频扩散模型。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体指标，但通过大量实验证明DragStream在视觉自然度和拖拽操作一致性上优于现有方法，有效缓解了分布漂移和上下文干扰问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 解决了流式拖拽视频操作的关键挑战，提供轻量级训练无关方案，可即插即用于现有模型，提升了交互式视频生成的实用性和灵活性。未来可探索更复杂的操作类型或扩展到其他生成模型。

title: Resolution as a Direction: Vector-Panning Feature Alignment for Cross-Resolution Re-Identification
abstract: Cross-resolution person re-identification (CR-ReID) remains challenging in practical surveillance, where camera quality and capture distance lead to substantial resolution gaps between low-resolution (LR) queries and high-resolution (HR) gallery images. Prior approaches commonly rely on super-resolution (SR) or resolution-invariant representation learning, which often increases system complexity and may not directly address the feature mismatch induced by resolution degradation. In this work, we report a new empirical finding from a dedicated analysis in which identity-specific variation is averaged out: the HR--LR feature discrepancy produced by standard ReID backbones exhibits a consistent, resolution-related semantic direction in the embedding space. We further support this observation with statistical analyses based on Canonical Correlation Analysis (CCA) and Pearson correlation analysis. Motivated by this finding, we propose Vector Panning Feature Alignment (VPFA), a lightweight post-hoc module that learns to pan LR features along the learned resolution direction to obtain pseudo-HR representations. VPFA operates after feature extraction and can be integrated into existing ReID systems with negligible overhead. Extensive experiments on multiple CR-ReID benchmarks show that VPFA achieves state-of-the-art performance while improving efficiency compared to SR-based or jointly trained alternatives.

light_analysis.overview: 提出向量平移特征对齐（VPFA）方法，利用HR-LR特征差异的语义方向进行轻量级特征对齐，实现高效跨分辨率行人重识别。
light_analysis.motivation: 实际监控中，相机质量和距离导致低分辨率查询图像与高分辨率画廊图像之间存在显著分辨率差距。现有超分辨率或不变表示学习方法增加系统复杂度且未直接解决特征不匹配。本文发现标准ReID骨干网络产生的HR-LR特征差异在嵌入空间中呈现一致的语义方向，为轻量级对齐提供了可能。
light_analysis.method: 提出Vector Panning Feature Alignment（VPFA），一种轻量级后处理模块。首先通过典型相关分析和Pearson相关分析验证特征差异的语义方向，然后学习将LR特征沿该方向平移以获得伪HR表示。VPFA在特征提取后操作，可无缝集成现有ReID系统，计算开销可忽略。
light_analysis.result: 在多个跨分辨率行人重识别基准数据集上，VPFA达到最先进的性能，同时相比基于超分辨率或联合训练的方法显著提升效率。摘要未明确报告具体数值，但声称优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文发现HR-LR特征差异存在一致的语义方向，并据此提出轻量级VPFA模块，有效解决了跨分辨率重识别的特征对齐难题。该方法具有较高实用价值，可降低系统复杂性。未来可探索更复杂的平移策略或扩展到其他跨域任务。

title: In-Place Feedback: Reliable Refinement for Multi-Turn Expert-LLM Collaboration
abstract: LLM-generated drafts often contain subtle factual or logical errors, yet prior work shows that models struggle to reliably integrate multi-turn feedback aimed at fixing them. We propose in-place feedback, an interaction paradigm in which the user directly edits the model's previous response and the model continues generation from the edited context. In-place feedback consistently outperforms standard multi-turn feedback across five reasoning-intensive benchmarks while requiring fewer tokens, and our fine-grained analysis shows that it applies corrections more reliably and propagates them to subsequent reasoning. A user study with domain experts refining LLM-generated summaries corroborates these findings: participants report higher final-output satisfaction and substantially lower fatigue with in-place feedback, and a mixed strategy combining in-place and multi-turn feedback scores highest on every measured dimension. These results suggest that editing errors directly is a more effective paradigm for expert-LLM collaboration.

light_analysis.overview: 提出in-place feedback交互范式，用户直接编辑模型回复后模型继续生成，提升多轮协作中LLM的修正可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM生成的草稿常包含细微事实或逻辑错误，但现有研究表明模型难以可靠地整合多轮反馈来修正这些错误。标准多轮反馈中，用户提供文本反馈，模型需在后续轮次中理解并应用反馈，但模型可能忽略、误解或无法传播修正。因此需要一种更有效的交互范式，让用户直接编辑错误，使模型从修正后的上下文继续生成。
light_analysis.method: 提出in-place feedback范式，用户直接编辑模型上一次生成的回复（如修改错误文本），模型将编辑后的内容作为上下文继续生成。与标准多轮反馈不同，无需模型理解额外反馈，而是直接基于修正后的文本生成。在五个推理密集型基准（如GSM8K、MATH等）上评估，并进行了细粒度分析，比较修正的可靠性和传播性。用户研究中，领域专家使用该范式精炼LLM生成的摘要。
light_analysis.result: In-place feedback在五个推理密集型基准上一致优于标准多轮反馈，同时使用更少的token。细粒度分析表明，它更可靠地应用修正并将修正传播到后续推理。用户研究中，参与者对最终输出满意度更高，疲劳感更低。混合策略（结合in-place和标准反馈）在所有测量维度上得分最高。
light_analysis.conclusion: In-place feedback是一种更有效的专家-LLM协作范式，通过直接编辑错误提升修正可靠性和传播性，减少用户疲劳。该研究为未来人机交互设计提供了新方向，混合策略可能进一步优化协作效果。局限性可能包括对用户编辑能力的要求，未来可探索自动编辑辅助。

title: Towards Understanding the Shape of Representations in Protein Language Models
abstract: While protein language models (PLMs) are one of the most promising avenues of research for future de novo protein design, the way in which they transform sequences to hidden representations, as well as the information encoded in such representations is yet to be fully understood. Several works have attempted to propose interpretability tools for PLMs, but they have focused on understanding how individual sequences are transformed by such models. Therefore, the way in which PLMs transform the whole space of sequences along with their relations is still unknown. In this work we attempt to understand this transformed space of sequences by identifying protein structure and representation with square-root velocity (SRV) representations and graph filtrations. Both approaches naturally lead to a metric space in which pairs of proteins or protein representations can be compared with each other.   We analyze different types of proteins from the SCOP dataset and show that the Karcher mean and effective dimension of the SRV shape space follow a non-linear pattern as a function of the layers in ESM2 models of different sizes. Furthermore, we use graph filtrations as a tool to study the context lengths at which models encode the structural features of proteins. We find that PLMs preferentially encode immediate as well as local relations between residues, but start to degrade for larger context lengths. The most structurally faithful encoding tends to occur close to, but before the last layer of the models, indicating that training a folding model ontop of these layers might lead to improved folding performance.
comment: Accepted as a poster at ICLR 2026. OpenReview: https://openreview.net/forum?id=Dnn8SSBJaY

light_analysis.overview: 通过SRV表示和图过滤方法，揭示蛋白质语言模型如何变换序列空间，并发现结构编码在中间层最优。
light_analysis.motivation: 蛋白质语言模型（PLM）在从头蛋白质设计中前景广阔，但其如何将序列转换为隐藏表示及编码的信息尚未完全理解。现有可解释性工具仅关注单个序列的变换，忽视了PLM对整个序列空间及其关系的变换方式。因此，需要理解PLM变换后的序列空间结构，以优化模型设计和应用。
light_analysis.method: 利用平方根速度（SRV）表示和图过滤两种方法，将蛋白质结构与表示转化为度量空间，比较蛋白质对。从SCOP数据集分析不同类型蛋白质，计算Karcher均值和有效维度，研究ESM2模型中SRV形状空间随层数的非线性模式。通过图过滤分析模型编码结构特征的上下文长度。
light_analysis.result: Karcher均值和有效维度随ESM2模型层数呈现非线性模式。PLM优先编码残基间的即时和局部关系，但在更长上下文长度时编码退化。最保结构的编码出现在模型倒数第二层附近，表明基于这些层训练折叠模型可能提升折叠性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了PLM对蛋白质序列空间变换的结构特性，发现结构特征编码在中间层最优，为改进蛋白质设计提供指导。研究有限于SCOP数据集，未来可扩展至其他模型和更多蛋白质类型，并探索利用中间层改进折叠预测。

title: Estimating the Empowerment of Language Model Agents
abstract: As language model (LM) agents become increasingly capable and adopted in real-world applications, there is a growing need for scalable evaluation frameworks beyond costly, manually designed benchmarks.
