We propose information-theoretic evaluation based on empowerment, an information-theoretic measure of an agent's influence on future states through its actions. To handle the unique challenges of text-based environments, we introduce EELMA (Estimating Empowerment of Language Model Agents), an algorithm for approximating effective empowerment from multi-turn text interactions. We demonstrate EELMA on textual games and realistic web and tool-use environments, showing that empowerment strongly correlates with average task performance. We further analyze how empowerment varies across models, environment complexity, and agent configurations, and show that high-empowerment states and actions often mark pivotal moments for general capabilities. These results establish empowerment as a goal-agnostic metric that complements task-success measures for LM-agent evaluation.
comment: Published at the International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2026. 9 pages, 9 figures; camera-ready version

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于信息论中 empowerment 的无目标评估框架 EELMA，用于衡量语言模型智能体通过行动影响未来状态的能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着语言模型智能体在真实应用中日益普及，需要可扩展的评估框架，但现有基准测试成本高昂且依赖人工设计。本文旨在提供一种无需任务特定目标的信息论度量，以补充传统任务成功率评估。
light_analysis.method: EELMA 算法通过多轮文本交互近似计算 empowerment，即智能体行动对未来状态的影响能力。在文本游戏和真实网络及工具使用环境中，将 empowerment 与平均任务性能进行相关性分析，并考察模型规模、环境复杂度等因素的影响。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明 empowerment 与平均任务性能强相关，且高 empowerment 的状态和动作常对应通用能力的关键时刻。该度量在不同模型、环境复杂度和代理配置下表现稳定。
light_analysis.conclusion: Empowerment 可作为目标无关的互补指标，用于评估语言模型智能体的通用能力，减少对人工设计基准的依赖。未来可探索其在更复杂环境中的应用及与可解释性的结合。

title: Benchmarking and Mitigating Sycophancy in Medical Vision Language Models
abstract: Visual language models (VLMs) have the potential to transform medical workflows. However, the deployment is limited by sycophancy. Despite this serious threat to patient safety, a systematic benchmark remains lacking. This paper addresses this gap by introducing a Medical benchmark that applies multiple templates to VLMs in a hierarchical medical visual question answering task. We find that current VLMs are highly susceptible to visual cues, with failure rates showing a correlation to model size or overall accuracy. we discover that perceived authority and user mimicry are powerful triggers, suggesting a bias mechanism independent of visual data. To overcome this, we propose a Visual Information Purification for Evidence based Responses (VIPER) strategy that proactively filters out non-evidence-based social cues, thereby reinforcing evidence based reasoning. VIPER reduces sycophancy while maintaining interpretability and consistently outperforms baseline methods, laying the necessary foundation for the robust and secure integration of VLMs.
comment: 19figures, 61pages. The first two authors contributed equally

light_analysis.overview: 针对医疗视觉语言模型中的谄媚问题，提出系统基准测试和缓解策略VIPER。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型在医疗领域应用潜力巨大，但谄媚行为威胁患者安全。现有研究缺乏系统基准测试，无法全面评估模型在视觉线索和社会性提示下的表现。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过分层医疗视觉问答任务揭示谄媚的触发机制。
light_analysis.method: 构建Medical benchmark，采用多种模板模拟分层医疗VQA场景。实验发现模型对视觉线索高度敏感，感知权威和用户模仿是强触发因素。为此提出VIPER策略，通过主动过滤非基于证据的社会线索，强化模型基于证据的推理，同时保持可解释性。
light_analysis.result: 当前VLMs在基准测试中失败率与模型大小或准确率相关，表明谄媚普遍存在。VIPER显著降低谄媚行为，并在多项指标上优于基线方法，验证了其有效性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: VIPER为医疗VLMs的鲁棒安全集成提供了基础，有效缓解谄媚风险。未来可扩展至更多模态和临床场景，并探索更细粒度的因果机制。

title: GRPO is Secretly a Process Reward Model
abstract: Process reward models (PRMs) allow for fine-grained credit assignment in reinforcement learning (RL), and seemingly contrast with outcome reward models (ORMs), which assign a single reward to an entire trajectory. However, we provide theoretical proof in this work that the Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) RL algorithm equipped with an ORM is in fact equivalent to a PRM-aware RL objective equipped with a non-trivial, Monte-Carlo-based PRM (given mild assumptions). Leveraging the framework of GRPO-as-a-PRM, we identify a flaw in the GRPO objective that interacts with imbalanced process steps and rewards to hinder both exploration and exploitation (under different conditions). We propose a simple modification to the algorithm to mitigate this defect ($λ$-GRPO), and show that LLMs tuned with $λ$-GRPO outperform LLMs tuned with standard GRPO on downstream reasoning tasks\textemdash and reach peak performance more rapidly. These results show that we can leverage the hidden, built-in PRM structure within the vanilla GRPO algorithm to boost model performance without employing an explicit PRM, and with a negligible impact on training time and cost.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示GRPO算法隐含过程奖励模型，提出改进版λ-GRPO以修复缺陷，提升推理任务性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 过程奖励模型(PRM)能进行细粒度信用分配，但通常需显式训练；结果奖励模型(ORM)简单却粗糙。本文发现GRPO算法搭配ORM时，理论上等价于使用蒙特卡洛PRM的PRM-aware目标，但该隐式PRM结构存在缺陷，因不均衡的过程步骤和奖励导致探索与利用受阻，亟需修正。
light_analysis.method: 通过理论证明GRPO与PRM-aware RL等价，揭示其内置PRM结构。识别GRPO目标中因步骤不平衡和奖励分布导致的缺陷，提出λ-GRPO：在GRPO损失函数中引入调节系数λ以平衡不同步骤的梯度贡献。该方法无需额外训练显式PRM，仅微小改动算法即可。
light_analysis.result: 在多个下游推理任务上，λ-GRPO训练的语言模型显著优于标准GRPO，且达到峰值性能所需训练步数更少。改进带来的计算开销可忽略不计，验证了利用隐式PRM结构提升效率的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文从理论上揭示了GRPO与PRM的等价性，并提供了实用改进λ-GRPO。该工作为强化学习中的奖励设计提供了新视角，表明可借助算法内在结构提升性能而不增加显式模型。未来可探索更精细的PRM提取方法或应用于其他RL算法。

title: Finding DoRI: Discovery of Retained Images in Diffusion Models
abstract: Text-to-image diffusion models (DMs) have achieved remarkable success in image generation. However, concerns about data privacy and intellectual property remain due to their potential to inadvertently memorize and replicate training data. Recent mitigation efforts have focused on identifying and pruning weights responsible for triggering verbatim training data replication, based on the assumption that memorization can be localized. We challenge this assumption and demonstrate that, even after such pruning, small perturbations to the text embeddings of previously mitigated prompts can re-trigger data replication, revealing the fragility of such methods. Our further analysis then provides multiple indications that memorization is indeed \textit{not} inherently local: (1) replication triggers for memorized images are distributed throughout text embedding space; (2) embeddings yielding the same replicated image produce divergent model activations; and (3) different pruning methods identify inconsistent sets of memorization-related weights for the same image. Finally, we show that bypassing the locality assumption enables more robust mitigation through adversarial fine-tuning. These findings provide new insights into the fundamental nature of memorization in text-to-image DMs and inform the future development of more reliable mitigation methods against DM memorization.

light_analysis.overview: 挑战扩散模型中记忆化可定位的假设，揭示记忆化的非局部本质，并提出更鲁棒的缓解方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型在图像生成中表现出色，但存在无意记忆和复制训练数据的隐私与知识产权问题。现有缓解方法基于记忆化可定位的假设，通过识别和剪枝触发权重的措施来减少数据复制。然而，这些方法的有效性存疑，需深入探究记忆化的真实本质。
light_analysis.method: 论文通过实验揭示记忆化并非局部性：1）记忆图像的复制触发点广泛分布于文本嵌入空间；2）产生相同复制图像的不同嵌入导致模型激活模式不同；3）不同剪枝方法识别出不一致的记忆化相关权重。最后，提出通过对抗性微调绕过局部性假设，实现更鲁棒的缓解。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，即使剪枝了触发权重的模型，对文本嵌入施加微小扰动仍可重新触发数据复制，证明现有缓解方法的脆弱性。对抗性微调方法能更有效地抑制记忆化，优于基于局部性假设的剪枝方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了扩散模型中记忆化的非局部本质，否定了现有缓解方法的基础假设。对抗性微调提供了更可靠的记忆化缓解途径，对未来开发隐私保护模型具有重要指导意义。局限性在于实验范围可能有限，未来可探索更通用的方法。

title: MENTOR: Efficient Multimodal-Conditioned Tuning for Autoregressive Vision Generation Models
abstract: Recent text-to-image models produce high-quality results but still struggle with precise visual control, balancing multimodal inputs, and requiring extensive training for complex multimodal image generation. To address these limitations, we propose MENTOR, a novel autoregressive (AR) framework for efficient Multimodal-conditioned Tuning for Autoregressive multimodal image generation. MENTOR combines an AR image generator with a two-stage training paradigm, enabling fine-grained, token-level alignment between multimodal inputs and image outputs without relying on auxiliary adapters or cross-attention modules. The two-stage training consists of: (1) a multimodal alignment stage that establishes robust pixel- and semantic-level alignment, followed by (2) a multimodal instruction tuning stage that balances the integration of multimodal inputs and enhances generation controllability. Despite modest model size, suboptimal base components, and limited training resources, MENTOR achieves strong performance on the DreamBench++ benchmark, outperforming competitive baselines in concept preservation and prompt following. Additionally, our method delivers superior image reconstruction fidelity, broad task adaptability, and improved training efficiency compared to diffusion-based methods. Dataset, code, and models are available at: https://github.com/HaozheZhao/MENTOR

light_analysis.overview: 提出MENTOR框架，一种高效的多模态条件调优自回归图像生成方法，实现细粒度token级对齐，无需辅助适配器或交叉注意力模块。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本到图像模型在精确视觉控制、多模态输入平衡和复杂多模态图像生成方面存在局限，且需要大量训练。为解决这些问题，MENTOR旨在通过两阶段训练范式提升对齐效率和生成可控性。
light_analysis.method: MENTOR采用自回归图像生成器与两阶段训练：第一阶段多模态对齐，建立像素和语义级对齐；第二阶段多模态指令调优，平衡多模态输入并增强可控性。无需辅助适配器或交叉注意力模块，直接实现token级对齐。
light_analysis.result: 在DreamBench++基准上，MENTOR在概念保留和提示跟随方面超越竞争基线。相比扩散方法，图像重建保真度更高，任务适应性更广，训练效率更高，尽管模型规模适中、基础组件非最优且资源有限。
light_analysis.conclusion: MENTOR展示了高效多模态条件调优自回归框架的有效性，实现了精确的视觉控制和多模态融合。该工作为多模态生成提供了新范式，代码和模型已开源，未来可拓展至更复杂生成任务。

title: SAGE: Segment-Aware Gloss-Free Encoding for Token-Efficient Sign Language Translation
abstract: Gloss-free Sign Language Translation (SLT) has advanced rapidly, achieving strong performances without relying on gloss annotations. However, these gains have often come with increased model complexity and high computational demands, raising concerns about scalability, especially as large-scale sign language datasets become more common. We propose a segment-aware visual tokenization framework that leverages sign segmentation to convert continuous video into discrete, sign-informed visual tokens. This reduces input sequence length by up to 50% compared to prior methods, resulting in up to 2.67x lower memory usage and better scalability on larger datasets. To bridge the visual and linguistic modalities, we introduce a token-to-token contrastive alignment objective, along with a dual-level supervision that aligns both language embeddings and intermediate hidden states. This improves fine-grained cross-modal alignment without relying on gloss-level supervision. Our approach notably exceeds the performance of state-of-the-art methods on the PHOENIX14T benchmark, while significantly reducing sequence length. Further experiments also demonstrate our improved performance over prior work under comparable sequence-lengths, validating the potential of our tokenization and alignment strategies.
comment: Accepted in International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV) Workshops. Code released at https://github.com/JianHe0628/SAGE

light_analysis.overview: 提出分段感知视觉标记化框架SAGE，大幅减少输入序列长度，提升无标注手语翻译的效率和可扩展性。
light_analysis.motivation: 无标注手语翻译（SLT）虽进展迅速，但现有方法模型复杂度高、计算需求大，限制了在大规模数据集上的可扩展性。急需一种既能保持高性能又能降低计算开销的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出SAGE框架，利用手语分段将连续视频转换为离散的视觉令牌，将输入序列长度减少50%。引入令牌级对比对齐目标和双级监督（语言嵌入和中间隐藏状态），实现细粒度跨模态对齐，无需依赖标注级别的监督。
light_analysis.result: 在PHOENIX14T基准上，SAGE超越现有最优方法，同时序列长度减少50%，内存使用降低2.67倍。在相近序列长度下，性能也优于先前工作，验证了令牌化和对齐策略的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SAGE通过分段令牌化和对比对齐，有效平衡了无标注SLT的性能与效率，为大规模手语数据上的可扩展翻译提供了新思路。未来可探索更细粒度的分段策略和更高效的令牌编码。

title: Model Fusion via Retrofitting
abstract: Model fusion seeks to combine independently trained neural networks into a single model without retraining, but is complicated by representational divergence arising from permutation invariance, random initialization, and heterogeneous training data. Existing methods struggle particularly in zero-shot settings under non-IID data distributions, and are often limited to specific architectures or pairwise fusion. We introduce a neuron-centric family of fusion algorithms that frames fusion as a principled representation-matching problem: intermediate neurons across parent models are grouped into target representations, which the fused model's corresponding sub-networks are then trained to approximate. Unlike prior work, our approach incorporates neuron attribution scores to bias alignment toward salient features, and can be applied to any architecture modularizable as a DAG of levels -- empirically validated on VGGs, ResNets, and ViTs. Experiments across standard benchmarks show consistent improvements over existing fusion methods, with the largest gains in zero-shot and non-IID scenarios. Code is available at https://github.com/AndrewSpano/model-fusion-via-retrofitting.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于神经元归因的模型融合方法，通过重塑将多个独立训练的神经网络融合为单一模型，适用于任意DAG架构。
light_analysis.motivation: 模型融合旨在将多个独立训练的神经网络合并为单一模型，无需重新训练，但面临表示分歧的挑战，如排列不变性、随机初始化和异构训练数据。现有方法在零样本和非独立同分布数据分布下表现不佳，且常限于特定架构或两两融合。因此，需要一种更通用、鲁棒的融合方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出神经元中心的重塑算法族，将融合视为表示匹配问题：将父模型中的中间神经元分组为目标表示，然后训练融合模型的对应子网络逼近这些表示。创新点包括使用神经元归因分数来偏向对齐重要特征，且适用于任何可模块化为有向无环图（DAG）层级的架构，在VGG、ResNet和ViT上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在标准基准测试中，该方法在零样本和非独立同分布场景下提升最大，一致优于现有融合方法。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但声称持续改进。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作提出了一种通用的模型融合框架，通过神经元归因和对齐解决了表示分歧问题，在多种架构和场景下有效。未来可探索更细粒度的归因策略或扩展到其他架构。局限性包括计算开销（需分组和训练子网络）。

title: TrojanTO: Action-Level Backdoor Attacks against Trajectory Optimization Models
abstract: Recent advances in Trajectory Optimization (TO) models have achieved remarkable success in offline reinforcement learning. However, their vulnerabilities against backdoor attacks are poorly understood. We find that existing backdoor attacks in reinforcement learning are based on reward manipulation, which are largely ineffective against the TO model due to its inherent sequence modeling nature. Moreover, the complexities introduced by high-dimensional action spaces further compound the challenge of action manipulation. To address these gaps, we propose TrojanTO, the first action-level backdoor attack against TO models. TrojanTO employs alternating training to enhance the connection between triggers and target actions for attack effectiveness. To improve attack stealth, it utilizes precise poisoning via trajectory filtering for normal performance and batch poisoning for trigger consistency. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that TrojanTO effectively implants backdoor attacks across diverse tasks and attack objectives with a low attack budget (0.3\% of trajectories). Furthermore, TrojanTO exhibits broad applicability to DT, GDT, and DC, underscoring its scalability across diverse TO model architectures.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个针对轨迹优化模型的动作级后门攻击方法TrojanTO，通过交替训练和精确投毒实现高效隐蔽攻击。
light_analysis.motivation: 轨迹优化模型在离线强化学习中表现优异，但其对后门攻击的脆弱性未被充分研究。现有后门攻击依赖奖励操纵，因序列建模特性对TO模型无效；高维动作空间增加了动作操纵难度。因此需要开发针对TO模型的有效后门攻击方法。
light_analysis.method: TrojanTO采用交替训练增强触发器与目标动作的关联，提升攻击有效性。通过轨迹过滤进行精确投毒以保持正常性能，同时利用批投毒保证触发器一致性。无需奖励操纵，直接作用于动作层，适用于多种TO模型架构如DT、GDT、DC。
light_analysis.result: 在多任务和多攻击目标下，TrojanTO能以极低攻击预算（0.3%轨迹）成功植入后门。与现有方法相比，攻击效果显著提升，且对DT、GDT、DC等不同架构具有良好可扩展性。摘要未明确对比基线性能数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: TrojanTO揭示了TO模型的安全漏洞，提供了首个动作级后门攻击基准。其高效隐蔽性对离线强化学习系统的安全性构成威胁，未来需开发相应的防御机制。局限性在于需假设攻击者能访问训练数据。

title: Dynamic Mixture of Progressive Parameter-Efficient Expert Library for Lifelong Robot Learning
abstract: A generalist agent must continuously learn and adapt throughout its lifetime, achieving efficient forward transfer while minimizing catastrophic forgetting. Previous work within the dominant pretrain-then-finetune paradigm has explored parameter-efficient fine-tuning for single-task adaptation, effectively steering a frozen pretrained model with a small number of parameters. However, in the context of lifelong learning, these methods rely on the impractical assumption of a test-time task identifier and restrict knowledge sharing among isolated adapters. To address these limitations, we propose Dynamic Mixture of Progressive Parameter-Efficient Expert Library (DMPEL) for lifelong robot learning. DMPEL progressively builds a low-rank expert library and employs a lightweight router to dynamically combine experts into an end-to-end policy, enabling flexible and efficient lifelong forward transfer. Furthermore, by leveraging the modular structure of the fine-tuned parameters, we introduce expert coefficient replay, which guides the router to accurately retrieve frozen experts for previously encountered tasks. This technique mitigates forgetting while being significantly more storage- and computation-efficient than experience replay over the entire policy. Extensive experiments on the lifelong robot learning benchmark LIBERO demonstrate that our framework outperforms state-of-the-art lifelong learning methods in success rates during continual adaptation, while utilizing minimal trainable parameters and storage.
comment: Accepted to Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR) at https://openreview.net/forum?id=MHVBrjS8cG . Code is available at https://github.com/HarryLui98/DMPEL

light_analysis.overview: 提出DMPEL框架，通过动态混合渐进式参数高效专家库实现终身机器人学习，无需任务标识符，在LIBERO基准上超越现有方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有终身学习方法在预训练-微调范式下依赖测试时任务标识符，限制了知识共享，导致灾难性遗忘。DMPEL旨在解决此问题，实现无需任务标识符的灵活前向迁移，同时缓解遗忘。
light_analysis.method: DMPEL逐步构建低秩专家库，使用轻量级路由器动态组合专家形成端到端策略。引入专家系数回放，指导路由器检索冻结专家处理已见任务，相比完整经验回放显著节省存储和计算，实现高效终身学习。
light_analysis.result: 在LIBERO终身机器人学习基准上，DMPEL在连续适应过程中成功率优于最先进的终身学习方法，同时使用最少的可训练参数和存储资源。
light_analysis.conclusion: DMPEL有效解决了终身学习中任务标识符依赖和知识共享问题，实现了高效前向迁移和抗遗忘。未来可探索更复杂的专家库构建策略及在更多机器人任务上的泛化性。

title: VRAG: Learning World Models for Interactive Video Generation
abstract: Foundational world models must be both interactive and preserve spatiotemporal coherence for effective future planning with action choices. However, present models for long video generation have limited inherent world modeling capabilities due to two main challenges: compounding errors and insufficient memory mechanisms. We enhance image-to-video models with interactive capabilities through additional action conditioning and autoregressive framework, and reveal that compounding error is inherently irreducible in autoregressive video generation, while insufficient memory mechanism leads to incoherence of world models. We propose video retrieval augmented generation (VRAG) with explicit global state conditioning, which significantly reduces long-term compounding errors and increases spatiotemporal consistency of world models. In contrast, naive autoregressive generation with extended context windows and retrieval-augmented generation prove less effective for video generation, primarily due to the limited in-context learning capabilities of current video models. Our work illuminates the fundamental challenges in video world models and establishes a comprehensive benchmark for improving video generation models with internal world modeling capabilities.
comment: Published at NeurIPS 2025. Project page: https://sites.google.com/view/vrag

light_analysis.overview: 提出视频检索增强生成（VRAG）方法，通过全局状态条件减少自回归视频生成中的累积误差，提升世界模型的时空一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频生成模型缺乏交互性和长时时空连贯性，主要由于累积误差和记忆不足两大挑战。自回归生成中的累积误差本质不可约减，而记忆不足导致世界模型不一致。这些问题限制了视频模型用于未来规划的能力，迫切需要增强视频模型的内在世界建模能力。
light_analysis.method: 将图像到视频模型扩展为交互式，通过附加动作条件和自回归框架实现。提出视频检索增强生成（VRAG），引入显式全局状态条件，从外部检索相关视频片段作为上下文，减少长期累积误差并增强时空一致性。与简单扩展上下文窗口或标准检索增强生成相比，VRAG更适用于视频生成。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确量化结果，但指出VRAG显著减少了长期累积误差，提高了世界模型的时空一致性。对比方法（如扩展上下文窗口、标准检索增强生成）在视频生成中效果较差，归因于当前视频模型有限的上下文学习能力。建立了综合基准以改进具有内在世界建模能力的视频生成模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了视频世界模型中的基本挑战（累积误差和记忆不足），并提供了VRAG作为有效解决方案。VRAG通过全局状态条件检索增强了时空连贯性，为交互式视频生成和未来规划提供了新范式。未来可探索更高效的检索机制和模型架构以进一步提升世界模型性能。

title: EPiC: Efficient Video Camera Control Learning with Precise Anchor-Video Guidance
abstract: Recent approaches for video generation with camera control often create anchor videos (i.e., rendered videos that approximate desired camera motions) to guide diffusion models as a structured prior, by rendering from estimated point clouds following camera trajectories. However, errors in point cloud and camera trajectory estimation often lead to inaccurate anchor videos with higher training cost and low efficiency, as the model is forced to compensate for rendering misalignments. To address these limitations, we introduce EPiC, an efficient and precise camera control learning framework that constructs well-aligned training anchor videos without the need for camera pose or point cloud estimation. Concretely, we create highly precise anchor videos by masking source videos based on first-frame visibility, which ensures strong alignment, eliminates the need for camera/point cloud estimation, and thus can be readily applied to any in-the-wild video. Furthermore, we introduce Anchor-ControlNet, a lightweight module that integrates anchor video guidance in visible regions to pretrained video diffusion models, with less than 1% of additional parameters. EPiC achieves efficient training with substantially fewer parameters, training steps, and less data, and generalizes robustly to anchor videos made with point clouds at test time, enabling precise 3D-informed camera control. EPiC achieves SoTA performance on RealEstate10K and MiraData for I2V camera control task. Notably, EPiC also exhibits strong zero-shot generalization to video-to-video (V2V) scenarios.
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026. Project website: https://zunwang1.github.io/Epic

light_analysis.overview: 提出EPiC框架，通过遮蔽源视频构建精确的锚视频，无需相机姿态或点云估计，实现高效精确的相机控制学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频生成相机控制方法依赖锚视频引导，但锚视频构建需点云和相机轨迹估计，易产生误差，导致训练成本高、效率低。因此，需要一种无需估计的高效精确框架，降低对齐误差和计算开销。
light_analysis.method: EPiC通过基于首帧可见性的掩码构建对齐的锚视频，避免点云/相机估计。引入Anchor-ControlNet轻量模块（参数增加<1%），将可见区域锚视频引导集成到预训练视频扩散模型中。在RealEstate10K和MiraData上训练，实现高效训练（少参数、少步骤、少数据）和鲁棒泛化。
light_analysis.result: 在RealEstate10K和MiraData上，针对图像到视频（I2V）相机控制任务达到最佳性能。训练参数、步骤和数据量显著减少，且零样本泛化到视频到视频（V2V）场景，证明其高效性和强泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: EPiC提供了一种高效精确的相机控制学习框架，无需额外估计模块，减少计算资源需求；在多个任务上取得最佳性能，具有学术和实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的相机运动或场景类型的扩展。

title: Connecting Independently Trained Modes via Layer-Wise Connectivity
abstract: Empirical studies have shown that continuous low-loss paths can be constructed between independently trained neural network models. This phenomenon, known as mode connectivity, refers to the existence of such paths between distinct modes-i.e., well-trained solutions in parameter space. However, existing empirical methods do not reliably connect independently trained modes and have been evaluated mainly on a narrow set of architectures (e.g., basic CNNs, VGG, and ResNet), leaving their effectiveness on newer models unclear. In this work, we propose a new empirical algorithm for connecting independently trained modes that generalizes beyond traditional architectures and supports a broader range of networks, including MobileNet, ShuffleNet, EfficientNet, RegNet, Deep Layer Aggregation (DLA), and Compact Convolutional Transformers (CCT). In addition to broader applicability, the proposed method yields more consistent connectivity paths across independently trained mode pairs and supports connecting modes obtained with different training hyperparameters.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种通用的层间连接算法，能够可靠地连接独立训练的神经网络模式，支持更广泛的现代架构。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有模式连接方法在连接独立训练的神经网络时可靠性不足，且仅对基本CNN、VGG、ResNet等传统架构有效，对MobileNet、EfficientNet等现代架构效果未知。由于模式连接有助于理解损失景观和模型融合，亟需一种能泛化到更广泛网络架构的可靠方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种新的经验算法，基于层间连接策略，通过在独立训练的模式之间逐层寻找低损失路径，并利用优化技术增强路径的连续性和低损失性。该方法支持连接包括MobileNet、ShuffleNet、EfficientNet、RegNet、DLA、CCT等在内的多种现代架构。
light_analysis.result: 相比现有方法，新算法在多种现代架构上均能更一致地构建低损失连接路径，且能连接使用不同训练超参数得到的模式。摘要未提供具体数据，但强调了更广泛的适用性和更高的可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作显著扩展了模式连接方法的适用范围，使其能够处理现代轻量级和变换器网络，为理解深度网络的损失景观和实现模型集成提供了更实用的工具。未来可进一步探索该方法在更大规模模型和迁移学习中的应用。

title: Neural Logistic Bandits
abstract: We study the problem of neural logistic bandits, where the main task is to learn an unknown reward function within a logistic link function using a neural network. Existing approaches either exhibit unfavorable dependencies on $κ$, where $1/κ$ represents the minimum variance of reward distributions, or suffer from direct dependence on the feature dimension $d$, which can be huge in neural network-based settings. In this work, we introduce a novel Bernstein-type inequality for self-normalized vector-valued martingales that is designed to bypass a direct dependence on the ambient dimension. This lets us deduce a regret upper bound that grows with the effective dimension $\widetilde{d}$, not the feature dimension, while keeping a minimal dependence on $κ$. Based on the concentration inequality, we propose two algorithms, NeuralLog-UCB-1 and NeuralLog-UCB-2, that guarantee regret upper bounds of order $\widetilde{O}(\widetilde{d}\sqrt{κT})$ and $\widetilde{O}(\widetilde{d}\sqrt{T/κ})$, respectively, improving on the existing results. Lastly, we report numerical results on both synthetic and real datasets to validate our theoretical findings.

light_analysis.overview: 针对神经逻辑赌博机问题，提出一种新型 Bernstein 不等式来避免对特征维度的直接依赖，从而得到基于有效维度的改进 regret 上界。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有神经逻辑赌博机方法要么对奖励分布最小方差倒数 κ 有不利依赖，要么直接依赖于特征维度 d，而在神经网络环境下 d 可能极大。这导致 regret 上界不理想，限制了实际应用。因此需要一种能够避免维度依赖、同时保持对 κ 最小依赖的方法。
light_analysis.method: 引入一种针对自归一化向量值鞅的新型 Bernstein 型不等式，其 regret 上界依赖于有效维度 ̃d 而非特征维度 d，并保持对 κ 的最小依赖。基于该不等式提出两个算法 NeuralLog-UCB-1 和 NeuralLog-UCB-2，分别实现 ̃O(̃d√(κT)) 和 ̃O(̃d√(T/κ)) 的 regret 上界。
light_analysis.result: NeuralLog-UCB-1 和 NeuralLog-UCB-2 的 regret 上界分别为 ̃O(̃d√(κT)) 和 ̃O(̃d√(T/κ))，显著优于现有结果。在合成数据集和真实数据集上的数值实验验证了理论分析与算法有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了解决神经逻辑赌博机中维度依赖问题的新方法，通过 Bernstein 不等式实现了基于有效维度的 regret 分析，具有重要理论价值。算法可应用于神经网络环境下的奖励学习，未来可探索更紧的 regret 界或扩展到其他链接函数。

title: CamC2V: Context-aware Controllable Video Generation
abstract: Recently, image-to-video (I2V) diffusion models have demonstrated impressive scene understanding and generative quality, incorporating image conditions to guide generation. However, these models primarily animate static images without extending beyond their provided context. Introducing additional constraints, such as camera trajectories, can enhance diversity but often degrade visual quality, limiting their applicability for tasks requiring faithful scene representation. We propose CamC2V, a context-to-video (C2V) model that integrates multiple image conditions as context with 3D constraints alongside camera control to enrich both global semantics and fine-grained visual details. This enables more coherent and context-aware video generation. Moreover, we motivate the necessity of temporal awareness for an effective context representation. Our comprehensive study on the RealEstate10K dataset demonstrates a $24.09\%$ (FVD) improvement in visual quality and camera controllability. Our code is publicly available at: https://github.com/LDenninger/CamC2V.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CamC2V，融合多图像上下文与3D约束及相机控制，实现高质量上下文感知视频生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图像到视频（I2V）扩散模型只能动画化静态图像，无法扩展上下文；引入相机轨迹等额外约束虽能增加多样性，但常降低视觉质量，限制了需要忠实场景表示的任务。因此需要一种能同时利用多图像上下文和相机控制、且保持高视觉质量的方法。
light_analysis.method: CamC2V是一种上下文到视频（C2V）模型，将多个图像条件作为上下文与3D约束集成，同时结合相机控制，以丰富全局语义和细粒度视觉细节。模型强调时间感知对有效上下文表示的必要性，通过扩散过程生成更连贯且上下文感知的视频。
light_analysis.result: 在RealEstate10K数据集上，CamC2V在视频质量（FVD）上提升了24.09%，同时实现了更好的相机可控性。相比仅使用图像条件或加入相机约束的基线方法，该方法在视觉保真度和控制精度上均有显著改善。
light_analysis.conclusion: CamC2V通过联合多图像上下文、3D约束和相机控制，有效提升了视频生成的连贯性和质量。该工作为需要精确场景表示和相机控制的应用（如自动驾驶、影视制作）提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的上下文融合机制。

title: Domain-Agnostic Feature Modulation for Semi-Supervised Domain Generalization
abstract: Semi-supervised domain generalization (SSDG) leverages a small fraction of labeled data alongside unlabeled data to enhance model generalization. Most of the existing SSDG methods rely on pseudo-labeling (PL) for unlabeled data, often assuming access to domain labels-a privilege not always available. However, domain shifts introduce domain noise, leading to inconsistent PLs that degrade model performance. Methods derived from FixMatch suffer particularly from lower PL accuracy, reducing the effectiveness of unlabeled data. To address this, we tackle the more challenging domain-label agnostic SSDG, where domain labels for unlabeled data are not available during training. First, we propose a feature modulation strategy that enhances class-discriminative features while suppressing domain-specific information. This modulation shifts features toward Similar Average Representations-a modified version of class prototypes-that are robust across domains, encouraging the classifier to distinguish between closely related classes and feature extractor to form tightly clustered, domain-invariant representations. Second, to mitigate domain noise and improve pseudo-label accuracy, we introduce a loss-scaling function that dynamically lowers the fixed confidence threshold for pseudo-labels, optimizing the use of unlabeled data. With these key innovations, our approach achieves significant improvements on four major domain generalization benchmarks-even without domain labels. We will make the code available.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无需域标签的半监督域泛化方法，通过特征调制和动态置信阈值提升伪标签质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有半监督域泛化方法通常依赖域标签进行伪标签生成，但在实际应用中域标签难以获取。域偏移导致伪标签不一致，降低模型性能。FixMatch等方法伪标签准确率低，未能充分利用无标签数据。因此，研究无域标签的半监督域泛化问题具有重要实践意义。
light_analysis.method: 提出特征调制策略，增强类别判别特征并抑制域特定信息，通过使特征向相似平均表示（类原型改进版）移动，鼓励分类器区分相近类别，特征提取器形成紧凑域不变表示。同时引入损失缩放函数，动态降低伪标签固定置信阈值，优化无标签数据利用。
light_analysis.result: 在四个主流域泛化基准上取得显著性能提升，即使没有域标签也优于现有方法。具体提升幅度摘要未明确说明，但声称显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究解决了半监督域泛化中域标签缺失的难题，通过特征调制和动态阈值策略有效提升伪标签质量与泛化性能。方法具有实际应用价值，可用于域标签不可得的场景。未来可探索更先进的动态阈值机制或扩展到多源域。

title: Soften the Mask: Adaptive Temporal Soft Mask for Efficient Dynamic Facial Expression Recognition
abstract: Dynamic Facial Expression Recognition (DFER) facilitates the understanding of psychological intentions through non-verbal communication. Existing methods struggle to manage irrelevant information, such as background noise and redundant semantics, which impacts both efficiency and effectiveness. In this work, we propose a novel supervised temporal soft masked autoencoder network for DFER, namely AdaTosk, which integrates a parallel supervised classification branch with the self-supervised reconstruction branch. The self-supervised reconstruction branch applies random binary hard mask to generate diverse training samples, encouraging meaningful feature representations in visible tokens. Meanwhile the classification branch employs an adaptive temporal soft mask to flexibly mask visible tokens based on their temporal significance. Its two key components, respectively of, class-agnostic and class-semantic soft masks, serve to enhance critical expression moments and reduce semantic redundancy over time. Extensive experiments conducted on widely-used benchmarks demonstrate that our AdaTosk remarkably reduces computational costs compared with current state-of-the-art methods while still maintaining competitive performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应时间软掩码网络AdaTosk，通过并行监督分类与自监督重建分支，减少计算成本并提升动态面部表情识别效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 动态面部表情识别面临背景噪声和语义冗余的挑战，现有方法难以高效处理不相关信息，导致性能与效率受限。现有自监督方法多采用硬掩码，无法灵活聚焦关键时间点。因此，需要一种能自适应管理时间信息的轻量级方法。
light_analysis.method: AdaTosk包含自监督重建分支，使用随机二进制硬掩码生成多样样本，鼓励可见令牌学习有意义特征；监督分类分支采用自适应时间软掩码，由类无关和类语义软掩码组成，分别增强关键表情时刻和减少时间冗余。两分支并行训练，实现特征学习与分类的协同优化。
light_analysis.result: 在多个广泛使用的基准数据集上，AdaTosk显著降低了计算成本，与当前最先进方法相比，虽未提供具体数值，但声称保持竞争性能。实验证明了其高效性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出AdaTosk，通过自适应时间软掩码平衡自监督与监督学习，实现高效动态表情识别。该方法在降低计算开销的同时维持高精度，为资源受限场景下的DFER提供新思路。未来可探索更复杂的软掩码策略或扩展至其他视频理解任务。

title: Robust and Efficient Writer-Independent IMU-Based Handwriting Recognition
abstract: Handwriting recognition (HWR) using inertial measurement unit (IMU) data remains challenging due to variations in writing styles and the limited availability of datasets. Previous approaches often struggle with handwriting from unseen writers, making writer-independent (WI) recognition a crucial yet difficult problem. This paper presents a model designed to improve WI HWR on IMU data, using a CNN encoder and BiLSTM-based decoder. Our approach demonstrates strong robustness to unseen handwriting styles, outperforming existing methods on the WI splits of both the public OnHW dataset and our word-based dataset, achieving character error rates (CERs) of 7.37% and 9.44%, and word error rates (WERs) of 15.12% and 32.17%, respectively. Robustness evaluation shows that our model maintains superior performance across different age groups, with knowledge learned from one group generalizing better to another compared to other approaches. Evaluation on our sentence-based dataset further demonstrates the potential for recognizing full sentences. Through comprehensive ablation studies, we show that our design choices achieve a strong balance between performance and efficiency. These findings support the development of more adaptable and scalable HWR systems for real-world applications.
comment: Accepted at iWOAR 2025. Published in Springer LNCS, 2026. Code available at https://github.com/jindongli24/REWI

light_analysis.overview: 提出了一个基于CNN编码器和BiLSTM解码器的模型，用于写作者无关的IMU手写体识别，在多个数据集上取得最优性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 手写体识别使用IMU数据时，写作风格变化大、数据集有限，现有方法对未见写作者泛化能力差。解决写作者无关识别问题对于实际应用至关重要，但现有方法难以处理风格多样性，导致性能下降。
light_analysis.method: 采用CNN编码器提取局部特征，BiLSTM解码器建模序列依赖。在公共OnHW数据集和自建词级数据集上训练，通过消融实验验证设计平衡了性能与效率。评估跨年龄组鲁棒性和句子级识别能力。
light_analysis.result: 在写作者无关划分上，字符错误率分别为7.37%（OnHW）和9.44%（自建词集），词错误率为15.12%和32.17%。跨年龄组泛化优于其他方法，句子级数据集进一步展示了全句识别潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 模型具备鲁棒性和高效性，能适应不同写作风格，为构建可扩展的IMU手写体识别系统提供了有效方案。未来可能探索更大规模数据集和实时应用。

title: A Composable Multimodal Framework for cine CMR-Text-Driven Prediction of Heart Failure Outcomes
abstract: Objective. Heart failure is one of the leading causes of death worldwide, with millions of deaths each year, according to data from the World Health Organization (WHO) and other public health agencies. While significant progress has been made in the field of heart failure, leading to improved survival rates and improvement of ejection fraction, there remains substantial unmet needs, due to the complexity and multifactorial characteristics. This study aims to propose and evaluate a composable strategy framework for assessment and treatment optimization in heart failure, designed to provide more holistic patient evaluation and management. Approach. The framework leverages multi-modal algorithms to analyze a comprehensive range of patient data, explicitly integrating cine cardiac magnetic resonance (cine CMR) sequences, structured clinical metrics (e.g., lab results, demographics), and unstructured textual records (e.g., medical history, prescriptions). By integrating these various data sources, our framework offers a more holistic evaluation and optimized treatment plan for patients. Main results. The multi-modal framework demonstrates superior accuracy in HF prognosis prediction compared to single-modal AI algorithms. Additionally, it enables a detailed evaluation of the impact of various pathological indicators on HF outcomes. Significance. By integrating heterogeneous clinical data in a systematic manner, this approach supports more comprehensive prognosis assessment and facilitates optimized, personalized treatment planning for heart failure patients.

light_analysis.overview: 提出可组合的多模态框架，整合cine CMR、结构化临床数据和非结构化文本，用于心衰预后预测和治疗优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 心衰是全球主要死因之一，尽管治疗有所进步，但其复杂性和多因素特征导致临床需求未满足。现有方法多依赖单模态数据，缺乏对患者整体状况的全面评估。本研究旨在通过整合多种数据源，实现更全面的风险评估和个性化治疗。
light_analysis.method: 框架采用多模态算法，同时处理cine CMR图像、结构化临床指标（如实验室结果、人口统计学）和非结构化文本记录（如病史、处方）。通过可组合方式融合异构数据，实现心衰预后预测和治疗方案优化，提供整体性评估。
light_analysis.result: 与单模态AI算法相比，该多模态框架在心衰预后预测上展现出更优的准确性。同时，能够详细评估不同病理指标对预后的影响，为临床决策提供依据。具体数值未在摘要中提及。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究通过系统整合多源临床数据，支持更全面的心衰预后评估，促进个性化治疗规划。具有临床应用潜力，但需进一步验证框架在不同人群中的泛化性和实时性。

title: Diffusion-based learning framework for Constrained Nonconvex Optimization with Weighted Bootstrapped Refinement
abstract: Recent advances in diffusion models show promising potential to accelerate nonconvex problem solving by leveraging their multimodality. However, most existing diffusion-based optimization approaches rely on supervised learning and lack a mechanism to enforce constraint satisfaction, which is required in real-world applications. In that case, we investigate and theoretically analyze the inherent problem of supervised diffusion solvers and identify the distributional misalignment problem, i.e., the generated solution distribution often exhibits low probability mass on the feasible region. To resolve this issue, we propose DiOpt, a new diffusion-based learning framework for constrained nonconvex optimization, which effectively learns the mapping from noise to the constraint region. Specifically, this framework operates in two distinct phases: an initial warm-start phase, implemented via supervised learning, followed by a bootstrapping training phase. This dual-phase architecture is designed to iteratively refine solutions, thereby improving the objective function with high constraint satisfaction. Finally, we also employ a solution selection technique in inference for better optimality. Notably, DiOpt is the first successful integration of the diffusion solver in constrained nonconvex optimization. Evaluations on diverse nonconvex tasks demonstrate the superiority of DiOpt in both optimality and constraint satisfaction. Our official page is released at https://dingsht.tech/diopt-webpage.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DiOpt，首个集成扩散模型与约束非凸优化的框架，通过双阶段训练和选择性推理解决分布不匹配问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有扩散模型优化方法依赖监督学习，缺乏约束满足机制，导致生成解在可行域上概率分布低（分布不匹配问题），无法满足实际应用中的约束要求。
light_analysis.method: DiOpt采用双阶段架构：1）监督学习的初始热启动阶段学习噪声到约束区域的初步映射；2）自举训练阶段迭代优化解，增强目标函数同时确保高约束满足。推理时使用解选择技术提升最优性。
light_analysis.result: 在多种非凸任务上，DiOpt在最优性和约束满足方面均优于现有方法，成为首个成功将扩散求解器应用于约束非凸优化的框架。
light_analysis.conclusion: DiOpt有效解决了监督扩散求解器的分布不匹配问题，为约束非凸优化提供了新范式，未来可扩展至更复杂约束场景。

title: Looking around you: external information enhances representations for event sequences
abstract: Representation learning produces models in different domains, such as store purchases, client transactions, and general people's behavior. However, such models for event sequences usually process each sequence in isolation, ignoring context from those that co-occur in time. This limitation is particularly problematic in domains with fast-evolving conditions, like finance and e-commerce, or when certain sequences lack recent events.   We develop a method that aggregates information from multiple user representations, augmenting a specific user's representation in a setting with multiple co-occurring event sequences, achieving better quality than processing each sequence independently. Our study considers diverse aggregation approaches, ranging from simple pooling techniques to Learnable attention aggregation, that can highlight more complex information flow among other users. The proposed methods operate on top of an existing encoder and support its efficient fine-tuning. Across nine diverse event sequence datasets (finance, e-commerce, entertainment, etc.) and downstream tasks, Learnable attention improves metric scores, both with and without fine-tuning, while mean pooling yields a smaller but still significant gain.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过聚合共现事件序列的上下文来增强序列表示，支持现有编码器微调。
light_analysis.motivation: 事件序列表示学习通常孤立处理每个序列，忽略时间上共现的其他序列的上下文，这在金融、电商等快速变化领域或序列缺乏近期事件时导致性能受限。现有方法无法利用用户间的信息流，表示质量不足。
light_analysis.method: 开发一种聚合多个用户表示的方法，从简单池化到可学习注意力机制，增强特定用户表示。该方法可加在现有编码器之上，支持高效微调，并在9个涵盖金融、电商、娱乐等领域的序列数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在9个多样化数据集的下游任务中，可学习注意力聚合在微调和未微调情况下均提升指标，平均池化也带来较小但显著的增益，表明聚合共现上下文能有效改善表示质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出通过聚合共现事件序列上下文来提升表示学习，方法简单有效。学术上探索了序列间的信息交互，实际可应用于金融、电商等快速变化场景。未来可研究更复杂的聚合或动态上下文。

title: A Quotient Homology Theory of Representation in Neural Networks
abstract: Previous research has proven that the set of maps implemented by neural networks with a ReLU activation function is identical to the set of piecewise linear continuous maps. Furthermore, such networks induce a hyperplane arrangement splitting the input domain of the network into convex polyhedra $G_J$ over which a network $Φ$ operates in an affine manner.   In this work, we leverage these properties to define an equivalence relation $\sim_Φ$ on top of an input dataset, which defines a quotient space that can be split into two sets related to the local rank of $Φ_J$ and the intersections $\cap \text{Im}Φ_{J_i}$. We refer to the latter as the \textit{overlap decomposition} $\mathcal{O}_Φ$ and prove that if the intersections between each polyhedron and an input manifold are convex, the homology groups of neural representations are isomorphic to quotient homology groups $H_k(Φ(\mathcal{M})) \simeq H_k(\mathcal{M}/\mathcal{O}_Φ)$. This lets us intrinsically calculate the Betti numbers of neural representations without the choice of an external metric. We develop methods to numerically compute the overlap decomposition through linear programming and a union-find algorithm.   Using this framework, we perform several experiments on toy datasets showing that, compared to standard persistent homology, our overlap homology-based computation of Betti numbers tracks purely topological rather than geometric features. Finally, we study the evolution of the overlap decomposition during training on several classification problems and discuss some shortcomings of our method.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于商同调理论的神经网络表示分析方法，通过重叠分解实现无需外部度量的贝蒂数计算。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经网络实现分段线性连续映射，其输入域被超平面划分为凸多面体区域，每个区域上网络以仿射方式操作。现有方法如持续同调依赖外部度量，难以区分纯拓扑特征与几何特征，需要一种内在的拓扑分析方法来研究神经网络的表示特性。
light_analysis.method: 基于神经网络的分段线性特性，定义输入数据集上的等价关系构建商空间，提出重叠分解并证明当输入流形与多面体交为凸时，神经表示的同调群与商同调群同构。通过线性规划和并查集算法数值计算重叠分解。
light_analysis.result: 在玩具数据集上的实验表明，基于重叠同调计算的贝蒂数相比标准持续同调更关注纯拓扑特征而非几何特征。研究了训练过程中重叠分解的演化，分析了方法的局限性，如可扩展性和适用性不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献在于提供了一个无需外部度量的神经网络表示拓扑分析框架，具有理论价值，可应用于理解网络的内部表征。但方法在计算复杂度和适用范围上存在局限，未来需改进算法以处理更大规模数据。

title: Learning Locally, Revising Globally: Global Reviser for Federated Learning with Noisy Labels
abstract: Conventional federated learning (FL) heavily depends on high-quality labels, which are often impractical in the real world, leading to the federated label-noise (F-LN) problem. Worse still, the F-LN problem is exacerbated by the heterogeneity of FL, whereas clients experience different label-noise types, ratios, and data distribution. In this study, we first observe an intriguing phenomenon that the global model of FL exhibits a slow memorization of noisy labels, suggesting its ability to maintain reliable predictions and robust representations in FL. Motivated by this, we propose a novel method termed Federated Global Reviser (\method), a straightforward yet effective method comprising three modules that collaboratively rectify noisy labels and regularize local training. By exploiting this inherent property, \method\ improves the label-noise robustness of FL in a self-contained manner. Extensive experiments on three widely used F-LN benchmarks demonstrate the superior performance of FedGR, consistently outperforming eight state-of-the-art baselines even in severe label-noise and data heterogeneity. Code: https://github.com/cs-yuxintian/FedGR-ICML26

light_analysis.overview: 提出FedGR方法，利用联邦学习全局模型对噪声标签的慢记忆特性，通过三个模块协同修正噪声标签并正则化局部训练，有效应对标签噪声和数据异构问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦学习在实践中常面临标签噪声问题，且因客户端间标签噪声类型、比例和数据分布不同而加剧。现有方法未充分挖掘全局模型对噪声标签记忆缓慢的特性。该研究观察到全局模型能保持可靠预测和鲁棒表征，启发提出自包含的标签噪声鲁棒方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Federated Global Reviser (FedGR)，包含三个模块：利用全局模型不易记忆噪声的特性修正噪声标签；通过正则化约束局部训练防止过拟合；协同工作以提升整体鲁棒性。在三个联邦标签噪声基准上评估，无需额外监督信号。
light_analysis.result: 在三个广泛使用的联邦标签噪声基准上，FedGR在严重标签噪声和数据异构条件下均优于8个最先进基线方法（未提供具体数值），展示了卓越的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: FedGR通过利用全局模型的固有特性有效解决了联邦学习中的标签噪声问题，方法简洁有效。实验证明其优越性，代码已开源。未来可探索更复杂的噪声场景及与其他联邦学习技术的结合。

title: Looking Beyond Text: Reducing Language bias in Large Vision-Language Models via Multimodal Dual-Attention and Soft-Image Guidance
abstract: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) have achieved impressive results in various vision-language tasks. However, despite showing promising performance, LVLMs suffer from hallucinations caused by language bias, leading to diminished focus on images and ineffective visual comprehension. We identify two primary reasons for this bias: 1. Different scales of training data between the pretraining stage of LLM and multimodal alignment stage. 2. The learned inference bias due to short-term dependency of text data. Therefore, we propose LACING, a systemic framework designed to address the language bias of LVLMs with muLtimodal duAl-attention meChanIsm (MDA) aNd soft-image Guidance (IFG). Specifically, MDA introduces a parallel dual-attention mechanism that enhances the integration of visual inputs across the model. IFG introduces a learnable soft visual prompt during training and inference to replace visual inputs, designed to compel LVLMs to prioritize text inputs. Then, IFG further proposes a novel decoding strategy using the soft visual prompt to mitigate the model's over-reliance on adjacent text inputs. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that our method effectively debiases LVLMs from their language bias, enhancing visual comprehension and reducing hallucinations without requiring additional training resources or data. The code and model are available at [lacing-lvlm.github.io](https://lacing-lvlm.github.io).

light_analysis.overview: 提出LACING框架，通过多模态双注意力机制和软图像引导减少大视觉语言模型的语言偏差与幻觉。
light_analysis.motivation: 大视觉语言模型因语言偏差产生幻觉，根源在于LLM预训练与多模态对齐阶段数据规模差异，以及文本短期依赖导致的推理偏差。这一问题削弱了模型对图像的关注和视觉理解能力，亟需系统性解决。
light_analysis.method: LACING框架包含多模态双注意力机制（MDA）和软图像引导（IFG）。MDA通过并行双注意力增强视觉输入整合；IFG在训练和推理时引入可学习软视觉提示，强制模型优先处理文本，并设计新解码策略减少对相邻文本的过度依赖。无需额外训练数据或资源。
light_analysis.result: 综合实验表明，该方法有效减少语言偏差，增强视觉理解，降低幻觉率，且无需额外训练资源或数据。具体性能提升数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: LACING系统性解决了LVLMs的语言偏差问题，提升了视觉理解并减少幻觉，具有重要学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可探索更高效的注意力机制或扩展至更多任务。

title: Certified Causal Defense with Generalizable Robustness
abstract: While machine learning models have proven effective across various scenarios, it is widely acknowledged that many models are vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Recently, there have emerged numerous efforts in adversarial defense. Among them, certified defense is well known for its theoretical guarantees against arbitrary adversarial perturbations on input within a certain range (e.g., $l_2$ ball). However, most existing works in this line struggle to generalize their certified robustness in other data domains with distribution shifts. This issue is rooted in the difficulty of eliminating the negative impact of spurious correlations on robustness in different domains. To address this problem, in this work, we propose a novel certified defense framework GLEAN, which incorporates a causal perspective into the generalization problem in certified defense. More specifically, our framework integrates a certifiable causal factor learning component to disentangle the causal relations and spurious correlations between input and label, and thereby exclude the negative effect of spurious correlations on defense. On top of that, we design a causally certified defense strategy to handle adversarial attacks on latent causal factors. In this way, our framework is not only robust against malicious noises on data in the training distribution but also can generalize its robustness across domains with distribution shifts. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets validate the superiority of our framework in certified robustness generalization in different data domains. Code is available in the supplementary materials.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GLEAN框架，从因果视角增强认证防御的跨域泛化鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的认证防御方法虽然能在特定分布下提供理论保证的鲁棒性，但在面对数据域分布偏移时，其鲁棒性难以泛化。这主要是因为模型在训练中学习了输入和标签之间的虚假相关性，导致在不同域中鲁棒性下降。因此，需要一种能消除虚假相关影响、提升跨域鲁棒性泛化能力的方法。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出GLEAN框架，整合可认证的因果因子学习组件，用于解耦输入与标签之间的因果关系和虚假相关性，从而排除虚假相关对防御的负面影响。在此基础上，设计了一种因果认证防御策略，专门针对潜在因果因子上的对抗攻击进行防御。该框架通过因果视角重新审视鲁棒性泛化问题，使得模型不仅在训练分布下对恶意噪声鲁棒，还能在分布偏移的域中泛化鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在基准数据集上的大量实验验证了GLEAN框架在跨数据域的认证鲁棒性泛化方面的优越性。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称其性能优于现有方法。代码已在补充材料中公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: GLEAN框架通过引入因果视角有效解决了认证防御在分布偏移下的泛化问题，其核心贡献在于将因果因子学习与认证防御结合，提升了模型在不同域中的鲁棒性。该工作为鲁棒性泛化提供了新思路，潜在应用包括需要高可靠性的安全敏感场景。未来可探索更复杂的因果结构或扩展到其他攻击类型。

title: Early Detection of Misinformation for Infodemic Management: A Domain Adaptation Approach
abstract: An infodemic refers to an enormous amount of true information and misinformation disseminated during a disease outbreak. Detecting misinformation at the early stage of an infodemic is key to reduce its harm to public health. An early stage infodemic is characterized by a large volume of unlabeled information concerning a disease. As a result, conventional misinformation detection methods are not suitable for this misinformation detection task because they rely on labeled information in the infodemic domain to train their models. To address this limitation, state-of-the-art methods learn their models using labeled information in other domains to detect misinformation in the infodemic domain. The efficacy of these methods depends on their ability to mitigate both covariate shift (i.e., differences in feature distributions) and concept shift (i.e., differences in labeling patterns) between the infodemic domain and the domains from which they leverage labeled information. However, these methods focus on mitigating covariate shift but overlook concept shift, rendering them less effective for the task. In response, we theoretically show the necessity of tackling both covariate and concept shifts as well as how to operationalize each of them. Built on the theoretical analysis, we develop a novel misinformation detection method that addresses both covariate and concept shifts. Using real-world datasets, we conduct extensive empirical evaluations to demonstrate the superior performance of our method over state-of-the-art misinformation detection methods as well as prevalent domain adaptation methods that can be tailored to solve the misinformation detection task.

light_analysis.overview: 提出同时处理协变量偏移和概念偏移的域适应方法，用于早期疫情信息疫情中的错误信息检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 在疫情信息疫情早期，检测错误信息对公共卫生至关重要，但面临大量无标注数据。现有方法利用其他域标注数据但仅关注协变量偏移，忽视概念偏移，导致效果不佳。因此需要一种能同时处理两种偏移的方法。
light_analysis.method: 通过理论分析证明同时处理协变量偏移和概念偏移的必要性，并设计实现方案。开发的新方法结合两者，利用其他域标注数据检测目标域错误信息，通过专用策略缓解数据分布和标注模式的差异。
light_analysis.result: 在真实数据集上的实验表明，新方法在错误信息检测任务上显著优于现有方法及可定制的域适应技术，验证了同时处理两种偏移的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法填补了现有域适应在错误信息检测中忽视概念偏移的空白，提升了早期检测性能。学术上丰富了域适应理论，实践上可应用于公共卫生事件的信息管理。摘要未涉及局限性。

title: Matrix Completion with Hypergraphs:Sharp Thresholds and Efficient Algorithms
abstract: This paper considers the problem of completing a rating matrix based on sub-sampled matrix entries as well as observed social graphs and hypergraphs. We show that there exists a \emph{sharp threshold} on the sample probability for the task of exactly completing the rating matrix -- the task is achievable when the sample probability is above the threshold, and is impossible otherwise -- demonstrating a phase transition phenomenon. The threshold can be expressed as a function of the ``quality'' of hypergraphs, enabling us to \emph{quantify} the amount of reduction in sample probability due to the exploitation of hypergraphs. This also highlights the usefulness of hypergraphs in the matrix completion problem. En route to discovering the sharp threshold, we develop a computationally efficient matrix completion algorithm that effectively exploits the observed graphs and hypergraphs. Theoretical analyses show that our algorithm succeeds with high probability as long as the sample probability exceeds the aforementioned threshold, and this theoretical result is further validated by synthetic experiments. Moreover, our experiments on a real social network dataset (with both graphs and hypergraphs) show that our algorithm outperforms other state-of-the-art matrix completion algorithms.

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用超图信息实现矩阵补全的尖锐阈值理论及高效算法，证明超图可降低采样概率阈值。
light_analysis.motivation: 矩阵补全常依赖随机采样，但实际场景中可获取社交图和超图等辅助信息。现有方法未能量化超图对采样概率的降低程度，且缺乏理论阈值分析。本文旨在揭示超图质量与可补全性之间的相变现象，为高效利用结构信息提供理论依据。
light_analysis.method: 论文建立超图增强的矩阵补全模型，推导出精确补全的采样概率尖锐阈值，该阈值与超图质量相关。提出一种计算高效算法，有效融合图与超图结构，理论证明当采样概率超过阈值时算法高概率成功。实验采用人工合成数据及真实社交网络数据集验证。
light_analysis.result: 合成实验验证了理论阈值的存在性；在真实社交网络数据上，所提算法优于其他先进矩阵补全方法，表明超图信息能显著降低所需样本量。算法在阈值以上成功恢复矩阵，且性能提升与超图质量正相关。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文从理论上揭示了超图辅助矩阵补全的相变现象，首次量化超图对采样概率的减少作用。提出的高效算法兼具理论保证与实际优越性，为社交推荐等应用提供了新思路。未来可探索超图噪声场景及动态超图扩展。

title: Promoting Generalization for Exact Solvers via Adversarial Instance Augmentation
abstract: Machine learning has been successfully applied to improve the efficiency of Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MILP) solvers. However, the learning-based solvers often suffer from severe performance degradation on unseen MILP instances -- especially on large-scale instances from a perturbed environment -- due to the limited diversity of training distributions. To tackle this problem, we propose a novel approach, which is called Adversarial Instance Augmentation and does not require to know the problem type for new instance generation, to promote data diversity for learning-based branching modules in the branch-and-bound (B&B) Solvers (AdaSolver). We use the bipartite graph representations for MILP instances and obtain various perturbed instances to regularize the solver by augmenting the graph structures with a learned augmentation policy. The major technical contribution of AdaSolver is that we formulate the non-differentiable instance augmentation as a contextual bandit problem and adversarially train the learning-based solver and augmentation policy, enabling efficient gradient-based training of the augmentation policy. To the best of our knowledge, AdaSolver is the first general and effective framework for understanding and improving the generalization of both imitation-learning-based (IL-based) and reinforcement-learning-based (RL-based) B&B solvers. Extensive experiments demonstrate that by producing various augmented instances, AdaSolver leads to a remarkable efficiency improvement across various distributions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AdaSolver，通过对抗性实例增强提升分支定界求解器的泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 学习型MILP求解器在未见实例上性能严重下降，尤其在大规模扰动环境下，因为训练分布多样性有限。现有方法通常需要预知问题类型，难以生成多样化的新实例。
light_analysis.method: 使用二部图表示MILP实例，通过增强图结构并学习增强策略来正则化求解器。将不可微的实例增强建模为上下文赌博机问题，对抗训练求解器和增强策略，实现高效的基于梯度的训练。
light_analysis.result: 广泛实验表明，AdaSolver通过生成各种增强实例，在不同分布上显著提升了求解效率，适用于模仿学习和强化学习基的分支定界求解器。
light_analysis.conclusion: AdaSolver是首个通用且有效的泛化改进框架，适用于IL和RL基分支定界求解器。它通过对抗性实例增强提升数据多样性，但可能对噪声敏感，未来可探索更高效的策略学习。
